authors_text: Zihao Ye,Ruihang Lai,Junru Shao,Tianqi Chen,Luis Ceze
title: SparseTIR: Composable Abstractions for Sparse Compilation in Deep Learning
title_zh: SparseTIR：深度学习中稀疏编译的可组合抽象
comment: To appear at ASPLOS 2023 (19 pages, 23 figures), source code available at https://github.com/uwsampl/sparsetir, artifact available at https://github.com/uwsampl/sparsetir-artifact
comments: To appear at ASPLOS 2023 (19 pages, 23 figures), source code available at https://github.com/uwsampl/sparsetir, artifact available at https://github.com/uwsampl/sparsetir-artifact
abstract: Sparse tensors are rapidly becoming critical components of modern deep learning workloads. However, developing high-performance sparse operators can be difficult and tedious, and existing vendor libraries cannot satisfy the escalating demands from new operators. Sparse tensor compilers simplify the development of operators, but efficient sparse compilation for deep learning remains challenging because a single sparse format cannot maximize hardware efficiency, and single-shot compilers cannot keep up with latest hardware and system advances. In this paper, we observe that the key to addressing both these challenges is to leverage composable formats and composable transformations. We propose SparseTIR, a sparse tensor compilation abstraction that offers composable formats and composable transformations for deep learning workloads. SparseTIR constructs a search space over these composable components for performance tuning. With these improvements, SparseTIR obtains consistent performance speedups vs vendor libraries on GPUs for single operators: 1.20-2.34x for GNN operators, 1.05-2.98x for sparse attention operators, and 0.56-7.45x for sparse convolution operators. SparseTIR also accelerates end-to-end GNNs by 1.08-1.52x for GraphSAGE training, and 4.20-40.18x for RGCN inference.

In this paper, we observe that the key to addressing both these challenges is to leverage composable formats and composable transformations. We propose SparseTIR, a sparse tensor compilation abstraction that offers composable formats and composable transformations for deep learning workloads. SparseTIR constructs a search space over these composable components for performance tuning. With these improvements, SparseTIR obtains consistent performance speedups vs vendor libraries on GPUs for single operators: 1.20-2.34x for GNN operators, 1.05-2.98x for sparse attention operators, and 0.56-7.45x for sparse convolution operators. SparseTIR also accelerates end-to-end GNNs by 1.08-1.52x for GraphSAGE training, and 4.20-40.18x for RGCN inference.
abstract_zh: 稀疏张量正在迅速成为现代深度学习工作负载的关键组成部分。然而，开发高性能稀疏算子可能既困难又乏味，而且现有的供应商库无法满足新算子不断增长的需求。稀疏张量编译器简化了算子的开发，但深度学习的高效稀疏编译仍然具有挑战性，因为单一稀疏格式无法最大限度地提高硬件效率，并且单次编译器无法跟上最新的硬件和系统进步。在本文中，我们发现解决这两个挑战的关键是利用可组合格式和可组合转换。我们提出了 SparseTIR，这是一种稀疏张量编译抽象，可为深度学习工作负载提供可组合格式和可组合转换。 SparseTIR 在这些可组合组件上构建搜索空间以进行性能调整。通过这些改进，与 GPU 上的供应商库相比，SparseTIR 对于单个算子获得了一致的性能加速：GNN 算子为 1.20-2.34 倍，稀疏注意力算子为 1.05-2.98 倍，稀疏卷积算子为 0.56-7.45 倍。 SparseTIR 还将 GraphSAGE 训练的端到端 GNN 加速了 1.08-1.52 倍，将 RGCN 推理加速了 4.20-40.18 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SparseTIR的稀疏张量编译抽象，用于解决深度学习中稀疏计算的性能问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的稀疏张量库无法满足新兴操作符的需求，且单一稀疏格式和编译器难以最大化硬件效率并适应最新的硬件和系统发展。
AI.method: 通过引入可组合的稀疏格式和可组合的转换方法，SparseTIR构建了一个用于性能调优的搜索空间。
AI.result: SparseTIR在GPU上实现了与供应商库相比的性能提升，包括GNN操作符1.20-2.34倍、稀疏注意力操作符1.05-2.98倍、稀疏卷积操作符0.56-7.45倍的加速。
AI.conclusion: SparseTIR通过可组合的抽象方法有效提升了稀疏计算的性能，为深度学习中的稀疏操作提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Xinyu Lyu,Lianli Gao,Pengpeng Zeng,Heng Tao Shen,Jingkuan Song
title: Adaptive Fine-Grained Predicates Learning for Scene Graph Generation
title_zh: 用于场景图生成的自适应细粒度谓词学习
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2204.02597
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2204.02597
abstract: The performance of current Scene Graph Generation (SGG) models is severely hampered by hard-to-distinguish predicates, e.g., woman-on/standing on/walking on-beach. As general SGG models tend to predict head predicates and re-balancing strategies prefer tail categories, none of them can appropriately handle hard-to-distinguish predicates. To tackle this issue, inspired by fine-grained image classification, which focuses on differentiating hard-to-distinguish objects, we propose an Adaptive Fine-Grained Predicates Learning (FGPL-A) which aims at differentiating hard-to-distinguish predicates for SGG. First, we introduce an Adaptive Predicate Lattice (PL-A) to figure out hard-to-distinguish predicates, which adaptively explores predicate correlations in keeping with model's dynamic learning pace. Practically, PL-A is initialized from SGG dataset, and gets refined by exploring model's predictions of current mini-batch. Utilizing PL-A, we propose an Adaptive Category Discriminating Loss (CDL-A) and an Adaptive Entity Discriminating Loss (EDL-A), which progressively regularize model's discriminating process with fine-grained supervision concerning model's dynamic learning status, ensuring balanced and efficient learning process. Extensive experimental results show that our proposed model-agnostic strategy significantly boosts performance of benchmark models on VG-SGG and GQA-SGG datasets by up to 175% and 76% on Mean Recall@100, achieving new state-of-the-art performance. Moreover, experiments on Sentence-to-Graph Retrieval and Image Captioning tasks further demonstrate practicability of our method.
summary: The performance of current Scene Graph Generation (SGG) models is severely hampered by hard-to-distinguish predicates, e.g., woman-on/standing on/walking on-beach. As general SGG models tend to predict head predicates and re-balancing strategies prefer tail categories, none of them can appropriately handle hard-to-distinguish predicates. To tackle this issue, inspired by fine-grained image classification, which focuses on differentiating hard-to-distinguish objects, we propose an Adaptive Fine-Grained Predicates Learning (FGPL-A) which aims at differentiating hard-to-distinguish predicates for SGG. First, we introduce an Adaptive Predicate Lattice (PL-A) to figure out hard-to-distinguish predicates, which adaptively explores predicate correlations in keeping with model's dynamic learning pace. Practically, PL-A is initialized from SGG dataset, and gets refined by exploring model's predictions of current mini-batch. Utilizing PL-A, we propose an Adaptive Category Discriminating Loss (CDL-A) and an Adaptive Entity Discriminating Loss (EDL-A), which progressively regularize model's discriminating process with fine-grained supervision concerning model's dynamic learning status, ensuring balanced and efficient learning process. Extensive experimental results show that our proposed model-agnostic strategy significantly boosts performance of benchmark models on VG-SGG and GQA-SGG datasets by up to 175% and 76% on Mean Recall@100, achieving new state-of-the-art performance. Moreover, experiments on Sentence-to-Graph Retrieval and Image Captioning tasks further demonstrate practicability of our method.
abstract_zh: 当前场景图生成（SGG）模型的性能受到难以区分的谓词的严重阻碍，例如女人在/站在/在海滩上行走。由于一般的 SGG 模型倾向于预测头部谓词，而重新平衡策略更喜欢尾部类别，因此它们都不能正确处理难以区分的谓词。为了解决这个问题，受细粒度图像分类（专注于区分难以区分的对象）的启发，我们提出了一种自适应细粒度谓词学习（FGPL-A），旨在区分 SGG 的难以区分的谓词。首先，我们引入自适应谓词格（PL-A）来找出难以区分的谓词，它自适应地探索谓词相关性以与模型的动态学习速度保持一致。实际上，PL-A 是从 SGG 数据集初始化的，并通过探索模型对当前小批量的预测进行细化。利用PL-A，我们提出了自适应类别判别损失（CDL-A）和自适应实体判别损失（EDL-A），通过对模型动态学习状态的细粒度监督，逐步规范模型的判别过程，确保平衡和高效的学习过程。大量的实验结果表明，我们提出的模型无关策略将 VG-SGG 和 GQA-SGG 数据集上的基准模型的性能在 Mean Recall@100 上显着提高了 175% 和 76%，实现了新的最先进的性能。此外，句子到图检索和图像描述任务的实验进一步证明了我们方法的实用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自适应细粒度谓词学习方法（FGPL-A），用于解决场景图生成（SGG）中难以区分的谓词预测问题。
AI.motivation: 现有SGG模型在处理如'woman-on/standing on/walking on-beach'等易混淆谓词时表现不佳，通用模型偏向预测头部谓词，再平衡策略偏向尾部类别，均无法有效处理此类问题。
AI.method: 引入自适应谓词格（PL-A）动态挖掘谓词关联，并基于模型学习状态设计自适应类别区分损失（CDL-A）和实体区分损失（EDL-A），通过细粒度监督实现平衡高效学习。
AI.result: 在VG-SGG和GQA-SGG数据集上，基准模型的Mean Recall@100分别提升175%和76%，达到新SOTA；方法在句图检索和图像 caption 任务中也表现出实践价值。
AI.conclusion: 该模型无关策略有效解决了SGG中易混淆谓词问题，其自适应学习框架具有跨任务应用潜力。

authors_text: Nathan J. Kong,Chuanzheng Li,Aaron M. Johnson
title: Hybrid iLQR Model Predictive Control for Contact Implicit Stabilization on Legged Robots
title_zh: 用于腿式机器人接触隐式稳定的混合 iLQR 模型预测控制
comment: in IEEE Transactions on Robotics, 2023. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2103.14584
comments: in IEEE Transactions on Robotics, 2023. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2103.14584
abstract: Model Predictive Control (MPC) is a popular strategy for controlling robots but is difficult for systems with contact due to the complex nature of hybrid dynamics. To implement MPC for systems with contact, dynamic models are often simplified or contact sequences fixed in time in order to plan trajectories efficiently. In this work, we extend Hybrid iterative Linear Quadratic Regulator to work in a MPC fashion (HiLQR MPC) by 1) modifying how the cost function is computed when contact modes do not align, 2) utilizing parallelizations when simulating rigid body dynamics, and 3) using efficient analytical derivative computations of the rigid body dynamics. The result is a system that can modify the contact sequence of the reference behavior and plan whole body motions cohesively -- which is crucial when dealing with large perturbations. HiLQR MPC is tested on two systems: first, the hybrid cost modification is validated on a simple actuated bouncing ball hybrid system. Then HiLQR MPC is compared against methods that utilize centroidal dynamic assumptions on a quadruped robot (Unitree A1). HiLQR MPC outperforms the centroidal methods in both simulation and hardware tests.
summary: Model Predictive Control (MPC) is a popular strategy for controlling robots but is difficult for systems with contact due to the complex nature of hybrid dynamics. To implement MPC for systems with contact, dynamic models are often simplified or contact sequences fixed in time in order to plan trajectories efficiently. In this work, we extend Hybrid iterative Linear Quadratic Regulator to work in a MPC fashion (HiLQR MPC) by 1) modifying how the cost function is computed when contact modes do not align, 2) utilizing parallelizations when simulating rigid body dynamics, and 3) using efficient analytical derivative computations of the rigid body dynamics. The result is a system that can modify the contact sequence of the reference behavior and plan whole body motions cohesively -- which is crucial when dealing with large perturbations. HiLQR MPC is tested on two systems: first, the hybrid cost modification is validated on a simple actuated bouncing ball hybrid system. Then HiLQR MPC is compared against methods that utilize centroidal dynamic assumptions on a quadruped robot (Unitree A1). HiLQR MPC outperforms the centroidal methods in both simulation and hardware tests.
abstract_zh: 模型预测控制（MPC）是一种流行的机器人控制策略，但由于混合动力学的复杂性，对于接触系统来说很难。为了对接触系统实施 MPC，通常会简化动态模型或及时固定接触序列，以便有效地规划轨迹。在这项工作中，我们通过以下方式扩展混合迭代线性二次调节器以 MPC 方式 (HiLQR MPC) 工作：1) 修改接触模式不对齐时成本函数的计算方式，2) 在模拟刚体动力学时利用并行化，以及 3) 使用刚体动力学的高效分析导数计算。结果是一个可以修改参考行为的接触序列并一致地规划全身运动的系统——这在处理大扰动时至关重要。 HiLQR MPC 在两个系统上进行了测试：首先，在简单的驱动弹跳球混合系统上验证了混合成本修改。然后将 HiLQR MPC 与在四足机器人 (Unitree A1) 上利用质心动态假设的方法进行比较。 HiLQR MPC 在仿真和硬件测试中都优于质心方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种混合iLQR模型预测控制（HiLQR MPC）方法，用于解决足式机器人接触隐式稳定化中的复杂动力学问题。
AI.motivation: 传统模型预测控制（MPC）在处理具有接触动态的系统时面临挑战，需简化模型或固定接触序列，限制了其在足式机器人中的应用。
AI.method: 通过改进接触模式不匹配时的成本函数计算、并行化刚体动力学仿真以及高效解析导数计算，扩展混合迭代线性二次调节器（iLQR）以实现MPC框架。
AI.result: HiLQR MPC在简单驱动弹跳球系统和四足机器人（Unitree A1）上验证，仿真和硬件测试均优于基于质心动力学的方法。
AI.conclusion: HiLQR MPC能有效调整参考行为的接触序列并实现全身运动规划，在处理大扰动时表现优于现有方法。

authors_text: Huairui Wang,Zhenzhong Chen,Chang Wen Chen
title: Learned Video Compression via Heterogeneous Deformable Compensation Network
title_zh: 通过异构可变形补偿网络学习视频压缩
abstract: Learned video compression has recently emerged as an essential research topic in developing advanced video compression technologies, where motion compensation is considered one of the most challenging issues. In this paper, we propose a learned video compression framework via heterogeneous deformable compensation strategy (HDCVC) to tackle the problems of unstable compression performance caused by single-size deformable kernels in downsampled feature domain. More specifically, instead of utilizing optical flow warping or single-size-kernel deformable alignment, the proposed algorithm extracts features from the two adjacent frames to estimate content-adaptive heterogeneous deformable (HetDeform) kernel offsets. Then we transform the reference features with the HetDeform convolution to accomplish motion compensation. Moreover, we design a Spatial-Neighborhood-Conditioned Divisive Normalization (SNCDN) to achieve more effective data Gaussianization combined with the Generalized Divisive Normalization. Furthermore, we propose a multi-frame enhanced reconstruction module for exploiting context and temporal information for final quality enhancement. Experimental results indicate that HDCVC achieves superior performance than the recent state-of-the-art learned video compression approaches.
summary: Learned video compression has recently emerged as an essential research topic in developing advanced video compression technologies, where motion compensation is considered one of the most challenging issues. In this paper, we propose a learned video compression framework via heterogeneous deformable compensation strategy (HDCVC) to tackle the problems of unstable compression performance caused by single-size deformable kernels in downsampled feature domain. More specifically, instead of utilizing optical flow warping or single-size-kernel deformable alignment, the proposed algorithm extracts features from the two adjacent frames to estimate content-adaptive heterogeneous deformable (HetDeform) kernel offsets. Then we transform the reference features with the HetDeform convolution to accomplish motion compensation. Moreover, we design a Spatial-Neighborhood-Conditioned Divisive Normalization (SNCDN) to achieve more effective data Gaussianization combined with the Generalized Divisive Normalization. Furthermore, we propose a multi-frame enhanced reconstruction module for exploiting context and temporal information for final quality enhancement. Experimental results indicate that HDCVC achieves superior performance than the recent state-of-the-art learned video compression approaches.
abstract_zh: 学习视频压缩最近已成为开发高级视频压缩技术的重要研究课题，其中运动补偿被认为是最具挑战性的问题之一。在本文中，我们提出了一种通过异构可变形补偿策略（HDCVC）的学习视频压缩框架，以解决下采样特征域中单一尺寸可变形核导致的压缩性能不稳定的问题。更具体地说，所提出的算法不是利用光流扭曲或单尺寸内核可变形对齐，而是从两个相邻帧中提取特征来估计内容自适应异构可变形（HetDeform）内核偏移。然后利用HetDeform卷积对参考特征进行变换，完成运动补偿。此外，我们设计了空间邻域条件除法归一化（SNCDN），以结合广义除法归一化实现更有效的数据高斯化。此外，我们提出了一种多帧增强重建模块，用于利用上下文和时间信息来增强最终质量。实验结果表明，HDCVC 比最近最先进的学习视频压缩方法具有更优越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于异构可变形补偿策略的视频压缩框架（HDCVC），以解决传统单尺寸可变形核在下采样特征域中导致的压缩性能不稳定问题。
AI.motivation: 现有视频压缩方法在运动补偿中依赖单尺寸可变形核或光流变形，难以适应复杂场景导致性能不稳定，需探索更灵活的补偿机制。
AI.method: 通过提取相邻帧特征估计内容自适应的异构可变形（HetDeform）核偏移，结合空间邻域条件归一化（SNCDN）和多帧增强重建模块实现运动补偿与质量提升。
AI.result: 实验表明，HDCVC在压缩性能上优于当前最先进的学习型视频压缩方法。
AI.conclusion: 异构可变形补偿策略有效提升了视频压缩的稳定性与质量，为学习型压缩技术提供了新方向。

authors_text: Hong-You Chen,Wei-Lun Chao
title: Gradual Domain Adaptation without Indexed Intermediate Domains
title_zh: 无索引中间域的渐进域适应
abstract: The effectiveness of unsupervised domain adaptation degrades when there is a large discrepancy between the source and target domains. Gradual domain adaptation (GDA) is one promising way to mitigate such an issue, by leveraging additional unlabeled data that gradually shift from the source to the target. Through sequentially adapting the model along the "indexed" intermediate domains, GDA substantially improves the overall adaptation performance. In practice, however, the extra unlabeled data may not be separated into intermediate domains and indexed properly, limiting the applicability of GDA. In this paper, we investigate how to discover the sequence of intermediate domains when it is not already available. Concretely, we propose a coarse-to-fine framework, which starts with a coarse domain discovery step via progressive domain discriminator training. This coarse domain sequence then undergoes a fine indexing step via a novel cycle-consistency loss, which encourages the next intermediate domain to preserve sufficient discriminative knowledge of the current intermediate domain. The resulting domain sequence can then be used by a GDA algorithm. On benchmark data sets of GDA, we show that our approach, which we name Intermediate DOmain Labeler (IDOL), can lead to comparable or even better adaptation performance compared to the pre-defined domain sequence, making GDA more applicable and robust to the quality of domain sequences. Codes are available at https://github.com/hongyouc/IDOL.
summary: The effectiveness of unsupervised domain adaptation degrades when there is a large discrepancy between the source and target domains. Gradual domain adaptation (GDA) is one promising way to mitigate such an issue, by leveraging additional unlabeled data that gradually shift from the source to the target. Through sequentially adapting the model along the "indexed" intermediate domains, GDA substantially improves the overall adaptation performance. In practice, however, the extra unlabeled data may not be separated into intermediate domains and indexed properly, limiting the applicability of GDA. In this paper, we investigate how to discover the sequence of intermediate domains when it is not already available. Concretely, we propose a coarse-to-fine framework, which starts with a coarse domain discovery step via progressive domain discriminator training. This coarse domain sequence then undergoes a fine indexing step via a novel cycle-consistency loss, which encourages the next intermediate domain to preserve sufficient discriminative knowledge of the current intermediate domain. The resulting domain sequence can then be used by a GDA algorithm. On benchmark data sets of GDA, we show that our approach, which we name Intermediate DOmain Labeler (IDOL), can lead to comparable or even better adaptation performance compared to the pre-defined domain sequence, making GDA more applicable and robust to the quality of domain sequences. Codes are available at https://github.com/hongyouc/IDOL.
abstract_zh: 当源域和目标域之间存在较大差异时，无监督域适应的有效性会降低。渐进域适应 (GDA) 是缓解此类问题的一种有前途的方法，它利用逐渐从源转移到目标的额外未标记数据。通过沿着“索引”中间域顺序调整模型，GDA 显着提高了整体适应性能。然而，在实践中，额外的未标记数据可能不会被分成中间域并正确索引，从而限制了 GDA 的适用性。在本文中，我们研究了如何在中间域序列尚不可用时发现它。具体来说，我们提出了一个从粗到细的框架，该框架从通过渐进域鉴别器训练的粗域发现步骤开始。然后，该粗域序列通过新颖的循环一致性损失经历精细索引步骤，这鼓励下一个中间域保留当前中间域的足够的判别知识。生成的域序列随后可由 GDA 算法使用。在 GDA 的基准数据集上，我们表明，与预定义的域序列相比，我们的方法（我们称之为中间域标记器（IDOL））可以带来可比甚至更好的适应性能，使 GDA 对于域序列的质量更加适用和鲁棒。代码可在 https://github.com/hongyouc/IDOL 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需预定义中间域的渐进域适应方法，通过自动发现中间域序列来提升域适应性能。
AI.motivation: 现有渐进域适应（GDA）方法依赖预定义的中间域序列，但实际场景中这些中间域可能无法被正确划分和索引，限制了GDA的适用性。
AI.method: 提出粗到细的框架，首先通过渐进域判别器训练进行粗粒度域发现，再利用循环一致性损失进行细粒度域索引，生成连续的中间域序列。
AI.result: 在GDA基准数据集上，所提方法IDOL在无需预定义域序列的情况下，表现与预定义序列相当或更优，增强了GDA对域序列质量的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 通过自动发现中间域序列，本文方法有效解决了GDA对预定义域依赖的限制，提升了域适应的适用性和稳定性。

search_text: Gradual Domain Adaptation without Indexed Intermediate Domains 无索引中间域的渐进域适应 The effectiveness of unsupervised domain adaptation degrades when there is a large discrepancy between the source and target domains. Gradual domain adaptation (GDA) is one promising way to mitigate such an issue, by leveraging additional unlabeled data that gradually shift from the source to the target. Through sequentially adapting the model along the "indexed" intermediate domains, GDA substantially improves the overall adaptation performance. In practice, however, the extra unlabeled data may not be separated into intermediate domains and indexed properly, limiting the applicability of GDA. In this paper, we investigate how to discover the sequence of intermediate domains when it is not already available. Concretely, we propose a coarse-to-fine framework, which starts with a coarse domain discovery step via progressive domain discriminator training. This coarse domain sequence then undergoes a fine indexing step via a novel cycle-consistency loss, which encourages the next intermediate domain to preserve sufficient discriminative knowledge of the current intermediate domain. The resulting domain sequence can then be used by a GDA algorithm. On benchmark data sets of GDA, we show that our approach, which we name Intermediate DOmain Labeler (IDOL), can lead to comparable or even better adaptation performance compared to the pre-defined domain sequence, making GDA more applicable and robust to the quality of domain sequences. Codes are available at https://github.com/hongyouc/IDOL. 当源域和目标域之间存在较大差异时，无监督域适应的有效性会降低。渐进域适应 (GDA) 是缓解此类问题的一种有前途的方法，它利用逐渐从源转移到目标的额外未标记数据。通过沿着“索引”中间域顺序调整模型，GDA 显着提高了整体适应性能。然而，在实践中，额外的未标记数据可能不会被分成中间域并正确索引，从而限制了 GDA 的适用性。在本文中，我们研究了如何在中间域序列尚不可用时发现它。具体来说，我们提出了一个从粗到细的框架，该框架从通过渐进域鉴别器训练的粗域发现步骤开始。然后，该粗域序列通过新颖的循环一致性损失经历精细索引步骤，这鼓励下一个中间域保留当前中间域的足够的判别知识。生成的域序列随后可由 GDA 算法使用。在 GDA 的基准数据集上，我们表明，与预定义的域序列相比，我们的方法（我们称之为中间域标记器（IDOL））可以带来可比甚至更好的适应性能，使 GDA 对于域序列的质量更加适用和鲁棒。代码可在 https://github.com/hongyouc/IDOL 获取。 本文提出了一种无需预定义中间域的渐进域适应方法，通过自动发现中间域序列来提升域适应性能。 Hong-You Chen,Wei-Lun Chao cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Kaikai Zhao,Yajie Cui,Zhaoxiang Liu,Shiguo Lian
title: A Waste Copper Granules Rating System Based on Machine Vision
title_zh: 基于机器视觉的废铜粒评级系统
abstract: In the field of waste copper granules recycling, engineers should be able to identify all different sorts of impurities in waste copper granules and estimate their mass proportion relying on experience before rating. This manual rating method is costly, lacking in objectivity and comprehensiveness. To tackle this problem, we propose a waste copper granules rating system based on machine vision and deep learning. We firstly formulate the rating task into a 2D image recognition and purity regression task. Then we design a two-stage convolutional rating network to compute the mass purity and rating level of waste copper granules. Our rating network includes a segmentation network and a purity regression network, which respectively calculate the semantic segmentation heatmaps and purity results of the waste copper granules. After training the rating network on the augmented datasets, experiments on real waste copper granules demonstrate the effectiveness and superiority of the proposed network. Specifically, our system is superior to the manual method in terms of accuracy, effectiveness, robustness, and objectivity.
summary: In the field of waste copper granules recycling, engineers should be able to identify all different sorts of impurities in waste copper granules and estimate their mass proportion relying on experience before rating. This manual rating method is costly, lacking in objectivity and comprehensiveness. To tackle this problem, we propose a waste copper granules rating system based on machine vision and deep learning. We firstly formulate the rating task into a 2D image recognition and purity regression task. Then we design a two-stage convolutional rating network to compute the mass purity and rating level of waste copper granules. Our rating network includes a segmentation network and a purity regression network, which respectively calculate the semantic segmentation heatmaps and purity results of the waste copper granules. After training the rating network on the augmented datasets, experiments on real waste copper granules demonstrate the effectiveness and superiority of the proposed network. Specifically, our system is superior to the manual method in terms of accuracy, effectiveness, robustness, and objectivity.
abstract_zh: 在废铜颗粒回收领域，工程师应能够识别废铜颗粒中的各种杂质，并在评级前根据经验估计其质量比例。这种人工评级方法成本高，缺乏客观性和全面性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于机器视觉和深度学习的废铜颗粒评级系统。我们首先将评级任务制定为二维图像识别和纯度回归任务。然后我们设计了一个两级卷积评级网络来计算废铜颗粒的质量纯度和评级水平。我们的评级网络包括分割网络和纯度回归网络，分别计算废铜颗粒的语义分割热图和纯度结果。在增强数据集上训练评级网络后，对真实废铜颗粒的实验证明了所提出网络的有效性和优越性。具体来说，我们的系统在准确性、有效性、稳健性和客观性方面优于手动方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于机器视觉和深度学习的废铜颗粒评级系统，用于自动识别杂质并评估其纯度。
AI.motivation: 传统人工评级方法成本高且缺乏客观性，需要更高效、自动化的解决方案。
AI.method: 将评级任务转化为图像识别与纯度回归问题，设计包含分割网络和纯度回归网络的两阶段卷积神经网络。
AI.result: 实验表明，该系统在准确性、效率、鲁棒性和客观性方面均优于人工方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的机器视觉评级系统有效解决了废铜颗粒人工评级的局限性，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Mehmet Saygın Seyfioğlu,Zixuan Liu,Pranav Kamath,Sadjyot Gangolli,Sheng Wang,Thomas Grabowski,Linda Shapiro
title: Brain-Aware Replacements for Supervised Contrastive Learning in Detection of Alzheimer's Disease
title_zh: 大脑感知替代监督对比学习检测阿尔茨海默病
abstract: We propose a novel framework for Alzheimer's disease (AD) detection using brain MRIs. The framework starts with a data augmentation method called Brain-Aware Replacements (BAR), which leverages a standard brain parcellation to replace medically-relevant 3D brain regions in an anchor MRI from a randomly picked MRI to create synthetic samples. Ground truth "hard" labels are also linearly mixed depending on the replacement ratio in order to create "soft" labels. BAR produces a great variety of realistic-looking synthetic MRIs with higher local variability compared to other mix-based methods, such as CutMix. On top of BAR, we propose using a soft-label-capable supervised contrastive loss, aiming to learn the relative similarity of representations that reflect how mixed are the synthetic MRIs using our soft labels. This way, we do not fully exhaust the entropic capacity of our hard labels, since we only use them to create soft labels and synthetic MRIs through BAR. We show that a model pre-trained using our framework can be further fine-tuned with a cross-entropy loss using the hard labels that were used to create the synthetic samples. We validated the performance of our framework in a binary AD detection task against both from-scratch supervised training and state-of-the-art self-supervised training plus fine-tuning approaches. Then we evaluated BAR's individual performance compared to another mix-based method CutMix by integrating it within our framework. We show that our framework yields superior results in both precision and recall for the AD detection task.
summary: We propose a novel framework for Alzheimer's disease (AD) detection using brain MRIs. The framework starts with a data augmentation method called Brain-Aware Replacements (BAR), which leverages a standard brain parcellation to replace medically-relevant 3D brain regions in an anchor MRI from a randomly picked MRI to create synthetic samples. Ground truth "hard" labels are also linearly mixed depending on the replacement ratio in order to create "soft" labels. BAR produces a great variety of realistic-looking synthetic MRIs with higher local variability compared to other mix-based methods, such as CutMix. On top of BAR, we propose using a soft-label-capable supervised contrastive loss, aiming to learn the relative similarity of representations that reflect how mixed are the synthetic MRIs using our soft labels. This way, we do not fully exhaust the entropic capacity of our hard labels, since we only use them to create soft labels and synthetic MRIs through BAR. We show that a model pre-trained using our framework can be further fine-tuned with a cross-entropy loss using the hard labels that were used to create the synthetic samples. We validated the performance of our framework in a binary AD detection task against both from-scratch supervised training and state-of-the-art self-supervised training plus fine-tuning approaches. Then we evaluated BAR's individual performance compared to another mix-based method CutMix by integrating it within our framework. We show that our framework yields superior results in both precision and recall for the AD detection task.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种使用脑部 MRI 检测阿尔茨海默病 (AD) 的新框架。该框架首先采用一种名为“大脑感知替换”(BAR) 的数据增强方法，该方法利用标准的大脑分区来替换随机选取的 MRI 中的锚定 MRI 中的医学相关 3D 大脑区域，以创建合成样本。地面实况“硬”标签也根据替换率进行线性混合，以创建“软”标签。与其他基于混合的方法（例如 CutMix）相比，BAR 可生成各种逼真的合成 MRI，具有更高的局部变异性。在 BAR 之上，我们建议使用支持软标签的监督对比损失，旨在学习表示的相对相似性，以反映使用我们的软标签的合成 MRI 的混合程度。这样，我们就不会完全耗尽硬标签的熵容量，因为我们仅使用它们通过 BAR 创建软标签和合成 MRI。我们表明，使用我们的框架预训练的模型可以使用用于创建合成样本的硬标签通过交叉熵损失进行进一步微调。我们针对从头开始的监督训练和最先进的自监督训练加上微调方法，在二进制 AD 检测任务中验证了我们的框架的性能。然后，我们通过将 BAR 集成到我们的框架中，与另一种基于混合的方法 CutMix 进行比较，评估了 BAR 的个人性能。我们表明，我们的框架在 AD 检测任务的精确度和召回率方面都取得了优异的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于阿尔茨海默病检测的新框架，结合脑区替换数据增强方法（BAR）和软标签监督对比损失，提升MRI图像分类性能。
AI.motivation: 传统数据增强方法（如CutMix）生成的合成MRI局部变化不足，且未充分利用硬标签信息，导致AD检测模型性能受限。
AI.method: 1. BAR方法：基于脑分区图谱替换锚定MRI的医学相关脑区，生成高局部变异性的合成样本；2. 线性混合硬标签生成软标签；3. 设计软标签监督对比损失函数，学习合成样本的表示相似性；4. 预训练后使用硬标签微调模型。
AI.result: 在二分类AD检测任务中，框架在精确率和召回率上均优于从零训练和最先进自监督方法，且BAR方法优于CutMix。
AI.conclusion: BAR结合软标签监督对比学习能有效提升AD检测性能，合成数据质量与标签利用策略是关键创新点。

ai_content.motivation: 传统数据增强方法（如CutMix）生成的合成MRI局部变化不足，且未充分利用硬标签信息，导致AD检测模型性能受限。

ai_content.result: 在二分类AD检测任务中，框架在精确率和召回率上均优于从零训练和最先进自监督方法，且BAR方法优于CutMix。
ai_content.conclusion: BAR结合软标签监督对比学习能有效提升AD检测性能，合成数据质量与标签利用策略是关键创新点。

search_text: Brain-Aware Replacements for Supervised Contrastive Learning in Detection of Alzheimer's Disease 大脑感知替代监督对比学习检测阿尔茨海默病 We propose a novel framework for Alzheimer's disease (AD) detection using brain MRIs. The framework starts with a data augmentation method called Brain-Aware Replacements (BAR), which leverages a standard brain parcellation to replace medically-relevant 3D brain regions in an anchor MRI from a randomly picked MRI to create synthetic samples. Ground truth "hard" labels are also linearly mixed depending on the replacement ratio in order to create "soft" labels. BAR produces a great variety of realistic-looking synthetic MRIs with higher local variability compared to other mix-based methods, such as CutMix. On top of BAR, we propose using a soft-label-capable supervised contrastive loss, aiming to learn the relative similarity of representations that reflect how mixed are the synthetic MRIs using our soft labels. This way, we do not fully exhaust the entropic capacity of our hard labels, since we only use them to create soft labels and synthetic MRIs through BAR. We show that a model pre-trained using our framework can be further fine-tuned with a cross-entropy loss using the hard labels that were used to create the synthetic samples. We validated the performance of our framework in a binary AD detection task against both from-scratch supervised training and state-of-the-art self-supervised training plus fine-tuning approaches. Then we evaluated BAR's individual performance compared to another mix-based method CutMix by integrating it within our framework. We show that our framework yields superior results in both precision and recall for the AD detection task. 我们提出了一种使用脑部 MRI 检测阿尔茨海默病 (AD) 的新框架。该框架首先采用一种名为“大脑感知替换”(BAR) 的数据增强方法，该方法利用标准的大脑分区来替换随机选取的 MRI 中的锚定 MRI 中的医学相关 3D 大脑区域，以创建合成样本。地面实况“硬”标签也根据替换率进行线性混合，以创建“软”标签。与其他基于混合的方法（例如 CutMix）相比，BAR 可生成各种逼真的合成 MRI，具有更高的局部变异性。在 BAR 之上，我们建议使用支持软标签的监督对比损失，旨在学习表示的相对相似性，以反映使用我们的软标签的合成 MRI 的混合程度。这样，我们就不会完全耗尽硬标签的熵容量，因为我们仅使用它们通过 BAR 创建软标签和合成 MRI。我们表明，使用我们的框架预训练的模型可以使用用于创建合成样本的硬标签通过交叉熵损失进行进一步微调。我们针对从头开始的监督训练和最先进的自监督训练加上微调方法，在二进制 AD 检测任务中验证了我们的框架的性能。然后，我们通过将 BAR 集成到我们的框架中，与另一种基于混合的方法 CutMix 进行比较，评估了 BAR 的个人性能。我们表明，我们的框架在 AD 检测任务的精确度和召回率方面都取得了优异的结果。 本文提出一种用于阿尔茨海默病检测的新框架，结合脑区替换数据增强方法（BAR）和软标签监督对比损失，提升MRI图像分类性能。 Mehmet Saygın Seyfioğlu,Zixuan Liu,Pranav Kamath,Sadjyot Gangolli,Sheng Wang,Thomas Grabowski,Linda Shapiro cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Renke Wang,Ifeoma Nwogu
title: A Probabilistic Model Of Interaction Dynamics for Dyadic Face-to-Face Settings
title_zh: 二元面对面设置的交互动力学概率模型
abstract: Natural conversations between humans often involve a large number of non-verbal nuanced expressions, displayed at key times throughout the conversation. Understanding and being able to model these complex interactions is essential for creating realistic human-agent communication, whether in the virtual or physical world. As social robots and intelligent avatars emerge in popularity and utility, being able to realistically model and generate these dynamic expressions throughout conversations is critical. We develop a probabilistic model to capture the interaction dynamics between pairs of participants in a face-to-face setting, allowing for the encoding of synchronous expressions between the interlocutors. This interaction encoding is then used to influence the generation when predicting one agent's future dynamics, conditioned on the other's current dynamics. FLAME features are extracted from videos containing natural conversations between subjects to train our interaction model. We successfully assess the efficacy of our proposed model via quantitative metrics and qualitative metrics, and show that it successfully captures the dynamics of a pair of interacting dyads. We also test the model with a never-before-seen parent-infant dataset comprising of two different modes of communication between the dyads, and show that our model successfully delineates between the modes, based on their interacting dynamics.
summary: Natural conversations between humans often involve a large number of non-verbal nuanced expressions, displayed at key times throughout the conversation. Understanding and being able to model these complex interactions is essential for creating realistic human-agent communication, whether in the virtual or physical world. As social robots and intelligent avatars emerge in popularity and utility, being able to realistically model and generate these dynamic expressions throughout conversations is critical. We develop a probabilistic model to capture the interaction dynamics between pairs of participants in a face-to-face setting, allowing for the encoding of synchronous expressions between the interlocutors. This interaction encoding is then used to influence the generation when predicting one agent's future dynamics, conditioned on the other's current dynamics. FLAME features are extracted from videos containing natural conversations between subjects to train our interaction model. We successfully assess the efficacy of our proposed model via quantitative metrics and qualitative metrics, and show that it successfully captures the dynamics of a pair of interacting dyads. We also test the model with a never-before-seen parent-infant dataset comprising of two different modes of communication between the dyads, and show that our model successfully delineates between the modes, based on their interacting dynamics.
abstract_zh: 人与人之间的自然对话通常涉及大量非语言的细微表达，这些表达在整个对话的关键时刻表现出来。无论是在虚拟世界还是物理世界，理解并能够对这些复杂的交互进行建模对于创建真实的人机通信至关重要。随着社交机器人和智能化身的流行和实用，能够在整个对话中真实地建模和生成这些动态表达至关重要。我们开发了一个概率模型来捕获面对面环境中参与者之间的互动动态，从而允许对对话者之间的同步表达进行编码。然后，在预测一个代理的未来动态（以另一个代理的当前动态为条件）时，使用这种交互编码来影响生成。 FLAME 特征是从包含受试者之间自然对话的视频中提取的，以训练我们的交互模型。我们通过定量指标和定性指标成功评估了我们提出的模型的有效性，并表明它成功地捕捉了一对相互作用的二元体的动态。我们还使用前所未见的亲子数据集测试了该模型，该数据集包含二人之间两种不同的通信模式，并表明我们的模型根据它们的相互作用动态成功地描述了这些模式。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种概率模型，用于捕捉面对面双人互动中的动态，以生成同步的非语言表达。
AI.motivation: 随着社交机器人和智能虚拟形象的发展，需真实建模人类互动动态以提升人机交互的真实性。
AI.method: 基于FLAME特征提取视频中的自然对话数据，构建概率模型编码互动动态，并利用一方动态预测另一方未来行为。
AI.result: 模型通过定量与定性评估验证有效性，可区分父母-婴儿互动中的两种沟通模式。
AI.conclusion: 该模型能准确捕捉互动动态并区分不同模式，为生成真实人机交互提供基础。

authors_text: Kleanthis Avramidis,Mohammad Rostami,Melinda Chang,Shrikanth Narayanan
title: Automating Detection of Papilledema in Pediatric Fundus Images with Explainable Machine Learning
title_zh: 利用可解释的机器学习自动检测儿科眼底图像中的视乳头水肿
comment: 5 pages, 4 figures, 2 tables, 2022 IEEE International Conference on Image Processing (ICIP)
comments: 5 pages, 4 figures, 2 tables, 2022 IEEE International Conference on Image Processing (ICIP)
abstract: Papilledema is an ophthalmic neurologic disorder in which increased intracranial pressure leads to swelling of the optic nerves. Undiagnosed papilledema in children may lead to blindness and may be a sign of life-threatening conditions, such as brain tumors. Robust and accurate clinical diagnosis of this syndrome can be facilitated by automated analysis of fundus images using deep learning, especially in the presence of challenges posed by pseudopapilledema that has similar fundus appearance but distinct clinical implications. We present a deep learning-based algorithm for the automatic detection of pediatric papilledema. Our approach is based on optic disc localization and detection of explainable papilledema indicators through data augmentation. Experiments on real-world clinical data demonstrate that our proposed method is effective with a diagnostic accuracy comparable to expert ophthalmologists.
summary: Papilledema is an ophthalmic neurologic disorder in which increased intracranial pressure leads to swelling of the optic nerves. Undiagnosed papilledema in children may lead to blindness and may be a sign of life-threatening conditions, such as brain tumors. Robust and accurate clinical diagnosis of this syndrome can be facilitated by automated analysis of fundus images using deep learning, especially in the presence of challenges posed by pseudopapilledema that has similar fundus appearance but distinct clinical implications. We present a deep learning-based algorithm for the automatic detection of pediatric papilledema. Our approach is based on optic disc localization and detection of explainable papilledema indicators through data augmentation. Experiments on real-world clinical data demonstrate that our proposed method is effective with a diagnostic accuracy comparable to expert ophthalmologists.
abstract_zh: 视乳头水肿是一种眼科神经系统疾病，颅内压升高导致视神经肿胀。未经诊断的儿童视乳头水肿可能导致失明，并且可能是危及生命的疾病（例如脑肿瘤）的征兆。使用深度学习对眼底图像进行自动分析可以促进对该综合征的稳健而准确的临床诊断，特别是在存在具有相似眼底外观但不同临床意义的假性视乳头水肿所带来的挑战的情况下。我们提出了一种基于深度学习的算法，用于自动检测儿童视乳头水肿。我们的方法基于视盘定位和通过数据增强检测可解释的视乳头水肿指标。对真实世界临床数据的实验表明，我们提出的方法是有效的，其诊断准确性可与专业眼科医生相媲美。

AI.tldr: 开发基于深度学习的儿科视乳头水肿自动检测算法
AI.motivation: 未诊断的视乳头水肿可能导致儿童失明及危及生命的疾病，而假性视乳头水肿的鉴别存在挑战，需自动化方法提高诊断准确率
AI.method: 采用视盘定位与可解释指标检测结合数据增强的深度学习方法
AI.result: 在临床数据中验证有效，诊断准确率与专家眼科医生相当
AI.conclusion: 提出的算法有效，可辅助临床诊断，提升儿科视乳头水肿检测效率

authors_text: Kha Gia Quach,Huu Le,Pha Nguyen,Chi Nhan Duong,Tien Dai Bui,Khoa Luu
title: Depth Perspective-aware Multiple Object Tracking
title_zh: 深度透视感知多对象跟踪
abstract: This paper aims to tackle Multiple Object Tracking (MOT), an important problem in computer vision but remains challenging due to many practical issues, especially occlusions. Indeed, we propose a new real-time Depth Perspective-aware Multiple Object Tracking (DP-MOT) approach to tackle the occlusion problem in MOT. A simple yet efficient Subject-Ordered Depth Estimation (SODE) is first proposed to automatically order the depth positions of detected subjects in a 2D scene in an unsupervised manner. Using the output from SODE, a new Active pseudo-3D Kalman filter, a simple but effective extension of Kalman filter with dynamic control variables, is then proposed to dynamically update the movement of objects. In addition, a new high-order association approach is presented in the data association step to incorporate first-order and second-order relationships between the detected objects. The proposed approach consistently achieves state-of-the-art performance compared to recent MOT methods on standard MOT benchmarks.
summary: This paper aims to tackle Multiple Object Tracking (MOT), an important problem in computer vision but remains challenging due to many practical issues, especially occlusions. Indeed, we propose a new real-time Depth Perspective-aware Multiple Object Tracking (DP-MOT) approach to tackle the occlusion problem in MOT. A simple yet efficient Subject-Ordered Depth Estimation (SODE) is first proposed to automatically order the depth positions of detected subjects in a 2D scene in an unsupervised manner. Using the output from SODE, a new Active pseudo-3D Kalman filter, a simple but effective extension of Kalman filter with dynamic control variables, is then proposed to dynamically update the movement of objects. In addition, a new high-order association approach is presented in the data association step to incorporate first-order and second-order relationships between the detected objects. The proposed approach consistently achieves state-of-the-art performance compared to recent MOT methods on standard MOT benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 本文旨在解决多目标跟踪（MOT），这是计算机视觉中的一个重要问题，但由于许多实际问题，尤其是遮挡，仍然具有挑战性。事实上，我们提出了一种新的实时深度透视感知多对象跟踪（DP-MOT）方法来解决 MOT 中的遮挡问题。首先提出了一种简单而高效的主题排序深度估计（SODE），以无监督的方式自动对 2D 场景中检测到的主题的深度位置进行排序。使用 SODE 的输出，提出了一种新的主​​动伪 3D 卡尔曼滤波器，它是具有动态控制变量的卡尔曼滤波器的简单但有效的扩展，用于动态更新对象的运动。此外，在数据关联步骤中提出了一种新的高阶关联方法，以合并检测到的对象之间的一阶和二阶关系。与标准 MOT 基准上的最新 MOT 方法相比，所提出的方法始终能够实现最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为DP-MOT的实时多目标跟踪方法，通过深度视角感知解决遮挡问题。
AI.motivation: 多目标跟踪在遮挡场景下仍存在挑战，现有方法难以有效处理目标间的深度关系和动态变化。
AI.method: 提出三方面方法：1) 无监督的主体有序深度估计（SODE）；2) 带动态控制变量的主动伪3D卡尔曼滤波器；3) 融合一阶和二阶关系的高阶关联算法。
AI.result: 在标准MOT基准测试中，该方法性能达到当前最优水平（SOTA）。
AI.conclusion: 通过深度感知与动态建模的结合，DP-MOT有效提升了遮挡场景下的多目标跟踪精度与实时性。

authors_text: Timothée Lesort,Oleksiy Ostapenko,Diganta Misra,Md Rifat Arefin,Pau Rodríguez,Laurent Charlin,Irina Rish
title: Challenging Common Assumptions about Catastrophic Forgetting
title_zh: 挑战关于灾难性遗忘的常见假设
abstract: Building learning agents that can progressively learn and accumulate knowledge is the core goal of the continual learning (CL) research field. Unfortunately, training a model on new data usually compromises the performance on past data. In the CL literature, this effect is referred to as catastrophic forgetting (CF). CF has been largely studied, and a plethora of methods have been proposed to address it on short sequences of non-overlapping tasks. In such setups, CF always leads to a quick and significant drop in performance in past tasks. Nevertheless, despite CF, recent work showed that SGD training on linear models accumulates knowledge in a CL regression setup. This phenomenon becomes especially visible when tasks reoccur. We might then wonder if DNNs trained with SGD or any standard gradient-based optimization accumulate knowledge in such a way. Such phenomena would have interesting consequences for applying DNNs to real continual scenarios. Indeed, standard gradient-based optimization methods are significantly less computationally expensive than existing CL algorithms. In this paper, we study the progressive knowledge accumulation (KA) in DNNs trained with gradient-based algorithms in long sequences of tasks with data re-occurrence. We propose a new framework, SCoLe (Scaling Continual Learning), to investigate KA and discover that catastrophic forgetting has a limited effect on DNNs trained with SGD. When trained on long sequences with data sparsely re-occurring, the overall accuracy improves, which might be counter-intuitive given the CF phenomenon. We empirically investigate KA in DNNs under various data occurrence frequencies and propose simple and scalable strategies to increase knowledge accumulation in DNNs.
summary: Building learning agents that can progressively learn and accumulate knowledge is the core goal of the continual learning (CL) research field. Unfortunately, training a model on new data usually compromises the performance on past data. In the CL literature, this effect is referred to as catastrophic forgetting (CF). CF has been largely studied, and a plethora of methods have been proposed to address it on short sequences of non-overlapping tasks. In such setups, CF always leads to a quick and significant drop in performance in past tasks. Nevertheless, despite CF, recent work showed that SGD training on linear models accumulates knowledge in a CL regression setup. This phenomenon becomes especially visible when tasks reoccur. We might then wonder if DNNs trained with SGD or any standard gradient-based optimization accumulate knowledge in such a way. Such phenomena would have interesting consequences for applying DNNs to real continual scenarios. Indeed, standard gradient-based optimization methods are significantly less computationally expensive than existing CL algorithms. In this paper, we study the progressive knowledge accumulation (KA) in DNNs trained with gradient-based algorithms in long sequences of tasks with data re-occurrence. We propose a new framework, SCoLe (Scaling Continual Learning), to investigate KA and discover that catastrophic forgetting has a limited effect on DNNs trained with SGD. When trained on long sequences with data sparsely re-occurring, the overall accuracy improves, which might be counter-intuitive given the CF phenomenon. We empirically investigate KA in DNNs under various data occurrence frequencies and propose simple and scalable strategies to increase knowledge accumulation in DNNs.
abstract_zh: 构建能够逐步学习和积累知识的学习代理是持续学习（CL）研究领域的核心目标。不幸的是，根据新数据训练模型通常会损害过去数据的性能。在 CL 文献中，这种效应被称为灾难性遗忘（CF）。 CF 已被广泛研究，并且已经提出了大量方法来在非重叠任务的短序列上解决它。在这样的设置中，CF 总是会导致过去任务的性能快速显着下降。然而，尽管存在 CF，最近的工作表明，线性模型上的 SGD 训练可以在 CL 回归设置中积累知识。当任务再次发生时，这种现象变得尤其明显。然后，我们可能想知道使用 SGD 或任何标准的基于梯度的优化训练的 DNN 是否以这种方式积累知识。这种现象对于将 DNN 应用于真实的连续场景会产生有趣的后果。事实上，标准的基于梯度的优化方法的计算成本明显低于现有的 CL 算法。在本文中，我们研究了在数据重复出现的长序列任务中使用基于梯度的算法训练的 DNN 中的渐进知识积累 (KA)。我们提出了一个新的框架 SCoLe（扩展持续学习）来研究 KA 并发现灾难性遗忘对使用 SGD 训练的 DNN 的影响有限。当对数据稀疏重复出现的长序列进行训练时，整体精度会提高，但考虑到 CF 现象，这可能是违反直觉的。我们根据经验研究了各种数据出现频率下 DNN 中的 KA，并提出了简单且可扩展的策略来增加 DNN 中的知识积累。

AI.tldr: 本文挑战了关于灾难性遗忘（CF）的常见假设，研究了使用梯度下降法训练的深度神经网络（DNN）在长期任务序列中是否能积累知识。
AI.motivation: 传统持续学习方法计算成本高，而SGD等标准优化方法更高效。本文旨在验证DNN在存在CF的情况下是否仍能通过长期任务序列积累知识，从而改变对DNN在真实持续学习场景中应用的认知。
AI.method: 提出SCoLe框架，通过长序列任务和数据重复出现的设置，研究DNN的知识积累（KA）现象，并测试不同数据出现频率下的策略以增强知识积累。
AI.result: 实验发现，DNN在长期稀疏数据重复的任务序列中整体准确率提升，与CF的负面影响相悖，表明SGD训练的DNN具有有限的CF影响。
AI.conclusion: CF对SGD训练的DNN影响有限，标准优化方法可有效积累知识，这对实际持续学习场景的应用具有重要意义。

authors_text: Mufan Sang,John H. L. Hansen
title: Multi-Frequency Information Enhanced Channel Attention Module for Speaker Representation Learning
title_zh: 用于说话人表示学习的多频信息增强通道注意模块
abstract: Recently, attention mechanisms have been applied successfully in neural network-based speaker verification systems. Incorporating the Squeeze-and-Excitation block into convolutional neural networks has achieved remarkable performance. However, it uses global average pooling (GAP) to simply average the features along time and frequency dimensions, which is incapable of preserving sufficient speaker information in the feature maps. In this study, we show that GAP is a special case of a discrete cosine transform (DCT) on time-frequency domain mathematically using only the lowest frequency component in frequency decomposition. To strengthen the speaker information extraction ability, we propose to utilize multi-frequency information and design two novel and effective attention modules, called Single-Frequency Single-Channel (SFSC) attention module and Multi-Frequency Single-Channel (MFSC) attention module. The proposed attention modules can effectively capture more speaker information from multiple frequency components on the basis of DCT. We conduct comprehensive experiments on the VoxCeleb datasets and a probe evaluation on the 1st 48-UTD forensic corpus. Experimental results demonstrate that our proposed SFSC and MFSC attention modules can efficiently generate more discriminative speaker representations and outperform ResNet34-SE and ECAPA-TDNN systems with relative 20.9% and 20.2% reduction in EER, without adding extra network parameters.
summary: Recently, attention mechanisms have been applied successfully in neural network-based speaker verification systems. Incorporating the Squeeze-and-Excitation block into convolutional neural networks has achieved remarkable performance. However, it uses global average pooling (GAP) to simply average the features along time and frequency dimensions, which is incapable of preserving sufficient speaker information in the feature maps. In this study, we show that GAP is a special case of a discrete cosine transform (DCT) on time-frequency domain mathematically using only the lowest frequency component in frequency decomposition. To strengthen the speaker information extraction ability, we propose to utilize multi-frequency information and design two novel and effective attention modules, called Single-Frequency Single-Channel (SFSC) attention module and Multi-Frequency Single-Channel (MFSC) attention module. The proposed attention modules can effectively capture more speaker information from multiple frequency components on the basis of DCT. We conduct comprehensive experiments on the VoxCeleb datasets and a probe evaluation on the 1st 48-UTD forensic corpus. Experimental results demonstrate that our proposed SFSC and MFSC attention modules can efficiently generate more discriminative speaker representations and outperform ResNet34-SE and ECAPA-TDNN systems with relative 20.9% and 20.2% reduction in EER, without adding extra network parameters.
abstract_zh: 最近，注意力机制已成功应用于基于神经网络的说话人验证系统。将挤压和激励模块合并到卷积神经网络中已经取得了显着的性能。然而，它使用全局平均池化（GAP）来简单地沿时间和频率维度对特征进行平均，这无法在特征图中保留足够的说话人信息。在本研究中，我们证明 GAP 是时频域上离散余弦变换 (DCT) 的特例，在数学上仅使用频率分解中的最低频率分量。为了增强说话人信息提取能力，我们建议利用多频率信息并设计两种新颖有效的注意模块，称为单频单通道（SFSC）注意模块和多频单通道（MFSC）注意模块。所提出的注意力模块可以在 DCT 的基础上有效地从多个频率分量中捕获更多的说话人信息。我们对 VoxCeleb 数据集进行了全面的实验，并对第一个 48-UTD 法医语料库进行了探针评估。实验结果表明，我们提出的 SFSC 和 MFSC 注意力模块可以有效地生成更具辨别力的说话人表示，并且优于 ResNet34-SE 和 ECAPA-TDNN 系统，EER 相对降低 20.9% 和 20.2%，而无需添加额外的网络参数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多频信息增强的通道注意力模块，用于改进说话人表示学习。
AI.motivation: 传统的全局平均池化（GAP）在提取说话人信息时存在不足，无法保留足够的信息。因此，本文希望通过利用多频信息来增强说话人信息的提取能力。
AI.method: 本文提出两种新的注意力模块：单频单通道（SFSC）和多频单通道（MFSC）注意力模块，基于离散余弦变换（DCT）来捕捉多频成分中的说话人信息。
AI.result: 在VoxCeleb数据集和1st 48-UTD法医语料库上的实验表明，SFSC和MFSC模块在不增加网络参数的情况下，分别将EER降低了20.9%和20.2%。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的注意力模块能够有效生成更具判别力的说话人表示，显著优于ResNet34-SE和ECAPA-TDNN系统。

authors_text: Ashutosh Agarwal,Chetan Arora
title: Depthformer : Multiscale Vision Transformer For Monocular Depth Estimation With Local Global Information Fusion
title_zh: Depthformer：用于单目深度估计和局部全局信息融合的多尺度视觉变换器
abstract: Attention-based models such as transformers have shown outstanding performance on dense prediction tasks, such as semantic segmentation, owing to their capability of capturing long-range dependency in an image. However, the benefit of transformers for monocular depth prediction has seldom been explored so far. This paper benchmarks various transformer-based models for the depth estimation task on an indoor NYUV2 dataset and an outdoor KITTI dataset. We propose a novel attention-based architecture, Depthformer for monocular depth estimation that uses multi-head self-attention to produce the multiscale feature maps, which are effectively combined by our proposed decoder network. We also propose a Transbins module that divides the depth range into bins whose center value is estimated adaptively per image. The final depth estimated is a linear combination of bin centers for each pixel. Transbins module takes advantage of the global receptive field using the transformer module in the encoding stage. Experimental results on NYUV2 and KITTI depth estimation benchmark demonstrate that our proposed method improves the state-of-the-art by 3.3%, and 3.3% respectively in terms of Root Mean Squared Error (RMSE). Code is available at https://github.com/ashutosh1807/Depthformer.git.
summary: Attention-based models such as transformers have shown outstanding performance on dense prediction tasks, such as semantic segmentation, owing to their capability of capturing long-range dependency in an image. However, the benefit of transformers for monocular depth prediction has seldom been explored so far. This paper benchmarks various transformer-based models for the depth estimation task on an indoor NYUV2 dataset and an outdoor KITTI dataset. We propose a novel attention-based architecture, Depthformer for monocular depth estimation that uses multi-head self-attention to produce the multiscale feature maps, which are effectively combined by our proposed decoder network. We also propose a Transbins module that divides the depth range into bins whose center value is estimated adaptively per image. The final depth estimated is a linear combination of bin centers for each pixel. Transbins module takes advantage of the global receptive field using the transformer module in the encoding stage. Experimental results on NYUV2 and KITTI depth estimation benchmark demonstrate that our proposed method improves the state-of-the-art by 3.3%, and 3.3% respectively in terms of Root Mean Squared Error (RMSE). Code is available at https://github.com/ashutosh1807/Depthformer.git.
abstract_zh: 基于注意力的模型（例如 Transformer）由于能够捕获图像中的远程依赖性，因此在语义分割等密集预测任务中表现出了出色的性能。然而，迄今为止，变压器对于单目深度预测的好处很少被探索。本文对室内 NYUV2 数据集和室外 KITTI 数据集上深度估计任务的各种基于 Transformer 的模型进行了基准测试。我们提出了一种新颖的基于注意力的架构，用于单目深度估计的 Depthformer，它使用多头自注意力来生成多尺度特征图，这些特征图由我们提出的解码器网络有效地组合。我们还提出了一个 Transbins 模块，它将深度范围划分为多个 bin，其中心值是根据每个图像自适应估计的。最终估计的深度是每个像素的箱中心的线性组合。 Transbins 模块在编码阶段使用 Transformer 模块来利用全局感受野。 NYUV2 和 KITTI 深度估计基准的实验结果表明，我们提出的方法在均方根误差 (RMSE) 方面分别将最先进的方法提高了 3.3% 和 3.3%。代码可在 https://github.com/ashutosh1807/Depthformer.git 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多尺度视觉变换器的单目深度估计方法Depthformer，通过融合局部与全局信息提升深度预测精度。
AI.motivation: 尽管Transformer在密集预测任务中表现优异，但其在单目深度估计中的潜力尚未被充分挖掘，现有方法存在局部与全局信息融合不足的问题。
AI.method: 设计Depthformer架构，采用多头自注意力生成多尺度特征图，并通过解码器网络融合；提出Transbins模块自适应划分深度范围，结合全局信息进行线性组合预测。
AI.result: 在NYUV2和KITTI数据集上，Depthformer的RMSE指标分别提升3.3%，优于现有最优方法。
AI.conclusion: Depthformer通过有效融合多尺度特征与全局信息，在单目深度估计任务中取得显著性能提升，代码已开源。

authors_text: Stefano Cerri,Douglas N. Greve,Andrew Hoopes,Henrik Lundell,Hartwig R. Siebner,Mark Mühlau,Koen Van Leemput
title: An Open-Source Tool for Longitudinal Whole-Brain and White Matter Lesion Segmentation
title_zh: 用于纵向全脑和白质病变分割的开源工具
abstract: In this paper we describe and validate a longitudinal method for whole-brain segmentation of longitudinal MRI scans. It builds upon an existing whole-brain segmentation method that can handle multi-contrast data and robustly analyze images with white matter lesions. This method is here extended with subject-specific latent variables that encourage temporal consistency between its segmentation results, enabling it to better track subtle morphological changes in dozens of neuroanatomical structures and white matter lesions. We validate the proposed method on multiple datasets of control subjects and patients suffering from Alzheimer's disease and multiple sclerosis, and compare its results against those obtained with its original cross-sectional formulation and two benchmark longitudinal methods. The results indicate that the method attains a higher test-retest reliability, while being more sensitive to longitudinal disease effect differences between patient groups. An implementation is publicly available as part of the open-source neuroimaging package FreeSurfer.
summary: In this paper we describe and validate a longitudinal method for whole-brain segmentation of longitudinal MRI scans. It builds upon an existing whole-brain segmentation method that can handle multi-contrast data and robustly analyze images with white matter lesions. This method is here extended with subject-specific latent variables that encourage temporal consistency between its segmentation results, enabling it to better track subtle morphological changes in dozens of neuroanatomical structures and white matter lesions. We validate the proposed method on multiple datasets of control subjects and patients suffering from Alzheimer's disease and multiple sclerosis, and compare its results against those obtained with its original cross-sectional formulation and two benchmark longitudinal methods. The results indicate that the method attains a higher test-retest reliability, while being more sensitive to longitudinal disease effect differences between patient groups. An implementation is publicly available as part of the open-source neuroimaging package FreeSurfer.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们描述并验证了纵向 MRI 扫描全脑分割的纵向方法。它建立在现有的全脑分割方法的基础上，该方法可以处理多对比度数据并稳健地分析白质病变图像。该方法在这里扩展了特定于主题的潜在变量，这些潜在变量鼓励其分割结果之间的时间一致性，使其能够更好地跟踪数十个神经解剖结构和白质病变中的细微形态变化。我们在对照受试者以及患有阿尔茨海默病和多发性硬化症的患者的多个数据集上验证了所提出的方法，并将其结果与其原始横截面公式和两种基准纵向方法获得的结果进行比较。结果表明，该方法获得了更高的重测可靠性，同时对患者组之间的纵向疾病效应差异更加敏感。其实现作为开源神经成像包 FreeSurfer 的一部分公开提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种开源工具，用于纵向全脑和白质病变分割，通过引入受试者特定潜在变量提升时间一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有全脑分割方法在处理纵向MRI数据时难以保持时间一致性，且对细微形态变化和白质病变的追踪能力不足。
AI.method: 基于现有全脑分割方法，扩展加入受试者特定潜在变量，利用多对比数据增强纵向分析的稳定性，并在AD和MS患者数据集上验证。
AI.result: 该方法在测试-再测试可靠性上优于原版及基准方法，且能更敏感地检测患者组间的纵向疾病差异。
AI.conclusion: 新方法有效提升纵向分割的稳定性与敏感性，已作为FreeSurfer开源工具包的一部分公开。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种开源工具，用于纵向全脑和白质病变分割，通过引入受试者特定潜在变量提升时间一致性。
ai_content.motivation: 现有全脑分割方法在处理纵向MRI数据时难以保持时间一致性，且对细微形态变化和白质病变的追踪能力不足。
ai_content.method: 基于现有全脑分割方法，扩展加入受试者特定潜在变量，利用多对比数据增强纵向分析的稳定性，并在AD和MS患者数据集上验证。
ai_content.result: 该方法在测试-再测试可靠性上优于原版及基准方法，且能更敏感地检测患者组间的纵向疾病差异。
ai_content.conclusion: 新方法有效提升纵向分割的稳定性与敏感性，已作为FreeSurfer开源工具包的一部分公开。

search_text: An Open-Source Tool for Longitudinal Whole-Brain and White Matter Lesion Segmentation 用于纵向全脑和白质病变分割的开源工具 In this paper we describe and validate a longitudinal method for whole-brain segmentation of longitudinal MRI scans. It builds upon an existing whole-brain segmentation method that can handle multi-contrast data and robustly analyze images with white matter lesions. This method is here extended with subject-specific latent variables that encourage temporal consistency between its segmentation results, enabling it to better track subtle morphological changes in dozens of neuroanatomical structures and white matter lesions. We validate the proposed method on multiple datasets of control subjects and patients suffering from Alzheimer's disease and multiple sclerosis, and compare its results against those obtained with its original cross-sectional formulation and two benchmark longitudinal methods. The results indicate that the method attains a higher test-retest reliability, while being more sensitive to longitudinal disease effect differences between patient groups. An implementation is publicly available as part of the open-source neuroimaging package FreeSurfer. 在本文中，我们描述并验证了纵向 MRI 扫描全脑分割的纵向方法。它建立在现有的全脑分割方法的基础上，该方法可以处理多对比度数据并稳健地分析白质病变图像。该方法在这里扩展了特定于主题的潜在变量，这些潜在变量鼓励其分割结果之间的时间一致性，使其能够更好地跟踪数十个神经解剖结构和白质病变中的细微形态变化。我们在对照受试者以及患有阿尔茨海默病和多发性硬化症的患者的多个数据集上验证了所提出的方法，并将其结果与其原始横截面公式和两种基准纵向方法获得的结果进行比较。结果表明，该方法获得了更高的重测可靠性，同时对患者组之间的纵向疾病效应差异更加敏感。其实现作为开源神经成像包 FreeSurfer 的一部分公开提供。 本文提出了一种开源工具，用于纵向全脑和白质病变分割，通过引入受试者特定潜在变量提升时间一致性。 Stefano Cerri,Douglas N. Greve,Andrew Hoopes,Henrik Lundell,Hartwig R. Siebner,Mark Mühlau,Koen Van Leemput cs.CV

authors_text: Daniel Seichter,Söhnke Benedikt Fischedick,Mona Köhler,Horst-Michael Groß
title: Efficient Multi-Task RGB-D Scene Analysis for Indoor Environments
title_zh: 适用于室内环境的高效多任务 RGB-D 场景分析
comment: To be published in IEEE International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN) 2022
comments: To be published in IEEE International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN) 2022
abstract: Semantic scene understanding is essential for mobile agents acting in various environments. Although semantic segmentation already provides a lot of information, details about individual objects as well as the general scene are missing but required for many real-world applications. However, solving multiple tasks separately is expensive and cannot be accomplished in real time given limited computing and battery capabilities on a mobile platform. In this paper, we propose an efficient multi-task approach for RGB-D scene analysis~(EMSANet) that simultaneously performs semantic and instance segmentation~(panoptic segmentation), instance orientation estimation, and scene classification. We show that all tasks can be accomplished using a single neural network in real time on a mobile platform without diminishing performance - by contrast, the individual tasks are able to benefit from each other. In order to evaluate our multi-task approach, we extend the annotations of the common RGB-D indoor datasets NYUv2 and SUNRGB-D for instance segmentation and orientation estimation. To the best of our knowledge, we are the first to provide results in such a comprehensive multi-task setting for indoor scene analysis on NYUv2 and SUNRGB-D.
summary: Semantic scene understanding is essential for mobile agents acting in various environments. Although semantic segmentation already provides a lot of information, details about individual objects as well as the general scene are missing but required for many real-world applications. However, solving multiple tasks separately is expensive and cannot be accomplished in real time given limited computing and battery capabilities on a mobile platform. In this paper, we propose an efficient multi-task approach for RGB-D scene analysis~(EMSANet) that simultaneously performs semantic and instance segmentation~(panoptic segmentation), instance orientation estimation, and scene classification. We show that all tasks can be accomplished using a single neural network in real time on a mobile platform without diminishing performance - by contrast, the individual tasks are able to benefit from each other. In order to evaluate our multi-task approach, we extend the annotations of the common RGB-D indoor datasets NYUv2 and SUNRGB-D for instance segmentation and orientation estimation. To the best of our knowledge, we are the first to provide results in such a comprehensive multi-task setting for indoor scene analysis on NYUv2 and SUNRGB-D.
abstract_zh: 语义场景理解对于在各种环境中行动的移动代理至关重要。尽管语义分割已经提供了大量信息，但缺少有关单个对象以及一般场景的详细信息，但许多实际应用程序都需要这些信息。然而，由于移动平台上的计算和电池能力有限，单独解决多个任务成本高昂，并且无法实时完成。在本文中，我们提出了一种高效的 RGB-D 场景分析多任务方法（EMSANet），它同时执行语义和实例分割（全景分割）、实例方向估计和场景分类。我们证明，所有任务都可以在移动平台上使用单个神经网络实时完成，而不会降低性能 - 相比之下，各个任务能够相互受益。为了评估我们的多任务方法，我们扩展了常见 RGB-D 室内数据集 NYUv2 和 SUNRGB-D 的注释，用于实例分割和方向估计。据我们所知，我们是第一个在 NYUv2 和 SUNRGB-D 上提供如此全面的多任务设置室内场景分析结果的公司。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效的多任务RGB-D场景分析方法EMSANet，可同时实现语义与实例分割、实例方向估计和场景分类。
AI.motivation: 现有方法单独处理多任务效率低且无法满足移动平台实时性需求，而多任务协同可提升性能但缺乏有效实现方案。
AI.method: 设计单神经网络统一处理多任务，通过任务间特征共享与交互提升效率，并扩展NYUv2和SUNRGB-D数据集标注以支持实例分割与方向估计。
AI.result: 在移动平台实现实时多任务处理且性能无损失，首次在NYUv2和SUNRGB-D数据集上提供全面的多任务分析结果。
AI.conclusion: EMSANet验证了多任务协同的高效性，为室内场景分析提供了新的基准，证明了单网络多任务处理的可行性。

authors_text: Manuel Knott,Fernando Perez-Cruz,Thijs Defraeye
title: Facilitated machine learning for image-based fruit quality assessment
title_zh: 促进基于图像的水果质量评估的机器学习
abstract: Image-based machine learning models can be used to make the sorting and grading of agricultural products more efficient. In many regions, implementing such systems can be difficult due to the lack of centralization and automation of postharvest supply chains. Stakeholders are often too small to specialize in machine learning, and large training data sets are unavailable. We propose a machine learning procedure for images based on pre-trained Vision Transformers. It is easier to implement than the current standard approach of training Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) as we do not (re-)train deep neural networks. We evaluate our approach based on two data sets for apple defect detection and banana ripeness estimation. Our model achieves a competitive classification accuracy equal to or less than one percent below the best-performing CNN. At the same time, it requires three times fewer training samples to achieve a 90% accuracy.
summary: Image-based machine learning models can be used to make the sorting and grading of agricultural products more efficient. In many regions, implementing such systems can be difficult due to the lack of centralization and automation of postharvest supply chains. Stakeholders are often too small to specialize in machine learning, and large training data sets are unavailable. We propose a machine learning procedure for images based on pre-trained Vision Transformers. It is easier to implement than the current standard approach of training Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) as we do not (re-)train deep neural networks. We evaluate our approach based on two data sets for apple defect detection and banana ripeness estimation. Our model achieves a competitive classification accuracy equal to or less than one percent below the best-performing CNN. At the same time, it requires three times fewer training samples to achieve a 90% accuracy.
abstract_zh: 基于图像的机器学习模型可用于使农产品的分拣和分级更加高效。在许多地区，由于采后供应链缺乏集中化和自动化，实施此类系统可能很困难。利益相关者通常规模太小，无法专门从事机器学习，并且无法获得大型训练数据集。我们提出了一种基于预训练视觉变压器的图像机器学习程序。它比当前训练卷积神经网络（CNN）的标准方法更容易实现，因为我们不（重新）训练深度神经网络。我们根据苹果缺陷检测和香蕉成熟度估计的两个数据集评估我们的方法。我们的模型实现了具有竞争力的分类精度，比性能最佳的 CNN 低 1% 或更少。同时，它需要三倍的训练样本才能达到 90% 的准确率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于预训练Vision Transformers的简化机器学习方法，用于图像化的水果质量评估，减少训练数据需求。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN训练方法需要大量数据和专业知识，而农业供应链缺乏中央化和自动化，难以满足这些条件。
AI.method: 利用预训练Vision Transformers模型，无需重新训练深度神经网络，简化实施流程。
AI.result: 模型在苹果缺陷检测和香蕉成熟度估计数据集上达到与最佳CNN相当的准确率（低至1%差距），且训练样本需求减少三分之二。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为资源有限的农业场景提供了高效、易用的水果质量评估解决方案。

authors_text: Udayan Mandal,Amelia Regan,Julian Yarkony
title: Local Area Routes for Vehicle Routing Problems
title_zh: 车辆路径问题的本地区域路径
abstract: We consider an approach for improving the efficiency of column generation (CG) methods for solving vehicle routing problems. We introduce Local Area (LA) route relaxations, an alternative/complement to the commonly used ng-route relaxations and Decremental State Space Relaxations (DSSR) inside of CG formulations. LA routes are a subset of ng-routes and a super-set of elementary routes. Normally, the pricing stage of CG must produce elementary routes, which are routes without repeated customers, using processes which can be computationally expensive. Non-elementary routes visit at least one customer more than once, creating a cycle. LA routes relax the constraint of being an elementary route in such a manner as to permit efficient pricing. LA routes are best understood in terms of ng-route relaxations. Ng-routes are routes which are permitted to have non-localized cycles in space; this means that at least one intermediate customer (called a breaker) in the cycle must consider the starting customer in the cycle to be spatially far away. LA routes are described using a set of special indexes corresponding to customers on the route ordered from the start to the end of the route. LA route relaxations further restrict the set of permitted cycles beyond that of ng-routes by additionally enforcing that the breaker must be a located at a special index where the set of special indexes is defined recursively as follows. The first special index in the route is at index 1 meaning that it is associated with the first customer in the route. The k'th special index corresponds to the first customer after the k-1'th special index, that is not considered to be a neighbor of (considered spatially far from) the customer located at the k-1'th special index. We demonstrate that LA route relaxations can significantly improve the computational speed of pricing when compared to the standard DSSR.
summary: We consider an approach for improving the efficiency of column generation (CG) methods for solving vehicle routing problems. We introduce Local Area (LA) route relaxations, an alternative/complement to the commonly used ng-route relaxations and Decremental State Space Relaxations (DSSR) inside of CG formulations. LA routes are a subset of ng-routes and a super-set of elementary routes. Normally, the pricing stage of CG must produce elementary routes, which are routes without repeated customers, using processes which can be computationally expensive. Non-elementary routes visit at least one customer more than once, creating a cycle. LA routes relax the constraint of being an elementary route in such a manner as to permit efficient pricing. LA routes are best understood in terms of ng-route relaxations. Ng-routes are routes which are permitted to have non-localized cycles in space; this means that at least one intermediate customer (called a breaker) in the cycle must consider the starting customer in the cycle to be spatially far away. LA routes are described using a set of special indexes corresponding to customers on the route ordered from the start to the end of the route. LA route relaxations further restrict the set of permitted cycles beyond that of ng-routes by additionally enforcing that the breaker must be a located at a special index where the set of special indexes is defined recursively as follows. The first special index in the route is at index 1 meaning that it is associated with the first customer in the route. The k'th special index corresponds to the first customer after the k-1'th special index, that is not considered to be a neighbor of (considered spatially far from) the customer located at the k-1'th special index. We demonstrate that LA route relaxations can significantly improve the computational speed of pricing when compared to the standard DSSR.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑一种提高列生成（CG）方法效率的方法来解决车辆路径问题。我们引入局域 (LA) 路线松弛，这是 CG 公式中常用的 ng 路线松弛和递减状态空间松弛 (DSSR) 的替代/补充。 LA 路由是 ng-routes 的子集和基本路由的超集。通常，CG 的定价阶段必须产生基本路线，即没有重复客户的路线，使用计算成本较高的流程。非基本路线多次访问至少一个客户，从而形成一个循环。洛杉矶航线放宽了基本航线的限制，从而允许有效定价。 LA 路由最好通过 ng-route 放宽来理解。 Ng-routes是允许在空间中具有非局部循环的路线；这意味着循环中的至少一个中间客户（称为断路器）必须认为循环中的起始客户在空间上很远。 LA路线是用一组特殊索引来描述的，这些索引对应于路线上从起点到终点排序的客户。 LA 路线放宽进一步限制了 ng 路线之外的允许循环集，另外还强制断路器必须位于特殊索引处，其中特殊索引集递归定义如下。路线中的第一个特殊索引位于索引 1 处，这意味着它与路线中的第一个客户相关联。第k'个特殊索引对应于第k-1'个特殊索引之后的第一个客户，其不被认为是位于第k-1'个特殊索引处的客户的邻居（被认为在空间上远离）。我们证明，与标准 DSSR 相比，LA 路线放宽可以显着提高定价的计算速度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进车辆路径问题中列生成方法效率的局部区域路径（LA）松弛方法。
AI.motivation: 传统列生成方法在生成无重复客户的基本路径时计算成本较高，而现有松弛方法（如ng-route和DSSR）存在效率限制，需寻找更高效的路径松弛策略。
AI.method: 通过定义局部区域路径（LA）松弛，利用递归特殊索引限制循环结构，使路径在允许非基本循环的同时保持计算效率。
AI.result: 实验表明，LA路径松弛相比标准DSSR方法显著提升了定价阶段的计算速度。
AI.conclusion: LA路径松弛为车辆路径问题的列生成方法提供了更高效的替代方案，平衡了计算复杂性与解的质量。

authors_text: Holger Eichelberger,Gregory Palmer,Svenja Reimer,Tat Trong Vu,Hieu Do,Sofiane Laridi,Alexander Weber,Claudia Niederée,Thomas Hildebrandt
title: Developing an AI-enabled IIoT platform -- Lessons learned from early use case validation
title_zh: 开发支持人工智能的工业物联网平台——从早期用例验证中汲取的经验教训
abstract: For a broader adoption of AI in industrial production, adequate infrastructure capabilities are crucial. This includes easing the integration of AI with industrial devices, support for distributed deployment, monitoring, and consistent system configuration. Existing IIoT platforms still lack required capabilities to flexibly integrate reusable AI services and relevant standards such as Asset Administration Shells or OPC UA in an open, ecosystem-based manner. This is exactly what our next level Intelligent Industrial Production Ecosphere (IIP-Ecosphere) platform addresses, employing a highly configurable low-code based approach. In this paper, we introduce the design of this platform and discuss an early evaluation in terms of a demonstrator for AI-enabled visual quality inspection. This is complemented by insights and lessons learned during this early evaluation activity.
summary: For a broader adoption of AI in industrial production, adequate infrastructure capabilities are crucial. This includes easing the integration of AI with industrial devices, support for distributed deployment, monitoring, and consistent system configuration. Existing IIoT platforms still lack required capabilities to flexibly integrate reusable AI services and relevant standards such as Asset Administration Shells or OPC UA in an open, ecosystem-based manner. This is exactly what our next level Intelligent Industrial Production Ecosphere (IIP-Ecosphere) platform addresses, employing a highly configurable low-code based approach. In this paper, we introduce the design of this platform and discuss an early evaluation in terms of a demonstrator for AI-enabled visual quality inspection. This is complemented by insights and lessons learned during this early evaluation activity.
abstract_zh: 为了在工业生产中更广泛地采用人工智能，充足的基础设施能力至关重要。这包括简化人工智能与工业设备的集成，支持分布式部署、监控和一致的系统配置。现有的工业物联网平台仍然缺乏以开放、基于生态系统的方式灵活集成可重用人工智能服务和相关标准（例如资产管理外壳或 OPC UA）所需的能力。这正是我们的下一级智能工业生产生态圈 (IIP-Ecosphere) 平台所解决的问题，该平台采用高度可配置的低代码方法。在本文中，我们介绍了该平台的设计，并讨论了基于人工智能的视觉质量检测演示器的早期评估。在早期评估活动中获得的见解和经验教训对此进行了补充。

AI.tldr: 开发一个AI驱动的工业物联网（IIoT）平台，并分享早期使用案例验证的经验教训。
AI.motivation: 现有IIoT平台缺乏灵活集成AI服务和工业标准（如Asset Administration Shells、OPC UA）的能力，限制了AI在工业生产中的广泛应用。
AI.method: 采用高度可配置的低代码方法设计IIP-Ecosphere平台，支持分布式部署、监控和系统配置，并通过AI视觉质量检测演示器进行早期验证。
AI.result: 验证了平台在集成AI服务和工业标准方面的可行性，同时总结了关于系统配置、生态兼容性及实际部署的早期经验教训。
AI.conclusion: IIP-Ecosphere平台通过低代码架构解决了现有IIoT平台的不足，但需进一步优化以支持更复杂的工业场景和标准化集成。

authors_text: Seyed Mojtaba Marvasti-Zadeh,Mohammad N. S. Jahromi,Javad Khaghani,Devin Goodsman,Nilanjan Ray,Nadir Erbilgin
title: Learning-based Monocular 3D Reconstruction of Birds: A Contemporary Survey
title_zh: 基于学习的鸟类单目 3D 重建：当代调查
comment: Accepted in the International Conference on Patten Recognition Workshops (VAIB'22)
comments: Accepted in the International Conference on Patten Recognition Workshops (VAIB'22)
abstract: In nature, the collective behavior of animals, such as flying birds is dominated by the interactions between individuals of the same species. However, the study of such behavior among the bird species is a complex process that humans cannot perform using conventional visual observational techniques such as focal sampling in nature. For social animals such as birds, the mechanism of group formation can help ecologists understand the relationship between social cues and their visual characteristics over time (e.g., pose and shape). But, recovering the varying pose and shapes of flying birds is a highly challenging problem. A widely-adopted solution to tackle this bottleneck is to extract the pose and shape information from 2D image to 3D correspondence. Recent advances in 3D vision have led to a number of impressive works on the 3D shape and pose estimation, each with different pros and cons. To the best of our knowledge, this work is the first attempt to provide an overview of recent advances in 3D bird reconstruction based on monocular vision, give both computer vision and biology researchers an overview of existing approaches, and compare their characteristics.
summary: In nature, the collective behavior of animals, such as flying birds is dominated by the interactions between individuals of the same species. However, the study of such behavior among the bird species is a complex process that humans cannot perform using conventional visual observational techniques such as focal sampling in nature. For social animals such as birds, the mechanism of group formation can help ecologists understand the relationship between social cues and their visual characteristics over time (e.g., pose and shape). But, recovering the varying pose and shapes of flying birds is a highly challenging problem. A widely-adopted solution to tackle this bottleneck is to extract the pose and shape information from 2D image to 3D correspondence. Recent advances in 3D vision have led to a number of impressive works on the 3D shape and pose estimation, each with different pros and cons. To the best of our knowledge, this work is the first attempt to provide an overview of recent advances in 3D bird reconstruction based on monocular vision, give both computer vision and biology researchers an overview of existing approaches, and compare their characteristics.
abstract_zh: 在自然界中，动物（例如飞鸟）的集体行为由同一物种个体之间的相互作用主导。然而，对鸟类这种行为的研究是一个复杂的过程，人类无法使用传统的视觉观察技术（例如自然界中的焦点采样）来进行。对于鸟类等社会性动物来说，群体形成机制可以帮助生态学家理解社会线索与其视觉特征（例如姿势和形状）之间的关系。但是，恢复飞鸟的不同姿势和形状是一个极具挑战性的问题。解决这一瓶颈的一种广泛采用的解决方案是将姿态和形状信息从 2D 图像提取到 3D 对应关系。 3D 视觉的最新进展催生了许多关于 3D 形状和姿势估计的令人印象深刻的工作，每个工作都有不同的优点和缺点。据我们所知，这项工作是首次尝试概述基于单目视觉的 3D 鸟类重建的最新进展，让计算机视觉和生物学研究人员概述现有方法，并比较它们的特点。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了基于单目视觉的鸟类三维重建技术的最新进展。
AI.motivation: 传统观测技术难以捕捉鸟类群体动态，需通过3D重建分析其社会行为与视觉特征的关系。
AI.method: 通过比较不同3D形状和姿态估计方法，分析单目视觉下的鸟类重建技术。
AI.result: 总结了当前主流方法并比较其特性，为跨学科研究提供参考。
AI.conclusion: 首次系统综述单目鸟类3D重建技术，促进计算机视觉与生态学的交叉研究。

ai_content.tldr: 本文综述了基于单目视觉的鸟类三维重建技术的最新进展。
