search_text: Learning-based Monocular 3D Reconstruction of Birds: A Contemporary Survey 基于学习的鸟类单目 3D 重建：当代调查 In nature, the collective behavior of animals, such as flying birds is dominated by the interactions between individuals of the same species. However, the study of such behavior among the bird species is a complex process that humans cannot perform using conventional visual observational techniques such as focal sampling in nature. For social animals such as birds, the mechanism of group formation can help ecologists understand the relationship between social cues and their visual characteristics over time (e.g., pose and shape). But, recovering the varying pose and shapes of flying birds is a highly challenging problem. A widely-adopted solution to tackle this bottleneck is to extract the pose and shape information from 2D image to 3D correspondence. Recent advances in 3D vision have led to a number of impressive works on the 3D shape and pose estimation, each with different pros and cons. To the best of our knowledge, this work is the first attempt to provide an overview of recent advances in 3D bird reconstruction based on monocular vision, give both computer vision and biology researchers an overview of existing approaches, and compare their characteristics. 在自然界中，动物（例如飞鸟）的集体行为由同一物种个体之间的相互作用主导。然而，对鸟类这种行为的研究是一个复杂的过程，人类无法使用传统的视觉观察技术（例如自然界中的焦点采样）来进行。对于鸟类等社会性动物来说，群体形成机制可以帮助生态学家理解社会线索与其视觉特征（例如姿势和形状）之间的关系。但是，恢复飞鸟的不同姿势和形状是一个极具挑战性的问题。解决这一瓶颈的一种广泛采用的解决方案是将姿态和形状信息从 2D 图像提取到 3D 对应关系。 3D 视觉的最新进展催生了许多关于 3D 形状和姿势估计的令人印象深刻的工作，每个工作都有不同的优点和缺点。据我们所知，这项工作是首次尝试概述基于单目视觉的 3D 鸟类重建的最新进展，让计算机视觉和生物学研究人员概述现有方法，并比较它们的特点。 本文综述了基于单目视觉的鸟类三维重建技术的最新进展。 Seyed Mojtaba Marvasti-Zadeh,Mohammad N. S. Jahromi,Javad Khaghani,Devin Goodsman,Nilanjan Ray,Nadir Erbilgin cs.CV

authors_text: Abhinandan Jain,Pattie Maes,Misha Sra
title: Adaptive Virtual Neuroarchitecture
title_zh: 自适应虚拟神经架构
abstract: Our surrounding environment impacts our cognitive-emotional processes on a daily basis and shapes our physical, psychological and social wellbeing. Although the effects of the built environment on our psycho-physiological processes are well studied, virtual environment design with a potentially similar impact on the user, has received limited attention. Based on the influence of space design on a user and combining that with the dynamic affordances of virtual spaces, we present the idea of adaptive virtual neuroarchitecture (AVN), where virtual environments respond to the user and the user's real world context while simultaneously influencing them both in realtime. To show how AVN has been explored in current research, we present a sampling of recent work that demonstrates reciprocal relationships using physical affordances (space, objects), the user's state (physiological, cognitive, emotional), and the virtual world used in the design of novel virtual reality experiences. We believe AVN has the potential to help us learn how to design spaces and environments that can enhance the wellbeing of their inhabitants.
summary: Our surrounding environment impacts our cognitive-emotional processes on a daily basis and shapes our physical, psychological and social wellbeing. Although the effects of the built environment on our psycho-physiological processes are well studied, virtual environment design with a potentially similar impact on the user, has received limited attention. Based on the influence of space design on a user and combining that with the dynamic affordances of virtual spaces, we present the idea of adaptive virtual neuroarchitecture (AVN), where virtual environments respond to the user and the user's real world context while simultaneously influencing them both in realtime. To show how AVN has been explored in current research, we present a sampling of recent work that demonstrates reciprocal relationships using physical affordances (space, objects), the user's state (physiological, cognitive, emotional), and the virtual world used in the design of novel virtual reality experiences. We believe AVN has the potential to help us learn how to design spaces and environments that can enhance the wellbeing of their inhabitants.
abstract_zh: 我们周围的环境每天都会影响我们的认知情绪过程，并塑造我们的身体、心理和社会福祉。尽管建筑环境对我们心理生理过程的影响已得到充分研究，但对用户具有潜在类似影响的虚拟环境设计受到的关注有限。基于空间设计对用户的影响，并结合虚拟空间的动态可供性，我们提出了自适应虚拟神经架构（AVN）的想法，其中虚拟环境对用户和用户的现实世界环境做出响应，同时实时影响它们。为了展示当前研究中如何探索 AVN，我们展示了最近工作的一个样本，这些工作展示了使用物理可供性（空间、物体）、用户状态（生理、认知、情感）以及用于设计新颖的虚拟现实体验的虚拟世界的相互关系。我们相信 AVN 有潜力帮助我们学习如何设计能够提高居民福祉的空间和环境。

AI.tldr: 本文提出自适应虚拟神经建筑（AVN）概念，探讨虚拟环境如何通过实时响应用户状态和现实情境来影响其心理生理过程，并分析其在虚拟现实设计中的应用潜力。
AI.motivation: 尽管物理环境对人类心理生理影响已被广泛研究，但虚拟环境设计对用户的类似影响尚未得到充分关注，需探索虚拟空间与用户之间的动态交互机制以提升福祉。
AI.method: 结合空间设计原理与虚拟环境的动态特性，通过分析物理环境、用户状态（生理/认知/情感）及虚拟世界三者间的相互作用，采样近期研究案例展示AVN的实现方式。
AI.result: 展示了AVN通过实时双向交互影响用户状态的可行性，验证了虚拟环境设计在提升用户心理生理福祉方面的潜力。
AI.conclusion: AVN为设计具有积极心理影响的虚拟环境提供了新思路，未来可进一步探索其在医疗、教育等领域的应用价值。

authors_text: Aaron Bernstein,Nicole Wein
title: Closing the Gap Between Directed Hopsets and Shortcut Sets
title_zh: 缩小定向 Hopsets 和 Shortcut Sets 之间的差距
comment: Abstract shortened to meet arXiv requirements, v2: fixed a typo, v3: implemented reviewer comments
comments: Abstract shortened to meet arXiv requirements, v2: fixed a typo, v3: implemented reviewer comments
abstract: For an n-vertex directed graph $G = (V,E)$, a $β$-\emph{shortcut set} $H$ is a set of additional edges $H \subseteq V \times V$ such that $G \cup H$ has the same transitive closure as $G$, and for every pair $u,v \in V$, there is a $uv$-path in $G \cup H$ with at most $β$ edges. A natural generalization of shortcut sets to distances is a $(β,ε)$-\emph{hopset} $H \subseteq V \times V$, where the requirement is that $H$ and $G \cup H$ have the same shortest-path distances, and for every $u,v \in V$, there is a $(1+ε)$-approximate shortest path in $G \cup H$ with at most $β$ edges. There is a large literature on the tradeoff between the size of a shortcut set / hopset and the value of $β$. We highlight the most natural point on this tradeoff: what is the minimum value of $β$, such that for any graph $G$, there exists a $β$-shortcut set (or a $(β,ε)$-hopset) with $O(n)$ edges? Not only is this a natural structural question in its own right, but shortcuts sets / hopsets form the core of many distributed, parallel, and dynamic algorithms for reachability / shortest paths. Until very recently the best known upper bound was a folklore construction showing $β= O(n^{1/2})$, but in a breakthrough result Kogan and Parter [SODA 2022] improve this to $β= \tilde{O}(n^{1/3})$ for shortcut sets and $\tilde{O}(n^{2/5})$ for hopsets. Our result is to close the gap between shortcut sets and hopsets. That is, we show that for any graph $G$ and any fixed $ε$ there is a $(\tilde{O}(n^{1/3}),ε)$ hopset with $O(n)$ edges. More generally, we achieve a smooth tradeoff between hopset size and $β$ which exactly matches the tradeoff of Kogan and Parter for shortcut sets (up to polylog factors). Using a very recent black-box reduction of Kogan and Parter, our new hopset implies improved bounds for approximate distance preservers.
summary: For an n-vertex directed graph $G = (V,E)$, a $β$-\emph{shortcut set} $H$ is a set of additional edges $H \subseteq V \times V$ such that $G \cup H$ has the same transitive closure as $G$, and for every pair $u,v \in V$, there is a $uv$-path in $G \cup H$ with at most $β$ edges. A natural generalization of shortcut sets to distances is a $(β,ε)$-\emph{hopset} $H \subseteq V \times V$, where the requirement is that $H$ and $G \cup H$ have the same shortest-path distances, and for every $u,v \in V$, there is a $(1+ε)$-approximate shortest path in $G \cup H$ with at most $β$ edges. There is a large literature on the tradeoff between the size of a shortcut set / hopset and the value of $β$. We highlight the most natural point on this tradeoff: what is the minimum value of $β$, such that for any graph $G$, there exists a $β$-shortcut set (or a $(β,ε)$-hopset) with $O(n)$ edges? Not only is this a natural structural question in its own right, but shortcuts sets / hopsets form the core of many distributed, parallel, and dynamic algorithms for reachability / shortest paths. Until very recently the best known upper bound was a folklore construction showing $β= O(n^{1/2})$, but in a breakthrough result Kogan and Parter [SODA 2022] improve this to $β= \tilde{O}(n^{1/3})$ for shortcut sets and $\tilde{O}(n^{2/5})$ for hopsets. Our result is to close the gap between shortcut sets and hopsets. That is, we show that for any graph $G$ and any fixed $ε$ there is a $(\tilde{O}(n^{1/3}),ε)$ hopset with $O(n)$ edges. More generally, we achieve a smooth tradeoff between hopset size and $β$ which exactly matches the tradeoff of Kogan and Parter for shortcut sets (up to polylog factors). Using a very recent black-box reduction of Kogan and Parter, our new hopset implies improved bounds for approximate distance preservers.
abstract_zh: 对于 n 顶点有向图 $G = (V,E)$，$β$-\emph{shortcut set} $H$ 是一组附加边 $H \subseteq V \times V$，使得 $G \cup H$ 具有与 $G$ 相同的传递闭包，并且对于每对 $u,v \in V$，$G \cup H$ 中存在一条 $uv$ 路径，最多具有 $β$ 边。快捷方式集对距离的自然概括是 $(β,ε)$-\emph{hopset} $H \subseteq V \times V$，其中要求 $H$ 和 $G \cup H$ 具有相同的最短路径距离，并且对于 V$ 中的每个 $u,v \in V$，在 $G \cup H$ 中存在一条 $(1+ε)$ 近似最短路径，最多具有 $β$ 边。有大量文献讨论了快捷方式集/跳跃集的大小和 $β$ 值之间的权衡。我们强调这种权衡中最自然的一点：$β$ 的最小值是多少，这样对于任何图 $G$，都存在具有 $O(n)$ 边的 $β$-shortcut 集（或 $(β,ε)$-hopset）？这不仅是一个自然的结构问题，而且捷径集/跳跃集构成了许多分布式、并行和动态可达性/最短路径算法的核心。直到最近，最著名的上限还是民间传说构造，显示 $β= O(n^{1/2})$，但在突破性的结果中，Kogan 和 Parter [SODA 2022] 将其改进为 $β= \tilde{O}(n^{1/3})$（对于快捷方式集）和 $\tilde{O}(n^{2/5})$（对于跳集）。我们的结果是缩小快捷方式集和跳跃集之间的差距。也就是说，我们证明对于任何图 $G$ 和任何固定 $ε$ 都存在一个具有 $O(n)$ 边的 $(\tilde{O}(n^{1/3}),ε)$ hopset。更一般地说，我们在 hopset 大小和 $β$ 之间实现了平滑的权衡，这与 Kogan 和 Parter 对快捷方式集的权衡完全匹配（最多为多对数因子）。使用 Kogan 和 Parter 最近的黑盒简化，我们的新跳跃集意味着近似距离保持器的界限得到了改进。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了有向图中捷径集与跳集之间的差距，旨在用O(n)条边构建β值尽可能小的跳集，以匹配捷径集的最优参数。
AI.motivation: 此前捷径集和跳集之间存在差距，Kogan和Parter在捷径集上取得了β=Õ(n^{1/3})的突破，但跳集仅能达到Õ(n^{2/5})。本文希望填补这一差距，使跳集达到与捷径集相同的参数水平。
AI.method: 通过构造一种新的跳集设计方法，在保持O(n)条边的前提下，将跳集的β值改进到Õ(n^{1/3})，实现了与捷径集最优参数相匹配的平滑权衡。
AI.result: 对于任何有向图G和固定ε，存在一个(Õ(n^{1/3}), ε)-跳集，边数为O(n)。更一般地，实现了跳集大小与β之间的平滑权衡，完全匹配了Kogan和Parter对捷径集的结果（仅相差多对数因子）。
AI.conclusion: 该结果闭合了捷径集与跳集之间的差距，并借助Kogan和Parter的近期黑盒归约，新的跳集改进了近似距离保持器的上界。

search_text: Closing the Gap Between Directed Hopsets and Shortcut Sets 缩小定向 Hopsets 和 Shortcut Sets 之间的差距 For an n-vertex directed graph $G = (V,E)$, a $β$-\emph{shortcut set} $H$ is a set of additional edges $H \subseteq V \times V$ such that $G \cup H$ has the same transitive closure as $G$, and for every pair $u,v \in V$, there is a $uv$-path in $G \cup H$ with at most $β$ edges. A natural generalization of shortcut sets to distances is a $(β,ε)$-\emph{hopset} $H \subseteq V \times V$, where the requirement is that $H$ and $G \cup H$ have the same shortest-path distances, and for every $u,v \in V$, there is a $(1+ε)$-approximate shortest path in $G \cup H$ with at most $β$ edges. There is a large literature on the tradeoff between the size of a shortcut set / hopset and the value of $β$. We highlight the most natural point on this tradeoff: what is the minimum value of $β$, such that for any graph $G$, there exists a $β$-shortcut set (or a $(β,ε)$-hopset) with $O(n)$ edges? Not only is this a natural structural question in its own right, but shortcuts sets / hopsets form the core of many distributed, parallel, and dynamic algorithms for reachability / shortest paths. Until very recently the best known upper bound was a folklore construction showing $β= O(n^{1/2})$, but in a breakthrough result Kogan and Parter [SODA 2022] improve this to $β= \tilde{O}(n^{1/3})$ for shortcut sets and $\tilde{O}(n^{2/5})$ for hopsets. Our result is to close the gap between shortcut sets and hopsets. That is, we show that for any graph $G$ and any fixed $ε$ there is a $(\tilde{O}(n^{1/3}),ε)$ hopset with $O(n)$ edges. More generally, we achieve a smooth tradeoff between hopset size and $β$ which exactly matches the tradeoff of Kogan and Parter for shortcut sets (up to polylog factors). Using a very recent black-box reduction of Kogan and Parter, our new hopset implies improved bounds for approximate distance preservers. 对于 n 顶点有向图 $G = (V,E)$，$β$-\emph{shortcut set} $H$ 是一组附加边 $H \subseteq V \times V$，使得 $G \cup H$ 具有与 $G$ 相同的传递闭包，并且对于每对 $u,v \in V$，$G \cup H$ 中存在一条 $uv$ 路径，最多具有 $β$ 边。快捷方式集对距离的自然概括是 $(β,ε)$-\emph{hopset} $H \subseteq V \times V$，其中要求 $H$ 和 $G \cup H$ 具有相同的最短路径距离，并且对于 V$ 中的每个 $u,v \in V$，在 $G \cup H$ 中存在一条 $(1+ε)$ 近似最短路径，最多具有 $β$ 边。有大量文献讨论了快捷方式集/跳跃集的大小和 $β$ 值之间的权衡。我们强调这种权衡中最自然的一点：$β$ 的最小值是多少，这样对于任何图 $G$，都存在具有 $O(n)$ 边的 $β$-shortcut 集（或 $(β,ε)$-hopset）？这不仅是一个自然的结构问题，而且捷径集/跳跃集构成了许多分布式、并行和动态可达性/最短路径算法的核心。直到最近，最著名的上限还是民间传说构造，显示 $β= O(n^{1/2})$，但在突破性的结果中，Kogan 和 Parter [SODA 2022] 将其改进为 $β= \tilde{O}(n^{1/3})$（对于快捷方式集）和 $\tilde{O}(n^{2/5})$（对于跳集）。我们的结果是缩小快捷方式集和跳跃集之间的差距。也就是说，我们证明对于任何图 $G$ 和任何固定 $ε$ 都存在一个具有 $O(n)$ 边的 $(\tilde{O}(n^{1/3}),ε)$ hopset。更一般地说，我们在 hopset 大小和 $β$ 之间实现了平滑的权衡，这与 Kogan 和 Parter 对快捷方式集的权衡完全匹配（最多为多对数因子）。使用 Kogan 和 Parter 最近的黑盒简化，我们的新跳跃集意味着近似距离保持器的界限得到了改进。 本文研究了有向图中捷径集与跳集之间的差距，旨在用O(n)条边构建β值尽可能小的跳集，以匹配捷径集的最优参数。 Aaron Bernstein,Nicole Wein cs.DS

authors_text: Matteo Bettini,Amanda Prorok
title: On the properties of path additions for traffic routing
title_zh: 流量路由的路径添加特性
abstract: In this paper we investigate the impact of path additions to transport networks with optimised traffic routing. In particular, we study the behaviour of total travel time, and consider both self-interested routing paradigms, such as User Equilibrium (UE) routing, as well as cooperative paradigms, such as classic Multi-Commodity (MC) network flow and System Optimal (SO) routing. We provide a formal framework for designing transport networks through iterative path additions, introducing the concepts of trip spanning tree and trip path graph. Using this formalisation, we prove multiple properties of the objective function for transport network design. Since the underlying routing problem is NP-Hard, we investigate properties that provide guarantees in approximate algorithm design. Firstly, while Braess' paradox has shown that total travel time is not monotonic non-increasing with respect to path additions under self-interested routing (UE), we prove that, instead, monotonicity holds for cooperative routing (MC and SO). This result has the important implication that cooperative agents make the best use of redundant infrastructure. Secondly, we prove via a counterexample that the intuitive statement `adding a path to a transport network always grants greater or equal benefit to users than adding it to a superset of that network' is false. In other words we prove that, for all the routing formulations studied, total travel time is not supermodular with respect to path additions. While this counter-intuitive result yields a hardness property for algorithm design, we provide particular instances where, instead, the property of supermodularity holds. Our study on monotonicity and supermodularity of total travel time with respect to path additions provides formal proofs and scenarios that constitute important insights for transport network designers.
summary: In this paper we investigate the impact of path additions to transport networks with optimised traffic routing. In particular, we study the behaviour of total travel time, and consider both self-interested routing paradigms, such as User Equilibrium (UE) routing, as well as cooperative paradigms, such as classic Multi-Commodity (MC) network flow and System Optimal (SO) routing. We provide a formal framework for designing transport networks through iterative path additions, introducing the concepts of trip spanning tree and trip path graph. Using this formalisation, we prove multiple properties of the objective function for transport network design. Since the underlying routing problem is NP-Hard, we investigate properties that provide guarantees in approximate algorithm design. Firstly, while Braess' paradox has shown that total travel time is not monotonic non-increasing with respect to path additions under self-interested routing (UE), we prove that, instead, monotonicity holds for cooperative routing (MC and SO). This result has the important implication that cooperative agents make the best use of redundant infrastructure. Secondly, we prove via a counterexample that the intuitive statement `adding a path to a transport network always grants greater or equal benefit to users than adding it to a superset of that network' is false. In other words we prove that, for all the routing formulations studied, total travel time is not supermodular with respect to path additions. While this counter-intuitive result yields a hardness property for algorithm design, we provide particular instances where, instead, the property of supermodularity holds. Our study on monotonicity and supermodularity of total travel time with respect to path additions provides formal proofs and scenarios that constitute important insights for transport network designers.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了路径添加对具有优化流量路由的传输网络的影响。特别是，我们研究总旅行时间的行为，并考虑自利路由范式，例如用户均衡（UE）路由，以及合作范式，例如经典的多商品（MC）网络流和系统最优（SO）路由。我们提供了一个通过迭代路径添加来设计交通网络的正式框架，引入了行程生成树和行程路径图的概念。使用这种形式化，我们证明了传输网络设计目标函数的多个属性。由于底层路由问题是 NP-Hard，因此我们研究了为近似算法设计提供保证的属性。首先，虽然 Braess 悖论表明总旅行时间相对于自利路由（UE）下的路径添加而言不是单调非增加的，但我们证明单调性对于合作路由（MC 和 SO）成立。这一结果具有重要意义，即合作代理充分利用冗余基础设施。其次，我们通过反例证明，直观的说法“向传输网络添加路径总是比将其添加到该网络的超集给用户带来更大或相同的利益”是错误的。换句话说，我们证明，对于所研究的所有路由公式，总旅行时间相对于路径添加而言并不是超模的。虽然这种反直觉的结果产生了算法设计的硬度属性，但我们提供了超模块化属性成立的特定实例。我们对总旅行时间相对于路径添加的单调性和超模块化的研究提供了形式证明和场景，为交通网络设计者提供了重要的见解。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在交通网络中添加路径对总出行时间的影响，分析了不同路由策略下的网络设计特性。
AI.motivation: 理解交通网络中路径添加对出行效率的影响，为优化网络设计提供理论依据，解决自利与协作路由模式下的复杂性问题。
AI.method: 构建路径添加的迭代框架，引入行程生成树和路径图概念，通过数学证明与反例分析探讨总出行时间的单调性与超模性。
AI.result: 协作路由（MC/SO）下总出行时间具有单调性，而自利路由（UE）存在Braess悖论；总出行时间对路径添加不具有超模性，但特定场景下成立。
AI.conclusion: 协作路由能更高效利用冗余基础设施，但网络设计需应对非超模性带来的算法复杂性挑战。

authors_text: Yuan An,Jane Greenberg,Xintong Zhao,Xiaohua Hu,Scott McCLellan,Alex Kalinowski,Fernando J. Uribe-Romo,Kyle Langlois,Jacob Furst,Diego A. Gómez-Gualdrón,Fernando Fajardo-Rojas,Katherine Ardila
title: Building Open Knowledge Graph for Metal-Organic Frameworks (MOF-KG): Challenges and Case Studies
title_zh: 构建金属有机框架开放知识图（MOF-KG）：挑战和案例研究
comment: Accepted by the International Workshop on Knowledge Graphs and Open Knowledge Network (OKN'22) Co-located with the 28th ACM SIGKDD Conference
comments: Accepted by the International Workshop on Knowledge Graphs and Open Knowledge Network (OKN'22) Co-located with the 28th ACM SIGKDD Conference
abstract: Metal-Organic Frameworks (MOFs) are a class of modular, porous crystalline materials that have great potential to revolutionize applications such as gas storage, molecular separations, chemical sensing, catalysis, and drug delivery. The Cambridge Structural Database (CSD) reports 10,636 synthesized MOF crystals which in addition contains ca. 114,373 MOF-like structures. The sheer number of synthesized (plus potentially synthesizable) MOF structures requires researchers pursue computational techniques to screen and isolate MOF candidates. In this demo paper, we describe our effort on leveraging knowledge graph methods to facilitate MOF prediction, discovery, and synthesis. We present challenges and case studies about (1) construction of a MOF knowledge graph (MOF-KG) from structured and unstructured sources and (2) leveraging the MOF-KG for discovery of new or missing knowledge.
summary: Metal-Organic Frameworks (MOFs) are a class of modular, porous crystalline materials that have great potential to revolutionize applications such as gas storage, molecular separations, chemical sensing, catalysis, and drug delivery. The Cambridge Structural Database (CSD) reports 10,636 synthesized MOF crystals which in addition contains ca. 114,373 MOF-like structures. The sheer number of synthesized (plus potentially synthesizable) MOF structures requires researchers pursue computational techniques to screen and isolate MOF candidates. In this demo paper, we describe our effort on leveraging knowledge graph methods to facilitate MOF prediction, discovery, and synthesis. We present challenges and case studies about (1) construction of a MOF knowledge graph (MOF-KG) from structured and unstructured sources and (2) leveraging the MOF-KG for discovery of new or missing knowledge.
abstract_zh: 金属有机框架 (MOF) 是一类模块化多孔晶体材料，具有巨大的潜力，可以彻底改变气体存储、分子分离、化学传感、催化和药物输送等应用。剑桥结构数据库 (CSD) 报告了 10,636 个合成的 MOF 晶体，其中还含有约 10,636 个 MOF 晶体。 114,373 个类 MOF 结构。合成（加上潜在可合成）MOF 结构的绝对数量要求研究人员采用计算技术来筛选和分离 MOF 候选物。在这篇演示论文中，我们描述了我们利用知识图方法来促进 MOF 预测、发现和合成的努力。我们提出了以下方面的挑战和案例研究：(1) 从结构化和非结构化来源构建 MOF 知识图谱 (MOF-KG)，以及 (2) 利用 MOF-KG 发现新的或缺失的知识。

AI.tldr: 构建用于MOF预测与发现的开放知识图谱（MOF-KG），并探讨其在新知识发现中的应用挑战与案例
AI.motivation: 应对MOF结构数量庞大带来的筛选难题，通过知识图谱整合多源数据以提升预测与发现效率
AI.method: 从结构化和非结构化数据中构建MOF知识图谱，并应用图谱进行新知识挖掘与验证
AI.result: 成功构建MOF-KG并验证其在知识发现中的有效性，但具体性能指标未明确给出
AI.conclusion: 知识图谱方法为MOF研究提供新工具，但需进一步解决数据整合与知识推理的挑战

search_text: Building Open Knowledge Graph for Metal-Organic Frameworks (MOF-KG): Challenges and Case Studies 构建金属有机框架开放知识图（MOF-KG）：挑战和案例研究 Metal-Organic Frameworks (MOFs) are a class of modular, porous crystalline materials that have great potential to revolutionize applications such as gas storage, molecular separations, chemical sensing, catalysis, and drug delivery. The Cambridge Structural Database (CSD) reports 10,636 synthesized MOF crystals which in addition contains ca. 114,373 MOF-like structures. The sheer number of synthesized (plus potentially synthesizable) MOF structures requires researchers pursue computational techniques to screen and isolate MOF candidates. In this demo paper, we describe our effort on leveraging knowledge graph methods to facilitate MOF prediction, discovery, and synthesis. We present challenges and case studies about (1) construction of a MOF knowledge graph (MOF-KG) from structured and unstructured sources and (2) leveraging the MOF-KG for discovery of new or missing knowledge. 金属有机框架 (MOF) 是一类模块化多孔晶体材料，具有巨大的潜力，可以彻底改变气体存储、分子分离、化学传感、催化和药物输送等应用。剑桥结构数据库 (CSD) 报告了 10,636 个合成的 MOF 晶体，其中还含有约 10,636 个 MOF 晶体。 114,373 个类 MOF 结构。合成（加上潜在可合成）MOF 结构的绝对数量要求研究人员采用计算技术来筛选和分离 MOF 候选物。在这篇演示论文中，我们描述了我们利用知识图方法来促进 MOF 预测、发现和合成的努力。我们提出了以下方面的挑战和案例研究：(1) 从结构化和非结构化来源构建 MOF 知识图谱 (MOF-KG)，以及 (2) 利用 MOF-KG 发现新的或缺失的知识。 构建用于MOF预测与发现的开放知识图谱（MOF-KG），并探讨其在新知识发现中的应用挑战与案例 Yuan An,Jane Greenberg,Xintong Zhao,Xiaohua Hu,Scott McCLellan,Alex Kalinowski,Fernando J. Uribe-Romo,Kyle Langlois,Jacob Furst,Diego A. Gómez-Gualdrón,Fernando Fajardo-Rojas,Katherine Ardila cs.AI

authors_text: Xavier F. Cadet,Sara Ahmadi-Abhari,Hamed Haddadi
title: FIB: A Method for Evaluation of Feature Impact Balance in Multi-Dimensional Data
title_zh: FIB：一种多维数据中特征影响平衡评估方法
abstract: Errors might not have the same consequences depending on the task at hand. Nevertheless, there is limited research investigating the impact of imbalance in the contribution of different features in an error vector. Therefore, we propose the Feature Impact Balance (FIB) score. It measures whether there is a balanced impact of features in the discrepancies between two vectors. We designed the FIB score to lie in [0, 1]. Scores close to 0 indicate that a small number of features contribute to most of the error, and scores close to 1 indicate that most features contribute to the error equally. We experimentally study the FIB on different datasets, using AutoEncoders and Variational AutoEncoders. We show how the feature impact balance varies during training and showcase its usability to support model selection for single output and multi-output tasks.
summary: Errors might not have the same consequences depending on the task at hand. Nevertheless, there is limited research investigating the impact of imbalance in the contribution of different features in an error vector. Therefore, we propose the Feature Impact Balance (FIB) score. It measures whether there is a balanced impact of features in the discrepancies between two vectors. We designed the FIB score to lie in [0, 1]. Scores close to 0 indicate that a small number of features contribute to most of the error, and scores close to 1 indicate that most features contribute to the error equally. We experimentally study the FIB on different datasets, using AutoEncoders and Variational AutoEncoders. We show how the feature impact balance varies during training and showcase its usability to support model selection for single output and multi-output tasks.
abstract_zh: 根据手头的任务，错误可能不会产生相同的后果。然而，关于误差向量中不同特征的贡献不平衡的影响的研究还很有限。因此，我们提出功能影响平衡（FIB）评分。它衡量两个向量之间的差异是否存在特征的平衡影响。我们将 FIB 分数设计为 [0, 1]。接近 0 的分数表示少数特征对大部分错误有贡献，接近 1 的分数表示大多数特征对错误的贡献相同。我们使用自动编码器和变分自动编码器在不同数据集上实验研究 FIB。我们展示了特征影响平衡在训练期间如何变化，并展示了其支持单输出和多输出任务的模型选择的可用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为FIB（Feature Impact Balance）的评分方法，用于评估多维数据中特征影响的平衡性，以衡量不同特征在误差向量中的贡献差异。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对误差向量中不同特征贡献不平衡问题的系统性分析，而特征贡献的不平衡可能影响模型性能和可靠性，因此需要一种量化评估方法。
AI.method: 设计FIB评分范围为[0,1]，通过自编码器（AutoEncoders）和变分自编码器（Variational AutoEncoders）在不同数据集上实验，分析训练过程中特征影响平衡的变化规律。
AI.result: 实验验证了FIB评分在单输出和多输出任务中的有效性，展示了其在模型选择中的实用性，能够反映特征贡献的动态变化。
AI.conclusion: FIB评分提供了一种新的特征影响平衡评估工具，有助于优化模型设计并深入理解误差来源，为多维数据建模提供了理论支持。

authors_text: Shuwen Chai,Jinghui Chen
title: One-shot Neural Backdoor Erasing via Adversarial Weight Masking
title_zh: 通过对抗性权重掩蔽一次性消除神经后门
comment: Accepted by NeurIPS 2022 (19 pages, 6 figures, 10 tables)
comments: Accepted by NeurIPS 2022 (19 pages, 6 figures, 10 tables)
abstract: Recent studies show that despite achieving high accuracy on a number of real-world applications, deep neural networks (DNNs) can be backdoored: by injecting triggered data samples into the training dataset, the adversary can mislead the trained model into classifying any test data to the target class as long as the trigger pattern is presented. To nullify such backdoor threats, various methods have been proposed. Particularly, a line of research aims to purify the potentially compromised model. However, one major limitation of this line of work is the requirement to access sufficient original training data: the purifying performance is a lot worse when the available training data is limited. In this work, we propose Adversarial Weight Masking (AWM), a novel method capable of erasing the neural backdoors even in the one-shot setting. The key idea behind our method is to formulate this into a min-max optimization problem: first, adversarially recover the trigger patterns and then (soft) mask the network weights that are sensitive to the recovered patterns. Comprehensive evaluations of several benchmark datasets suggest that AWM can largely improve the purifying effects over other state-of-the-art methods on various available training dataset sizes.
summary: Recent studies show that despite achieving high accuracy on a number of real-world applications, deep neural networks (DNNs) can be backdoored: by injecting triggered data samples into the training dataset, the adversary can mislead the trained model into classifying any test data to the target class as long as the trigger pattern is presented. To nullify such backdoor threats, various methods have been proposed. Particularly, a line of research aims to purify the potentially compromised model. However, one major limitation of this line of work is the requirement to access sufficient original training data: the purifying performance is a lot worse when the available training data is limited. In this work, we propose Adversarial Weight Masking (AWM), a novel method capable of erasing the neural backdoors even in the one-shot setting. The key idea behind our method is to formulate this into a min-max optimization problem: first, adversarially recover the trigger patterns and then (soft) mask the network weights that are sensitive to the recovered patterns. Comprehensive evaluations of several benchmark datasets suggest that AWM can largely improve the purifying effects over other state-of-the-art methods on various available training dataset sizes.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究表明，尽管在许多现实世界的应用中实现了高精度，但深度神经网络（DNN）可能存在后门：通过将触发的数据样本注入训练数据集中，只要呈现触发模式，攻击者就可以误导训练模型将任何测试数据分类到目标类别。为了消除这种后门威胁，已经提出了各种方法。特别是，一系列研究旨在净化可能受到损害的模型。然而，这一工作的一个主要限制是需要访问足够的原始训练数据：当可用的训练数据有限时，净化性能会差很多。在这项工作中，我们提出了对抗性权重掩蔽（AWM），这是一种即使在一次性设置中也能够消除神经后门的新颖方法。我们的方法背后的关键思想是将其表述为最小-最大优化问题：首先，对抗性地恢复触发模式，然后（软）屏蔽对恢复模式敏感的网络权重。对多个基准数据集的综合评估表明，与其他最先进的方法相比，AWM 在各种可用的训练数据集大小上可以大大提高净化效果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为AWM的新方法，在仅有一例样本的情况下有效消除神经网络中的后门攻击。
AI.motivation: 现有去后门方法依赖大量原始训练数据，但在数据有限时效果显著下降，亟需一种低数据需求的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过构建最小-最大优化问题，首先对抗性恢复触发模式，再对敏感网络权重进行软掩码处理。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上验证表明，AWM在不同规模训练数据下均优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: AWM通过对抗权重掩码机制，在单样本设置下实现了高效后门消除，突破了传统方法对训练数据量的依赖限制。

authors_text: Yunyun Wang,Yao Liu,Songcan Chen
title: Towards Adaptive Unknown Authentication for Universal Domain Adaptation by Classifier Paradox
title_zh: 通过分类器悖论实现通用域自适应的自适应未知身份验证
abstract: Universal domain adaptation (UniDA) is a general unsupervised domain adaptation setting, which addresses both domain and label shifts in adaptation. Its main challenge lies in how to identify target samples in unshared or unknown classes. Previous methods commonly strive to depict sample "confidence" along with a threshold for rejecting unknowns, and align feature distributions of shared classes across domains. However, it is still hard to pre-specify a "confidence" criterion and threshold which are adaptive to various real tasks, and a mis-prediction of unknowns further incurs misalignment of features in shared classes. In this paper, we propose a new UniDA method with adaptive Unknown Authentication by Classifier Paradox (UACP), considering that samples with paradoxical predictions are probably unknowns belonging to none of the source classes. In UACP, a composite classifier is jointly designed with two types of predictors. That is, a multi-class (MC) predictor classifies samples to one of the multiple source classes, while a binary one-vs-all (OVA) predictor further verifies the prediction by MC predictor. Samples with verification failure or paradox are identified as unknowns. Further, instead of feature alignment for shared classes, implicit domain alignment is conducted in output space such that samples across domains share the same decision boundary, though with feature discrepancy. Empirical results validate UACP under both open-set and universal UDA settings.
summary: Universal domain adaptation (UniDA) is a general unsupervised domain adaptation setting, which addresses both domain and label shifts in adaptation. Its main challenge lies in how to identify target samples in unshared or unknown classes. Previous methods commonly strive to depict sample "confidence" along with a threshold for rejecting unknowns, and align feature distributions of shared classes across domains. However, it is still hard to pre-specify a "confidence" criterion and threshold which are adaptive to various real tasks, and a mis-prediction of unknowns further incurs misalignment of features in shared classes. In this paper, we propose a new UniDA method with adaptive Unknown Authentication by Classifier Paradox (UACP), considering that samples with paradoxical predictions are probably unknowns belonging to none of the source classes. In UACP, a composite classifier is jointly designed with two types of predictors. That is, a multi-class (MC) predictor classifies samples to one of the multiple source classes, while a binary one-vs-all (OVA) predictor further verifies the prediction by MC predictor. Samples with verification failure or paradox are identified as unknowns. Further, instead of feature alignment for shared classes, implicit domain alignment is conducted in output space such that samples across domains share the same decision boundary, though with feature discrepancy. Empirical results validate UACP under both open-set and universal UDA settings.
abstract_zh: 通用域适应（UniDA）是一种通用的无监督域适应设置，它解决了适应中的域和标签移位问题。它的主要挑战在于如何识别非共享或未知类别中的目标样本。以前的方法通常努力描述样本“置信度”以及拒绝未知数的阈值，并跨域对齐共享类的特征分布。然而，仍然很难预先指定适应各种实际任务的“置信度”标准和阈值，并且对未知数的错误预测进一步导致共享类中特征的错位。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的 UniDA 方法，该方法具有自适应分类器悖论未知认证 (UACP)，考虑到具有矛盾预测的样本可能不属于任何源类。在UACP中，复合分类器是与两种类型的预测器联合设计的。也就是说，多类 (MC) 预测器将样本分类到多个源类之一，而二进制一对多 (OVA) 预测器进一步验证 MC 预测器的预测。验证失败或存在悖论的样本被识别为未知样本。此外，不是共享类的特征对齐，而是在输出空间中进行隐式域对齐，使得跨域的样本共享相同的决策边界，尽管存在特征差异。实证结果在开放集和通用 UDA 设置下验证了 UACP。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的通用域适应方法UACP，通过分类器悖论实现自适应未知样本认证，解决域适应中的未知类别识别问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以预设适应不同任务的置信度标准和阈值，且误判未知样本会导致共享类别特征对齐错误，亟需更鲁棒的未知样本识别机制。
AI.method: 设计复合分类器包含多类预测器和二元OVA验证器，通过预测悖论识别未知样本，并在输出空间进行隐式域对齐而非特征空间对齐。
AI.result: 实验验证UACP在开放集和通用UDA设置下均有效，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过分类器悖论机制和输出空间对齐，UACP实现了自适应未知样本认证，为通用域适应提供了新思路。

search_text: Towards Adaptive Unknown Authentication for Universal Domain Adaptation by Classifier Paradox 通过分类器悖论实现通用域自适应的自适应未知身份验证 Universal domain adaptation (UniDA) is a general unsupervised domain adaptation setting, which addresses both domain and label shifts in adaptation. Its main challenge lies in how to identify target samples in unshared or unknown classes. Previous methods commonly strive to depict sample "confidence" along with a threshold for rejecting unknowns, and align feature distributions of shared classes across domains. However, it is still hard to pre-specify a "confidence" criterion and threshold which are adaptive to various real tasks, and a mis-prediction of unknowns further incurs misalignment of features in shared classes. In this paper, we propose a new UniDA method with adaptive Unknown Authentication by Classifier Paradox (UACP), considering that samples with paradoxical predictions are probably unknowns belonging to none of the source classes. In UACP, a composite classifier is jointly designed with two types of predictors. That is, a multi-class (MC) predictor classifies samples to one of the multiple source classes, while a binary one-vs-all (OVA) predictor further verifies the prediction by MC predictor. Samples with verification failure or paradox are identified as unknowns. Further, instead of feature alignment for shared classes, implicit domain alignment is conducted in output space such that samples across domains share the same decision boundary, though with feature discrepancy. Empirical results validate UACP under both open-set and universal UDA settings. 通用域适应（UniDA）是一种通用的无监督域适应设置，它解决了适应中的域和标签移位问题。它的主要挑战在于如何识别非共享或未知类别中的目标样本。以前的方法通常努力描述样本“置信度”以及拒绝未知数的阈值，并跨域对齐共享类的特征分布。然而，仍然很难预先指定适应各种实际任务的“置信度”标准和阈值，并且对未知数的错误预测进一步导致共享类中特征的错位。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的 UniDA 方法，该方法具有自适应分类器悖论未知认证 (UACP)，考虑到具有矛盾预测的样本可能不属于任何源类。在UACP中，复合分类器是与两种类型的预测器联合设计的。也就是说，多类 (MC) 预测器将样本分类到多个源类之一，而二进制一对多 (OVA) 预测器进一步验证 MC 预测器的预测。验证失败或存在悖论的样本被识别为未知样本。此外，不是共享类的特征对齐，而是在输出空间中进行隐式域对齐，使得跨域的样本共享相同的决策边界，尽管存在特征差异。实证结果在开放集和通用 UDA 设置下验证了 UACP。 本文提出一种新的通用域适应方法UACP，通过分类器悖论实现自适应未知样本认证，解决域适应中的未知类别识别问题。 Yunyun Wang,Yao Liu,Songcan Chen cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Maoyuan Ye,Jing Zhang,Shanshan Zhao,Juhua Liu,Bo Du,Dacheng Tao
title: DPText-DETR: Towards Better Scene Text Detection with Dynamic Points in Transformer
title_zh: DPText-DETR：利用 Transformer 中的动态点实现更好的场景文本检测
abstract: Recently, Transformer-based methods, which predict polygon points or Bezier curve control points for localizing texts, are popular in scene text detection. However, these methods built upon detection transformer framework might achieve sub-optimal training efficiency and performance due to coarse positional query modeling.In addition, the point label form exploited in previous works implies the reading order of humans, which impedes the detection robustness from our observation. To address these challenges, this paper proposes a concise Dynamic Point Text DEtection TRansformer network, termed DPText-DETR. In detail, DPText-DETR directly leverages explicit point coordinates to generate position queries and dynamically updates them in a progressive way. Moreover, to improve the spatial inductive bias of non-local self-attention in Transformer, we present an Enhanced Factorized Self-Attention module which provides point queries within each instance with circular shape guidance. Furthermore, we design a simple yet effective positional label form to tackle the side effect of the previous form. To further evaluate the impact of different label forms on the detection robustness in real-world scenario, we establish an Inverse-Text test set containing 500 manually labeled images. Extensive experiments prove the high training efficiency, robustness, and state-of-the-art performance of our method on popular benchmarks. The code and the Inverse-Text test set are available at https://github.com/ymy-k/DPText-DETR.
summary: Recently, Transformer-based methods, which predict polygon points or Bezier curve control points for localizing texts, are popular in scene text detection. However, these methods built upon detection transformer framework might achieve sub-optimal training efficiency and performance due to coarse positional query modeling.In addition, the point label form exploited in previous works implies the reading order of humans, which impedes the detection robustness from our observation. To address these challenges, this paper proposes a concise Dynamic Point Text DEtection TRansformer network, termed DPText-DETR. In detail, DPText-DETR directly leverages explicit point coordinates to generate position queries and dynamically updates them in a progressive way. Moreover, to improve the spatial inductive bias of non-local self-attention in Transformer, we present an Enhanced Factorized Self-Attention module which provides point queries within each instance with circular shape guidance. Furthermore, we design a simple yet effective positional label form to tackle the side effect of the previous form. To further evaluate the impact of different label forms on the detection robustness in real-world scenario, we establish an Inverse-Text test set containing 500 manually labeled images. Extensive experiments prove the high training efficiency, robustness, and state-of-the-art performance of our method on popular benchmarks. The code and the Inverse-Text test set are available at https://github.com/ymy-k/DPText-DETR.
abstract_zh: 最近，基于 Transformer 的方法在场景文本检测中很流行，这种方法可以预测多边形点或贝塞尔曲线控制点来定位文本。然而，由于粗略的位置查询建模，这些建立在检测变压器框架上的方法可能会达到次优的训练效率和性能。此外，之前的工作中利用的点标签形式暗示了人类的阅读顺序，这阻碍了我们观察到的检测鲁棒性。为了应对这些挑战，本文提出了一种简洁的动态点文本检测 TRansformer 网络，称为 DPText-DETR。具体来说，DPText-DETR直接利用显式点坐标来生成位置查询并以渐进的方式动态更新它们。此外，为了改善 Transformer 中非局部自注意力的空间归纳偏差，我们提出了一个增强型分解自注意力模块，该模块在每个实例内提供带有圆形形状指导的点查询。此外，我们设计了一种简单而有效的位置标签形式来解决以前形式的副作用。为了进一步评估不同标签形式对现实场景中检测鲁棒性的影响，我们建立了一个包含 500 个手动标记图像的逆文本测试集。大量的实验证明了我们的方法在流行基准上的高训练效率、鲁棒性和最先进的性能。代码和逆文本测试集可在 https://github.com/ymy-k/DPText-DETR 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DPText-DETR方法，通过动态点坐标和增强注意力机制改进场景文本检测的效率和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于Transformer的文本检测方法因位置查询建模粗糙和标签形式限制，导致训练效率低且检测鲁棒性不足。
AI.method: 动态生成点坐标作为位置查询，设计增强分解自注意力模块，并提出新的位置标签形式以提升模型表现。
AI.result: 在主流基准上达到SOTA性能，训练效率提升，Inverse-Text测试集验证了方法鲁棒性，代码和数据集已开源。
AI.conclusion: DPText-DETR通过动态点建模和结构改进，有效解决了场景文本检测中的效率与鲁棒性问题。

authors_text: Matias Greco,Álvaro Torralba,Jorge A. Baier,Hector Palacios
title: Scaling up ML-based Black-box Planning with Partial STRIPS Models
title_zh: 使用部分 STRIPS 模型扩展基于 ML 的黑盒规划
comment: 10 pages. Presented in workshops: RDDPS @ ICAPS 2022 and PRL @ IJCAI 2022
comments: 10 pages. Presented in workshops: RDDPS @ ICAPS 2022 and PRL @ IJCAI 2022
abstract: A popular approach for sequential decision-making is to perform simulator-based search guided with Machine Learning (ML) methods like policy learning. On the other hand, model-relaxation heuristics can guide the search effectively if a full declarative model is available. In this work, we consider how a practitioner can improve ML-based black-box planning on settings where a complete symbolic model is not available. We show that specifying an incomplete STRIPS model that describes only part of the problem enables the use of relaxation heuristics. Our findings on several planning domains suggest that this is an effective way to improve ML-based black-box planning beyond collecting more data or tuning ML architectures.
summary: A popular approach for sequential decision-making is to perform simulator-based search guided with Machine Learning (ML) methods like policy learning. On the other hand, model-relaxation heuristics can guide the search effectively if a full declarative model is available. In this work, we consider how a practitioner can improve ML-based black-box planning on settings where a complete symbolic model is not available. We show that specifying an incomplete STRIPS model that describes only part of the problem enables the use of relaxation heuristics. Our findings on several planning domains suggest that this is an effective way to improve ML-based black-box planning beyond collecting more data or tuning ML architectures.
abstract_zh: 顺序决策的一种流行方法是在策略学习等机器学习 (ML) 方法的指导下执行基于模拟器的搜索。另一方面，如果完整的声明性模型可用，模型松弛启发式可以有效地指导搜索。在这项工作中，我们考虑从业者如何在无法获得完整符号模型的情况下改进基于机器学习的黑盒规划。我们证明，指定一个仅描述问题的一部分的不完整 STRIPS 模型可以使用松弛启发法。我们在多个规划领域的研究结果表明，这是改进基于 ML 的黑盒规划的有效方法，而不仅仅是收集更多数据或调整 ML 架构。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨如何在没有完整符号模型的情况下，通过部分STRIPS模型提升基于机器学习的黑盒规划效果。
AI.motivation: 传统规划方法依赖完整符号模型或大量数据，但在实际场景中常面临模型不完整或数据不足的挑战，需寻找更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出利用部分STRIPS模型（仅描述问题局部信息）结合放松启发式方法，指导机器学习驱动的黑盒规划过程。
AI.result: 实验表明，在多个规划领域中，该方法能有效提升规划性能，优于单纯增加数据量或优化ML架构的方案。
AI.conclusion: 部分STRIPS模型为黑盒规划提供了新的启发式引导方式，在模型不完整场景下具有显著优势。

ai_content.tldr: 本文探讨如何在没有完整符号模型的情况下，通过部分STRIPS模型提升基于机器学习的黑盒规划效果。
ai_content.motivation: 传统规划方法依赖完整符号模型或大量数据，但在实际场景中常面临模型不完整或数据不足的挑战，需寻找更高效的解决方案。
ai_content.method: 提出利用部分STRIPS模型（仅描述问题局部信息）结合放松启发式方法，指导机器学习驱动的黑盒规划过程。
ai_content.result: 实验表明，在多个规划领域中，该方法能有效提升规划性能，优于单纯增加数据量或优化ML架构的方案。
ai_content.conclusion: 部分STRIPS模型为黑盒规划提供了新的启发式引导方式，在模型不完整场景下具有显著优势。

ai_content_json.tldr: 本文探讨如何在没有完整符号模型的情况下，通过部分STRIPS模型提升基于机器学习的黑盒规划效果。

search_text: Scaling up ML-based Black-box Planning with Partial STRIPS Models 使用部分 STRIPS 模型扩展基于 ML 的黑盒规划 A popular approach for sequential decision-making is to perform simulator-based search guided with Machine Learning (ML) methods like policy learning. On the other hand, model-relaxation heuristics can guide the search effectively if a full declarative model is available. In this work, we consider how a practitioner can improve ML-based black-box planning on settings where a complete symbolic model is not available. We show that specifying an incomplete STRIPS model that describes only part of the problem enables the use of relaxation heuristics. Our findings on several planning domains suggest that this is an effective way to improve ML-based black-box planning beyond collecting more data or tuning ML architectures. 顺序决策的一种流行方法是在策略学习等机器学习 (ML) 方法的指导下执行基于模拟器的搜索。另一方面，如果完整的声明性模型可用，模型松弛启发式可以有效地指导搜索。在这项工作中，我们考虑从业者如何在无法获得完整符号模型的情况下改进基于机器学习的黑盒规划。我们证明，指定一个仅描述问题的一部分的不完整 STRIPS 模型可以使用松弛启发法。我们在多个规划领域的研究结果表明，这是改进基于 ML 的黑盒规划的有效方法，而不仅仅是收集更多数据或调整 ML 架构。 本文探讨如何在没有完整符号模型的情况下，通过部分STRIPS模型提升基于机器学习的黑盒规划效果。 Matias Greco,Álvaro Torralba,Jorge A. Baier,Hector Palacios cs.AI,cs.CL,cs.LG

authors_text: Jeong Choi,Seongwon Jang,Hyunsouk Cho,Sehee Chung
title: Towards Proper Contrastive Self-supervised Learning Strategies For Music Audio Representation
title_zh: 音乐音频表示的正确对比自监督学习策略
comment: 2022 IEEE International Conference on Multimedia and Expo (ICME)
comments: 2022 IEEE International Conference on Multimedia and Expo (ICME)
abstract: The common research goal of self-supervised learning is to extract a general representation which an arbitrary downstream task would benefit from. In this work, we investigate music audio representation learned from different contrastive self-supervised learning schemes and empirically evaluate the embedded vectors on various music information retrieval (MIR) tasks where different levels of the music perception are concerned. We analyze the results to discuss the proper direction of contrastive learning strategies for different MIR tasks. We show that these representations convey a comprehensive information about the auditory characteristics of music in general, although each of the self-supervision strategies has its own effectiveness in certain aspect of information.
summary: The common research goal of self-supervised learning is to extract a general representation which an arbitrary downstream task would benefit from. In this work, we investigate music audio representation learned from different contrastive self-supervised learning schemes and empirically evaluate the embedded vectors on various music information retrieval (MIR) tasks where different levels of the music perception are concerned. We analyze the results to discuss the proper direction of contrastive learning strategies for different MIR tasks. We show that these representations convey a comprehensive information about the auditory characteristics of music in general, although each of the self-supervision strategies has its own effectiveness in certain aspect of information.
abstract_zh: 自监督学习的共同研究目标是提取任意下游任务都可以从中受益的一般表示。在这项工作中，我们研究了从不同对比自监督学习方案中学习到的音乐音频表示，并根据经验评估了涉及不同级别音乐感知的各种音乐信息检索（MIR）任务中的嵌入向量。我们分析结果，讨论不同 MIR 任务的对比学习策略的正确方向。我们表明，这些表示总体上传达了有关音乐听觉特征的全面信息，尽管每种自我监督策略在信息的某些方面都有其自身的有效性。

AI.tldr: 研究并评估不同对比自监督学习策略在音乐音频表示中的效果，以提升音乐信息检索任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 自监督学习旨在提取通用表示，但不同策略在不同音乐信息检索任务中的效果存在差异，需探讨适合不同任务的对比学习策略。
AI.method: 通过对比不同自监督学习框架，评估其在多个音乐信息检索任务中的嵌入向量表现，并分析结果以确定各策略的适用场景。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，不同策略提取的表示在特定信息方面有效，且整体上能捕捉音乐的听觉特征。
AI.conclusion: 不同对比学习策略在音乐音频表示中各有优势，但整体上能有效捕捉音乐特征，需根据具体MIR任务选择合适策略。

authors_text: Suman Sapkota,Binod Bhattarai
title: Noisy Heuristics NAS: A Network Morphism based Neural Architecture Search using Heuristics
title_zh: Noisy Heuristics NAS：使用启发式的基于网络形态的神经架构搜索
comment: 11 pages, 10 figures, DyNN workshop at the 39 th International Conference on Machine Learning, 2022
comments: 11 pages, 10 figures, DyNN workshop at the 39 th International Conference on Machine Learning, 2022
abstract: Network Morphism based Neural Architecture Search (NAS) is one of the most efficient methods, however, knowing where and when to add new neurons or remove dis-functional ones is generally left to black-box Reinforcement Learning models. In this paper, we present a new Network Morphism based NAS called Noisy Heuristics NAS which uses heuristics learned from manually developing neural network models and inspired by biological neuronal dynamics. Firstly, we add new neurons randomly and prune away some to select only the best fitting neurons. Secondly, we control the number of layers in the network using the relationship of hidden units to the number of input-output connections. Our method can increase or decrease the capacity or non-linearity of models online which is specified with a few meta-parameters by the user. Our method generalizes both on toy datasets and on real-world data sets such as MNIST, CIFAR-10, and CIFAR-100. The performance is comparable to the hand-engineered architecture ResNet-18 with the similar parameters.
summary: Network Morphism based Neural Architecture Search (NAS) is one of the most efficient methods, however, knowing where and when to add new neurons or remove dis-functional ones is generally left to black-box Reinforcement Learning models. In this paper, we present a new Network Morphism based NAS called Noisy Heuristics NAS which uses heuristics learned from manually developing neural network models and inspired by biological neuronal dynamics. Firstly, we add new neurons randomly and prune away some to select only the best fitting neurons. Secondly, we control the number of layers in the network using the relationship of hidden units to the number of input-output connections. Our method can increase or decrease the capacity or non-linearity of models online which is specified with a few meta-parameters by the user. Our method generalizes both on toy datasets and on real-world data sets such as MNIST, CIFAR-10, and CIFAR-100. The performance is comparable to the hand-engineered architecture ResNet-18 with the similar parameters.
abstract_zh: 基于网络形态的神经架构搜索（NAS）是最有效的方法之一，然而，了解何时何地添加新神经元或删除功能失调的神经元通常留给黑盒强化学习模型。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的基于网络形态的 NAS，称为 Noisy Heuristics NAS，它使用从手动开发神经网络模型中学习到的启发式方法，并受到生物神经元动力学的启发。首先，我们随机添加新神经元并删除一些神经元以仅选择最适合的神经元。其次，我们使用隐藏单元与输入输出连接数量的关系来控制网络中的层数。我们的方法可以增加或减少在线模型的容量或非线性，这是由用户用一些元参数指定的。我们的方法概括了玩具数据集和现实世界数据集（例如 MNIST、CIFAR-10 和 CIFAR-100）。其性能与具有相似参数的手工设计的架构 ResNet-18 相当。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于网络形态学和启发式规则的神经网络架构搜索方法，通过随机添加和剪枝神经元优化模型结构。
AI.motivation: 传统基于网络形态学的NAS依赖黑箱强化学习决定神经元增删策略，缺乏可解释性且效率较低。
AI.method: 采用启发式规则随机添加神经元并剪枝低效单元，通过输入输出连接数控制层数，利用少量元参数动态调整模型容量和非线性程度。
AI.result: 在MNIST、CIFAR-10/100等数据集上表现与ResNet-18相当，且参数量相近。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过生物启发式规则替代强化学习，在保持性能的同时提升了NAS的效率和可解释性。

authors_text: Peng Wang,Yuan Liu,Guying Lin,Jiatao Gu,Lingjie Liu,Taku Komura,Wenping Wang
title: Progressively-connected Light Field Network for Efficient View Synthesis
title_zh: 用于高效视图合成的渐进式连接光场网络
abstract: This paper presents a Progressively-connected Light Field network (ProLiF), for the novel view synthesis of complex forward-facing scenes. ProLiF encodes a 4D light field, which allows rendering a large batch of rays in one training step for image- or patch-level losses. Directly learning a neural light field from images has difficulty in rendering multi-view consistent images due to its unawareness of the underlying 3D geometry. To address this problem, we propose a progressive training scheme and regularization losses to infer the underlying geometry during training, both of which enforce the multi-view consistency and thus greatly improves the rendering quality. Experiments demonstrate that our method is able to achieve significantly better rendering quality than the vanilla neural light fields and comparable results to NeRF-like rendering methods on the challenging LLFF dataset and Shiny Object dataset. Moreover, we demonstrate better compatibility with LPIPS loss to achieve robustness to varying light conditions and CLIP loss to control the rendering style of the scene. Project page: https://totoro97.github.io/projects/prolif.
summary: This paper presents a Progressively-connected Light Field network (ProLiF), for the novel view synthesis of complex forward-facing scenes. ProLiF encodes a 4D light field, which allows rendering a large batch of rays in one training step for image- or patch-level losses. Directly learning a neural light field from images has difficulty in rendering multi-view consistent images due to its unawareness of the underlying 3D geometry. To address this problem, we propose a progressive training scheme and regularization losses to infer the underlying geometry during training, both of which enforce the multi-view consistency and thus greatly improves the rendering quality. Experiments demonstrate that our method is able to achieve significantly better rendering quality than the vanilla neural light fields and comparable results to NeRF-like rendering methods on the challenging LLFF dataset and Shiny Object dataset. Moreover, we demonstrate better compatibility with LPIPS loss to achieve robustness to varying light conditions and CLIP loss to control the rendering style of the scene. Project page: https://totoro97.github.io/projects/prolif.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种渐进连接光场网络（ProLiF），用于复杂前向场景的新颖视图合成。 ProLiF 对 4D 光场进行编码，允许在一个训练步骤中渲染大量光线，以实现图像或块级损失。由于不了解底层的 3D 几何结构，直接从图像学习神经光场很难渲染多视图一致的图像。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种渐进式训练方案和正则化损失来在训练期间推断底层几何，这两者都增强了多视图一致性，从而大大提高了渲染质量。实验表明，我们的方法能够实现比普通神经光场明显更好的渲染质量，并且在具有挑战性的 LLFF 数据集和 Shiny Object 数据集上获得与类似 NeRF 的渲染方法相当的结果。此外，我们还展示了与 LPIPS 损失的更好兼容性，以实现对不同光照条件的鲁棒性，以及与 CLIP 损失的更好兼容性，以控制场景的渲染风格。项目页面：https://totoro97.github.io/projects/prolif。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种渐进连接光场网络（ProLiF），用于复杂正面场景的高效新视角合成，通过编码4D光场并结合渐进训练与正则化损失提升渲染质量。
AI.motivation: 直接从图像学习神经光场时，因缺乏对底层3D几何的感知，难以生成多视角一致的图像，需通过渐进训练和几何推理解决此问题。
AI.method: 设计渐进连接的光场网络结构，结合渐进训练方案与正则化损失，利用4D光场编码和多视角一致性约束，同时兼容LPIPS与CLIP损失优化光照鲁棒性和风格控制。
AI.result: 在LLFF和Shiny Object数据集上，ProLiF的渲染质量显著优于传统神经光场，接近NeRF类方法，并在光照变化和风格控制任务中表现更优。
AI.conclusion: ProLiF通过渐进几何推理和多损失联合优化，有效提升了光场渲染的多视角一致性与鲁棒性，为高效视角合成提供了新思路。

search_text: Progressively-connected Light Field Network for Efficient View Synthesis 用于高效视图合成的渐进式连接光场网络 This paper presents a Progressively-connected Light Field network (ProLiF), for the novel view synthesis of complex forward-facing scenes. ProLiF encodes a 4D light field, which allows rendering a large batch of rays in one training step for image- or patch-level losses. Directly learning a neural light field from images has difficulty in rendering multi-view consistent images due to its unawareness of the underlying 3D geometry. To address this problem, we propose a progressive training scheme and regularization losses to infer the underlying geometry during training, both of which enforce the multi-view consistency and thus greatly improves the rendering quality. Experiments demonstrate that our method is able to achieve significantly better rendering quality than the vanilla neural light fields and comparable results to NeRF-like rendering methods on the challenging LLFF dataset and Shiny Object dataset. Moreover, we demonstrate better compatibility with LPIPS loss to achieve robustness to varying light conditions and CLIP loss to control the rendering style of the scene. authors_text: Jie Gao,Jing Hu,Wanqing Sun,Yili Shen,Xiaonan Zhang,Xiaomin Fang,Fan Wang,Guodong Zhao
title: TCR: A Transformer Based Deep Network for Predicting Cancer Drugs Response
title_zh: TCR：基于 Transformer 的深度网络，用于预测癌症药物反应
abstract: Predicting clinical outcomes to anti-cancer drugs on a personalized basis is challenging in cancer treatment due to the heterogeneity of tumors. Traditional computational efforts have been made to model the effect of drug response on individual samples depicted by their molecular profile, yet overfitting occurs because of the high dimension for omics data, hindering models from clinical application. Recent research shows that deep learning is a promising approach to build drug response models by learning alignment patterns between drugs and samples. However, existing studies employed the simple feature fusion strategy and only considered the drug features as a whole representation while ignoring the substructure information that may play a vital role when aligning drugs and genes. Hereby in this paper, we propose TCR (Transformer based network for Cancer drug Response) to predict anti-cancer drug response. By utilizing an attention mechanism, TCR is able to learn the interactions between drug atom/sub-structure and molecular signatures efficiently in our study. Furthermore, a dual loss function and cross sampling strategy were designed to improve the prediction power of TCR. We show that TCR outperformed all other methods under various data splitting strategies on all evaluation matrices (some with significant improvement). Extensive experiments demonstrate that TCR shows significantly improved generalization ability on independent in-vitro experiments and in-vivo real patient data. Our study highlights the prediction power of TCR and its potential value for cancer drug repurpose and precision oncology treatment.
summary: Predicting clinical outcomes to anti-cancer drugs on a personalized basis is challenging in cancer treatment due to the heterogeneity of tumors. Traditional computational efforts have been made to model the effect of drug response on individual samples depicted by their molecular profile, yet overfitting occurs because of the high dimension for omics data, hindering models from clinical application. Recent research shows that deep learning is a promising approach to build drug response models by learning alignment patterns between drugs and samples. However, existing studies employed the simple feature fusion strategy and only considered the drug features as a whole representation while ignoring the substructure information that may play a vital role when aligning drugs and genes. Hereby in this paper, we propose TCR (Transformer based network for Cancer drug Response) to predict anti-cancer drug response. By utilizing an attention mechanism, TCR is able to learn the interactions between drug atom/sub-structure and molecular signatures efficiently in our study. Furthermore, a dual loss function and cross sampling strategy were designed to improve the prediction power of TCR. We show that TCR outperformed all other methods under various data splitting strategies on all evaluation matrices (some with significant improvement). Extensive experiments demonstrate that TCR shows significantly improved generalization ability on independent in-vitro experiments and in-vivo real patient data. Our study highlights the prediction power of TCR and its potential value for cancer drug repurpose and precision oncology treatment.
abstract_zh: 由于肿瘤的异质性，在癌症治疗中个性化预测抗癌药物的临床结果具有挑战性。传统的计算工作是为了模拟药物反应对分子概况描述的单个样本的影响，但由于组学数据的高维度，会发生过度拟合，阻碍了模型的临床应用。最近的研究表明，深度学习是通过学习药物和样本之间的对齐模式来构建药物反应模型的一种有前景的方法。然而，现有研究采用简单的特征融合策略，仅将药物特征视为整体表示，而忽略了在对齐药物和基因时可能发挥至关重要作用的子结构信息。因此，在本文中，我们提出TCR（基于变压器的癌症药物反应网络）来预测抗癌药物反应。在我们的研究中，通过利用注意力机制，TCR 能够有效地学习药物原子/子结构与分子特征之间的相互作用。此外，还设计了双损失函数和交叉采样策略来提高TCR的预测能力。我们表明，TCR 在所有评估矩阵上的各种数据分割策略下都优于所有其他方法（有些有显着改进）。大量实验表明，TCR 在独立体外实验和体内真实患者数据上显示出显着提高的泛化能力。我们的研究强调了 TCR 的预测能力及其对癌症药物再利用和精准肿瘤治疗的潜在价值。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于Transformer的深度网络TCR，用于预测癌症药物反应。
AI.motivation: 传统方法因高维组学数据导致过拟合且忽略药物子结构信息，难以准确预测个性化抗癌药物反应。
AI.method: 设计基于注意力机制的Transformer网络，结合药物原子/子结构与分子特征，并采用双损失函数和交叉采样策略。
AI.result: TCR在多种数据分割策略下优于所有现有方法，且在独立体外实验和体内患者数据中表现出显著泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: TCR在癌症药物再利用和精准肿瘤治疗中具有重要应用价值。

authors_text: Lei Yang,Xinyu Zhang,Li Wang,Minghan Zhu,Chuang Zhang,Jun Li
title: Mix-Teaching: A Simple, Unified and Effective Semi-Supervised Learning Framework for Monocular 3D Object Detection
title_zh: 混合教学：一种简单、统一、有效的单目 3D 物体检测半监督学习框架
abstract: Monocular 3D object detection is an essential perception task for autonomous driving. However, the high reliance on large-scale labeled data make it costly and time-consuming during model optimization. To reduce such over-reliance on human annotations, we propose Mix-Teaching, an effective semi-supervised learning framework applicable to employ both labeled and unlabeled images in training stage. Mix-Teaching first generates pseudo-labels for unlabeled images by self-training. The student model is then trained on the mixed images possessing much more intensive and precise labeling by merging instance-level image patches into empty backgrounds or labeled images. This is the first to break the image-level limitation and put high-quality pseudo labels from multi frames into one image for semi-supervised training. Besides, as a result of the misalignment between confidence score and localization quality, it's hard to discriminate high-quality pseudo-labels from noisy predictions using only confidence-based criterion. To that end, we further introduce an uncertainty-based filter to help select reliable pseudo boxes for the above mixing operation. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first unified SSL framework for monocular 3D object detection. Mix-Teaching consistently improves MonoFlex and GUPNet by significant margins under various labeling ratios on KITTI dataset. For example, our method achieves around +6.34% AP@0.7 improvement against the GUPNet baseline on validation set when using only 10% labeled data. Besides, by leveraging full training set and the additional 48K raw images of KITTI, it can further improve the MonoFlex by +4.65% improvement on AP@0.7 for car detection, reaching 18.54% AP@0.7, which ranks the 1st place among all monocular based methods on KITTI test leaderboard. The code and pretrained models will be released at https://github.com/yanglei18/Mix-Teaching.
summary: Monocular 3D object detection is an essential perception task for autonomous driving. However, the high reliance on large-scale labeled data make it costly and time-consuming during model optimization. To reduce such over-reliance on human annotations, we propose Mix-Teaching, an effective semi-supervised learning framework applicable to employ both labeled and unlabeled images in training stage. Mix-Teaching first generates pseudo-labels for unlabeled images by self-training. The student model is then trained on the mixed images possessing much more intensive and precise labeling by merging instance-level image patches into empty backgrounds or labeled images. This is the first to break the image-level limitation and put high-quality pseudo labels from multi frames into one image for semi-supervised training. Besides, as a result of the misalignment between confidence score and localization quality, it's hard to discriminate high-quality pseudo-labels from noisy predictions using only confidence-based criterion. To that end, we further introduce an uncertainty-based filter to help select reliable pseudo boxes for the above mixing operation. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first unified SSL framework for monocular 3D object detection. Mix-Teaching consistently improves MonoFlex and GUPNet by significant margins under various labeling ratios on KITTI dataset. For example, our method achieves around +6.34% AP@0.7 improvement against the GUPNet baseline on validation set when using only 10% labeled data. Besides, by leveraging full training set and the additional 48K raw images of KITTI, it can further improve the MonoFlex by +4.65% improvement on AP@0.7 for car detection, reaching 18.54% AP@0.7, which ranks the 1st place among all monocular based methods on KITTI test leaderboard. The code and pretrained models will be released at https://github.com/yanglei18/Mix-Teaching.
abstract_zh: 单目 3D 物体检测是自动驾驶的一项重要感知任务。然而，对大规模标记数据的高度依赖使得模型优化过程成本高昂且耗时。为了减少对人类注释的过度依赖，我们提出了混合教学，这是一种有效的半监督学习框架，适用于在训练阶段使用标记和未标记图像。 Mix-Teaching首先通过自我训练为未标记的图像生成伪标签。然后，通过将实例级图像块合并到空背景或标记图像中，在具有更密集和更精确标记的混合图像上训练学生模型。这是第一个打破图像级别的限制，将多帧的高质量伪标签放入一张图像中进行半监督训练。此外，由于置信度分数和定位质量之间的不一致，仅使用基于置信度的标准很难区分高质量的伪标签和噪声预测。为此，我们进一步引入基于不确定性的滤波器来帮助为上述混合操作选择可靠的伪框。据我们所知，这是第一个用于单目 3D 物体检测的统一 SSL 框架。在 KITTI 数据集上的各种标记比率下，混合教学持续显着地改进了 MonoFlex 和 GUPNet。例如，当仅使用 10% 的标记数据时，我们的方法在验证集上相对于 GUPNet 基线实现了约 +6.34% AP@0.7 的改进。此外，通过利用KITTI的完整训练集和额外的48K原始图像，它可以进一步将MonoFlex在汽车检测AP@0.7上提高+4.65%，达到18.54% AP@0.7，在KITTI测试排行榜上所有基于单目的方法中排名第一。代码和预训练模型将在https://github.com/yanglei18/Mix-Teaching发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Mix-Teaching框架，通过半监督学习结合标注和未标注图像，提升单目3D目标检测性能。
AI.motivation: 单目3D目标检测高度依赖标注数据，成本高昂。现有方法难以有效利用未标注数据，且伪标签质量筛选机制不足。
AI.method: 通过自训练生成伪标签，将多帧伪标签融合至单张图像中进行训练；引入不确定性过滤器筛选可靠伪标签，突破图像级限制。
AI.result: 在KITTI数据集上，使用10%标注数据时GUPNet提升6.34% AP@0.7；结合全部数据与48K未标注图像后，MonoFlex汽车检测达18.54% AP@0.7，位列单目方法第一。
AI.conclusion: Mix-Teaching是首个统一的单目3D目标检测半监督框架，通过多帧伪标签融合与不确定性过滤显著提升模型性能。

search_text: Mix-Teaching: A Simple, Unified and Effective Semi-Supervised Learning Framework for Monocular 3D Object Detection 混合教学：一种简单、统一、有效的单目 3D 物体检测半监督学习框架 Monocular 3D object detection is an essential perception task for autonomous driving. However, the high reliance on large-scale labeled data make it costly and time-consuming during model optimization. To reduce such over-reliance on human annotations, we propose Mix-Teaching, an effective semi-supervised learning framework applicable to employ both labeled and unlabeled images in training stage. Mix-Teaching first generates pseudo-labels for unlabeled images by self-training. The student model is then trained on the mixed images possessing much more intensive and precise labeling by merging instance-level image patches into empty backgrounds or labeled images. This is the first to break the image-level limitation and put high-quality pseudo labels from multi frames into one image for semi-supervised training. Besides, as a result of the misalignment between confidence score and localization quality, it's hard to discriminate high-quality pseudo-labels from noisy predictions using only confidence-based criterion. To that end, we further introduce an uncertainty-based filter to help select reliable pseudo boxes for the above mixing operation. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first unified SSL framework for monocular 3D object detection. Mix-Teaching consistently improves MonoFlex and GUPNet by significant margins under various labeling ratios on KITTI dataset. For example, our method achieves around +6.34% AP@0.7 improvement against the GUPNet baseline on validation set when using only 10% labeled data. Besides, by leveraging full training set and the additional 48K raw images of KITTI, it can further improve the MonoFlex by +4.65% improvement on AP@0.7 for car detection, reaching 18.54% AP@0.7, which ranks the 1st place among all monocular based methods on KITTI test leaderboard. The code and pretrained models will be released at https://github.com/yanglei18/Mix-Teaching. 单目 3D 物体检测是自动驾驶的一项重要感知任务。然而，对大规模标记数据的高度依赖使得模型优化过程成本高昂且耗时。为了减少对人类注释的过度依赖，我们提出了混合教学，这是一种有效的半监督学习框架，适用于在训练阶段使用标记和未标记图像。 Mix-Teaching首先通过自我训练为未标记的图像生成伪标签。然后，通过将实例级图像块合并到空背景或标记图像中，在具有更密集和更精确标记的混合图像上训练学生模型。这是第一个打破图像级别的限制，将多帧的高质量伪标签放入一张图像中进行半监督训练。此外，由于置信度分数和定位质量之间的不一致，仅使用基于置信度的标准很难区分高质量的伪标签和噪声预测。为此，我们进一步引入基于不确定性的滤波器来帮助为上述混合操作选择可靠的伪框。据我们所知，这是第一个用于单目 3D 物体检测的统一 SSL 框架。在 KITTI 数据集上的各种标记比率下，混合教学持续显着地改进了 MonoFlex 和 GUPNet。例如，当仅使用 10% 的标记数据时，我们的方法在验证集上相对于 GUPNet 基线实现了约 +6.34% AP@0.7 的改进。此外，通过利用KITTI的完整训练集和额外的48K原始图像，它可以进一步将MonoFlex在汽车检测AP@0.7上提高+4.65%，达到18.54% AP@0.7，在KITTI测试排行榜上所有基于单目的方法中排名第一。代码和预训练模型将在https://github.com/yanglei18/Mix-Teaching发布。 本文提出Mix-Teaching框架，通过半监督学习结合标注和未标注图像，提升单目3D目标检测性能。 Lei Yang,Xinyu Zhang,Li Wang,Minghan Zhu,Chuang Zhang,Jun Li cs.CV

authors_text: Anat Hashavit,Hongning Wang,Tamar Stern,Sarit Kraus
title: Not Just Skipping. Understanding the Effect of Sponsored Content on Users' Decision-Making in Online Health Search
title_zh: 不仅仅是跳过。了解赞助内容对在线健康搜​​索中用户决策的影响
abstract: Advertisements (ads) are an innate part of search engine business models. Advertisers are willing to pay search engines to promote their content to a prominent position in the search result page (SERP). This raises concerns about the search engine manipulation effect (SEME): the opinions of users can be influenced by the way search results are presented. In this work, we investigate the connection between SEME and sponsored content in the health domain. We conduct a series of user studies in which participants need to evaluate the effectiveness of different non-prescription natural remedies for various medical conditions. We present participants SERPs with different intentionally created biases towards certain viewpoints, with or without sponsored content, and ask them to evaluate the effectiveness of the treatment only based on the information presented to them. We investigate two types of sponsored content: 1. Direct marketing ads that directly market the product without expressing an opinion about its effectiveness, and 2. Indirect marketing ads that explicitly advocate the product's effectiveness on the condition in the query. Our results reveal a significant difference between the influence on users from these two ad types. Though direct marketing ads are mostly skipped by users, they can tilt users decision making towards more positive viewpoints. Indirect marketing ads affect both the users' examination behaviour and their perception of the treatment's effectiveness. We further discover that the contrast between the indirect marketing ads and the viewpoint presented in the organic search results plays an important role in users' decision-making. When the contrast is high, users exhibit a strong preference towards a negative viewpoint, and when the contrast is low or none, users exhibit preference towards a more positive viewpoint.

Advertisers are willing to pay search engines to promote their content to a prominent position in the search result page (SERP). This raises concerns about the search engine manipulation effect (SEME): the opinions of users can be influenced by the way search results are presented. In this work, we investigate the connection between SEME and sponsored content in the health domain. We conduct a series of user studies in which participants need to evaluate the effectiveness of different non-prescription natural remedies for various medical conditions. We present participants SERPs with different intentionally created biases towards certain viewpoints, with or without sponsored content, and ask them to evaluate the effectiveness of the treatment only based on the information presented to them. We investigate two types of sponsored content: 1. Direct marketing ads that directly market the product without expressing an opinion about its effectiveness, and 2. Indirect marketing ads that explicitly advocate the product's effectiveness on the condition in the query. Our results reveal a significant difference between the influence on users from these two ad types. Though direct marketing ads are mostly skipped by users, they can tilt users decision making towards more positive viewpoints. Indirect marketing ads affect both the users' examination behaviour and their perception of the treatment's effectiveness. We further discover that the contrast between the indirect marketing ads and the viewpoint presented in the organic search results plays an important role in users' decision-making. When the contrast is high, users exhibit a strong preference towards a negative viewpoint, and when the contrast is low or none, users exhibit preference towards a more positive viewpoint.
abstract_zh: 广告（ads）是搜索引擎商业模式的固有组成部分。广告商愿意向搜索引擎付费，以将其内容推广到搜索结果页面 (SERP) 的显着位置。这引起了人们对搜索引擎操纵效应（SEME）的担忧：用户的意见可能会受到搜索结果呈现方式的影响。在这项工作中，我们研究了 SEME 和健康领域赞助内容之间的联系。我们进行了一系列用户研究，参与者需要评估不同非处方自然疗法对各种医疗状况的有效性。我们向参与者提供对某些观点有意制造的不同偏见的 SERP，无论是否有赞助内容，并要求他们仅根据提供给他们的信息来评估治疗的有效性。我们调查了两种类型的赞助内容：1. 直接营销广告，直接营销产品而不对其有效性发表意见；2. 间接营销广告，根据查询中的条件明确宣传产品的有效性。我们的结果揭示了这两种广告类型对用户的影响存在显着差异。尽管直接营销广告大多被用户跳过，但它们可以使用户的决策朝着更积极的观点倾斜。间接营销广告会影响用户的检查行为及其对治疗效果的看法。我们进一步发现，间接营销广告与有机搜索结果中呈现的观点之间的对比在用户的决策中起着重要作用。当对比度高时，用户表现出对消极观点的强烈偏好，而当对比度低或无对比度时，用户表现出对更积极的观点的偏好。

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨了在线健康搜索中付费广告对用户决策的影响，通过实验分析不同类型的广告如何改变用户对非处方自然疗法有效性的判断。
AI.motivation: 搜索引擎中的广告可能通过结果呈现方式影响用户观点（SEME效应），尤其在健康领域可能对用户决策产生重要影响，需明确不同类型广告的具体作用机制。
AI.method: 通过用户实验，让参与者在包含不同偏见的搜索结果页面（SERP）中评估非处方疗法有效性，对比直接广告（仅推广产品）和间接广告（声称疗效）对用户行为和判断的影响。
AI.result: 直接广告虽常被跳过，但仍使用户更倾向于积极观点；间接广告同时影响用户浏览行为和疗效判断，且其与自然搜索结果的对比度越高，用户越倾向负面观点。
AI.conclusion: 付费广告显著影响健康搜索中的用户决策，间接广告效果更强烈，广告与自然结果的对比度是关键因素，需警惕广告对健康信息判断的潜在操控风险。

When the contrast is high, users exhibit a strong preference towards a negative viewpoint, and when the contrast is low or none, users exhibit preference towards a more positive viewpoint. 广告（ads）是搜索引擎商业模式的固有组成部分。广告商愿意向搜索引擎付费，以将其内容推广到搜索结果页面 (SERP) 的显着位置。这引起了人们对搜索引擎操纵效应（SEME）的担忧：用户的意见可能会受到搜索结果呈现方式的影响。在这项工作中，我们研究了 SEME 和健康领域赞助内容之间的联系。我们进行了一系列用户研究，参与者需要评估不同非处方自然疗法对各种医疗状况的有效性。我们向参与者提供对某些观点有意制造的不同偏见的 SERP，无论是否有赞助内容，并要求他们仅根据提供给他们的信息来评估治疗的有效性。我们调查了两种类型的赞助内容：1. 直接营销广告，直接营销产品而不对其有效性发表意见；2. 间接营销广告，根据查询中的条件明确宣传产品的有效性。我们的结果揭示了这两种广告类型对用户的影响存在显着差异。尽管直接营销广告大多被用户跳过，但它们可以使用户的决策朝着更积极的观点倾斜。间接营销广告会影响用户的检查行为及其对治疗效果的看法。我们进一步发现，间接营销广告与有机搜索结果中呈现的观点之间的对比在用户的决策中起着重要作用。当对比度高时，用户表现出对消极观点的强烈偏好，而当对比度低或无对比度时，用户表现出对更积极的观点的偏好。 本研究探讨了在线健康搜索中付费广告对用户决策的影响，通过实验分析不同类型的广告如何改变用户对非处方自然疗法有效性的判断。 Anat Hashavit,Hongning Wang,Tamar Stern,Sarit Kraus cs.IR,cs.HC

authors_text: Jiawen Zhu,Xin Chen,Pengyu Zhang,Xinying Wang,Dong Wang,Wenda Zhao,Huchuan Lu
title: SRRT: Exploring Search Region Regulation for Visual Object Tracking
title_zh: SRRT：探索视觉对象跟踪的搜索区域规则
abstract: The dominant trackers generate a fixed-size rectangular region based on the previous prediction or initial bounding box as the model input, i.e., search region. While this manner obtains promising tracking efficiency, a fixed-size search region lacks flexibility and is likely to fail in some cases, e.g., fast motion and distractor interference. Trackers tend to lose the target object due to the limited search region or experience interference from distractors due to the excessive search region. Drawing inspiration from the pattern humans track an object, we propose a novel tracking paradigm, called Search Region Regulation Tracking (SRRT) that applies a small eyereach when the target is captured and zooms out the search field when the target is about to be lost. SRRT applies a proposed search region regulator to estimate an optimal search region dynamically for each frame, by which the tracker can flexibly respond to transient changes in the location of object occurrences. To adapt the object's appearance variation during online tracking, we further propose a lockingstate determined updating strategy for reference frame updating. The proposed SRRT is concise without bells and whistles, yet achieves evident improvements and competitive results with other state-of-the-art trackers on eight benchmarks. On the large-scale LaSOT benchmark, SRRT improves SiamRPN++ and TransT with absolute gains of 4.6% and 3.1% in terms of AUC. The code and models will be released.
summary: The dominant trackers generate a fixed-size rectangular region based on the previous prediction or initial bounding box as the model input, i.e., search region. While this manner obtains promising tracking efficiency, a fixed-size search region lacks flexibility and is likely to fail in some cases, e.g., fast motion and distractor interference. Trackers tend to lose the target object due to the limited search region or experience interference from distractors due to the excessive search region. Drawing inspiration from the pattern humans track an object, we propose a novel tracking paradigm, called Search Region Regulation Tracking (SRRT) that applies a small eyereach when the target is captured and zooms out the search field when the target is about to be lost. SRRT applies a proposed search region regulator to estimate an optimal search region dynamically for each frame, by which the tracker can flexibly respond to transient changes in the location of object occurrences. To adapt the object's appearance variation during online tracking, we further propose a lockingstate determined updating strategy for reference frame updating. The proposed SRRT is concise without bells and whistles, yet achieves evident improvements and competitive results with other state-of-the-art trackers on eight benchmarks. On the large-scale LaSOT benchmark, SRRT improves SiamRPN++ and TransT with absolute gains of 4.6% and 3.1% in terms of AUC. The code and models will be released.
abstract_zh: 主导跟踪器基于先前的预测或初始边界框生成固定大小的矩形区域作为模型输入，即搜索区域。虽然这种方式获得了有希望的跟踪效率，但固定大小的搜索区域缺乏灵活性，并且在某些情况下可能会失败，例如快速运动和干扰物干扰。由于搜索区域有限，跟踪器往往会丢失目标对象，或者由于搜索区域过多而受到干扰物的干扰。从人类跟踪物体的模式中汲取灵感，我们提出了一种新颖的跟踪范式，称为搜索区域调节跟踪（SRRT），它在捕获目标时应用较小的视线范围，并在目标即将丢失时缩小搜索范围。 SRRT应用提出的搜索区域调节器来动态估计每帧的最佳搜索区域，通过该区域跟踪器可以灵活地响应对象出现位置的瞬态变化。为了适应在线跟踪期间对象的外观变化，我们进一步提出了一种用于参考帧更新的锁定状态确定的更新策略。所提出的 SRRT 简洁明了，没有花哨的东西，但在八个基准测试中与其他最先进的跟踪器相比取得了明显的改进和竞争结果。在大规模 LaSOT 基准上，SRRT 改进了 SiamRPN++ 和 TransT，AUC 绝对增益分别为 4.6% 和 3.1%。代码和模型将被发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SRRT的视觉目标跟踪方法，通过动态调节搜索区域来提高跟踪性能。
AI.motivation: 现有跟踪器使用固定大小的搜索区域，导致在目标快速运动或存在干扰物时容易丢失目标或受到干扰。
AI.method: 提出搜索区域调节器动态估计每帧最优搜索区域，并设计锁定状态更新策略以适应目标外观变化。
AI.result: 在八大数据集上取得显著改进，尤其在LaSOT基准测试中较SiamRPN++和TransT分别提升4.6%和3.1%的AUC指标。
AI.conclusion: SRRT通过灵活调节搜索区域有效解决了固定区域的局限性，以简洁方法实现了与先进跟踪器竞争的性能。

authors_text: Lin Li,Chao Chen,Lei Pan,Yonghang Tai,Jun Zhang,Yang Xiang
title: Hiding Your Signals: A Security Analysis of PPG-based Biometric Authentication
title_zh: 隐藏您的信号：基于 PPG 的生物识别身份验证的安全分析
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
comments: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
abstract: Recently, physiological signal-based biometric systems have received wide attention. Unlike traditional biometric features, physiological signals can not be easily compromised (usually unobservable to human eyes). Photoplethysmography (PPG) signal is easy to measure, making it more attractive than many other physiological signals for biometric authentication. However, with the advent of remote PPG (rPPG), unobservability has been challenged when the attacker can remotely steal the rPPG signals by monitoring the victim's face, subsequently posing a threat to PPG-based biometrics. In PPG-based biometric authentication, current attack approaches mandate the victim's PPG signal, making rPPG-based attacks neglected. In this paper, we firstly analyze the security of PPG-based biometrics, including user authentication and communication protocols. We evaluate the signal waveforms, heart rate and inter-pulse-interval information extracted by five rPPG methods, including four traditional optical computing methods (CHROM, POS, LGI, PCA) and one deep learning method (CL_rPPG). We conducted experiments on five datasets (PURE, UBFC_rPPG, UBFC_Phys, LGI_PPGI, and COHFACE) to collect a comprehensive set of results. Our empirical studies show that rPPG poses a serious threat to the authentication system. The success rate of the rPPG signal spoofing attack in the user authentication system reached 0.35. The bit hit rate is 0.6 in inter-pulse-interval-based security protocols. Further, we propose an active defence strategy to hide the physiological signals of the face to resist the attack. It reduces the success rate of rPPG spoofing attacks in user authentication to 0.05. The bit hit rate was reduced to 0.5, which is at the level of a random guess. Our strategy effectively prevents the exposure of PPG signals to protect users' sensitive physiological data.
