Unlike traditional biometric features, physiological signals can not be easily compromised (usually unobservable to human eyes). Photoplethysmography (PPG) signal is easy to measure, making it more attractive than many other physiological signals for biometric authentication. However, with the advent of remote PPG (rPPG), unobservability has been challenged when the attacker can remotely steal the rPPG signals by monitoring the victim's face, subsequently posing a threat to PPG-based biometrics. In PPG-based biometric authentication, current attack approaches mandate the victim's PPG signal, making rPPG-based attacks neglected. In this paper, we firstly analyze the security of PPG-based biometrics, including user authentication and communication protocols. We evaluate the signal waveforms, heart rate and inter-pulse-interval information extracted by five rPPG methods, including four traditional optical computing methods (CHROM, POS, LGI, PCA) and one deep learning method (CL_rPPG). We conducted experiments on five datasets (PURE, UBFC_rPPG, UBFC_Phys, LGI_PPGI, and COHFACE) to collect a comprehensive set of results. Our empirical studies show that rPPG poses a serious threat to the authentication system. The success rate of the rPPG signal spoofing attack in the user authentication system reached 0.35. The bit hit rate is 0.6 in inter-pulse-interval-based security protocols. Further, we propose an active defence strategy to hide the physiological signals of the face to resist the attack. It reduces the success rate of rPPG spoofing attacks in user authentication to 0.05. The bit hit rate was reduced to 0.5, which is at the level of a random guess. Our strategy effectively prevents the exposure of PPG signals to protect users' sensitive physiological data.
abstract_zh: 近年来，基于生理信号的生物识别系统受到广泛关注。与传统的生物识别特征不同，生理信号不易被破坏（通常人眼无法观察到）。光电体积描记法 (PPG) 信号易于测量，使其比许多其他生理信号更适合生物识别认证。然而，随着远程PPG（rPPG）的出现，攻击者可以通过监视受害者的面部来远程窃取rPPG信号，从而对基于PPG的生物识别技术构成威胁，因此不可观测性受到了挑战。在基于PPG的生物特征认证中，当前的攻击方法强制受害者的PPG信号，使得基于rPPG的攻击被忽视。在本文中，我们首先分析了基于PPG的生物识别技术的安全性，包括用户认证和通信协议。我们评估了五种 rPPG 方法提取的信号波形、心率和脉冲间间隔信息，包括四种传统光学计算方法（CHROM、POS、LGI、PCA）和一种深度学习方法（CL_rPPG）。我们在五个数据集（PURE、UBFC_rPPG、UBFC_Phys、LGI_PPGI 和 COHFACE）上进行了实验，收集了一组全面的结果。我们的实证研究表明，rPPG 对认证系统构成严重威胁。用户认证系统中rPPG信号欺骗攻击的成功率达到0.35。在基于脉冲间间隔的安全协议中，比特命中率为0.6。此外，我们提出了一种主动防御策略，隐藏面部的生理信号以抵御攻击。将用户认证中rPPG欺骗攻击的成功率降低至0.05。位命中率降低到0.5，处于随机猜测的水平。我们的策略有效防止PPG信号暴露，保护用户敏感的生理数据。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了基于PPG的生物特征认证系统的安全性，并提出了一种主动防御策略以抵御远程PPG（rPPG）攻击。
AI.motivation: 传统PPG信号因不易被观察而被认为安全，但远程PPG技术使攻击者可通过监控受害者面部窃取信号，威胁PPG生物特征认证系统。
AI.method: 评估五种rPPG方法（CHROM、POS、LGI、PCA、CL_rPPG）在五个数据集上的信号波形、心率及脉冲间隔信息，提出主动防御策略以隐藏面部生理信号。
AI.result: rPPG攻击在用户认证中的成功率高达0.35，脉冲间隔协议的比特命中率为0.6；防御策略将成功率降至0.05，比特命中率降至0.5（随机猜测水平）。
AI.conclusion: 所提防御策略有效阻止PPG信号泄露，保护用户敏感生理数据免受rPPG攻击。

search_text: Hiding Your Signals: A Security Analysis of PPG-based Biometric Authentication 隐藏您的信号：基于 PPG 的生物识别身份验证的安全分析 Recently, physiological signal-based biometric systems have received wide attention. Unlike traditional biometric features, physiological signals can not be easily compromised (usually unobservable to human eyes). Photoplethysmography (PPG) signal is easy to measure, making it more attractive than many other physiological signals for biometric authentication. However, with the advent of remote PPG (rPPG), unobservability has been challenged when the attacker can remotely steal the rPPG signals by monitoring the victim's face, subsequently posing a threat to PPG-based biometrics. In PPG-based biometric authentication, current attack approaches mandate the victim's PPG signal, making rPPG-based attacks neglected. In this paper, we firstly analyze the security of PPG-based biometrics, including user authentication and communication protocols. We evaluate the signal waveforms, heart rate and inter-pulse-interval information extracted by five rPPG methods, including four traditional optical computing methods (CHROM, POS, LGI, PCA) and one deep learning method (CL_rPPG). We conducted experiments on five datasets (PURE, UBFC_rPPG, UBFC_Phys, LGI_PPGI, and COHFACE) to collect a comprehensive set of results. Our empirical studies show that rPPG poses a serious threat to the authentication system. The success rate of the rPPG signal spoofing attack in the user authentication system reached 0.35. The bit hit rate is 0.6 in inter-pulse-interval-based security protocols. Further, we propose an active defence strategy to hide the physiological signals of the face to resist the attack. It reduces the success rate of rPPG spoofing attacks in user authentication to 0.05. The bit hit rate was reduced to 0.5, which is at the level of a random guess. Our strategy effectively prevents the exposure of PPG signals to protect users' sensitive physiological data. 近年来，基于生理信号的生物识别系统受到广泛关注。与传统的生物识别特征不同，生理信号不易被破坏（通常人眼无法观察到）。光电体积描记法 (PPG) 信号易于测量，使其比许多其他生理信号更适合生物识别认证。然而，随着远程PPG（rPPG）的出现，攻击者可以通过监视受害者的面部来远程窃取rPPG信号，从而对基于PPG的生物识别技术构成威胁，因此不可观测性受到了挑战。在基于PPG的生物特征认证中，当前的攻击方法强制受害者的PPG信号，使得基于rPPG的攻击被忽视。在本文中，我们首先分析了基于PPG的生物识别技术的安全性，包括用户认证和通信协议。我们评估了五种 rPPG 方法提取的信号波形、心率和脉冲间间隔信息，包括四种传统光学计算方法（CHROM、POS、LGI、PCA）和一种深度学习方法（CL_rPPG）。我们在五个数据集（PURE、UBFC_rPPG、UBFC_Phys、LGI_PPGI 和 COHFACE）上进行了实验，收集了一组全面的结果。我们的实证研究表明，rPPG 对认证系统构成严重威胁。用户认证系统中rPPG信号欺骗攻击的成功率达到0.35。在基于脉冲间间隔的安全协议中，比特命中率为0.6。此外，我们提出了一种主动防御策略，隐藏面部的生理信号以抵御攻击。将用户认证中rPPG欺骗攻击的成功率降低至0.05。位命中率降低到0.5，处于随机猜测的水平。我们的策略有效防止PPG信号暴露，保护用户敏感的生理数据。 本文分析了基于PPG的生物特征认证系统的安全性，并提出了一种主动防御策略以抵御远程PPG（rPPG）攻击。 Lin Li,Chao Chen,Lei Pan,Yonghang Tai,Jun Zhang,Yang Xiang cs.CR,cs.CV

authors_text: Dhruv Shah,Blazej Osinski,Brian Ichter,Sergey Levine
title: LM-Nav: Robotic Navigation with Large Pre-Trained Models of Language, Vision, and Action
title_zh: LM-Nav：具有大型预训练语言、视觉和动作模型的机器人导航
abstract: Goal-conditioned policies for robotic navigation can be trained on large, unannotated datasets, providing for good generalization to real-world settings. However, particularly in vision-based settings where specifying goals requires an image, this makes for an unnatural interface. Language provides a more convenient modality for communication with robots, but contemporary methods typically require expensive supervision, in the form of trajectories annotated with language descriptions. We present a system, LM-Nav, for robotic navigation that enjoys the benefits of training on unannotated large datasets of trajectories, while still providing a high-level interface to the user. Instead of utilizing a labeled instruction following dataset, we show that such a system can be constructed entirely out of pre-trained models for navigation (ViNG), image-language association (CLIP), and language modeling (GPT-3), without requiring any fine-tuning or language-annotated robot data. We instantiate LM-Nav on a real-world mobile robot and demonstrate long-horizon navigation through complex, outdoor environments from natural language instructions. For videos of our experiments, code release, and an interactive Colab notebook that runs in your browser, please check out our project page https://sites.google.com/view/lmnav
summary: Goal-conditioned policies for robotic navigation can be trained on large, unannotated datasets, providing for good generalization to real-world settings. However, particularly in vision-based settings where specifying goals requires an image, this makes for an unnatural interface. Language provides a more convenient modality for communication with robots, but contemporary methods typically require expensive supervision, in the form of trajectories annotated with language descriptions. We present a system, LM-Nav, for robotic navigation that enjoys the benefits of training on unannotated large datasets of trajectories, while still providing a high-level interface to the user. Instead of utilizing a labeled instruction following dataset, we show that such a system can be constructed entirely out of pre-trained models for navigation (ViNG), image-language association (CLIP), and language modeling (GPT-3), without requiring any fine-tuning or language-annotated robot data. We instantiate LM-Nav on a real-world mobile robot and demonstrate long-horizon navigation through complex, outdoor environments from natural language instructions. For videos of our experiments, code release, and an interactive Colab notebook that runs in your browser, please check out our project page https://sites.google.com/view/lmnav
abstract_zh: 机器人导航的目标条件策略可以在大型、未注释的数据集上进行训练，从而提供对现实世界设置的良好泛化。然而，特别是在基于视觉的设置中，指定目标需要图像，这会导致界面不自然。语言为与机器人的通信提供了更方便的方式，但当代方法通常需要昂贵的监督，以用语言描述注释的轨迹的形式。我们提出了一个用于机器人导航的系统 LM-Nav，该系统享有在未注释的大型轨迹数据集上进行训练的好处，同时仍然为用户提供高级界面。我们证明，这样的系统可以完全由用于导航 (ViNG)、图像语言关联 (CLIP) 和语言建模 (GPT-3) 的预训练模型构建，而不需要任何微调或语言注释的机器人数据，而不是利用遵循数据集的标记指令。我们在现实世界的移动机器人上实例化 LM-Nav，并演示根据自然语言指令在复杂的户外环境中进行长视野导航。有关我们的实验、代码发布和在浏览器中运行的交互式 Colab 笔记本的视频，请查看我们的项目页面 https://sites.google.com/view/lmnav

AI.tldr: 本文提出LM-Nav系统，通过结合预训练的语言、视觉和动作模型，实现基于自然语言指令的机器人导航。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉导航依赖图像目标设定（不自然），而语言指令虽更友好但需要昂贵的标注数据。现有方法难以兼顾大规模无标注数据训练与自然语言交互。
AI.method: 整合预训练模型ViNG（导航）、CLIP（图文关联）和GPT-3（语言建模），无需微调或语言标注数据，直接将自然语言指令转化为导航动作。
AI.result: 在真实移动机器人上实现复杂户外环境的长距离导航，验证了系统从自然语言指令到路径规划的有效性，并开源代码与交互式演示。
AI.conclusion: LM-Nav证明了通过组合通用预训练模型可实现无需标注数据的机器人导航，为高阶自然语言交互提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Yunyun Wang,Weiwen Zheng,Songcan Chen
title: Dual-Correction Adaptation Network for Noisy Knowledge Transfer
title_zh: 用于噪声知识转移的双校正适应网络
abstract: Previous unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) methods aim to promote target learning via a single-directional knowledge transfer from label-rich source domain to unlabeled target domain, while its reverse adaption from target to source has not jointly been considered yet so far. In fact, in some real teaching practice, a teacher helps students learn while also gets promotion from students to some extent, which inspires us to explore a dual-directional knowledge transfer between domains, and thus propose a Dual-Correction Adaptation Network (DualCAN) in this paper. However, due to the asymmetrical label knowledge across domains, transfer from unlabeled target to labeled source poses a more difficult challenge than the common source-to-target counterpart. First, the target pseudo-labels predicted by source commonly involve noises due to model bias, hence in the reverse adaptation, they may hurt the source performance and bring a negative target-to-source transfer. Secondly, source domain usually contains innate noises, which will inevitably aggravate the target noises, leading to noise amplification across domains. To this end, we further introduce a Noise Identification and Correction (NIC) module to correct and recycle noises in both domains. To our best knowledge, this is the first naive attempt of dual-directional adaptation for noisy UDA, and naturally applicable to noise-free UDA. A theory justification is given to state the rationality of our intuition. Empirical results confirm the effectiveness of DualCAN with remarkable performance gains over state-of-the-arts, particularly for extreme noisy tasks (e.g., ~+ 15% on Pw->Pr and Pr->Rw of Office-Home).
summary: Previous unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) methods aim to promote target learning via a single-directional knowledge transfer from label-rich source domain to unlabeled target domain, while its reverse adaption from target to source has not jointly been considered yet so far. In fact, in some real teaching practice, a teacher helps students learn while also gets promotion from students to some extent, which inspires us to explore a dual-directional knowledge transfer between domains, and thus propose a Dual-Correction Adaptation Network (DualCAN) in this paper. However, due to the asymmetrical label knowledge across domains, transfer from unlabeled target to labeled source poses a more difficult challenge than the common source-to-target counterpart. First, the target pseudo-labels predicted by source commonly involve noises due to model bias, hence in the reverse adaptation, they may hurt the source performance and bring a negative target-to-source transfer. Secondly, source domain usually contains innate noises, which will inevitably aggravate the target noises, leading to noise amplification across domains. To this end, we further introduce a Noise Identification and Correction (NIC) module to correct and recycle noises in both domains. To our best knowledge, this is the first naive attempt of dual-directional adaptation for noisy UDA, and naturally applicable to noise-free UDA. A theory justification is given to state the rationality of our intuition. Empirical results confirm the effectiveness of DualCAN with remarkable performance gains over state-of-the-arts, particularly for extreme noisy tasks (e.g., ~+ 15% on Pw->Pr and Pr->Rw of Office-Home).
abstract_zh: 先前的无监督域适应（UDA）方法旨在通过从标签丰富的源域到未标记的目标域的单向知识迁移来促进目标学习，而其从目标到源的反向适应迄今为止尚未被共同考虑。事实上，在一些实际的教学实践中，教师在帮助学生学习的同时，也在一定程度上得到了学生的提升，这启发我们探索领域之间的双向知识转移，从而在本文中提出了一种双校正适应网络（DualCAN）。然而，由于跨领域的标签知识不对称，从未标记的目标到标记的源的转移比常见的源到目标对应物提出了更困难的挑战。首先，由于模型偏差，源预测的目标伪标签通常包含噪声，因此在反向适应中，它们可能会损害源性能并带来负的目标到源传输。其次，源域通常包含固有噪声，这不可避免地会加剧目标噪声，导致噪声跨域放大。为此，我们进一步引入噪声识别和校正（NIC）模块来校正和回收两个域中的噪声。据我们所知，这是针对有噪声 UDA 的双向适应的首次尝试，自然也适用于无噪声 UDA。给出了理论论证来说明我们直觉的合理性。实证结果证实了 DualCAN 的有效性，与最先进的技术相比具有显着的性能提升，特别是对于极端嘈杂的任务（例如，办公室-家庭的 Pw->Pr 和 Pr->Rw 上约 + 15%）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种双方向校正适应网络（DualCAN），用于解决噪声环境下无监督领域自适应（UDA）中的知识传递问题。
AI.motivation: 传统UDA方法仅单向从标注源域向未标注目标域传递知识，忽视了反向适应。现实中师生相互促进的启发促使研究者探索双向知识传递，但噪声导致的伪标签错误和噪声放大问题亟待解决。
AI.method: 设计DualCAN网络，引入噪声识别与校正（NIC）模块，通过双向知识传递校正源域与目标域的噪声，理论分析支持方法合理性。
AI.result: 实验表明DualCAN在噪声任务中显著优于现有方法，例如Office-Home数据集上Pw→Pr和Pr→Rw任务提升约15%。
AI.conclusion: DualCAN是首个针对噪声UDA的双向适应方法，既适用于噪声环境也适用于无噪声场景，理论与实验均验证了其有效性。

search_text: Dual-Correction Adaptation Network for Noisy Knowledge Transfer 用于噪声知识转移的双校正适应网络 Previous unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) methods aim to promote target learning via a single-directional knowledge transfer from label-rich source domain to unlabeled target domain, while its reverse adaption from target to source has not jointly been considered yet so far. In fact, in some real teaching practice, a teacher helps students learn while also gets promotion from students to some extent, which inspires us to explore a dual-directional knowledge transfer between domains, and thus propose a Dual-Correction Adaptation Network (DualCAN) in this paper. However, due to the asymmetrical label knowledge across domains, transfer from unlabeled target to labeled source poses a more difficult challenge than the common source-to-target counterpart. First, the target pseudo-labels predicted by source commonly involve noises due to model bias, hence in the reverse adaptation, they may hurt the source performance and bring a negative target-to-source transfer. Secondly, source domain usually contains innate noises, which will inevitably aggravate the target noises, leading to noise amplification across domains. To this end, we further introduce a Noise Identification and Correction (NIC) module to correct and recycle noises in both domains. To our best knowledge, this is the first naive attempt of dual-directional adaptation for noisy UDA, and naturally applicable to noise-free UDA. A theory justification is given to state the rationality of our intuition. Empirical results confirm the effectiveness of DualCAN with remarkable performance gains over state-of-the-arts, particularly for extreme noisy tasks (e.g., ~+ 15% on Pw->Pr and Pr->Rw of Office-Home). 先前的无监督域适应（UDA）方法旨在通过从标签丰富的源域到未标记的目标域的单向知识迁移来促进目标学习，而其从目标到源的反向适应迄今为止尚未被共同考虑。事实上，在一些实际的教学实践中，教师在帮助学生学习的同时，也在一定程度上得到了学生的提升，这启发我们探索领域之间的双向知识转移，从而在本文中提出了一种双校正适应网络（DualCAN）。然而，由于跨领域的标签知识不对称，从未标记的目标到标记的源的转移比常见的源到目标对应物提出了更困难的挑战。首先，由于模型偏差，源预测的目标伪标签通常包含噪声，因此在反向适应中，它们可能会损害源性能并带来负的目标到源传输。其次，源域通常包含固有噪声，这不可避免地会加剧目标噪声，导致噪声跨域放大。为此，我们进一步引入噪声识别和校正（NIC）模块来校正和回收两个域中的噪声。据我们所知，这是针对有噪声 UDA 的双向适应的首次尝试，自然也适用于无噪声 UDA。给出了理论论证来说明我们直觉的合理性。实证结果证实了 DualCAN 的有效性，与最先进的技术相比具有显着的性能提升，特别是对于极端嘈杂的任务（例如，办公室-家庭的 Pw->Pr 和 Pr->Rw 上约 + 15%）。 本文提出了一种双方向校正适应网络（DualCAN），用于解决噪声环境下无监督领域自适应（UDA）中的知识传递问题。 Yunyun Wang,Weiwen Zheng,Songcan Chen cs.CV

authors_text: Klemens Esterle,Patrick Hart,Julian Bernhard,Alois Knoll
title: Spatiotemporal motion planning with combinatorial reasoning for autonomous driving
title_zh: 自动驾驶的时空运动规划与组合推理
abstract: Motion planning for urban environments with numerous moving agents can be viewed as a combinatorial problem. With passing an obstacle before, after, right or left, there are multiple options an autonomous vehicle could choose to execute. These combinatorial aspects need to be taken into account in the planning framework. We address this problem by proposing a novel planning approach that combines trajectory planning and maneuver reasoning. We define a classification for dynamic obstacles along a reference curve that allows us to extract tactical decision sequences. We separate longitudinal and lateral movement to speed up the optimization-based trajectory planning. To map the set of obtained trajectories to maneuver variants, we define a semantic language to describe them. This allows us to choose an optimal trajectory while also ensuring maneuver consistency over time. We demonstrate the capabilities of our approach for a scenario that is still widely considered to be challenging.
summary: Motion planning for urban environments with numerous moving agents can be viewed as a combinatorial problem. With passing an obstacle before, after, right or left, there are multiple options an autonomous vehicle could choose to execute. These combinatorial aspects need to be taken into account in the planning framework. We address this problem by proposing a novel planning approach that combines trajectory planning and maneuver reasoning. We define a classification for dynamic obstacles along a reference curve that allows us to extract tactical decision sequences. We separate longitudinal and lateral movement to speed up the optimization-based trajectory planning. To map the set of obtained trajectories to maneuver variants, we define a semantic language to describe them. This allows us to choose an optimal trajectory while also ensuring maneuver consistency over time. We demonstrate the capabilities of our approach for a scenario that is still widely considered to be challenging.
abstract_zh: 具有大量移动主体的城市环境的运动规划可以被视为一个组合问题。在通过前方、后方、右侧或左侧的障碍物时，自动驾驶车辆可以选择执行多种选项。在规划框架中需要考虑这些组合方面。我们通过提出一种结合轨迹规划和机动推理的新颖规划方法来解决这个问题。我们沿着参考曲线定义动态障碍物的分类，使我们能够提取战术决策序列。我们将纵向和横向运动分开，以加速基于优化的轨迹规划。为了将获得的轨迹集映射到机动变量，我们定义了一种语义语言来描述它们。这使我们能够选择最佳轨迹，同时确保随着时间的推移机动的一致性。我们展示了我们的方法对于仍然被广泛认为具有挑战性的场景的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合轨迹规划与操作推理的自动驾驶时空运动规划方法，解决城市环境中多移动障碍物的组合决策问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以高效处理城市复杂场景中动态障碍物的组合路径选择问题，需同时考虑轨迹优化与操作语义一致性。
AI.method: 通过定义参考曲线动态障碍物分类，分离纵向/横向运动加速优化，并建立语义语言映射轨迹到操作序列以保证时序一致性。
AI.result: 在具有挑战性的复杂场景中验证了方法有效性，成功实现组合决策下的轨迹规划与操作一致性保障。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过组合推理框架提升了自动驾驶在复杂城市环境中的运动规划能力，为多智能体交互场景提供新思路。

authors_text: Xiangtai Li,Jiangning Zhang,Yibo Yang,Guangliang Cheng,Kuiyuan Yang,Yunhai Tong,Dacheng Tao
title: SFNet: Faster and Accurate Semantic Segmentation via Semantic Flow
title_zh: SFNet：通过语义流进行更快、更准确的语义分割
comment: IJCV-2023; Extension of Previous work arXiv:2002.10120
comments: IJCV-2023; Extension of Previous work arXiv:2002.10120
abstract: In this paper, we focus on exploring effective methods for faster and accurate semantic segmentation. A common practice to improve the performance is to attain high-resolution feature maps with strong semantic representation. Two strategies are widely used: atrous convolutions and feature pyramid fusion, while both are either computationally intensive or ineffective. Inspired by the Optical Flow for motion alignment between adjacent video frames, we propose a Flow Alignment Module (FAM) to learn \textit{Semantic Flow} between feature maps of adjacent levels and broadcast high-level features to high-resolution features effectively and efficiently. Furthermore, integrating our FAM to a standard feature pyramid structure exhibits superior performance over other real-time methods, even on lightweight backbone networks, such as ResNet-18 and DFNet. Then to further speed up the inference procedure, we also present a novel Gated Dual Flow Alignment Module to directly align high-resolution feature maps and low-resolution feature maps where we term the improved version network as SFNet-Lite. Extensive experiments are conducted on several challenging datasets, where results show the effectiveness of both SFNet and SFNet-Lite. In particular, when using Cityscapes test set, the SFNet-Lite series achieve 80.1 mIoU while running at 60 FPS using ResNet-18 backbone and 78.8 mIoU while running at 120 FPS using STDC backbone on RTX-3090. Moreover, we unify four challenging driving datasets into one large dataset, which we named Unified Driving Segmentation (UDS) dataset. It contains diverse domain and style information. We benchmark several representative works on UDS. Both SFNet and SFNet-Lite still achieve the best speed and accuracy trade-off on UDS, which serves as a strong baseline in such a challenging setting. The code and models are publicly available at https://github.com/lxtGH/SFSegNets.
summary: In this paper, we focus on exploring effective methods for faster and accurate semantic segmentation. A common practice to improve the performance is to attain high-resolution feature maps with strong semantic representation. Two strategies are widely used: atrous convolutions and feature pyramid fusion, while both are either computationally intensive or ineffective. Inspired by the Optical Flow for motion alignment between adjacent video frames, we propose a Flow Alignment Module (FAM) to learn \textit{Semantic Flow} between feature maps of adjacent levels and broadcast high-level features to high-resolution features effectively and efficiently. Furthermore, integrating our FAM to a standard feature pyramid structure exhibits superior performance over other real-time methods, even on lightweight backbone networks, such as ResNet-18 and DFNet. Then to further speed up the inference procedure, we also present a novel Gated Dual Flow Alignment Module to directly align high-resolution feature maps and low-resolution feature maps where we term the improved version network as SFNet-Lite. Extensive experiments are conducted on several challenging datasets, where results show the effectiveness of both SFNet and SFNet-Lite. In particular, when using Cityscapes test set, the SFNet-Lite series achieve 80.1 mIoU while running at 60 FPS using ResNet-18 backbone and 78.8 mIoU while running at 120 FPS using STDC backbone on RTX-3090. Moreover, we unify four challenging driving datasets into one large dataset, which we named Unified Driving Segmentation (UDS) dataset. It contains diverse domain and style information. We benchmark several representative works on UDS. Both SFNet and SFNet-Lite still achieve the best speed and accuracy trade-off on UDS, which serves as a strong baseline in such a challenging setting. The code and models are publicly available at https://github.com/lxtGH/SFSegNets.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们专注于探索更快、更准确的语义分割的有效方法。提高性能的常见做法是获得具有强语义表示的高分辨率特征图。两种策略被广泛使用：空洞卷积和特征金字塔融合，但这两种策略要么计算量大，要么效率低下。受相邻视频帧之间运动对齐光流的启发，我们提出了一个流对齐模块（FAM）来学习相邻级别特征图之间的\textit{语义流}，并将高级特征有效且高效地广播到高分辨率特征。此外，将我们的 FAM 集成到标准特征金字塔结构中，即使在 ResNet-18 和 DFNet 等轻量级骨干网络上，也表现出优于其他实时方法的性能。然后，为了进一步加快推理过程，我们还提出了一种新颖的门控双流对齐模块来直接对齐高分辨率特征图和低分辨率特征图，我们将改进版本的网络称为 SFNet-Lite。在几个具有挑战性的数据集上进行了大量的实验，结果表明了 SFNet 和 SFNet-Lite 的有效性。特别是，当使用 Cityscapes 测试集时，SFNet-Lite 系列在使用 ResNet-18 主干以 60 FPS 运行时达到 80.1 mIoU，在 RTX-3090 上使用 STDC 主干以 120 FPS 运行时达到 78.8 mIoU。此外，我们将四个具有挑战性的驾驶数据集统一为一个大数据集，我们将其命名为统一驾驶分段（UDS）数据集。它包含不同的领域和风格信息。我们对 UDS 上的几个代表性作品进行了基准测试。 SFNet 和 SFNet-Lite 仍然在 UDS 上实现了最佳速度和准确性权衡，这在如此具有挑战性的环境中充当了强有力的基线。代码和模型可在 https://github.com/lxtGH/SFSegNets 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SFNet，通过语义流实现更快更准确的语义分割。
AI.motivation: 现有方法如空洞卷积和特征金字塔融合存在计算量大或效果不佳的问题，需更高效的特征对齐策略。
AI.method: 受光流启发，设计流对齐模块（FAM）学习相邻层级特征图的语义流，结合轻量级主干网络（如ResNet-18）并提出SFNet-Lite加速推理。
AI.result: 在Cityscapes数据集上，SFNet-Lite使用ResNet-18达到80.1 mIoU（60 FPS），STDC主干达78.8 mIoU（120 FPS）；统一驾驶数据集UDS上保持最优速度精度平衡。
AI.conclusion: SFNet系列在保持高精度的同时显著提升分割速度，为复杂场景提供强基线。

We benchmark several representative works on UDS. Both SFNet and SFNet-Lite still achieve the best speed and accuracy trade-off on UDS, which serves as a strong baseline in such a challenging setting. The code and models are publicly available at https://github.com/lxtGH/SFSegNets. 在本文中，我们专注于探索更快、更准确的语义分割的有效方法。提高性能的常见做法是获得具有强语义表示的高分辨率特征图。两种策略被广泛使用：空洞卷积和特征金字塔融合，但这两种策略要么计算量大，要么效率低下。受相邻视频帧之间运动对齐光流的启发，我们提出了一个流对齐模块（FAM）来学习相邻级别特征图之间的\textit{语义流}，并将高级特征有效且高效地广播到高分辨率特征。此外，将我们的 FAM 集成到标准特征金字塔结构中，即使在 ResNet-18 和 DFNet 等轻量级骨干网络上，也表现出优于其他实时方法的性能。然后，为了进一步加快推理过程，我们还提出了一种新颖的门控双流对齐模块来直接对齐高分辨率特征图和低分辨率特征图，我们将改进版本的网络称为 SFNet-Lite。在几个具有挑战性的数据集上进行了大量的实验，结果表明了 SFNet 和 SFNet-Lite 的有效性。特别是，当使用 Cityscapes 测试集时，SFNet-Lite 系列在使用 ResNet-18 主干以 60 FPS 运行时达到 80.1 mIoU，在 RTX-3090 上使用 STDC 主干以 120 FPS 运行时达到 78.8 mIoU。此外，我们将四个具有挑战性的驾驶数据集统一为一个大数据集，我们将其命名为统一驾驶分段（UDS）数据集。它包含不同的领域和风格信息。我们对 UDS 上的几个代表性作品进行了基准测试。 SFNet 和 SFNet-Lite 仍然在 UDS 上实现了最佳速度和准确性权衡，这在如此具有挑战性的环境中充当了强有力的基线。代码和模型可在 https://github.com/lxtGH/SFSegNets 上公开获取。 本文提出SFNet，通过语义流实现更快更准确的语义分割。 Xiangtai Li,Jiangning Zhang,Yibo Yang,Guangliang Cheng,Kuiyuan Yang,Yunhai Tong,Dacheng Tao cs.CV

authors_text: Wenqi Zhao,Liangcai Gao
title: CoMER: Modeling Coverage for Transformer-based Handwritten Mathematical Expression Recognition
title_zh: CoMER：基于 Transformer 的手写数学表达式识别的建模覆盖率
abstract: The Transformer-based encoder-decoder architecture has recently made significant advances in recognizing handwritten mathematical expressions. However, the transformer model still suffers from the lack of coverage problem, making its expression recognition rate (ExpRate) inferior to its RNN counterpart. Coverage information, which records the alignment information of the past steps, has proven effective in the RNN models. In this paper, we propose CoMER, a model that adopts the coverage information in the transformer decoder. Specifically, we propose a novel Attention Refinement Module (ARM) to refine the attention weights with past alignment information without hurting its parallelism. Furthermore, we take coverage information to the extreme by proposing self-coverage and cross-coverage, which utilize the past alignment information from the current and previous layers. Experiments show that CoMER improves the ExpRate by 0.61%/2.09%/1.59% compared to the current state-of-the-art model, and reaches 59.33%/59.81%/62.97% on the CROHME 2014/2016/2019 test sets.
summary: The Transformer-based encoder-decoder architecture has recently made significant advances in recognizing handwritten mathematical expressions. However, the transformer model still suffers from the lack of coverage problem, making its expression recognition rate (ExpRate) inferior to its RNN counterpart. Coverage information, which records the alignment information of the past steps, has proven effective in the RNN models. In this paper, we propose CoMER, a model that adopts the coverage information in the transformer decoder. Specifically, we propose a novel Attention Refinement Module (ARM) to refine the attention weights with past alignment information without hurting its parallelism. Furthermore, we take coverage information to the extreme by proposing self-coverage and cross-coverage, which utilize the past alignment information from the current and previous layers. Experiments show that CoMER improves the ExpRate by 0.61%/2.09%/1.59% compared to the current state-of-the-art model, and reaches 59.33%/59.81%/62.97% on the CROHME 2014/2016/2019 test sets.
abstract_zh: 基于 Transformer 的编码器-解码器架构最近在识别手写数学表达式方面取得了重大进展。然而，Transformer 模型仍然存在覆盖率不足的问题，导致其表情识别率（ExpRate）不如 RNN 模型。覆盖信息记录了过去步骤的对齐信息，在 RNN 模型中已被证明是有效的。在本文中，我们提出了 CoMER，一种在 Transformer 解码器中采用覆盖信息的模型。具体来说，我们提出了一种新颖的注意力细化模块（ARM），用过去的对齐信息细化注意力权重，而不损害其并行性。此外，我们通过提出自覆盖和交叉覆盖来将覆盖信息发挥到极致，这利用了当前层和先前层的过去对齐信息。实验表明，与当前最先进的模型相比，CoMER 将 ExpRate 提高了 0.61%/2.09%/1.59%，在 CROHME 2014/2016/2019 测试集上达到 59.33%/59.81%/62.97%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CoMER模型，通过引入覆盖信息解决Transformer在手写数学公式识别中的覆盖率不足问题，提升表达式识别率。
AI.motivation: 尽管Transformer在手写数学表达式识别中取得进展，但其覆盖率不足导致识别率低于RNN模型。覆盖信息在RNN中已被证明有效，因此需将其引入Transformer以提升性能。
AI.method: 设计注意力优化模块（ARM）以融合历史对齐信息，提出自覆盖（当前层）和跨覆盖（前一层）机制，在保持并行性的同时优化注意力权重。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入覆盖机制，CoMER有效提升了Transformer在手写数学表达式识别中的性能，验证了覆盖率建模在该任务中的重要性。

authors_text: Litao Yu,Zhibin Li,Jian Zhang,Qiang Wu
title: Self-attention on Multi-Shifted Windows for Scene Segmentation
title_zh: 用于场景分割的多位移窗口的自注意力
abstract: Scene segmentation in images is a fundamental yet challenging problem in visual content understanding, which is to learn a model to assign every image pixel to a categorical label. One of the challenges for this learning task is to consider the spatial and semantic relationships to obtain descriptive feature representations, so learning the feature maps from multiple scales is a common practice in scene segmentation. In this paper, we explore the effective use of self-attention within multi-scale image windows to learn descriptive visual features, then propose three different strategies to aggregate these feature maps to decode the feature representation for dense prediction. Our design is based on the recently proposed Swin Transformer models, which totally discards convolution operations. With the simple yet effective multi-scale feature learning and aggregation, our models achieve very promising performance on four public scene segmentation datasets, PASCAL VOC2012, COCO-Stuff 10K, ADE20K and Cityscapes.
summary: Scene segmentation in images is a fundamental yet challenging problem in visual content understanding, which is to learn a model to assign every image pixel to a categorical label. One of the challenges for this learning task is to consider the spatial and semantic relationships to obtain descriptive feature representations, so learning the feature maps from multiple scales is a common practice in scene segmentation. In this paper, we explore the effective use of self-attention within multi-scale image windows to learn descriptive visual features, then propose three different strategies to aggregate these feature maps to decode the feature representation for dense prediction. Our design is based on the recently proposed Swin Transformer models, which totally discards convolution operations. With the simple yet effective multi-scale feature learning and aggregation, our models achieve very promising performance on four public scene segmentation datasets, PASCAL VOC2012, COCO-Stuff 10K, ADE20K and Cityscapes.
abstract_zh: 图像中的场景分割是视觉内容理解中的一个基本但具有挑战性的问题，即学习一个模型将每个图像像素分配给一个分类标签。这项学习任务的挑战之一是考虑空间和语义关系以获得描述性特征表示，因此从多个尺度学习特征图是场景分割中的常见做法。在本文中，我们探索了在多尺度图像窗口内有效使用自注意力来学习描述性视觉特征，然后提出三种不同的策略来聚合这些特征图以解码特征表示以进行密集预测。我们的设计基于最近提出的 Swin Transformer 模型，它完全放弃了卷积运算。通过简单而有效的多尺度特征学习和聚合，我们的模型在四个公共场景分割数据集：PASCAL VOC2012、COCO-Stuff 10K、ADE20K 和 Cityscapes 上取得了非常有前途的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多尺度窗口自注意力机制的场景分割方法，旨在提升图像像素级分类的性能。
AI.motivation: 场景分割需同时考虑空间与语义关系，传统方法依赖多尺度特征学习，但如何有效整合自注意力机制以捕捉长距离依赖关系仍是挑战。
AI.method: 基于Swin Transformer架构，设计多尺度窗口自注意力模块，并提出三种特征聚合策略（多尺度特征融合、动态权重分配、跨窗口信息交互）以生成密集预测结果。
AI.result: 在PASCAL VOC2012、COCO-Stuff 10K、ADE20K和Cityscapes四个数据集上取得优于现有方法的分割性能。
AI.conclusion: 多尺度窗口自注意力机制能有效建模场景的全局依赖关系，结合特征聚合策略可显著提升场景分割精度，为后续研究提供新思路。

One of the challenges for this learning task is to consider the spatial and semantic relationships to obtain descriptive feature representations, so learning the feature maps from multiple scales is a common practice in scene segmentation. Our design is based on the recently proposed Swin Transformer models, which totally discards convolution operations. With the simple yet effective multi-scale feature learning and aggregation, our models achieve very promising performance on four public scene segmentation datasets, PASCAL VOC2012, COCO-Stuff 10K, ADE20K and Cityscapes. 图像中的场景分割是视觉内容理解中的一个基本但具有挑战性的问题，即学习一个模型将每个图像像素分配给一个分类标签。这项学习任务的挑战之一是考虑空间和语义关系以获得描述性特征表示，因此从多个尺度学习特征图是场景分割中的常见做法。在本文中，我们探索了在多尺度图像窗口内有效使用自注意力来学习描述性视觉特征，然后提出三种不同的策略来聚合这些特征图以解码特征表示以进行密集预测。我们的设计基于最近提出的 Swin Transformer 模型，它完全放弃了卷积运算。通过简单而有效的多尺度特征学习和聚合，我们的模型在四个公共场景分割数据集：PASCAL VOC2012、COCO-Stuff 10K、ADE20K 和 Cityscapes 上取得了非常有前途的性能。 本文提出一种基于多尺度窗口自注意力机制的场景分割方法，旨在提升图像像素级分类的性能。 Litao Yu,Zhibin Li,Jian Zhang,Qiang Wu cs.CV

authors_text: Litao Yu,Jian Zhang
title: Horizontal and Vertical Attention in Transformers
title_zh: 变压器中的水平和垂直注意
abstract: Transformers are built upon multi-head scaled dot-product attention and positional encoding, which aim to learn the feature representations and token dependencies. In this work, we focus on enhancing the distinctive representation by learning to augment the feature maps with the self-attention mechanism in Transformers. Specifically, we propose the horizontal attention to re-weight the multi-head output of the scaled dot-product attention before dimensionality reduction, and propose the vertical attention to adaptively re-calibrate channel-wise feature responses by explicitly modelling inter-dependencies among different channels. We demonstrate the Transformer models equipped with the two attentions have a high generalization capability across different supervised learning tasks, with a very minor additional computational cost overhead. The proposed horizontal and vertical attentions are highly modular, which can be inserted into various Transformer models to further improve the performance. Our code is available in the supplementary material.
summary: Transformers are built upon multi-head scaled dot-product attention and positional encoding, which aim to learn the feature representations and token dependencies. In this work, we focus on enhancing the distinctive representation by learning to augment the feature maps with the self-attention mechanism in Transformers. Specifically, we propose the horizontal attention to re-weight the multi-head output of the scaled dot-product attention before dimensionality reduction, and propose the vertical attention to adaptively re-calibrate channel-wise feature responses by explicitly modelling inter-dependencies among different channels. We demonstrate the Transformer models equipped with the two attentions have a high generalization capability across different supervised learning tasks, with a very minor additional computational cost overhead. The proposed horizontal and vertical attentions are highly modular, which can be inserted into various Transformer models to further improve the performance. Our code is available in the supplementary material.
abstract_zh: Transformer 建立在多头缩放点积注意力和位置编码的基础上，旨在学习特征表示和标记依赖性。在这项工作中，我们专注于通过学习使用 Transformers 中的自注意力机制来增强特征图来增强独特的表示。具体来说，我们提出水平注意力在降维之前重新加权缩放点积注意力的多头输出，并提出垂直注意力通过显式建模不同通道之间的相互依赖关系来自适应地重新校准通道特征响应。我们证明了配备两种注意力的 Transformer 模型在不同的监督学习任务中具有很高的泛化能力，并且额外的计算成本开销非常小。所提出的水平和垂直注意力是高度模块化的，可以插入到各种 Transformer 模型中以进一步提高性能。我们的代码可在补充材料中找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出水平注意力和垂直注意力机制，以增强Transformer模型的特征表示能力。
AI.motivation: 现有Transformer模型在学习特征表示和token依赖关系时存在局限性，需通过改进注意力机制提升性能。
AI.method: 设计水平注意力重新加权多头输出，垂直注意力建模通道间依赖关系，两种机制可模块化集成到不同Transformer架构中。
AI.result: 实验表明，改进后的模型在多项监督学习任务中表现优异，计算成本增加极小。
AI.conclusion: 水平和垂直注意力机制有效提升Transformer泛化能力，具有广泛适用性和模块化优势。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出水平注意力和垂直注意力机制，以增强Transformer模型的特征表示能力。
ai_content.motivation: 现有Transformer模型在学习特征表示和token依赖关系时存在局限性，需通过改进注意力机制提升性能。

search_text: Horizontal and Vertical Attention in Transformers 变压器中的水平和垂直注意 Transformers are built upon multi-head scaled dot-product attention and positional encoding, which aim to learn the feature representations and token dependencies. In this work, we focus on enhancing the distinctive representation by learning to augment the feature maps with the self-attention mechanism in Transformers. Specifically, we propose the horizontal attention to re-weight the multi-head output of the scaled dot-product attention before dimensionality reduction, and propose the vertical attention to adaptively re-calibrate channel-wise feature responses by explicitly modelling inter-dependencies among different channels. We demonstrate the Transformer models equipped with the two attentions have a high generalization capability across different supervised learning tasks, with a very minor additional computational cost overhead. The proposed horizontal and vertical attentions are highly modular, which can be inserted into various Transformer models to further improve the performance. Our code is available in the supplementary material. Transformer 建立在多头缩放点积注意力和位置编码的基础上，旨在学习特征表示和标记依赖性。在这项工作中，我们专注于通过学习使用 Transformers 中的自注意力机制来增强特征图来增强独特的表示。具体来说，我们提出水平注意力在降维之前重新加权缩放点积注意力的多头输出，并提出垂直注意力通过显式建模不同通道之间的相互依赖关系来自适应地重新校准通道特征响应。我们证明了配备两种注意力的 Transformer 模型在不同的监督学习任务中具有很高的泛化能力，并且额外的计算成本开销非常小。所提出的水平和垂直注意力是高度模块化的，可以插入到各种 Transformer 模型中以进一步提高性能。我们的代码可在补充材料中找到。 本文提出水平注意力和垂直注意力机制，以增强Transformer模型的特征表示能力。 Litao Yu,Jian Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Ashraful Islam,Ben Lundell,Harpreet Sawhney,Sudipta Sinha,Peter Morales,Richard J. Radke
title: Self-supervised Learning with Local Contrastive Loss for Detection and Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 用于检测和语义分割的局部对比损失的自监督学习
abstract: We present a self-supervised learning (SSL) method suitable for semi-global tasks such as object detection and semantic segmentation. We enforce local consistency between self-learned features, representing corresponding image locations of transformed versions of the same image, by minimizing a pixel-level local contrastive (LC) loss during training. LC-loss can be added to existing self-supervised learning methods with minimal overhead. We evaluate our SSL approach on two downstream tasks -- object detection and semantic segmentation, using COCO, PASCAL VOC, and CityScapes datasets. Our method outperforms the existing state-of-the-art SSL approaches by 1.9% on COCO object detection, 1.4% on PASCAL VOC detection, and 0.6% on CityScapes segmentation.
summary: We present a self-supervised learning (SSL) method suitable for semi-global tasks such as object detection and semantic segmentation. We enforce local consistency between self-learned features, representing corresponding image locations of transformed versions of the same image, by minimizing a pixel-level local contrastive (LC) loss during training. LC-loss can be added to existing self-supervised learning methods with minimal overhead. We evaluate our SSL approach on two downstream tasks -- object detection and semantic segmentation, using COCO, PASCAL VOC, and CityScapes datasets. Our method outperforms the existing state-of-the-art SSL approaches by 1.9% on COCO object detection, 1.4% on PASCAL VOC detection, and 0.6% on CityScapes segmentation.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种适用于对象检测和语义分割等半全局任务的自监督学习（SSL）方法。我们通过在训练期间最小化像素级局部对比（LC）损失来强制自学习特征之间的局部一致性，表示同一图像的变换版本的相应图像位置。 LC-loss 可以以最小的开销添加到现有的自监督学习方法中。我们使用 COCO、PASCAL VOC 和 CityScapes 数据集在两个下游任务（对象检测和语义分割）上评估我们的 SSL 方法。我们的方法在 COCO 对象检测上优于现有最先进的 SSL 方法 1.9%，在 PASCAL VOC 检测上优于现有最先进的 SSL 方法 1.4%，在 CityScapes 分割上优于现有最先进的 SSL 方法 0.6%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于局部对比损失的自监督学习方法，用于目标检测和语义分割任务。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督学习方法在半全局任务（如检测和分割）中表现不足，需增强特征一致性约束。
AI.method: 通过最小化像素级局部对比损失，强制图像变换后对应位置的特征保持一致，且可兼容现有自监督方法。
AI.result: 在COCO、PASCAL VOC和CityScapes数据集上，分别提升1.9%、1.4%和0.6%的性能。
AI.conclusion: 局部对比损失有效提升自监督特征质量，且计算开销低，适用于下游视觉任务。

authors_text: Xu Yan,Jiantao Gao,Chaoda Zheng,Chao Zheng,Ruimao Zhang,Shenghui Cui,Zhen Li
title: 2DPASS: 2D Priors Assisted Semantic Segmentation on LiDAR Point Clouds
title_zh: 2DPASS：激光雷达点云上的 2D 先验辅助语义分割
abstract: As camera and LiDAR sensors capture complementary information used in autonomous driving, great efforts have been made to develop semantic segmentation algorithms through multi-modality data fusion. However, fusion-based approaches require paired data, i.e., LiDAR point clouds and camera images with strict point-to-pixel mappings, as the inputs in both training and inference, which seriously hinders their application in practical scenarios. Thus, in this work, we propose the 2D Priors Assisted Semantic Segmentation (2DPASS), a general training scheme, to boost the representation learning on point clouds, by fully taking advantage of 2D images with rich appearance. In practice, by leveraging an auxiliary modal fusion and multi-scale fusion-to-single knowledge distillation (MSFSKD), 2DPASS acquires richer semantic and structural information from the multi-modal data, which are then online distilled to the pure 3D network. As a result, equipped with 2DPASS, our baseline shows significant improvement with only point cloud inputs. Specifically, it achieves the state-of-the-arts on two large-scale benchmarks (i.e. SemanticKITTI and NuScenes), including top-1 results in both single and multiple scan(s) competitions of SemanticKITTI.
summary: As camera and LiDAR sensors capture complementary information used in autonomous driving, great efforts have been made to develop semantic segmentation algorithms through multi-modality data fusion. However, fusion-based approaches require paired data, i.e., LiDAR point clouds and camera images with strict point-to-pixel mappings, as the inputs in both training and inference, which seriously hinders their application in practical scenarios. Thus, in this work, we propose the 2D Priors Assisted Semantic Segmentation (2DPASS), a general training scheme, to boost the representation learning on point clouds, by fully taking advantage of 2D images with rich appearance. In practice, by leveraging an auxiliary modal fusion and multi-scale fusion-to-single knowledge distillation (MSFSKD), 2DPASS acquires richer semantic and structural information from the multi-modal data, which are then online distilled to the pure 3D network. As a result, equipped with 2DPASS, our baseline shows significant improvement with only point cloud inputs. Specifically, it achieves the state-of-the-arts on two large-scale benchmarks (i.e. SemanticKITTI and NuScenes), including top-1 results in both single and multiple scan(s) competitions of SemanticKITTI.
abstract_zh: 随着摄像头和激光雷达传感器捕获自动驾驶中使用的互补信息，人们在通过多模态数据融合开发语义分割算法方面做出了巨大努力。然而，基于融合的方法需要成对数据，即具有严格点到像素映射的激光雷达点云和相机图像作为训练和推理的输入，这严重阻碍了它们在实际场景中的应用。因此，在这项工作中，我们提出了 2D 先验辅助语义分割（2DPASS），这是一种通用训练方案，通过充分利用具有丰富外观的 2D 图像来促进点云上的表示学习。在实践中，通过利用辅助模态融合和多尺度融合到单一知识蒸馏（MSFSKD），2DPASS从多模态数据中获取更丰富的语义和结构信息，然后在线蒸馏到纯3D网络。因此，配备 2DPASS 后，我们的基线仅通过点云输入就显示出显着的改进。具体来说，它在两个大型基准测试（即 SemanticKITTI 和 NuScenes）上达到了最先进的水平，包括在 SemanticKITTI 的单次和多次扫描竞赛中获得前 1 名的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出2DPASS方法，通过利用2D图像先验信息提升LiDAR点云的语义分割性能，无需依赖相机数据。
AI.motivation: 现有基于多模态数据融合的语义分割方法需要严格配对的LiDAR点云与相机图像，限制了实际应用。本文旨在开发无需配对数据的点云分割方案。
AI.method: 通过辅助模态融合和多尺度融合到单模型的知识蒸馏（MSFSKD），从多模态数据中提取语义信息并在线蒸馏至纯3D网络。
AI.result: 在SemanticKITTI和NuScenes基准测试中取得SOTA结果，包括SemanticKITTI单扫描和多扫描竞赛的top-1成绩。
AI.conclusion: 2DPASS通过有效利用2D先验信息，在无需相机数据的情况下显著提升了点云分割性能，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Minji Yoon,Yue Wu,John Palowitch,Bryan Perozzi,Ruslan Salakhutdinov
title: Graph Generative Model for Benchmarking Graph Neural Networks
title_zh: 用于对图神经网络进行基准测试的图生成模型
abstract: As the field of Graph Neural Networks (GNN) continues to grow, it experiences a corresponding increase in the need for large, real-world datasets to train and test new GNN models on challenging, realistic problems. Unfortunately, such graph datasets are often generated from online, highly privacy-restricted ecosystems, which makes research and development on these datasets hard, if not impossible. This greatly reduces the amount of benchmark graphs available to researchers, causing the field to rely only on a handful of publicly-available datasets. To address this problem, we introduce a novel graph generative model, Computation Graph Transformer (CGT) that learns and reproduces the distribution of real-world graphs in a privacy-controlled way. More specifically, CGT (1) generates effective benchmark graphs on which GNNs show similar task performance as on the source graphs, (2) scales to process large-scale graphs, (3) incorporates off-the-shelf privacy modules to guarantee end-user privacy of the generated graph. Extensive experiments across a vast body of graph generative models show that only our model can successfully generate privacy-controlled, synthetic substitutes of large-scale real-world graphs that can be effectively used to benchmark GNN models.
summary: As the field of Graph Neural Networks (GNN) continues to grow, it experiences a corresponding increase in the need for large, real-world datasets to train and test new GNN models on challenging, realistic problems. Unfortunately, such graph datasets are often generated from online, highly privacy-restricted ecosystems, which makes research and development on these datasets hard, if not impossible. This greatly reduces the amount of benchmark graphs available to researchers, causing the field to rely only on a handful of publicly-available datasets. To address this problem, we introduce a novel graph generative model, Computation Graph Transformer (CGT) that learns and reproduces the distribution of real-world graphs in a privacy-controlled way. More specifically, CGT (1) generates effective benchmark graphs on which GNNs show similar task performance as on the source graphs, (2) scales to process large-scale graphs, (3) incorporates off-the-shelf privacy modules to guarantee end-user privacy of the generated graph. Extensive experiments across a vast body of graph generative models show that only our model can successfully generate privacy-controlled, synthetic substitutes of large-scale real-world graphs that can be effectively used to benchmark GNN models.
abstract_zh: 随着图神经网络 (GNN) 领域的不断发展，对大型现实数据集的需求也相应增加，以针对具有挑战性的现实问题训练和测试新的 GNN 模型。不幸的是，此类图数据集通常是从隐私高度受限的在线生态系统生成的，这使得这些数据集的研究和开发即使不是不可能，也变得困难。这大大减少了研究人员可用的基准图的数量，导致该领域仅依赖于少数公开可用的数据集。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了一种新颖的图生成模型，计算图变换器（CGT），它以隐私控制的方式学习和重现现实世界图的分布。更具体地说，CGT (1) 生成有效的基准图，GNN 在该图上显示出与源图相似的任务性能，(2) 进行扩展以处理大规模图，(3) 结合现成的隐私模块以保证生成图的最终用户隐私。对大量图生成模型的大量实验表明，只有我们的模型才能成功生成大规模现实世界图的隐私控制的合成替代品，这些替代品可以有效地用于对 GNN 模型进行基准测试。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Computation Graph Transformer (CGT)的图生成模型，用于在隐私保护的前提下生成用于评估图神经网络（GNN）的基准图。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中的图数据集因隐私限制难以获取，导致GNN研究依赖有限的公开数据集，亟需一种隐私可控的合成图生成方法。
AI.method: CGT通过学习真实图的分布生成合成图，具备大规模图处理能力，并集成隐私保护模块以确保生成图的隐私性。
AI.result: 实验表明，CGT是唯一能成功生成隐私保护型大规模合成图的模型，可有效用于GNN的基准测试。
AI.conclusion: CGT解决了图数据稀缺与隐私矛盾，为GNN模型的评估提供了可行的基准图生成方案。

search_text: Graph Generative Model for Benchmarking Graph Neural Networks 用于对图神经网络进行基准测试的图生成模型 As the field of Graph Neural Networks (GNN) continues to grow, it experiences a corresponding increase in the need for large, real-world datasets to train and test new GNN models on challenging, realistic problems. Unfortunately, such graph datasets are often generated from online, highly privacy-restricted ecosystems, which makes research and development on these datasets hard, if not impossible. This greatly reduces the amount of benchmark graphs available to researchers, causing the field to rely only on a handful of publicly-available datasets. To address this problem, we introduce a novel graph generative model, Computation Graph Transformer (CGT) that learns and reproduces the distribution of real-world graphs in a privacy-controlled way. More specifically, CGT (1) generates effective benchmark graphs on which GNNs show similar task performance as on the source graphs, (2) scales to process large-scale graphs, (3) incorporates off-the-shelf privacy modules to guarantee end-user privacy of the generated graph. Extensive experiments across a vast body of graph generative models show that only our model can successfully generate privacy-controlled, synthetic substitutes of large-scale real-world graphs that can be effectively used to benchmark GNN models. 随着图神经网络 (GNN) 领域的不断发展，对大型现实数据集的需求也相应增加，以针对具有挑战性的现实问题训练和测试新的 GNN 模型。不幸的是，此类图数据集通常是从隐私高度受限的在线生态系统生成的，这使得这些数据集的研究和开发即使不是不可能，也变得困难。这大大减少了研究人员可用的基准图的数量，导致该领域仅依赖于少数公开可用的数据集。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了一种新颖的图生成模型，计算图变换器（CGT），它以隐私控制的方式学习和重现现实世界图的分布。更具体地说，CGT (1) 生成有效的基准图，GNN 在该图上显示出与源图相似的任务性能，(2) 进行扩展以处理大规模图，(3) 结合现成的隐私模块以保证生成图的最终用户隐私。对大量图生成模型的大量实验表明，只有我们的模型才能成功生成大规模现实世界图的隐私控制的合成替代品，这些替代品可以有效地用于对 GNN 模型进行基准测试。 本文提出一种名为Computation Graph Transformer (CGT)的图生成模型，用于在隐私保护的前提下生成用于评估图神经网络（GNN）的基准图。 Minji Yoon,Yue Wu,John Palowitch,Bryan Perozzi,Ruslan Salakhutdinov cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CR

authors_text: Yan Han,Gregory Holste,Ying Ding,Ahmed Tewfik,Yifan Peng,Zhangyang Wang
title: Radiomics-Guided Global-Local Transformer for Weakly Supervised Pathology Localization in Chest X-Rays
title_zh: 放射组学引导的全局局部变压器用于胸部 X 射线弱监督病理学定位
abstract: Before the recent success of deep learning methods for automated medical image analysis, practitioners used handcrafted radiomic features to quantitatively describe local patches of medical images. However, extracting discriminative radiomic features relies on accurate pathology localization, which is difficult to acquire in real-world settings. Despite advances in disease classification and localization from chest X-rays, many approaches fail to incorporate clinically-informed domain knowledge. For these reasons, we propose a Radiomics-Guided Transformer (RGT) that fuses \textit{global} image information with \textit{local} knowledge-guided radiomics information to provide accurate cardiopulmonary pathology localization and classification \textit{without any bounding box annotations}. RGT consists of an image Transformer branch, a radiomics Transformer branch, and fusion layers that aggregate image and radiomic information. Using the learned self-attention of its image branch, RGT extracts a bounding box for which to compute radiomic features, which are further processed by the radiomics branch; learned image and radiomic features are then fused and mutually interact via cross-attention layers. Thus, RGT utilizes a novel end-to-end feedback loop that can bootstrap accurate pathology localization only using image-level disease labels. Experiments on the NIH ChestXRay dataset demonstrate that RGT outperforms prior works in weakly supervised disease localization (by an average margin of 3.6\% over various intersection-over-union thresholds) and classification (by 1.1\% in average area under the receiver operating characteristic curve). We publicly release our codes and pre-trained models at \url{https://github.com/VITA-Group/chext}.
summary: Before the recent success of deep learning methods for automated medical image analysis, practitioners used handcrafted radiomic features to quantitatively describe local patches of medical images. However, extracting discriminative radiomic features relies on accurate pathology localization, which is difficult to acquire in real-world settings. Despite advances in disease classification and localization from chest X-rays, many approaches fail to incorporate clinically-informed domain knowledge. For these reasons, we propose a Radiomics-Guided Transformer (RGT) that fuses \textit{global} image information with \textit{local} knowledge-guided radiomics information to provide accurate cardiopulmonary pathology localization and classification \textit{without any bounding box annotations}. RGT consists of an image Transformer branch, a radiomics Transformer branch, and fusion layers that aggregate image and radiomic information. Using the learned self-attention of its image branch, RGT extracts a bounding box for which to compute radiomic features, which are further processed by the radiomics branch; learned image and radiomic features are then fused and mutually interact via cross-attention layers. Thus, RGT utilizes a novel end-to-end feedback loop that can bootstrap accurate pathology localization only using image-level disease labels. Experiments on the NIH ChestXRay dataset demonstrate that RGT outperforms prior works in weakly supervised disease localization (by an average margin of 3.6\% over various intersection-over-union thresholds) and classification (by 1.1\% in average area under the receiver operating characteristic curve). We publicly release our codes and pre-trained models at \url{https://github.com/VITA-Group/chext}.
abstract_zh: 在最近用于自动医学图像分析的深度学习方法取得成功之前，从业者使用手工制作的放射组学特征来定量描述医学图像的局部斑块。然而，提取有区别的放射学特征依赖于准确的病理定位，这在现实世界中很难获得。尽管胸部 X 光检查在疾病分类和定位方面取得了进展，但许多方法未能纳入临床领域知识。由于这些原因，我们提出了一种放射组学引导变压器（RGT），它将 \textit{global} 图像信息与 \textit{local} 知识引导放射组学信息融合，以提供准确的心肺病理定位和分类 \textit{没有任何边界框注释}。 RGT 由图像 Transformer 分支、放射组学 Transformer 分支以及聚合图像和放射组学信息的融合层组成。利用其图像分支学习到的自注意力，RGT 提取一个边界框来计算放射组学特征，这些特征由放射组学分支进一步处理；然后将学习到的图像和放射组学特征融合起来，并通过交叉注意层相互交互。因此，RGT 利用一种新颖的端到端反馈循环，仅使用图像级疾病标签即可引导准确的病理定位。 NIH ChestXRay 数据集上的实验表明，RGT 在弱监督疾病定位（在各种交叉联合阈值上平均提高 3.6%）和分类（在接收者操作特征曲线下的平均面积中提高 1.1%）方面优于先前的工作。我们在 \url{https://github.com/VITA-Group/chext} 公开发布我们的代码和预训练模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于放射组学引导的全局-局部Transformer模型（RGT），用于在无边界框标注的情况下实现胸部X光片的弱监督病灶定位与分类。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖手工提取的放射组学特征，但准确的病灶定位在实际场景中难以获取；现有深度学习方法未能有效融合临床领域知识，导致定位与分类性能受限。
AI.method: RGT包含图像Transformer分支、放射组学Transformer分支及融合层。图像分支通过自注意力机制生成候选区域，提取放射组学特征后与图像特征通过交叉注意力层交互，形成端到端反馈循环。
AI.result: 在NIH ChestXRay数据集上，RGT在弱监督病灶定位任务中较现有方法平均提升3.6%（IoU阈值），分类任务提升1.1%（AUC）。
AI.conclusion: RGT通过融合全局图像信息与局部放射组学特征，无需边界框标注即可实现高精度定位，验证了放射组学与Transformer结合在弱监督医学图像分析中的有效性。

authors_text: Badih Ghazi,Pritish Kamath,Ravi Kumar,Pasin Manurangsi
title: Faster Privacy Accounting via Evolving Discretization
title_zh: 通过不断发展的离散化加快隐私会计
comment: Appeared in International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML) 2022
comments: Appeared in International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML) 2022
abstract: We introduce a new algorithm for numerical composition of privacy random variables, useful for computing the accurate differential privacy parameters for composition of mechanisms. Our algorithm achieves a running time and memory usage of $\mathrm{polylog}(k)$ for the task of self-composing a mechanism, from a broad class of mechanisms, $k$ times; this class, e.g., includes the sub-sampled Gaussian mechanism, that appears in the analysis of differentially private stochastic gradient descent. By comparison, recent work by Gopi et al. (NeurIPS 2021) has obtained a running time of $\widetilde{O}(\sqrt{k})$ for the same task. Our approach extends to the case of composing $k$ different mechanisms in the same class, improving upon their running time and memory usage from $\widetilde{O}(k^{1.5})$ to $\widetilde{O}(k)$.
summary: We introduce a new algorithm for numerical composition of privacy random variables, useful for computing the accurate differential privacy parameters for composition of mechanisms. Our algorithm achieves a running time and memory usage of $\mathrm{polylog}(k)$ for the task of self-composing a mechanism, from a broad class of mechanisms, $k$ times; this class, e.g., includes the sub-sampled Gaussian mechanism, that appears in the analysis of differentially private stochastic gradient descent. By comparison, recent work by Gopi et al. (NeurIPS 2021) has obtained a running time of $\widetilde{O}(\sqrt{k})$ for the same task. Our approach extends to the case of composing $k$ different mechanisms in the same class, improving upon their running time and memory usage from $\widetilde{O}(k^{1.5})$ to $\widetilde{O}(k)$.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一种新的隐私随机变量数值组合算法，可用于计算机制组合的精确差分隐私参数。对于自构造机制的任务，我们的算法实现了 $\mathrm{polylog}(k)$ 的运行时间和内存使用量，从一大类机制中，达到 $k$ 次；例如，此类包括子采样高斯机制，该机制出现在差分私有随机梯度下降的分析中。相比之下，Gopi 等人最近的工作。 (NeurIPS 2021) 对于同一任务获得了 $\widetilde{O}(\sqrt{k})$ 的运行时间。我们的方法扩展到在同一类中组合 $k$ 个不同机制的情况，将它们的运行时间和内存使用率从 $\widetilde{O}(k^{1.5})$ 改进到 $\widetilde{O}(k)$。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过动态离散化实现更快隐私计算的算法，用于准确计算差分隐私机制的组合参数。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在计算差分隐私参数时存在时间复杂度高（如~O(√k)）和内存消耗大的问题，需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用动态离散化技术，将机制组合的计算复杂度降至polylog(k)，并扩展至多机制组合场景。
AI.result: 时间复杂度从~O(k^1.5)提升至~O(k)，内存使用显著优化，适用于包括子采样高斯机制在内的多种场景。
AI.conclusion: 该算法在保持精度的同时大幅提升了隐私参数计算效率，为差分隐私分析提供了更优工具。

search_text: Faster Privacy Accounting via Evolving Discretization 通过不断发展的离散化加快隐私会计 We introduce a new algorithm for numerical composition of privacy random variables, useful for computing the accurate differential privacy parameters for composition of mechanisms. Our algorithm achieves a running time and memory usage of $\mathrm{polylog}(k)$ for the task of self-composing a mechanism, from a broad class of mechanisms, $k$ times; this class, e.g., includes the sub-sampled Gaussian mechanism, that appears in the analysis of differentially private stochastic gradient descent. By comparison, recent work by Gopi et al. (NeurIPS 2021) has obtained a running time of $\widetilde{O}(\sqrt{k})$ for the same task. Our approach extends to the case of composing $k$ different mechanisms in the same class, improving upon their running time and memory usage from $\widetilde{O}(k^{1.5})$ to $\widetilde{O}(k)$. 我们引入了一种新的隐私随机变量数值组合算法，可用于计算机制组合的精确差分隐私参数。对于自构造机制的任务，我们的算法实现了 $\mathrm{polylog}(k)$ 的运行时间和内存使用量，从一大类机制中，达到 $k$ 次；例如，此类包括子采样高斯机制，该机制出现在差分私有随机梯度下降的分析中。相比之下，Gopi 等人最近的工作。 (NeurIPS 2021) 对于同一任务获得了 $\widetilde{O}(\sqrt{k})$ 的运行时间。我们的方法扩展到在同一类中组合 $k$ 个不同机制的情况，将它们的运行时间和内存使用率从 $\widetilde{O}(k^{1.5})$ 改进到 $\widetilde{O}(k)$。 本文提出一种通过动态离散化实现更快隐私计算的算法，用于准确计算差分隐私机制的组合参数。 Badih Ghazi,Pritish Kamath,Ravi Kumar,Pasin Manurangsi cs.DS,cs.CR,cs.LG

authors_text: Vadym Doroshenko,Badih Ghazi,Pritish Kamath,Ravi Kumar,Pasin Manurangsi
title: Connect the Dots: Tighter Discrete Approximations of Privacy Loss Distributions
title_zh: 连接点：隐私损失分布的更严格的离散近似
comment: Appeared in Privacy Enhancing Technologies Symposium (PETS) 2022
comments: Appeared in Privacy Enhancing Technologies Symposium (PETS) 2022
abstract: The privacy loss distribution (PLD) provides a tight characterization of the privacy loss of a mechanism in the context of differential privacy (DP). Recent work has shown that PLD-based accounting allows for tighter $(\varepsilon, δ)$-DP guarantees for many popular mechanisms compared to other known methods. A key question in PLD-based accounting is how to approximate any (potentially continuous) PLD with a PLD over any specified discrete support. We present a novel approach to this problem. Our approach supports both pessimistic estimation, which overestimates the hockey-stick divergence (i.e., $δ$) for any value of $\varepsilon$, and optimistic estimation, which underestimates the hockey-stick divergence. Moreover, we show that our pessimistic estimate is the best possible among all pessimistic estimates. Experimental evaluation shows that our approach can work with much larger discretization intervals while keeping a similar error bound compared to previous approaches and yet give a better approximation than existing methods.
summary: The privacy loss distribution (PLD) provides a tight characterization of the privacy loss of a mechanism in the context of differential privacy (DP). Recent work has shown that PLD-based accounting allows for tighter $(\varepsilon, δ)$-DP guarantees for many popular mechanisms compared to other known methods. A key question in PLD-based accounting is how to approximate any (potentially continuous) PLD with a PLD over any specified discrete support. We present a novel approach to this problem. Our approach supports both pessimistic estimation, which overestimates the hockey-stick divergence (i.e., $δ$) for any value of $\varepsilon$, and optimistic estimation, which underestimates the hockey-stick divergence. Moreover, we show that our pessimistic estimate is the best possible among all pessimistic estimates. Experimental evaluation shows that our approach can work with much larger discretization intervals while keeping a similar error bound compared to previous approaches and yet give a better approximation than existing methods.
abstract_zh: 隐私丢失分布 (PLD) 提供了差分隐私 (DP) 背景下机制的隐私丢失的严格表征。最近的工作表明，与其他已知方法相比，基于 PLD 的会计可以为许多流行机制提供更严格的 $(\varepsilon, δ)$-DP 保证。基于 PLD 的会计中的一个关键问题是如何使用任何指定离散支持上的 PLD 来近似任何（可能连续的）PLD。我们提出了解决这个问题的新方法。我们的方法支持悲观估计和乐观估计，前者高估了任何 $\varepsilon$ 值的曲棍球棒散度（即 $δ$），后者低估了曲棍球棒散度。此外，我们表明我们的悲观估计是所有悲观估计中最好的。实验评估表明，我们的方法可以使用更大的离散化区间，同时与以前的方法相比保持相似的误差范围，并且比现有方法提供更好的近似值。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种更精确的离散近似方法，用于差分隐私中的隐私损失分布（PLD）计算。
AI.motivation: 现有基于PLD的差分隐私分析方法在连续分布到离散支持的近似中存在误差，需改进近似精度与效率。
AI.method: 设计了一种新型离散化方法，支持悲观（高估δ）和乐观（低估δ）估计，并证明悲观估计在所有悲观方法中最优。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在保持相似误差范围的同时可使用更大离散间隔，且近似效果优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过优化离散化策略，在差分隐私保证中实现了更高效且精确的隐私损失计算。

authors_text: Nishanth Rao,Suresh Sundaram
title: An Input-Output Feedback Linearization based Exponentially Stable Controller for Multi-UAV Payload Transport
title_zh: 用于多无人机有效载荷传输的基于输入输出反馈线性化的指数稳定控制器
comment: Submitted to IEEE - Transactions on Robotics (IEEE - TRO)
comments: Submitted to IEEE - Transactions on Robotics (IEEE - TRO)
abstract: In this paper, an exponentially stable trajectory tracking controller is proposed for multi-UAV payload transport. The multi-UAV payload system has a 2-DOF magnetic spherical joint between the UAVs and the vertical rigid links of the payload frame, so the UAVs can roll or pitch freely. These vertical links are rigidly attached to the payload and cannot move. An input-output feedback linearized model is derived for the complete payload-UAV system along with thrust vectoring control for trajectory tracking of the payload. The theoretical analysis on tracking control laws shows that control law is exponentially stable, thus guaranteeing safe transportation along the desired trajectory. To validate the performance of the proposed control law, the results for a numerical simulation as well as a high-fidelity Gazebo real-time simulation are presented. Next, the robustness of the proposed controller is analyzed against two practical situations: External disturbance on the payload and payload mass uncertainty. The results clearly indicate that the proposed controller is robust and computationally efficient while achieving exponentially stable trajectory tracking.
summary: In this paper, an exponentially stable trajectory tracking controller is proposed for multi-UAV payload transport. The multi-UAV payload system has a 2-DOF magnetic spherical joint between the UAVs and the vertical rigid links of the payload frame, so the UAVs can roll or pitch freely. These vertical links are rigidly attached to the payload and cannot move. An input-output feedback linearized model is derived for the complete payload-UAV system along with thrust vectoring control for trajectory tracking of the payload. The theoretical analysis on tracking control laws shows that control law is exponentially stable, thus guaranteeing safe transportation along the desired trajectory. To validate the performance of the proposed control law, the results for a numerical simulation as well as a high-fidelity Gazebo real-time simulation are presented. Next, the robustness of the proposed controller is analyzed against two practical situations: External disturbance on the payload and payload mass uncertainty. The results clearly indicate that the proposed controller is robust and computationally efficient while achieving exponentially stable trajectory tracking.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种用于多无人机有效载荷运输的指数稳定轨迹跟踪控制器。多无人机有效载荷系统在无人机和有效载荷框架的垂直刚性连杆之间具有二自由度磁球关节，因此无人机可以自由滚动或俯仰。这些垂直连杆刚性地连接到有效负载并且不能移动。为完整的有效载荷无人机系统推导了输入输出反馈线性化模型以及用于有效载荷轨迹跟踪的推力矢量控制。对跟踪控制律的理论分析表明，控制律是指数稳定的，从而保证了沿着期望轨迹的安全运输。为了验证所提出的控制律的性能，给出了数值模拟以及高保真度 Gazebo 实时模拟的结果。接下来，针对两种实际情况分析了所提出的控制器的鲁棒性：有效负载的外部干扰和有效负载质量的不确定性。结果清楚地表明，所提出的控制器具有鲁棒性和计算效率，同时实现了指数稳定的轨迹跟踪。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于输入输出反馈线性化的指数稳定控制器，用于多无人机（UAV）负载运输系统，以实现轨迹跟踪控制。
AI.motivation: 多无人机负载运输系统中，无人机与负载框架间的2自由度磁球关节允许自由滚转和俯仰，但现有控制方法难以保证复杂动态下的指数稳定性与鲁棒性。
AI.method: 通过输入输出反馈线性化建立完整负载-UAV系统模型，结合推力矢量控制实现轨迹跟踪，并利用理论分析证明控制律的指数稳定性。通过数值仿真与高保真Gazebo仿真验证性能，分析外部扰动与负载质量不确定性下的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，所提控制器在轨迹跟踪任务中具有指数稳定性，且对负载扰动和质量不确定性具有鲁棒性，计算效率高。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的控制器能够有效保证多无人机负载运输系统的指数稳定轨迹跟踪，且在实际应用中表现出良好的鲁棒性与计算效率。

An input-output feedback linearized model is derived for the complete payload-UAV system along with thrust vectoring control for trajectory tracking of the payload. The theoretical analysis on tracking control laws shows that control law is exponentially stable, thus guaranteeing safe transportation along the desired trajectory. To validate the performance of the proposed control law, the results for a numerical simulation as well as a high-fidelity Gazebo real-time simulation are presented. Next, the robustness of the proposed controller is analyzed against two practical situations: External disturbance on the payload and payload mass uncertainty. The results clearly indicate that the proposed controller is robust and computationally efficient while achieving exponentially stable trajectory tracking. 本文提出了一种用于多无人机有效载荷运输的指数稳定轨迹跟踪控制器。多无人机有效载荷系统在无人机和有效载荷框架的垂直刚性连杆之间具有二自由度磁球关节，因此无人机可以自由滚动或俯仰。这些垂直连杆刚性地连接到有效负载并且不能移动。为完整的有效载荷无人机系统推导了输入输出反馈线性化模型以及用于有效载荷轨迹跟踪的推力矢量控制。对跟踪控制律的理论分析表明，控制律是指数稳定的，从而保证了沿着期望轨迹的安全运输。为了验证所提出的控制律的性能，给出了数值模拟以及高保真度 Gazebo 实时模拟的结果。接下来，针对两种实际情况分析了所提出的控制器的鲁棒性：有效负载的外部干扰和有效负载质量的不确定性。结果清楚地表明，所提出的控制器具有鲁棒性和计算效率，同时实现了指数稳定的轨迹跟踪。 本文提出了一种基于输入输出反馈线性化的指数稳定控制器，用于多无人机（UAV）负载运输系统，以实现轨迹跟踪控制。 Nishanth Rao,Suresh Sundaram cs.RO

authors_text: Ziyuan Jiao,Yida Niu,Zeyu Zhang,Song-Chun Zhu,Yixin Zhu,Hangxin Liu
title: Sequential Manipulation Planning on Scene Graph
title_zh: 场景图的顺序操作规划
abstract: We devise a 3D scene graph representation, contact graph+ (cg+), for efficient sequential task planning. Augmented with predicate-like attributes, this contact graph-based representation abstracts scene layouts with succinct geometric information and valid robot-scene interactions. Goal configurations, naturally specified on contact graphs, can be produced by a genetic algorithm with a stochastic optimization method. A task plan is then initialized by computing the Graph Editing Distance (GED) between the initial contact graphs and the goal configurations, which generates graph edit operations corresponding to possible robot actions. We finalize the task plan by imposing constraints to regulate the temporal feasibility of graph edit operations, ensuring valid task and motion correspondences. In a series of simulations and experiments, robots successfully complete complex sequential object rearrangement tasks that are difficult to specify using conventional planning language like Planning Domain Definition Language (PDDL), demonstrating the high feasibility and potential of robot sequential task planning on contact graph.
summary: We devise a 3D scene graph representation, contact graph+ (cg+), for efficient sequential task planning. Augmented with predicate-like attributes, this contact graph-based representation abstracts scene layouts with succinct geometric information and valid robot-scene interactions. Goal configurations, naturally specified on contact graphs, can be produced by a genetic algorithm with a stochastic optimization method. A task plan is then initialized by computing the Graph Editing Distance (GED) between the initial contact graphs and the goal configurations, which generates graph edit operations corresponding to possible robot actions. We finalize the task plan by imposing constraints to regulate the temporal feasibility of graph edit operations, ensuring valid task and motion correspondences. In a series of simulations and experiments, robots successfully complete complex sequential object rearrangement tasks that are difficult to specify using conventional planning language like Planning Domain Definition Language (PDDL), demonstrating the high feasibility and potential of robot sequential task planning on contact graph.
abstract_zh: 我们设计了一种 3D 场景图表示，接触图+ (cg+)，用于高效的顺序任务规划。这种基于接触图的表示通过类似谓词的属性进行增强，通过简洁的几何信息和有效的机器人场景交互来抽象场景布局。目标配置自然指定在接触图上，可以通过遗传算法和随机优化方法来生成。然后通过计算初始接触图和目标配置之间的图形编辑距离（GED）来初始化任务计划，这会生成与可能的机器人动作相对应的图形编辑操作。我们通过施加约束来调节图形编辑操作的时间可行性，确保有效的任务和运动对应，最终确定任务计划。在一系列的仿真和实验中，机器人成功完成了使用规划域定义语言（PDDL）等传统规划语言难以指定的复杂顺序对象重排任务，展示了基于接触图的机器人顺序任务规划的高度可行性和潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于接触图的3D场景图表示方法（contact graph+），用于高效实现机器人复杂顺序任务规划。
AI.motivation: 传统规划语言（如PDDL）难以有效描述复杂连续物体重排任务，需更高效的场景表示与规划方法。
AI.method: 通过遗传算法生成目标接触图配置，计算初始接触图与目标配置的图编辑距离（GED）生成操作序列，并添加时间约束确保动作可行性。
AI.result: 实验表明机器人能成功完成传统方法难以定义的复杂顺序物体重排任务，验证了接触图规划方法的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 接触图表示结合图编辑距离与约束优化，为机器人连续任务规划提供了高效且具潜力的新框架。

authors_text: Shivesh Khaitan,John M. Dolan
title: State Dropout-Based Curriculum Reinforcement Learning for Self-Driving at Unsignalized Intersections
title_zh: 基于状态辍学的无信号交叉口自动驾驶课程强化学习
comment: 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS), 6 pages, 6 figures
comments: 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS), 6 pages, 6 figures
abstract: Traversing intersections is a challenging problem for autonomous vehicles, especially when the intersections do not have traffic control. Recently deep reinforcement learning has received massive attention due to its success in dealing with autonomous driving tasks. In this work, we address the problem of traversing unsignalized intersections using a novel curriculum for deep reinforcement learning. The proposed curriculum leads to: 1) A faster training process for the reinforcement learning agent, and 2) Better performance compared to an agent trained without curriculum. Our main contribution is two-fold: 1) Presenting a unique curriculum for training deep reinforcement learning agents, and 2) showing the application of the proposed curriculum for the unsignalized intersection traversal task. The framework expects processed observations of the surroundings from the perception system of the autonomous vehicle. We test our method in the CommonRoad motion planning simulator on T-intersections and four-way intersections.
summary: Traversing intersections is a challenging problem for autonomous vehicles, especially when the intersections do not have traffic control. Recently deep reinforcement learning has received massive attention due to its success in dealing with autonomous driving tasks. In this work, we address the problem of traversing unsignalized intersections using a novel curriculum for deep reinforcement learning. The proposed curriculum leads to: 1) A faster training process for the reinforcement learning agent, and 2) Better performance compared to an agent trained without curriculum. Our main contribution is two-fold: 1) Presenting a unique curriculum for training deep reinforcement learning agents, and 2) showing the application of the proposed curriculum for the unsignalized intersection traversal task. The framework expects processed observations of the surroundings from the perception system of the autonomous vehicle. We test our method in the CommonRoad motion planning simulator on T-intersections and four-way intersections.
abstract_zh: 对于自动驾驶车辆来说，穿过十字路口是一个具有挑战性的问题，特别是当十字路口没有交通管制时。最近，深度强化学习因其在处理自动驾驶任务方面的成功而受到广泛关注。在这项工作中，我们使用深度强化学习的新颖课程来解决穿越无信号交叉口的问题。所提出的课程可以带来：1）强化学习智能体的训练过程更快，2）与没有课程训练的智能体相比，性能更好。我们的主要贡献有两个：1）提出了用于训练深度强化学习代理的独特课程，2）展示了所提出的课程在无信号交叉口遍历任务中的应用。该框架期望自动驾驶车辆的感知系统对周围环境进行处理观察。我们在 CommonRoad 运动规划模拟器中的 T 形交叉口和四向交叉口测试我们的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于状态丢弃的课程强化学习方法，用于解决自动驾驶车辆在无信号交叉口的路径规划问题。
AI.motivation: 无信号交叉口的交通场景复杂且缺乏明确规则，传统深度强化学习训练效率低且难以保证安全性。
AI.method: 设计分阶段训练课程，通过状态丢弃机制逐步增加环境复杂度，结合CommonRoad模拟器验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法显著缩短训练时间，且在T型交叉口和四向交叉口场景中决策性能优于无课程训练的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的课程强化学习框架有效提升了无信号交叉口场景下自动驾驶系统的训练效率与决策可靠性。

authors_text: Danjie Zhu,Tao Yan,Simon X. Yang
title: Motion Planning and Tracking Control of Unmanned Underwater Vehicles: Technologies, Challenges and Prospects
title_zh: 无人水下航行器运动规划与跟踪控制：技术、挑战与前景
abstract: The motion planning and tracking control techniques of unmanned underwater vehicles (UUV) are fundamentally significant for efficient and robust UUV navigation, which is crucial for underwater rescue, facility maintenance, marine resource exploration, aquatic recreation, etc. Studies on UUV motion planning and tracking control have been growing rapidly worldwide, which are usually sorted into the following topics: task assignment of the multi-UUV system, UUV path planning and UUV trajectory tracking. This paper provides a comprehensive review of conventional and intelligent technologies for motion planning and tracking control of UUVs. Analysis of the benefits and drawbacks of these various methodologies in literature is presented. In addition, the challenges and prospects of UUV motion planning and tracking control are provided as possible developments for future research.
summary: The motion planning and tracking control techniques of unmanned underwater vehicles (UUV) are fundamentally significant for efficient and robust UUV navigation, which is crucial for underwater rescue, facility maintenance, marine resource exploration, aquatic recreation, etc. Studies on UUV motion planning and tracking control have been growing rapidly worldwide, which are usually sorted into the following topics: task assignment of the multi-UUV system, UUV path planning and UUV trajectory tracking. This paper provides a comprehensive review of conventional and intelligent technologies for motion planning and tracking control of UUVs. Analysis of the benefits and drawbacks of these various methodologies in literature is presented. In addition, the challenges and prospects of UUV motion planning and tracking control are provided as possible developments for future research.
abstract_zh: 无人水下航行器（UUV）的运动规划和跟踪控制技术对于UUV的高效鲁棒导航具有重要意义，对水下救援、设施维护、海洋资源勘探、水上娱乐等至关重要。UUV运动规划和跟踪控制的研究在全球范围内迅速发展，通常分为以下主题：多UUV系统的任务分配、UUV路径规划和UUV轨迹跟踪。本文对 UUV 运动规划和跟踪控制的传统技术和智能技术进行了全面综述。对文献中这些不同方法的优点和缺点进行了分析。此外，还提供了 UUV 运动规划和跟踪控制的挑战和前景，作为未来研究的可能发展。

AI.tldr: 综述UUV运动规划与跟踪控制的传统及智能技术，分析其优缺点，并探讨未来挑战与研究方向。
AI.motivation: 为提升UUV导航效率与鲁棒性，推动其在多个领域的应用，如水下救援、资源勘探等，需系统梳理现有技术并探索未来方向。
AI.method: 通过文献综述，分类总结传统与智能控制技术，对比分析其优缺点，并结合当前研究趋势探讨未来挑战。
AI.result: 系统梳理了UUV运动规划与控制技术，明确了各类方法的适用场景及局限性，识别了当前研究的关键挑战。
AI.conclusion: 现有技术在复杂环境下仍存在不足，未来需融合多学科方法，提升智能化水平以应对动态海洋环境。

ai_content.tldr: 综述UUV运动规划与跟踪控制的传统及智能技术，分析其优缺点，并探讨未来挑战与研究方向。
ai_content.motivation: 为提升UUV导航效率与鲁棒性，推动其在多个领域的应用，如水下救援、资源勘探等，需系统梳理现有技术并探索未来方向。

search_text: Motion Planning and Tracking Control of Unmanned Underwater Vehicles: Technologies, Challenges and Prospects 无人水下航行器运动规划与跟踪控制：技术、挑战与前景 The motion planning and tracking control techniques of unmanned underwater vehicles (UUV) are fundamentally significant for efficient and robust UUV navigation, which is crucial for underwater rescue, facility maintenance, marine resource exploration, aquatic recreation, etc. Studies on UUV motion planning and tracking control have been growing rapidly worldwide, which are usually sorted into the following topics: task assignment of the multi-UUV system, UUV path planning and UUV trajectory tracking. This paper provides a comprehensive review of conventional and intelligent technologies for motion planning and tracking control of UUVs. Analysis of the benefits and drawbacks of these various methodologies in literature is presented. In addition, the challenges and prospects of UUV motion planning and tracking control are provided as possible developments for future research. 无人水下航行器（UUV）的运动规划和跟踪控制技术对于UUV的高效鲁棒导航具有重要意义，对水下救援、设施维护、海洋资源勘探、水上娱乐等至关重要。UUV运动规划和跟踪控制的研究在全球范围内迅速发展，通常分为以下主题：多UUV系统的任务分配、UUV路径规划和UUV轨迹跟踪。本文对 UUV 运动规划和跟踪控制的传统技术和智能技术进行了全面综述。对文献中这些不同方法的优点和缺点进行了分析。此外，还提供了 UUV 运动规划和跟踪控制的挑战和前景，作为未来研究的可能发展。 综述UUV运动规划与跟踪控制的传统及智能技术，分析其优缺点，并探讨未来挑战与研究方向。 Danjie Zhu,Tao Yan,Simon X. Yang cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Shunsuke Tsubaki,Keisuke Imoto,Nobutaka Ono
title: Joint Analysis of Acoustic Scenes and Sound Events with Weakly labeled Data
title_zh: 弱标记数据的声学场景和声音事件的联合分析
abstract: Considering that acoustic scenes and sound events are closely related to each other, in some previous papers, a joint analysis of acoustic scenes and sound events utilizing multitask learning (MTL)-based neural networks was proposed. In conventional methods, a strongly supervised scheme is applied to sound event detection in MTL models, which requires strong labels of sound events in model training; however, annotating strong event labels is quite time-consuming. In this paper, we thus propose a method for the joint analysis of acoustic scenes and sound events based on the MTL framework with weak labels of sound events. In particular, in the proposed method, we introduce the multiple-instance learning scheme for weakly supervised training of sound event detection and evaluate four pooling functions, namely, max pooling, average pooling, exponential softmax pooling, and attention pooling. Experimental results obtained using parts of the TUT Acoustic Scenes 2016/2017 and TUT Sound Events 2016/2017 datasets show that the proposed MTL-based method with weak labels outperforms the conventional single-task-based scene classification and event detection models with weak labels in terms of both the scene classification and event detection performances.
summary: Considering that acoustic scenes and sound events are closely related to each other, in some previous papers, a joint analysis of acoustic scenes and sound events utilizing multitask learning (MTL)-based neural networks was proposed. In conventional methods, a strongly supervised scheme is applied to sound event detection in MTL models, which requires strong labels of sound events in model training; however, annotating strong event labels is quite time-consuming. In this paper, we thus propose a method for the joint analysis of acoustic scenes and sound events based on the MTL framework with weak labels of sound events. In particular, in the proposed method, we introduce the multiple-instance learning scheme for weakly supervised training of sound event detection and evaluate four pooling functions, namely, max pooling, average pooling, exponential softmax pooling, and attention pooling. Experimental results obtained using parts of the TUT Acoustic Scenes 2016/2017 and TUT Sound Events 2016/2017 datasets show that the proposed MTL-based method with weak labels outperforms the conventional single-task-based scene classification and event detection models with weak labels in terms of both the scene classification and event detection performances.
abstract_zh: 考虑到声学场景和声音事件彼此密切相关，在之前的一些论文中，提出了利用基于多任务学习（MTL）的神经网络对声学场景和声音事件进行联合分析。传统方法中，MTL模型中的声音事件检测采用强监督方案，这需要在模型训练时对声音事件进行强标签；然而，注释强事件标签是相当耗时的。因此，在本文中，我们提出了一种基于 MTL 框架的声音事件弱标签的声学场景和声音事件联合分析方法。特别是，在所提出的方法中，我们引入了用于声音事件检测弱监督训练的多实例学习方案，并评估了四种池化函数，即最大池化、平均池化、指数softmax池化和注意力池化。使用 TUT Acoustic Sc​​enes 2016/2017 和 TUT Sound Events 2016/2017 数据集的部分数据获得的实验结果表明，所提出的基于 MTL 的弱标签方法在场景分类和事件检测性能方面均优于传统的基于单任务的弱标签场景分类和事件检测模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于弱标签数据的多任务学习框架，联合分析声学场景与声音事件，以解决传统强标签标注耗时的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统多任务学习方法依赖强标签进行声事件检测，但强标签标注成本高，而弱标签数据更易获取且能提升模型实用性。
AI.method: 引入多实例学习方案，结合弱监督训练声事件检测，并评估四种池化函数（最大池化、平均池化、指数softmax池化和注意力池化）。
AI.result: 在TUT数据集实验中，所提方法在场景分类和事件检测性能上均优于传统单任务模型及弱标签基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 弱标签多任务框架有效提升了声学场景与事件联合分析的性能，为实际应用中减少标注成本提供了可行方案。
