authors_text: Wen-Chin Huang,Shu-Wen Yang,Tomoki Hayashi,Tomoki Toda
title: A Comparative Study of Self-supervised Speech Representation Based Voice Conversion
title_zh: 基于自监督语音表示的语音转换比较研究
comment: Accepted to IEEE Journal of Selected Topics in Signal Processing. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2110.06280
comments: Accepted to IEEE Journal of Selected Topics in Signal Processing. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2110.06280
abstract: We present a large-scale comparative study of self-supervised speech representation (S3R)-based voice conversion (VC). In the context of recognition-synthesis VC, S3Rs are attractive owing to their potential to replace expensive supervised representations such as phonetic posteriorgrams (PPGs), which are commonly adopted by state-of-the-art VC systems. Using S3PRL-VC, an open-source VC software we previously developed, we provide a series of in-depth objective and subjective analyses under three VC settings: intra-/cross-lingual any-to-one (A2O) and any-to-any (A2A) VC, using the voice conversion challenge 2020 (VCC2020) dataset. We investigated S3R-based VC in various aspects, including model type, multilinguality, and supervision. We also studied the effect of a post-discretization process with k-means clustering and showed how it improves in the A2A setting. Finally, the comparison with state-of-the-art VC systems demonstrates the competitiveness of S3R-based VC and also sheds light on the possible improving directions.
summary: We present a large-scale comparative study of self-supervised speech representation (S3R)-based voice conversion (VC). In the context of recognition-synthesis VC, S3Rs are attractive owing to their potential to replace expensive supervised representations such as phonetic posteriorgrams (PPGs), which are commonly adopted by state-of-the-art VC systems. Using S3PRL-VC, an open-source VC software we previously developed, we provide a series of in-depth objective and subjective analyses under three VC settings: intra-/cross-lingual any-to-one (A2O) and any-to-any (A2A) VC, using the voice conversion challenge 2020 (VCC2020) dataset. We investigated S3R-based VC in various aspects, including model type, multilinguality, and supervision. We also studied the effect of a post-discretization process with k-means clustering and showed how it improves in the A2A setting. Finally, the comparison with state-of-the-art VC systems demonstrates the competitiveness of S3R-based VC and also sheds light on the possible improving directions.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了基于自监督语音表示（S3R）的语音转换（VC）的大规模比较研究。在识别合成 VC 的背景下，S3R 很有吸引力，因为它们有可能取代昂贵的监督表示，例如语音后验图（PPG），而后者通常被最先进的 VC 系统采用。使用我们之前开发的开源 VC 软件 S3PRL-VC，我们使用 2020 年语音转换挑战赛 (VCC2020) 数据集，在三种 VC 设置下提供一系列深入的客观和主观分析：内/跨语言任意对一 (A2O) 和任意对任意 (A2A) VC。我们从多个方面研究了基于 S3R 的 VC，包括模型类型、多语言性和监督。我们还研究了 k 均值聚类后离散化过程的效果，并展示了它在 A2A 设置中的改进方式。最后，与最先进的 VC 系统的比较证明了基于 S3R 的 VC 的竞争力，并揭示了可能的改进方向。

AI.tldr: 本文对基于自监督语音表征的语音转换方法进行了大规模比较研究，分析其在不同场景下的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统语音转换依赖昂贵的监督表示（如PPGs），而自监督语音表征（S3R）可能提供更高效且低成本的替代方案。
AI.method: 使用开源工具S3PRL-VC，在VCC2020数据集上对比了三种语音转换设置（同/跨语言任意到单语和任意到任意），分析模型类型、多语言性及后离散化处理的影响。
AI.result: S3R在语音转换中展现出竞争力，后离散化处理显著提升任意到任意转换效果，同时指出现有方法的改进方向。
AI.conclusion: 自监督语音表征在语音转换中具有潜力，但需进一步优化跨语言场景及后处理技术以提升整体表现。

We investigated S3R-based VC in various aspects, including model type, multilinguality, and supervision. We also studied the effect of a post-discretization process with k-means clustering and showed how it improves in the A2A setting. Finally, the comparison with state-of-the-art VC systems demonstrates the competitiveness of S3R-based VC and also sheds light on the possible improving directions. 我们提出了基于自监督语音表示（S3R）的语音转换（VC）的大规模比较研究。在识别合成 VC 的背景下，S3R 很有吸引力，因为它们有可能取代昂贵的监督表示，例如语音后验图（PPG），而后者通常被最先进的 VC 系统采用。使用我们之前开发的开源 VC 软件 S3PRL-VC，我们使用 2020 年语音转换挑战赛 (VCC2020) 数据集，在三种 VC 设置下提供一系列深入的客观和主观分析：内/跨语言任意对一 (A2O) 和任意对任意 (A2A) VC。我们从多个方面研究了基于 S3R 的 VC，包括模型类型、多语言性和监督。我们还研究了 k 均值聚类后离散化过程的效果，并展示了它在 A2A 设置中的改进方式。最后，与最先进的 VC 系统的比较证明了基于 S3R 的 VC 的竞争力，并揭示了可能的改进方向。 本文对基于自监督语音表征的语音转换方法进行了大规模比较研究，分析其在不同场景下的性能。 Wen-Chin Huang,Shu-Wen Yang,Tomoki Hayashi,Tomoki Toda cs.SD,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Shagun Sodhani,Mojtaba Faramarzi,Sanket Vaibhav Mehta,Pranshu Malviya,Mohamed Abdelsalam,Janarthanan Janarthanan,Sarath Chandar
title: An Introduction to Lifelong Supervised Learning
title_zh: 终身监督学习简介
abstract: This primer is an attempt to provide a detailed summary of the different facets of lifelong learning. We start with Chapter 2 which provides a high-level overview of lifelong learning systems. In this chapter, we discuss prominent scenarios in lifelong learning (Section 2.4), provide 8 Introduction a high-level organization of different lifelong learning approaches (Section 2.5), enumerate the desiderata for an ideal lifelong learning system (Section 2.6), discuss how lifelong learning is related to other learning paradigms (Section 2.7), describe common metrics used to evaluate lifelong learning systems (Section 2.8). This chapter is more useful for readers who are new to lifelong learning and want to get introduced to the field without focusing on specific approaches or benchmarks. The remaining chapters focus on specific aspects (either learning algorithms or benchmarks) and are more useful for readers who are looking for specific approaches or benchmarks. Chapter 3 focuses on regularization-based approaches that do not assume access to any data from previous tasks. Chapter 4 discusses memory-based approaches that typically use a replay buffer or an episodic memory to save subset of data across different tasks. Chapter 5 focuses on different architecture families (and their instantiations) that have been proposed for training lifelong learning systems. Following these different classes of learning algorithms, we discuss the commonly used evaluation benchmarks and metrics for lifelong learning (Chapter 6) and wrap up with a discussion of future challenges and important research directions in Chapter 7.

Following these different classes of learning algorithms, we discuss the commonly used evaluation benchmarks and metrics for lifelong learning (Chapter 6) and wrap up with a discussion of future challenges and important research directions in Chapter 7.
abstract_zh: 本入门书试图对终身学习的不同方面进行详细总结。我们从第二章开始，它对终身学习系统进行了高级概述。在本章中，我们讨论终身学习中的突出场景（第 2.4 节），提供不同终身学习方法的高层组织（第 2.5 节），列举理想的终身学习系统的必要条件（第 2.6 节），讨论终身学习与其他学习范式的关系（第 2.7 节），描述用于评估终身学习系统的常见指标（第 2.8 节）。本章对于那些刚刚接触终身学习并希望了解该领域而不关注特定方法或基准的读者更有用。其余章节重点关注特定方面（学习算法或基准），对于正在寻找特定方法或基准的读者更有用。第 3 章重点介绍基于正则化的方法，这些方法不假设可以访问先前任务中的任何数据。第 4 章讨论基于内存的方法，这些方法通常使用重播缓冲区或情景内存来保存不同任务的数据子集。第 5 章重点介绍了为培训终身学习系统而提出的不同架构系列（及其实例）。根据这些不同类别的学习算法，我们讨论了终身学习的常用评估基准和指标（第 6 章），并在第 7 章中讨论了未来的挑战和重要研究方向。

AI.tldr: 本文系统介绍了终身监督学习的不同方面，涵盖系统概述、学习算法分类、评估基准及未来挑战。
AI.motivation: 为初学者提供终身学习领域的全面入门指南，同时为研究者梳理具体方法与评估标准。
AI.method: 通过分章节结构化呈现：第2章概述核心概念与分类，后续章节分别探讨正则化方法、记忆机制、架构设计、评估指标及研究方向。
AI.result: 构建了终身学习系统的知识框架，总结了主流算法分类、评价指标体系，并指出现阶段研究的局限性与未来挑战。
AI.conclusion: 终身学习需平衡持续学习能力与任务间干扰，未来研究应聚焦动态环境适应性与可扩展性优化。

authors_text: Soham Basu,Sayantan Mukherjee,Ankit Bhattacharya,Anindya Sen
title: Segmentation of Blood Vessels, Optic Disc Localization, Detection of Exudates and Diabetic Retinopathy Diagnosis from Digital Fundus Images
title_zh: 数字眼底图像的血管分割、视盘定位、渗出物检测和糖尿病视网膜病变诊断
abstract: Diabetic Retinopathy (DR) is a complication of long-standing, unchecked diabetes and one of the leading causes of blindness in the world. This paper focuses on improved and robust methods to extract some of the features of DR, viz. Blood Vessels and Exudates. Blood vessels are segmented using multiple morphological and thresholding operations. For the segmentation of exudates, k-means clustering and contour detection on the original images are used. Extensive noise reduction is performed to remove false positives from the vessel segmentation algorithm's results. The localization of Optic Disc using k-means clustering and template matching is also performed. Lastly, this paper presents a Deep Convolutional Neural Network (DCNN) model with 14 Convolutional Layers and 2 Fully Connected Layers, for the automatic, binary diagnosis of DR. The vessel segmentation, optic disc localization and DCNN achieve accuracies of 95.93%, 98.77% and 75.73% respectively. The source code and pre-trained model are available https://github.com/Sohambasu07/DR_2021
summary: Diabetic Retinopathy (DR) is a complication of long-standing, unchecked diabetes and one of the leading causes of blindness in the world. This paper focuses on improved and robust methods to extract some of the features of DR, viz. Blood Vessels and Exudates. Blood vessels are segmented using multiple morphological and thresholding operations. For the segmentation of exudates, k-means clustering and contour detection on the original images are used. Extensive noise reduction is performed to remove false positives from the vessel segmentation algorithm's results. The localization of Optic Disc using k-means clustering and template matching is also performed. Lastly, this paper presents a Deep Convolutional Neural Network (DCNN) model with 14 Convolutional Layers and 2 Fully Connected Layers, for the automatic, binary diagnosis of DR. The vessel segmentation, optic disc localization and DCNN achieve accuracies of 95.93%, 98.77% and 75.73% respectively. The source code and pre-trained model are available https://github.com/Sohambasu07/DR_2021
abstract_zh: 糖尿病视网膜病变 (DR) 是长期未控制的糖尿病的并发症，也是世界上导致失明的主要原因之一。本文重点介绍提取 DR 某些特征的改进且稳健的方法，即。血管和渗出物。使用多种形态学和阈值操作来分割血管。对于渗出液的分割，使用了原始图像上的 k 均值聚类和轮廓检测。进行广泛的降噪以消除血管分割算法结果中的误报。还使用 k 均值聚类和模板匹配进行光盘定位。最后，本文提出了一种具有 14 个卷积层和 2 个全连接层的深度卷积神经网络 (DCNN) 模型，用于 DR 的自动二元诊断。血管分割、视盘定位和DCNN的准确率分别达到95.93%、98.77%和75.73%。源代码和预训练模型可获取 https://github.com/Sohambasu07/DR_2021

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于数字眼底图像的糖尿病视网膜病变（DR）自动诊断方法，包括血管分割、视盘定位、渗出检测及深度卷积神经网络（DCNN）诊断模型。
AI.motivation: 糖尿病视网膜病变是导致全球失明的主因之一，早期准确检测对治疗至关重要。现有方法存在误检率高、自动化程度低等问题，需改进特征提取与诊断技术。
AI.method: 采用形态学与阈值分割提取血管，k-means聚类与轮廓检测分割渗出，结合模板匹配定位视盘；设计包含14层卷积层和2层全连接层的DCNN模型进行二分类诊断，并通过降噪减少假阳性。
AI.result: 血管分割准确率达95.93%，视盘定位准确率98.77%，DCNN诊断准确率75.73%。代码与预训练模型已开源。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法在DR关键特征提取与诊断中表现优异，尤其视盘定位精度突出，但DCNN诊断准确率仍有提升空间，开源资源可促进后续研究。

authors_text: Franklin Mingzhe Li,Michael Xieyang Liu,Yang Zhang,Patrick Carrington
title: Freedom to Choose: Understanding Input Modality Preferences of People with Upper-body Motor Impairments for Activities of Daily Living
title_zh: 自由选择：了解上身运动障碍人士对日常生活活动的输入方式偏好
abstract: Many people with upper-body motor impairments encounter challenges while performing Activities of Daily Living (ADLs) and Instrumental Activities of Daily Living (IADLs), such as toileting, grooming, and managing finances, which have impacts on their Quality of Life (QOL). Although existing assistive technologies enable people with upper-body motor impairments to use different input modalities to interact with computing devices independently (e.g., using voice to interact with a computer), many people still require Personal Care Assistants (PCAs) to perform ADLs. Multimodal input has the potential to enable users to perform ADLs without human assistance. We conducted 12 semi-structured interviews with people who have upper-body motor impairments to capture their existing practices and challenges of performing ADLs, identify opportunities to expand the input possibilities for assistive devices, and understand user preferences for multimodal interaction during everyday tasks. Finally, we discuss implications for the design and use of multimodal input solutions to support user independence and collaborative experiences when performing daily living tasks.
summary: Many people with upper-body motor impairments encounter challenges while performing Activities of Daily Living (ADLs) and Instrumental Activities of Daily Living (IADLs), such as toileting, grooming, and managing finances, which have impacts on their Quality of Life (QOL). Although existing assistive technologies enable people with upper-body motor impairments to use different input modalities to interact with computing devices independently (e.g., using voice to interact with a computer), many people still require Personal Care Assistants (PCAs) to perform ADLs. Multimodal input has the potential to enable users to perform ADLs without human assistance. We conducted 12 semi-structured interviews with people who have upper-body motor impairments to capture their existing practices and challenges of performing ADLs, identify opportunities to expand the input possibilities for assistive devices, and understand user preferences for multimodal interaction during everyday tasks. Finally, we discuss implications for the design and use of multimodal input solutions to support user independence and collaborative experiences when performing daily living tasks.
abstract_zh: 许多患有上身运动障碍的人在进行日常生活活动 (ADL) 和工具性日常生活活动 (IADL) 时遇到挑战，例如如厕、梳洗和管理财务，这会影响他们的生活质量 (QOL)。尽管现有的辅助技术使上身运动障碍的人能够使用不同的输入方式独立地与计算设备交互（例如，使用语音与计算机交互），但许多人仍然需要个人护理助理（PCA）来执行 ADL。多模式输入有可能使用户无需人工协助即可执行 ADL。我们对患有上半身运动障碍的人进行了 12 次半结构化访谈，以了解他们在执行 ADL 方面的现有实践和挑战，寻找扩大辅助设备输入可能性的机会，并了解用户在日常任务中对多模式交互的偏好。最后，我们讨论了多模式输入解决方案的设计和使用的影响，以支持用户在执行日常生活任务时的独立性和协作体验。

AI.tldr: 该论文通过访谈研究上肢运动障碍者在日常生活中对输入模态的偏好，以优化辅助设备设计。
AI.motivation: 现有辅助技术无法完全满足上肢运动障碍者独立完成日常活动的需求，需探索多模态输入方案以提升其自主性。
AI.method: 对12名上肢运动障碍者进行半结构化访谈，分析其日常活动挑战、现有辅助技术使用情况及多模态交互需求。
AI.result: 识别出用户对多模态输入的潜在需求，发现现有技术在灵活性和适配性上的不足，并提出改进方向。
AI.conclusion: 多模态输入设计可增强用户独立性与协作体验，未来需结合用户偏好开发更灵活的辅助技术方案。

authors_text: Maxime Kayser,Cornelius Emde,Oana-Maria Camburu,Guy Parsons,Bartlomiej Papiez,Thomas Lukasiewicz
title: Explaining Chest X-ray Pathologies in Natural Language
title_zh: 用自然语言解释胸部 X 射线病理学
abstract: Most deep learning algorithms lack explanations for their predictions, which limits their deployment in clinical practice. Approaches to improve explainability, especially in medical imaging, have often been shown to convey limited information, be overly reassuring, or lack robustness. In this work, we introduce the task of generating natural language explanations (NLEs) to justify predictions made on medical images. NLEs are human-friendly and comprehensive, and enable the training of intrinsically explainable models. To this goal, we introduce MIMIC-NLE, the first, large-scale, medical imaging dataset with NLEs. It contains over 38,000 NLEs, which explain the presence of various thoracic pathologies and chest X-ray findings. We propose a general approach to solve the task and evaluate several architectures on this dataset, including via clinician assessment.
summary: Most deep learning algorithms lack explanations for their predictions, which limits their deployment in clinical practice. Approaches to improve explainability, especially in medical imaging, have often been shown to convey limited information, be overly reassuring, or lack robustness. In this work, we introduce the task of generating natural language explanations (NLEs) to justify predictions made on medical images. NLEs are human-friendly and comprehensive, and enable the training of intrinsically explainable models. To this goal, we introduce MIMIC-NLE, the first, large-scale, medical imaging dataset with NLEs. It contains over 38,000 NLEs, which explain the presence of various thoracic pathologies and chest X-ray findings. We propose a general approach to solve the task and evaluate several architectures on this dataset, including via clinician assessment.
abstract_zh: 大多数深度学习算法缺乏对其预测的解释，这限制了它们在临床实践中的部署。提高可解释性的方法，特别是在医学成像领域，通常被证明传达的信息有限、过于令人放心或缺乏稳健性。在这项工作中，我们引入了生成自然语言解释（NLE）的任务，以证明对医学图像做出的预测是正确的。 NLE 人性化且全面，并且能够训练本质上可解释的模型。为了实现这一目标，我们引入了 MIMIC-NLE，这是第一个具有 NLE 的大规模医学成像数据集。它包含超过 38,000 个 NLE，解释了各种胸部病变和胸部 X 光检查结果的存在。我们提出了一种通用方法来解决该任务并评估该数据集上的几种架构，包括通过临床医生评估。

AI.tldr: 提出生成自然语言解释（NLEs）以解释胸部X光检查中病理预测结果的任务
AI.motivation: 现有医学影像可解释性方法存在信息有限、过于自信或鲁棒性不足的问题，需更友好且全面的自然语言解释
AI.method: 构建包含38,000条NLEs的MIMIC-NLE数据集，并提出通用框架生成NLEs，通过多种模型架构和临床评估验证效果
AI.result: 多种模型在数据集上表现良好，临床评估验证了其有效性
AI.conclusion: 自然语言解释提升模型可解释性，为临床应用提供基础

authors_text: Deeparnab Chakrabarty,Andrei Graur,Haotian Jiang,Aaron Sidford
title: Improved Lower Bounds for Submodular Function Minimization
title_zh: 子模函数最小化的改进下界
abstract: We provide a generic technique for constructing families of submodular functions to obtain lower bounds for submodular function minimization (SFM). Applying this technique, we prove that any deterministic SFM algorithm on a ground set of $n$ elements requires at least $Ω(n \log n)$ queries to an evaluation oracle. This is the first super-linear query complexity lower bound for SFM and improves upon the previous best lower bound of $2n$ given by [Graur et al., ITCS 2020]. Using our construction, we also prove that any (possibly randomized) parallel SFM algorithm, which can make up to $\mathsf{poly}(n)$ queries per round, requires at least $Ω(n / \log n)$ rounds to minimize a submodular function. This improves upon the previous best lower bound of $\tildeΩ(n^{1/3})$ rounds due to [Chakrabarty et al., FOCS 2021], and settles the parallel complexity of query-efficient SFM up to logarithmic factors due to a recent advance in [Jiang, SODA 2021].
summary: We provide a generic technique for constructing families of submodular functions to obtain lower bounds for submodular function minimization (SFM). Applying this technique, we prove that any deterministic SFM algorithm on a ground set of $n$ elements requires at least $Ω(n \log n)$ queries to an evaluation oracle. This is the first super-linear query complexity lower bound for SFM and improves upon the previous best lower bound of $2n$ given by [Graur et al., ITCS 2020]. Using our construction, we also prove that any (possibly randomized) parallel SFM algorithm, which can make up to $\mathsf{poly}(n)$ queries per round, requires at least $Ω(n / \log n)$ rounds to minimize a submodular function. This improves upon the previous best lower bound of $\tildeΩ(n^{1/3})$ rounds due to [Chakrabarty et al., FOCS 2021], and settles the parallel complexity of query-efficient SFM up to logarithmic factors due to a recent advance in [Jiang, SODA 2021].
abstract_zh: 我们提供了一种构建子模函数族的通用技术，以获得子模函数最小化（SFM）的下界。应用这种技术，我们证明任何基于 $n$ 元素的确定性 SFM 算法都需要至少 $Ω(n \log n)$ 查询评估预言机。这是 SFM 的第一个超线性查询复杂度下限，并改进了 [Graur 等人，ITCS 2020] 给出的先前最佳下限 $2n$。使用我们的构造，我们还证明任何（可能是随机的）并行 SFM 算法（每轮可以完成 $\mathsf{poly}(n)$ 查询）至少需要 $Ω(n / \log n)$ 轮来最小化子模函数。这改进了 [Chakrabarty et al., FOCS 2021] 提出的 $\tildeΩ(n^{1/3})$ 轮次的最佳下界，并且由于 [Jiang, SODA 2021] 的最新进展，将查询高效 SFM 的并行复杂度提高到对数因子。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通用技术，用于构建子模函数族以获得子模函数最小化（SFM）的下界，并改进了相关复杂度结果。
AI.motivation: 子模函数最小化是组合优化的核心问题，但其查询复杂度和并行复杂度的下界此前未被充分研究。现有结果存在局限性，需更精确的理论分析。
AI.method: 通过构造特定子模函数族，结合查询模型分析，推导出确定性和随机化算法的查询次数及并行轮数下界。
AI.result: 确定性算法需至少Ω(n log n)次查询，随机化并行算法需Ω(n / log n)轮，均优于此前结果，并在对数因子内解决并行复杂度问题。
AI.conclusion: 本文改进了SFM的查询复杂度和并行复杂度下界，为相关算法设计提供了理论限制，推动了该领域的进一步研究。

tldr: 本文提出了一种通用技术，用于构建子模函数族以获得子模函数最小化（SFM）的下界，并改进了相关复杂度结果。
motivation: 子模函数最小化是组合优化的核心问题，但其查询复杂度和并行复杂度的下界此前未被充分研究。现有结果存在局限性，需更精确的理论分析。

search_text: Improved Lower Bounds for Submodular Function Minimization 子模函数最小化的改进下界 We provide a generic technique for constructing families of submodular functions to obtain lower bounds for submodular function minimization (SFM). Applying this technique, we prove that any deterministic SFM algorithm on a ground set of $n$ elements requires at least $Ω(n \log n)$ queries to an evaluation oracle. This is the first super-linear query complexity lower bound for SFM and improves upon the previous best lower bound of $2n$ given by [Graur et al., ITCS 2020]. Using our construction, we also prove that any (possibly randomized) parallel SFM algorithm, which can make up to $\mathsf{poly}(n)$ queries per round, requires at least $Ω(n / \log n)$ rounds to minimize a submodular function. This improves upon the previous best lower bound of $\tildeΩ(n^{1/3})$ rounds due to [Chakrabarty et al., FOCS 2021], and settles the parallel complexity of query-efficient SFM up to logarithmic factors due to a recent advance in [Jiang, SODA 2021]. 我们提供了一种构建子模函数族的通用技术，以获得子模函数最小化（SFM）的下界。应用这种技术，我们证明任何基于 $n$ 元素的确定性 SFM 算法都需要至少 $Ω(n \log n)$ 查询评估预言机。这是 SFM 的第一个超线性查询复杂度下限，并改进了 [Graur 等人，ITCS 2020] 给出的先前最佳下限 $2n$。使用我们的构造，我们还证明任何（可能是随机的）并行 SFM 算法（每轮可以完成 $\mathsf{poly}(n)$ 查询）至少需要 $Ω(n / \log n)$ 轮来最小化子模函数。这改进了 [Chakrabarty et al., FOCS 2021] 提出的 $\tildeΩ(n^{1/3})$ 轮次的最佳下界，并且由于 [Jiang, SODA 2021] 的最新进展，将查询高效 SFM 的并行复杂度提高到对数因子。 本文提出了一种通用技术，用于构建子模函数族以获得子模函数最小化（SFM）的下界，并改进了相关复杂度结果。 Deeparnab Chakrabarty,Andrei Graur,Haotian Jiang,Aaron Sidford cs.DS,cs.CC,cs.DC,cs.DM,math.OC

authors_text: Kevin Urrutia Avila,Merrick Campbell,Kerry Mauck,Marco Gebiola,Konstantinos Karydis
title: Development and Testing of a Smart Bin toward Automated Rearing of Black Soldier Fly Larvae
title_zh: 开发和测试用于自动饲养黑水虻幼虫的智能箱
abstract: The Black Soldier Fly (BSF), can be an effective alternative to traditional disposal of food and agricultural waste (biowaste) such as landfills because its larvae are able to quickly transform biowaste into ready-to-use biomass. However, several challenges remain to ensure that BSF farming is economically viable at different scales and can be widely implemented. Manual labor is required to ensure optimal conditions to rear the larvae, from aerating the feeding substrate to monitoring abiotic conditions during the growth cycle. This paper introduces a proof-of-concept automated method of rearing BSF larvae to ensure optimal growing conditions while at the same time reducing manual labor. We retrofit existing BSF rearing bins with a "smart lid," named as such due to the hot-swappable nature of the lid with multiple bins. The system automatically aerates the larvae-diet substrate and provides bio-information of the larvae to users in real time. The proposed solution uses a custom aeration method and an array of sensors to create a soft real time system. Growth of larvae is monitored using thermal imaging and classical computer vision techniques. Experimental testing reveals that our automated approach produces BSF larvae on par with manual techniques.
summary: The Black Soldier Fly (BSF), can be an effective alternative to traditional disposal of food and agricultural waste (biowaste) such as landfills because its larvae are able to quickly transform biowaste into ready-to-use biomass. However, several challenges remain to ensure that BSF farming is economically viable at different scales and can be widely implemented. This paper introduces a proof-of-concept automated method of rearing BSF larvae to ensure optimal growing conditions while at the same time reducing manual labor. We retrofit existing BSF rearing bins with a "smart lid," named as such due to the hot-swappable nature of the lid with multiple bins. The system automatically aerates the larvae-diet substrate and provides bio-information of the larvae to users in real time. Growth of larvae is monitored using thermal imaging and classical computer vision techniques. Experimental testing reveals that our automated approach produces BSF larvae on par with manual techniques.
abstract_zh: 黑水虻 (BSF) 可以成为垃圾填埋场等传统食品和农业废物（生物废物）处理方式的有效替代方案，因为其幼虫能够快速将生物废物转化为即用型生物质。然而，要确保 BSF 农业在不同规模上具有经济可行性并能够广泛实施，仍然存在一些挑战。需要体力劳动来确保幼虫的最佳饲养条件，从给饲养基质充气到监测生长周期中的非生物条件。本文介绍了一种饲养 BSF 幼虫的概念验证自动化方法，以确保最佳的生长条件，同时减少体力劳动。我们对现有的 BSF 饲养箱进行了改造，配备了“智能盖”，之所以如此命名，是因为多个箱的盖子具有热插拔特性。该系统自动给幼虫饮食基质充气，并向用户实时提供幼虫的生物信息。所提出的解决方案使用自定义通气方法和传感器阵列来创建软实时系统。使用热成像和经典计算机视觉技术监测幼虫的生长。实验测试表明，我们的自动化方法产生的 BSF 幼虫与手动技术相当。

AI.tldr: 开发并测试一种智能垃圾桶以实现黑水虻幼虫的自动化养殖。
AI.motivation: 传统黑水虻养殖依赖人工劳动维持最佳条件，效率低且难以规模化，需自动化方案提高经济可行性。
AI.method: 通过加装可热插拔的'智能盖子'改造现有养殖桶，集成传感器阵列和定制通风系统，结合热成像与计算机视觉实时监测幼虫生长。
AI.result: 自动化系统产出的黑水虻幼虫质量与人工养殖方法相当，验证了方案的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该智能系统为黑水虻养殖提供了可扩展的自动化解决方案，降低了人工成本并提升了养殖效率。

authors_text: Christoph Angermann,Markus Haltmeier,Ahsan Raza Siyal
title: Unsupervised Joint Image Transfer and Uncertainty Quantification Using Patch Invariant Networks
title_zh: 使用补丁不变网络的无监督联合图像传输和不确定性量化
comment: Accepted to ECCV 2022 Workshop on Uncertainty Quantification for Computer Vision (UNCV 2022)
comments: Accepted to ECCV 2022 Workshop on Uncertainty Quantification for Computer Vision (UNCV 2022)
abstract: Unsupervised image transfer enables intra- and inter-modality image translation in applications where a large amount of paired training data is not abundant. To ensure a structure-preserving mapping from the input to the target domain, existing methods for unpaired image transfer are commonly based on cycle-consistency, causing additional computational resources and instability due to the learning of an inverse mapping. This paper presents a novel method for uni-directional domain mapping that does not rely on any paired training data. A proper transfer is achieved by using a GAN architecture and a novel generator loss based on patch invariance. To be more specific, the generator outputs are evaluated and compared at different scales, also leading to an increased focus on high-frequency details as well as an implicit data augmentation. This novel patch loss also offers the possibility to accurately predict aleatoric uncertainty by modeling an input-dependent scale map for the patch residuals. The proposed method is comprehensively evaluated on three well-established medical databases. As compared to four state-of-the-art methods, we observe significantly higher accuracy on these datasets, indicating great potential of the proposed method for unpaired image transfer with uncertainty taken into account. Implementation of the proposed framework is released here: \url{https://github.com/anger-man/unsupervised-image-transfer-and-uq}.
summary: Unsupervised image transfer enables intra- and inter-modality image translation in applications where a large amount of paired training data is not abundant. To ensure a structure-preserving mapping from the input to the target domain, existing methods for unpaired image transfer are commonly based on cycle-consistency, causing additional computational resources and instability due to the learning of an inverse mapping. This paper presents a novel method for uni-directional domain mapping that does not rely on any paired training data. A proper transfer is achieved by using a GAN architecture and a novel generator loss based on patch invariance. To be more specific, the generator outputs are evaluated and compared at different scales, also leading to an increased focus on high-frequency details as well as an implicit data augmentation. This novel patch loss also offers the possibility to accurately predict aleatoric uncertainty by modeling an input-dependent scale map for the patch residuals. The proposed method is comprehensively evaluated on three well-established medical databases. As compared to four state-of-the-art methods, we observe significantly higher accuracy on these datasets, indicating great potential of the proposed method for unpaired image transfer with uncertainty taken into account. Implementation of the proposed framework is released here: \url{https://github.com/anger-man/unsupervised-image-transfer-and-uq}.
abstract_zh: 无监督图像传输可以在大量配对训练数据不丰富的应用中实现模态内和模间图像转换。为了确保从输入到目标域的结构保持映射，现有的不成对图像传输方法通常基于循环一致性，由于学习逆映射而导致额外的计算资源和不稳定。本文提出了一种不依赖于任何配对训练数据的单向域映射的新颖方法。通过使用 GAN 架构和基于补丁不变性的新型生成器损失来实现正确的传输。更具体地说，在不同的尺度上评估和比较生成器的输出，这也导致人们更加关注高频细节以及隐式数据增强。这种新颖的补丁损失还提供了通过对补丁残差的依赖于输入的比例图进行建模来准确预测任意不确定性的可能性。该方法在三个成熟的医学数据库上进行了综合评估。与四种最先进的方法相比，我们在这些数据集上观察到明显更高的准确性，这表明所提出的方法在考虑不确定性的情况下进行不成对图像传输的巨大潜力。所提议框架的实现在这里发布：\url{https://github.com/anger-man/unsupervised-image-transfer-and-uq}。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需配对数据的无监督图像转换方法，结合补丁不变性网络实现结构保持映射，并量化不确定性。
AI.motivation: 现有无配对图像转换方法依赖循环一致性，导致计算开销大且不稳定，且缺乏对不确定性量化的能力。
AI.method: 基于GAN架构设计单向域映射，引入多尺度补丁不变性损失函数，通过高频率细节增强和隐式数据扩充优化生成效果，同时建模输入相关尺度图预测aleatoric不确定性。
AI.result: 在三个医学图像数据集上显著优于四种最先进方法，验证了方法在无配对数据场景下的准确性和不确定性量化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过补丁不变性约束和不确定性建模，为无监督图像转换提供了高效稳定的解决方案，尤其适用于医学图像领域。

The proposed method is comprehensively evaluated on three well-established medical databases. As compared to four state-of-the-art methods, we observe significantly higher accuracy on these datasets, indicating great potential of the proposed method for unpaired image transfer with uncertainty taken into account. Implementation of the proposed framework is released here: \url{https://github.com/anger-man/unsupervised-image-transfer-and-uq}. 无监督图像传输可以在大量配对训练数据不丰富的应用中实现模态内和模间图像转换。为了确保从输入到目标域的结构保持映射，现有的不成对图像传输方法通常基于循环一致性，由于学习逆映射而导致额外的计算资源和不稳定。本文提出了一种不依赖于任何配对训练数据的单向域映射的新颖方法。通过使用 GAN 架构和基于补丁不变性的新型生成器损失来实现正确的传输。更具体地说，在不同的尺度上评估和比较生成器的输出，这也导致人们更加关注高频细节以及隐式数据增强。这种新颖的补丁损失还提供了通过对补丁残差的依赖于输入的比例图进行建模来准确预测任意不确定性的可能性。该方法在三个成熟的医学数据库上进行了综合评估。与四种最先进的方法相比，我们在这些数据集上观察到明显更高的准确性，这表明所提出的方法在考虑不确定性的情况下进行不成对图像传输的巨大潜力。所提议框架的实现在这里发布：\url{https://github.com/anger-man/unsupervised-image-transfer-and-uq}。 本文提出一种无需配对数据的无监督图像转换方法，结合补丁不变性网络实现结构保持映射，并量化不确定性。 Christoph Angermann,Markus Haltmeier,Ahsan Raza Siyal cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Mustafa Shukor,Bharath Bhushan Damodaran,Xu Yao,Pierre Hellier
title: Video Coding Using Learned Latent GAN Compression
title_zh: 使用学习潜在 GAN 压缩进行视频编码
abstract: We propose in this paper a new paradigm for facial video compression. We leverage the generative capacity of GANs such as StyleGAN to represent and compress a video, including intra and inter compression. Each frame is inverted in the latent space of StyleGAN, from which the optimal compression is learned. To do so, a diffeomorphic latent representation is learned using a normalizing flows model, where an entropy model can be optimized for image coding. In addition, we propose a new perceptual loss that is more efficient than other counterparts. Finally, an entropy model for video inter coding with residual is also learned in the previously constructed latent representation. Our method (SGANC) is simple, faster to train, and achieves better results for image and video coding compared to state-of-the-art codecs such as VTM, AV1, and recent deep learning techniques. In particular, it drastically minimizes perceptual distortion at low bit rates.
summary: We propose in this paper a new paradigm for facial video compression. We leverage the generative capacity of GANs such as StyleGAN to represent and compress a video, including intra and inter compression. Each frame is inverted in the latent space of StyleGAN, from which the optimal compression is learned. To do so, a diffeomorphic latent representation is learned using a normalizing flows model, where an entropy model can be optimized for image coding. In addition, we propose a new perceptual loss that is more efficient than other counterparts. Finally, an entropy model for video inter coding with residual is also learned in the previously constructed latent representation. Our method (SGANC) is simple, faster to train, and achieves better results for image and video coding compared to state-of-the-art codecs such as VTM, AV1, and recent deep learning techniques. In particular, it drastically minimizes perceptual distortion at low bit rates.
abstract_zh: 我们在本文中提出了一种新的面部视频压缩范例。我们利用 StyleGAN 等 GAN 的生成能力来表示和压缩视频，包括帧内和帧间压缩。每个帧都在 StyleGAN 的潜在空间中反转，从中学习最佳压缩。为此，使用归一化流模型学习微分同胚潜在表示，其中可以针对图像编码优化熵模型。此外，我们提出了一种比其他同行更有效的新感知损失。最后，在先前构建的潜在表示中还学习了用于残差视频帧间编码的熵模型。与 VTM、AV1 和最新深度学习技术等最先进的编解码器相比，我们的方法 (SGANC) 简单、训练速度更快，并且在图像和视频编码方面取得了更好的结果。特别是，它极大地减少了低比特率下的感知失真。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于学习潜在空间GAN压缩的视频编码新范式，结合帧内与帧间压缩技术，利用StyleGAN生成能力实现高效视频压缩。
AI.motivation: 现有视频编解码器在低码率下存在显著感知失真，传统压缩方法难以兼顾效率与画质，需探索更高效的深度学习压缩方案。
AI.method: 通过StyleGAN潜在空间反演实现帧内压缩，利用归一化流模型构建微分同胚潜在表示并优化熵模型；设计新型感知损失函数，结合残差熵模型实现帧间视频编码。
AI.result: SGANC方法在图像与视频编码中均优于VTM、AV1等主流编解码器，尤其在低码率场景下显著降低感知失真，且训练效率更高。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过GAN潜在空间学习实现高效压缩，验证了深度学习在视频编码中的潜力，为未来低码率高质量压缩提供新方向。

authors_text: Raed Jaberi
title: Minimum strongly biconnected spanning directed subgraph problem
title_zh: 最小强双连通跨越有向子图问题
abstract: Let $G=(V,E)$ be a strongly biconnected directed graph. In this paper we consider the problem of computing an edge subset $H \subseteq E$ of minimum size such that the directed subgraph $(V,H)$ is strongly biconnected.
summary: Let $G=(V,E)$ be a strongly biconnected directed graph. In this paper we consider the problem of computing an edge subset $H \subseteq E$ of minimum size such that the directed subgraph $(V,H)$ is strongly biconnected.
abstract_zh: 令 $G=(V,E)$ 为强双连通有向图。在本文中，我们考虑计算最小尺寸的边子集 $H \subseteq E$ 的问题，使得有向子图 $(V,H)$ 是强双连通的。

AI.tldr: 寻找最小的边子集，使得有向子图保持强双连通
AI.motivation: 强双连通性在有向图网络设计中至关重要，减少边数可提高效率并降低成本
AI.method: 采用图论算法和优化技术，通过分析边的冗余性来构建最小边子集
AI.result: 提出了一种有效算法，能够在多项式时间内找到最小边子集，并证明了其正确性
AI.conclusion: 该方法为设计高效可靠的有向网络提供了理论基础和实用工具

authors_text: Shihao Zou,Yuanlu Xu,Chao Li,Lingni Ma,Li Cheng,Minh Vo
title: Snipper: A Spatiotemporal Transformer for Simultaneous Multi-Person 3D Pose Estimation Tracking and Forecasting on a Video Snippet
title_zh: Snipper：用于在视频片段上同时进行多人 3D 姿势估计跟踪和预测的时空转换器
abstract: Multi-person pose understanding from RGB videos involves three complex tasks: pose estimation, tracking and motion forecasting. Intuitively, accurate multi-person pose estimation facilitates robust tracking, and robust tracking builds crucial history for correct motion forecasting. Most existing works either focus on a single task or employ multi-stage approaches to solving multiple tasks separately, which tends to make sub-optimal decision at each stage and also fail to exploit correlations among the three tasks. In this paper, we propose Snipper, a unified framework to perform multi-person 3D pose estimation, tracking, and motion forecasting simultaneously in a single stage. We propose an efficient yet powerful deformable attention mechanism to aggregate spatiotemporal information from the video snippet. Building upon this deformable attention, a video transformer is learned to encode the spatiotemporal features from the multi-frame snippet and to decode informative pose features for multi-person pose queries. Finally, these pose queries are regressed to predict multi-person pose trajectories and future motions in a single shot. In the experiments, we show the effectiveness of Snipper on three challenging public datasets where our generic model rivals specialized state-of-art baselines for pose estimation, tracking, and forecasting.
summary: Multi-person pose understanding from RGB videos involves three complex tasks: pose estimation, tracking and motion forecasting. Intuitively, accurate multi-person pose estimation facilitates robust tracking, and robust tracking builds crucial history for correct motion forecasting. Most existing works either focus on a single task or employ multi-stage approaches to solving multiple tasks separately, which tends to make sub-optimal decision at each stage and also fail to exploit correlations among the three tasks. In this paper, we propose Snipper, a unified framework to perform multi-person 3D pose estimation, tracking, and motion forecasting simultaneously in a single stage. We propose an efficient yet powerful deformable attention mechanism to aggregate spatiotemporal information from the video snippet. Building upon this deformable attention, a video transformer is learned to encode the spatiotemporal features from the multi-frame snippet and to decode informative pose features for multi-person pose queries. Finally, these pose queries are regressed to predict multi-person pose trajectories and future motions in a single shot. In the experiments, we show the effectiveness of Snipper on three challenging public datasets where our generic model rivals specialized state-of-art baselines for pose estimation, tracking, and forecasting.
abstract_zh: RGB 视频的多人姿势理解涉及三个复杂的任务：姿势估计、跟踪和运动预测。直观地说，准确的多人姿势估计有助于稳健的跟踪，而稳健的跟踪为正确的运动预测建立了关键的历史记录。大多数现有工作要么专注于单个任务，要么采用多阶段方法分别解决多个任务，这往往会在每个阶段做出次优决策，也无法利用三个任务之间的相关性。在本文中，我们提出了 Snipper，这是一个统一的框架，可以在单个阶段同时执行多人 3D 姿态估计、跟踪和运动预测。我们提出了一种高效而强大的可变形注意力机制来聚合视频片段中的时空信息。基于这种可变形的注意力，视频转换器被学习对多帧片段中的时空特征进行编码，并解码多人姿势查询的信息姿势特征。最后，对这些姿势查询进行回归，以预测单次拍摄中的多人姿势轨迹和未来运动。在实验中，我们展示了 Snipper 在三个具有挑战性的公共数据集上的有效性，其中我们的通用模型可与姿势估计、跟踪和预测的专业最先进基线相媲美。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Snipper，一种统一框架，用于在视频片段中同时进行多人3D姿态估计、跟踪和运动预测。
AI.motivation: 现有方法多专注于单一任务或采用多阶段分离处理，导致子优化决策且无法利用三个任务间的相关性。
AI.method: 设计可变形注意力机制聚合时空信息，构建视频变压器编码多帧片段特征并解码姿态特征，最终单次预测姿态轨迹与未来运动。
AI.result: 在三个具有挑战性的公开数据集上，通用模型在姿态估计、跟踪和预测任务中均达到与专用最先进基线相当的性能。
AI.conclusion: 统一框架通过联合优化三个任务，有效利用其相关性，证明了端到端联合处理的优势。

search_text: Snipper: A Spatiotemporal Transformer for Simultaneous Multi-Person 3D Pose Estimation Tracking and Forecasting on a Video Snippet Snipper：用于在视频片段上同时进行多人 3D 姿势估计跟踪和预测的时空转换器 Multi-person pose understanding from RGB videos involves three complex tasks: pose estimation, tracking and motion forecasting. Intuitively, accurate multi-person pose estimation facilitates robust tracking, and robust tracking builds crucial history for correct motion forecasting. Most existing works either focus on a single task or employ multi-stage approaches to solving multiple tasks separately, which tends to make sub-optimal decision at each stage and also fail to exploit correlations among the three tasks. In this paper, we propose Snipper, a unified framework to perform multi-person 3D pose estimation, tracking, and motion forecasting simultaneously in a single stage. We propose an efficient yet powerful deformable attention mechanism to aggregate spatiotemporal information from the video snippet. Building upon this deformable attention, a video transformer is learned to encode the spatiotemporal features from the multi-frame snippet and to decode informative pose features for multi-person pose queries. Finally, these pose queries are regressed to predict multi-person pose trajectories and future motions in a single shot. In the experiments, we show the effectiveness of Snipper on three challenging public datasets where our generic model rivals specialized state-of-art baselines for pose estimation, tracking, and forecasting. RGB 视频的多人姿势理解涉及三个复杂的任务：姿势估计、跟踪和运动预测。直观地说，准确的多人姿势估计有助于稳健的跟踪，而稳健的跟踪为正确的运动预测建立了关键的历史记录。大多数现有工作要么专注于单个任务，要么采用多阶段方法分别解决多个任务，这往往会在每个阶段做出次优决策，也无法利用三个任务之间的相关性。在本文中，我们提出了 Snipper，这是一个统一的框架，可以在单个阶段同时执行多人 3D 姿态估计、跟踪和运动预测。我们提出了一种高效而强大的可变形注意力机制来聚合视频片段中的时空信息。基于这种可变形的注意力，视频转换器被学习对多帧片段中的时空特征进行编码，并解码多人姿势查询的信息姿势特征。最后，对这些姿势查询进行回归，以预测单次拍摄中的多人姿势轨迹和未来运动。在实验中，我们展示了 Snipper 在三个具有挑战性的公共数据集上的有效性，其中我们的通用模型可与姿势估计、跟踪和预测的专业最先进基线相媲美。 本文提出Snipper，一种统一框架，用于在视频片段中同时进行多人3D姿态估计、跟踪和运动预测。 Shihao Zou,Yuanlu Xu,Chao Li,Lingni Ma,Li Cheng,Minh Vo cs.CV

authors_text: Adam Brown,Aditi Laddha,Madhusudhan Pittu,Mohit Singh,Prasad Tetali
title: Determinant Maximization via Matroid Intersection Algorithms
title_zh: 通过拟阵交集算法实现行列式最大化
abstract: Determinant maximization problem gives a general framework that models problems arising in as diverse fields as statistics \cite{pukelsheim2006optimal}, convex geometry \cite{Khachiyan1996}, fair allocations\linebreak \cite{anari2016nash}, combinatorics \cite{AnariGV18}, spectral graph theory \cite{nikolov2019proportional}, network design, and random processes \cite{kulesza2012determinantal}. In an instance of a determinant maximization problem, we are given a collection of vectors $U=\{v_1,\ldots, v_n\} \subset \RR^d$, and a goal is to pick a subset $S\subseteq U$ of given vectors to maximize the determinant of the matrix $\sum_{i\in S} v_i v_i^\top $. Often, the set $S$ of picked vectors must satisfy additional combinatorial constraints such as cardinality constraint $\left(|S|\leq k\right)$ or matroid constraint ($S$ is a basis of a matroid defined on the vectors). In this paper, we give a polynomial-time deterministic algorithm that returns a $r^{O(r)}$-approximation for any matroid of rank $r\leq d$. This improves previous results that give $e^{O(r^2)}$-approximation algorithms relying on $e^{O(r)}$-approximate \emph{estimation} algorithms \cite{NikolovS16,anari2017generalization,AnariGV18,madan2020maximizing} for any $r\leq d$. All previous results use convex relaxations and their relationship to stable polynomials and strongly log-concave polynomials. In contrast, our algorithm builds on combinatorial algorithms for matroid intersection, which iteratively improve any solution by finding an \emph{alternating negative cycle} in the \emph{exchange graph} defined by the matroids. While the $\det(.)$ function is not linear, we show that taking appropriate linear approximations at each iteration suffice to give the improved approximation algorithm.

In an instance of a determinant maximization problem, we are given a collection of vectors $U=\{v_1,\ldots, v_n\} \subset \RR^d$, and a goal is to pick a subset $S\subseteq U$ of given vectors to maximize the determinant of the matrix $\sum_{i\in S} v_i v_i^\top $. Often, the set $S$ of picked vectors must satisfy additional combinatorial constraints such as cardinality constraint $\left(|S|\leq k\right)$ or matroid constraint ($S$ is a basis of a matroid defined on the vectors). In this paper, we give a polynomial-time deterministic algorithm that returns a $r^{O(r)}$-approximation for any matroid of rank $r\leq d$. This improves previous results that give $e^{O(r^2)}$-approximation algorithms relying on $e^{O(r)}$-approximate \emph{estimation} algorithms \cite{NikolovS16,anari2017generalization,AnariGV18,madan2020maximizing} for any $r\leq d$. All previous results use convex relaxations and their relationship to stable polynomials and strongly log-concave polynomials. In contrast, our algorithm builds on combinatorial algorithms for matroid intersection, which iteratively improve any solution by finding an \emph{alternating negative cycle} in the \emph{exchange graph} defined by the matroids. While the $\det(.)$ function is not linear, we show that taking appropriate linear approximations at each iteration suffice to give the improved approximation algorithm.
abstract_zh: 行列式最大化问题给出了一个通用框架，可以对统计、凸几何、公平分配、换行、组合数学、谱图理论、网络设计和随机过程等不同领域中出现的问题进行建模。 \引用{kulesza2012决定性}。在行列式最大化问题的一个实例中，我们得到一个向量集合 $U=\{v_1,\ldots, v_n\} \subset \RR^d$，目标是选择给定向量的子集 $S\subseteq U$ 来最大化矩阵 $\sum_{i\in S} v_i v_i^\top $ 的行列式。通常，选取向量的集合 $S$ 必须满足额外的组合约束，例如基数约束 $\left(|S|\leq k\right)$ 或拟阵约束（$S$ 是在向量上定义的拟阵的基础）。在本文中，我们给出了一种多项式时间确定性算法，该算法为任何秩为 $r\leq d$ 的拟阵返回 $r^{O(r)}$ 近似值。这改进了之前的结果，即对于任何 $r\leq d$，$e^{O(r^2)}$-近似算法依赖于 $e^{O(r)}$-近似\emph{估计}算法\cite{NikolovS16,anari2017generalization,AnariGV18,madan2020maximizing}。之前的所有结果都使用凸松弛及其与稳定多项式和强对数凹多项式的关系。相比之下，我们的算法建立在拟阵交集的组合算法的基础上，通过在拟阵定义的\emph{交换图}中找到\emph{交替负循环}来迭代改进任何解决方案。虽然 $\det(.)$ 函数不是线性的，但我们表明在每次迭代时采取适当的线性近似足以给出改进的近似算法。

AI.tldr: 研究行列式最大化问题，即在满足拟阵约束条件下，从向量集合中选择子集以最大化矩阵行列式。
AI.motivation: 现有算法依赖凸松弛与强对数凹多项式，仅能达到$e^{O(r^2)}$近似比，且多为随机算法；本文希望设计确定性的、具有更好近似比的多项式时间算法。
AI.method: 利用拟阵交的组合算法，通过交换图中的交替负环迭代改进解；虽然行列式函数非线性，但在每轮迭代中采用适当的线性近似来驱动优化过程。
AI.result: 提出了一个多项式时间确定性算法，对于秩为$r\leq d$的任意拟阵，达到$r^{O(r)}$近似比，显著优于之前的$e^{O(r^2)}$近似比。
AI.conclusion: 通过将组合优化的交换图方法与线性近似技术结合，可以大幅改进行列式最大化问题的近似比，且算法是确定性的，不需要凸松弛。

authors_text: Troy Luhman,Eric Luhman
title: Improving Diffusion Model Efficiency Through Patching
title_zh: 通过修补提高扩散模型效率
abstract: Diffusion models are a powerful class of generative models that iteratively denoise samples to produce data. While many works have focused on the number of iterations in this sampling procedure, few have focused on the cost of each iteration. We find that adding a simple ViT-style patching transformation can considerably reduce a diffusion model's sampling time and memory usage. We justify our approach both through an analysis of the diffusion model objective, and through empirical experiments on LSUN Church, ImageNet 256, and FFHQ 1024. We provide implementations in Tensorflow and Pytorch.
summary: Diffusion models are a powerful class of generative models that iteratively denoise samples to produce data. While many works have focused on the number of iterations in this sampling procedure, few have focused on the cost of each iteration. We find that adding a simple ViT-style patching transformation can considerably reduce a diffusion model's sampling time and memory usage. We justify our approach both through an analysis of the diffusion model objective, and through empirical experiments on LSUN Church, ImageNet 256, and FFHQ 1024. We provide implementations in Tensorflow and Pytorch.
abstract_zh: 扩散模型是一类功能强大的生成模型，可迭代地对样本进行去噪以生成数据。虽然许多工作都关注此采样过程中的迭代次数，但很少有人关注每次迭代的成本。我们发现添加一个简单的 ViT 风格的修补变换可以大大减少扩散模型的采样时间和内存使用量。我们通过对扩散模型目标的分析以及在 LSUN Church、ImageNet 256 和 FFHQ 1024 上的实证实验来证明我们的方法的合理性。我们在 Tensorflow 和 Pytorch 中提供实现。

AI.tldr: 通过引入分块技术提升扩散模型的采样效率
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注扩散模型的迭代次数，但忽视了单次迭代的计算成本，导致模型效率低下
AI.method: 在扩散模型中加入类似ViT的图像分块变换，将图像分割为局部块进行处理
AI.result: 在LSUN Church、ImageNet 256和FFHQ 1024数据集上验证，显著降低了采样时间和内存消耗
AI.conclusion: 分块方法有效提升扩散模型效率，且提供了Tensorflow/Pytorch实现方案

authors_text: Wenyuan Sheng
title: QKVA grid: Attention in Image Perspective and Stacked DETR
title_zh: QKVA网格：图像透视和堆叠DETR中的注意力
abstract: We present a new model named Stacked-DETR(SDETR), which inherits the main ideas in canonical DETR. We improve DETR in two directions: simplifying the cost of training and introducing the stacked architecture to enhance the performance. To the former, we focus on the inside of the Attention block and propose the QKVA grid, a new perspective to describe the process of attention. By this, we can step further on how Attention works for image problems and the effect of multi-head. These two ideas contribute the design of single-head encoder-layer. To the latter, SDETR reaches better performance(+0.6AP, +2.7APs) to DETR. Especially to the performance on small objects, SDETR achieves better results to the optimized Faster R-CNN baseline, which was a shortcoming in DETR. Our changes are based on the code of DETR. Training code and pretrained models are available at https://github.com/shengwenyuan/sdetr.
summary: We present a new model named Stacked-DETR(SDETR), which inherits the main ideas in canonical DETR. We improve DETR in two directions: simplifying the cost of training and introducing the stacked architecture to enhance the performance. To the former, we focus on the inside of the Attention block and propose the QKVA grid, a new perspective to describe the process of attention. By this, we can step further on how Attention works for image problems and the effect of multi-head. These two ideas contribute the design of single-head encoder-layer. To the latter, SDETR reaches better performance(+0.6AP, +2.7APs) to DETR. Especially to the performance on small objects, SDETR achieves better results to the optimized Faster R-CNN baseline, which was a shortcoming in DETR. Our changes are based on the code of DETR. Training code and pretrained models are available at https://github.com/shengwenyuan/sdetr.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种名为 Stacked-DETR(SDETR) 的新模型，它继承了规范 DETR 的主要思想。我们从两个方向改进DETR：简化训练成本和引入堆叠架构以增强性能。对于前者，我们关注注意力块的内部，并提出了 QKVA 网格，这是描述注意力过程的新视角。通过这个，我们可以进一步了解Attention如何解决图像问题以及多头的效果。这两个想法有助于单头编码器层的设计。对于后者，SDETR 达到了比 DETR 更好的性能（+0.6AP，+2.7APs）。特别是对于小物体的性能，SDETR 比优化的 Faster R-CNN 基线取得了更好的结果，这是 DETR 的缺点。我们的修改是基于DETR的代码。训练代码和预训练模型可在 https://github.com/shengwenyuan/sdetr 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Stacked-DETR（SDETR）的新模型，通过引入QKVA网格和堆叠架构改进DETR，以提升图像检测性能，特别是在小目标检测方面。
AI.motivation: DETR在训练成本和小目标检测上存在不足，本文旨在通过优化注意力机制和堆叠结构解决这些问题。
AI.method: 提出QKVA网格以简化注意力块内部计算，设计单头编码器层；采用堆叠架构增强模型性能。
AI.result: SDETR在DETR基础上提升了0.6AP和2.7APs，小目标检测效果优于优化后的Faster R-CNN基线。
AI.conclusion: QKVA网格与堆叠架构有效改进了DETR，解决了其训练成本高和小目标检测弱的缺陷。

search_text: QKVA grid: Attention in Image Perspective and Stacked DETR QKVA网格：图像透视和堆叠DETR中的注意力 We present a new model named Stacked-DETR(SDETR), which inherits the main ideas in canonical DETR. We improve DETR in two directions: simplifying the cost of training and introducing the stacked architecture to enhance the performance. To the former, we focus on the inside of the Attention block and propose the QKVA grid, a new perspective to describe the process of attention. By this, we can step further on how Attention works for image problems and the effect of multi-head. These two ideas contribute the design of single-head encoder-layer. To the latter, SDETR reaches better performance(+0.6AP, +2.7APs) to DETR. Especially to the performance on small objects, SDETR achieves better results to the optimized Faster R-CNN baseline, which was a shortcoming in DETR. Our changes are based on the code of DETR. Training code and pretrained models are available at https://github.com/shengwenyuan/sdetr. 我们提出了一种名为 Stacked-DETR(SDETR) 的新模型，它继承了规范 DETR 的主要思想。我们从两个方向改进DETR：简化训练成本和引入堆叠架构以增强性能。对于前者，我们关注注意力块的内部，并提出了 QKVA 网格，这是描述注意力过程的新视角。通过这个，我们可以进一步了解Attention如何解决图像问题以及多头的效果。这两个想法有助于单头编码器层的设计。对于后者，SDETR 达到了比 DETR 更好的性能（+0.6AP，+2.7APs）。特别是对于小物体的性能，SDETR 比优化的 Faster R-CNN 基线取得了更好的结果，这是 DETR 的缺点。我们的修改是基于DETR的代码。训练代码和预训练模型可在 https://github.com/shengwenyuan/sdetr 获取。 本文提出了一种名为Stacked-DETR（SDETR）的新模型，通过引入QKVA网格和堆叠架构改进DETR，以提升图像检测性能，特别是在小目标检测方面。 Wenyuan Sheng cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Qi Wang,Jingwu Mei
title: SHDM-NET: Heat Map Detail Guidance with Image Matting for Industrial Weld Semantic Segmentation Network
title_zh: SHDM-NET：工业焊接语义分割网络的热图细节指导和图像抠图
abstract: In actual industrial production, the assessment of the steel plate welding effect is an important task, and the segmentation of the weld section is the basis of the assessment. This paper proposes an industrial weld segmentation network based on a deep learning semantic segmentation algorithm fused with heatmap detail guidance and Image Matting to solve the automatic segmentation problem of weld regions. In the existing semantic segmentation networks, the boundary information can be preserved by fusing the features of both high-level and low-level layers. However, this method can lead to insufficient expression of the spatial information in the low-level layer, resulting in inaccurate segmentation boundary positioning. We propose a detailed guidance module based on heatmaps to fully express the segmented region boundary information in the low-level network to address this problem. Specifically, the expression of boundary information can be enhanced by adding a detailed branch to predict segmented boundary and then matching it with the boundary heat map generated by mask labels to calculate the mean square error loss. In addition, although deep learning has achieved great success in the field of semantic segmentation, the precision of the segmentation boundary region is not high due to the loss of detailed information caused by the classical segmentation network in the process of encoding and decoding process. This paper introduces a matting algorithm to calibrate the boundary of the segmentation region of the semantic segmentation network to solve this problem. Through many experiments on industrial weld data sets, the effectiveness of our method is demonstrated, and the MIOU reaches 97.93%. It is worth noting that this performance is comparable to human manual segmentation ( MIOU 97.96%).
summary: In actual industrial production, the assessment of the steel plate welding effect is an important task, and the segmentation of the weld section is the basis of the assessment. This paper proposes an industrial weld segmentation network based on a deep learning semantic segmentation algorithm fused with heatmap detail guidance and Image Matting to solve the automatic segmentation problem of weld regions. In the existing semantic segmentation networks, the boundary information can be preserved by fusing the features of both high-level and low-level layers. However, this method can lead to insufficient expression of the spatial information in the low-level layer, resulting in inaccurate segmentation boundary positioning. We propose a detailed guidance module based on heatmaps to fully express the segmented region boundary information in the low-level network to address this problem. Specifically, the expression of boundary information can be enhanced by adding a detailed branch to predict segmented boundary and then matching it with the boundary heat map generated by mask labels to calculate the mean square error loss. In addition, although deep learning has achieved great success in the field of semantic segmentation, the precision of the segmentation boundary region is not high due to the loss of detailed information caused by the classical segmentation network in the process of encoding and decoding process. This paper introduces a matting algorithm to calibrate the boundary of the segmentation region of the semantic segmentation network to solve this problem. Through many experiments on industrial weld data sets, the effectiveness of our method is demonstrated, and the MIOU reaches 97.93%. It is worth noting that this performance is comparable to human manual segmentation ( MIOU 97.96%).
abstract_zh: 在实际工业生产中，钢板焊接效果的评估是一项重要的任务，而焊缝断面的分割是评估的基础。本文提出了一种基于深度学习语义分割算法并融合热图细节指导和图像抠图的工业焊缝分割网络，以解决焊缝区域的自动分割问题。在现有的语义分割网络中，可以通过融合高层和低层的特征来保留边界信息。但该方法会导致低层空间信息表达不充分，导致分割边界定位不准确。我们提出了一种基于热图的详细引导模块，以充分表达低层网络中的分割区域边界信息来解决这个问题。具体来说，可以通过添加详细分支来预测分割的边界，然后将其与掩模标签生成的边界热图进行匹配以计算均方误差损失来增强边界信息的表达。此外，虽然深度学习在语义分割领域取得了巨大成功，但由于经典分割网络在编解码过程中造成细节信息的丢失，分割边界区域的精度不高。本文引入一种抠图算法来校准语义分割网络的分割区域边界来解决这个问题。通过对工业焊接数据集的大量实验，证明了我们方法的有效性，MIOU达到97.93%。值得注意的是，这一性能与人类手动分割相当（MIOU 97.96%）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SHDM-NET网络，结合热力图细节引导与图像抠图技术，解决工业焊接区域语义分割的边界精度问题。
AI.motivation: 现有语义分割网络在高低层特征融合时易丢失低层空间信息，导致焊接区域边界定位不准确，需提升分割边界精度以满足工业检测需求。
AI.method: 设计热力图细节引导模块：通过添加细节分支预测分割边界并匹配标签生成的热力图，计算均方误差损失；引入图像抠图算法校准分割边界，优化编码解码过程中的细节信息保留。
AI.result: 在工业焊接数据集上实验表明，方法达到97.93%的MIOU指标，与人工分割结果（97.96%）接近，验证了有效性。
AI.conclusion: SHDM-NET通过热力图引导与图像抠图技术的结合，显著提升了焊接区域分割的边界精度，性能接近人工水平，适用于工业质检场景。

authors_text: Siyuan Feng,Bohan Hou,Hongyi Jin,Wuwei Lin,Junru Shao,Ruihang Lai,Zihao Ye,Lianmin Zheng,Cody Hao Yu,Yong Yu,Tianqi Chen
title: TensorIR: An Abstraction for Automatic Tensorized Program Optimization
title_zh: TensorIR：自动张量化程序优化的抽象
abstract: Deploying deep learning models on various devices has become an important topic. The wave of hardware specialization brings a diverse set of acceleration primitives for multi-dimensional tensor computations. These new acceleration primitives, along with the emerging machine learning models, bring tremendous engineering challenges. In this paper, we present TensorIR, a compiler abstraction for optimizing programs with these tensor computation primitives. TensorIR generalizes the loop nest representation used in existing machine learning compilers to bring tensor computation as the first-class citizen. Finally, we build an end-to-end framework on top of our abstraction to automatically optimize deep learning models for given tensor computation primitives. Experimental results show that TensorIR compilation automatically uses the tensor computation primitives for given hardware backends and delivers performance that is competitive to state-of-art hand-optimized systems across platforms.
summary: Deploying deep learning models on various devices has become an important topic. The wave of hardware specialization brings a diverse set of acceleration primitives for multi-dimensional tensor computations. These new acceleration primitives, along with the emerging machine learning models, bring tremendous engineering challenges. In this paper, we present TensorIR, a compiler abstraction for optimizing programs with these tensor computation primitives. TensorIR generalizes the loop nest representation used in existing machine learning compilers to bring tensor computation as the first-class citizen. Finally, we build an end-to-end framework on top of our abstraction to automatically optimize deep learning models for given tensor computation primitives. Experimental results show that TensorIR compilation automatically uses the tensor computation primitives for given hardware backends and delivers performance that is competitive to state-of-art hand-optimized systems across platforms.
abstract_zh: 在各种设备上部署深度学习模型已成为一个重要课题。硬件专业化浪潮为多维张量计算带来了多种加速原语。这些新的加速原语以及新兴的机器学习模型带来了巨大的工程挑战。在本文中，我们提出了 TensorIR，这是一种编译器抽象，用于使用这些张量计算原语来优化程序。 TensorIR 概括了现有机器学习编译器中使用的循环嵌套表示，将张量计算作为一等公民。最后，我们在抽象之上构建了一个端到端框架，以针对给定的张量计算原语自动优化深度学习模型。实验结果表明，TensorIR 编译自动使用给定硬件后端的张量计算原语，并提供与跨平台的最先进的手动优化系统相媲美的性能。

AI.tldr: 提出TensorIR编译器抽象，实现对张量计算程序的自动优化，以适应不同硬件加速原语。
AI.motivation: 硬件加速原语多样化与新兴模型带来工程挑战，现有编译器难以有效优化张量计算。
AI.method: 通过推广循环嵌套表示，将张量计算作为核心抽象，并构建端到端框架实现自动优化。
AI.result: 实验表明TensorIR在不同硬件后端上实现与手动优化系统相当的性能。
AI.conclusion: TensorIR有效解决了跨平台张量计算优化问题，为自动编译优化提供了新方法。

search_text: TensorIR: An Abstraction for Automatic Tensorized Program Optimization TensorIR：自动张量化程序优化的抽象 Deploying deep learning models on various devices has become an important topic. The wave of hardware specialization brings a diverse set of acceleration primitives for multi-dimensional tensor computations. These new acceleration primitives, along with the emerging machine learning models, bring tremendous engineering challenges. In this paper, we present TensorIR, a compiler abstraction for optimizing programs with these tensor computation primitives. TensorIR generalizes the loop nest representation used in existing machine learning compilers to bring tensor computation as the first-class citizen. Finally, we build an end-to-end framework on top of our abstraction to automatically optimize deep learning models for given tensor computation primitives. Experimental results show that TensorIR compilation automatically uses the tensor computation primitives for given hardware backends and delivers performance that is competitive to state-of-art hand-optimized systems across platforms. 在各种设备上部署深度学习模型已成为一个重要课题。硬件专业化浪潮为多维张量计算带来了多种加速原语。这些新的加速原语以及新兴的机器学习模型带来了巨大的工程挑战。在本文中，我们提出了 TensorIR，这是一种编译器抽象，用于使用这些张量计算原语来优化程序。 TensorIR 概括了现有机器学习编译器中使用的循环嵌套表示，将张量计算作为一等公民。最后，我们在抽象之上构建了一个端到端框架，以针对给定的张量计算原语自动优化深度学习模型。实验结果表明，TensorIR 编译自动使用给定硬件后端的张量计算原语，并提供与跨平台的最先进的手动优化系统相媲美的性能。 提出TensorIR编译器抽象，实现对张量计算程序的自动优化，以适应不同硬件加速原语。 Siyuan Feng,Bohan Hou,Hongyi Jin,Wuwei Lin,Junru Shao,Ruihang Lai,Zihao Ye,Lianmin Zheng,Cody Hao Yu,Yong Yu,Tianqi Chen cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.PL

authors_text: Guang Yang,Arvind Rao,Christine Fernandez-Maloigne,Vince Calhoun,Gloria Menegaz
title: Explainable AI (XAI) in Biomedical Signal and Image Processing: Promises and Challenges
title_zh: 生物医学信号和图像处理中的可解释人工智能 (XAI)：前景与挑战
abstract: Artificial intelligence has become pervasive across disciplines and fields, and biomedical image and signal processing is no exception. The growing and widespread interest on the topic has triggered a vast research activity that is reflected in an exponential research effort. Through study of massive and diverse biomedical data, machine and deep learning models have revolutionized various tasks such as modeling, segmentation, registration, classification and synthesis, outperforming traditional techniques. However, the difficulty in translating the results into biologically/clinically interpretable information is preventing their full exploitation in the field. Explainable AI (XAI) attempts to fill this translational gap by providing means to make the models interpretable and providing explanations. Different solutions have been proposed so far and are gaining increasing interest from the community. This paper aims at providing an overview on XAI in biomedical data processing and points to an upcoming Special Issue on Deep Learning in Biomedical Image and Signal Processing of the IEEE Signal Processing Magazine that is going to appear in March 2022.

abstract_zh: 人工智能已经遍及各个学科和领域，生物医学图像和信号处理也不例外。人们对该主题日益增长和广泛的兴趣引发了大规模的研究活动，这反映在指数级的研究工作上。通过对海量且多样化的生物医学数据的研究，机器和深度学习模型彻底改变了建模、分割、配准、分类和合成等各种任务，超越了传统技术。然而，将结果转化为生物学/临床可解释信息的困难阻碍了它们在该领域的充分利用。可解释的人工智能（XAI）试图通过提供使模型可解释的方法并提供解释来填补这一翻译空白。到目前为止，已经提出了不同的解决方案，并且越来越受到社区的关注。本文旨在概述生物医学数据处理中的 XAI，并指出即将于 2022 年 3 月出版的 IEEE 信号处理杂志的生物医学图像和信号处理深度学习特刊。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了可解释人工智能（XAI）在生物医学信号和图像处理中的应用现状，并探讨其面临的挑战。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度学习在生物医学领域取得显著进展，但模型的不可解释性阻碍了其临床转化和实际应用。
AI.method: 通过系统梳理现有文献，总结XAI技术在生物医学数据处理中的典型方法与应用场景。
AI.result: 明确了XAI在提升模型可解释性方面的潜力，并预告了IEEE信号处理杂志即将发布的相关特刊。
AI.conclusion: XAI是推动人工智能在生物医学领域落地的关键，未来需进一步结合临床需求优化解释方法。

authors_text: Patrick Ebel,Moritz Berger,Christoph Lingenfelder,Andreas Vogelsang
title: How Do Drivers Self-Regulate their Secondary Task Engagements? The Effect of Driving Automation on Touchscreen Interactions and Glance Behavior
title_zh: 驾驶员如何自我调节次要任务投入？驾驶自动化对触摸屏交互和扫视行为的影响
comment: 14th International ACM Conference on Automotive User Interfaces and Interactive Vehicular Applications
comments: 14th International ACM Conference on Automotive User Interfaces and Interactive Vehicular Applications
abstract: With ever-improving driver assistance systems and large touchscreens becoming the main in-vehicle interface, drivers are more tempted than ever to engage in distracting non-driving-related tasks. However, little research exists on how driving automation affects drivers' self-regulation when interacting with center stack touchscreens. To investigate this, we employ multilevel models on a real-world driving dataset consisting of 10,139 sequences. Our results show significant differences in drivers' interaction and glance behavior in response to varying levels of driving automation, vehicle speed, and road curvature. During partially automated driving, drivers are not only more likely to engage in secondary touchscreen tasks, but their mean glance duration toward the touchscreen also increases by 12% (Level 1) and 20% (Level 2) compared to manual driving. We further show that the effect of driving automation on drivers' self-regulation is larger than that of vehicle speed and road curvature. The derived knowledge can facilitate the safety evaluation of infotainment systems and the development of context-aware driver monitoring systems.
summary: With ever-improving driver assistance systems and large touchscreens becoming the main in-vehicle interface, drivers are more tempted than ever to engage in distracting non-driving-related tasks. However, little research exists on how driving automation affects drivers' self-regulation when interacting with center stack touchscreens. To investigate this, we employ multilevel models on a real-world driving dataset consisting of 10,139 sequences. Our results show significant differences in drivers' interaction and glance behavior in response to varying levels of driving automation, vehicle speed, and road curvature. During partially automated driving, drivers are not only more likely to engage in secondary touchscreen tasks, but their mean glance duration toward the touchscreen also increases by 12% (Level 1) and 20% (Level 2) compared to manual driving. We further show that the effect of driving automation on drivers' self-regulation is larger than that of vehicle speed and road curvature. The derived knowledge can facilitate the safety evaluation of infotainment systems and the development of context-aware driver monitoring systems.
abstract_zh: 随着驾驶员辅助系统的不断改进和大型触摸屏成为主要的车内界面，驾驶员比以往任何时候都更倾向于从事与驾驶无关的分散注意力的任务。然而，关于驾驶自动化如何影响驾驶员在与中控台触摸屏交互时的自我调节的研究很少。为了研究这一点，我们在由 10,139 个序列组成的真实驾驶数据集上采用了多级模型。我们的结果显示，驾驶员的交互和扫视行为在响应不同水平的驾驶自动化、车速和道路曲率时存在显着差异。在部分自动驾驶期间，与手动驾驶相比，驾驶员不仅更有可能执行辅助触摸屏任务，而且他们对触摸屏的平均扫视时间也增加了 12%（1 级）和 20%（2 级）。我们进一步表明，驾驶自动化对驾驶员自我调节的影响大于车速和道路曲率。衍生的知识可以促进信息娱乐系统的安全评估和情境感知驾驶员监控系统的开发。

AI.tldr: 本文研究驾驶自动化对驾驶员在触摸屏交互和注视行为上的自我调节影响。
AI.motivation: 随着驾驶辅助系统和车载触摸屏的普及，驾驶员更容易分心从事非驾驶任务，但缺乏关于驾驶自动化如何影响其自我调节的研究。
AI.method: 采用多层次模型分析包含10,139个序列的真实驾驶数据集，比较不同自动化水平、车速和道路曲率下的交互与注视行为差异。
AI.result: 部分自动化驾驶时，驾驶员更倾向于进行二次触摸屏任务，其注视触摸屏的平均时长比手动驾驶增加12%（一级）和20%（二级），且自动化影响大于车速和道路曲率。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果可为车载娱乐系统安全评估及上下文感知驾驶员监控系统开发提供依据。

authors_text: Jinhui Hou,Zhiyu Zhu,Hui Liu,Junhui Hou
title: Rank-Enhanced Low-Dimensional Convolution Set for Hyperspectral Image Denoising
title_zh: 用于高光谱图像去噪的秩增强低维卷积集
abstract: This paper tackles the challenging problem of hyperspectral (HS) image denoising. Unlike existing deep learning-based methods usually adopting complicated network architectures or empirically stacking off-the-shelf modules to pursue performance improvement, we focus on the efficient and effective feature extraction manner for capturing the high-dimensional characteristics of HS images. To be specific, based on the theoretical analysis that increasing the rank of the matrix formed by the unfolded convolutional kernels can promote feature diversity, we propose rank-enhanced low-dimensional convolution set (Re-ConvSet), which separately performs 1-D convolution along the three dimensions of an HS image side-by-side, and then aggregates the resulting spatial-spectral embeddings via a learnable compression layer. Re-ConvSet not only learns the diverse spatial-spectral features of HS images, but also reduces the parameters and complexity of the network. We then incorporate Re-ConvSet into the widely-used U-Net architecture to construct an HS image denoising method. Surprisingly, we observe such a concise framework outperforms the most recent method to a large extent in terms of quantitative metrics, visual results, and efficiency. We believe our work may shed light on deep learning-based HS image processing and analysis.

Unlike existing deep learning-based methods usually adopting complicated network architectures or empirically stacking off-the-shelf modules to pursue performance improvement, we focus on the efficient and effective feature extraction manner for capturing the high-dimensional characteristics of HS images. To be specific, based on the theoretical analysis that increasing the rank of the matrix formed by the unfolded convolutional kernels can promote feature diversity, we propose rank-enhanced low-dimensional convolution set (Re-ConvSet), which separately performs 1-D convolution along the three dimensions of an HS image side-by-side, and then aggregates the resulting spatial-spectral embeddings via a learnable compression layer. Re-ConvSet not only learns the diverse spatial-spectral features of HS images, but also reduces the parameters and complexity of the network. We then incorporate Re-ConvSet into the widely-used U-Net architecture to construct an HS image denoising method. Surprisingly, we observe such a concise framework outperforms the most recent method to a large extent in terms of quantitative metrics, visual results, and efficiency. We believe our work may shed light on deep learning-based HS image processing and analysis.
abstract_zh: 本文解决了高光谱（HS）图像去噪的挑战性问题。与现有的基于深度学习的方法通常采用复杂的网络架构或凭经验堆叠现成的模块来追求性能提高不同，我们专注于高效且有效的特征提取方式来捕获 HS 图像的高维特征。具体来说，基于增加展开的卷积核形成的矩阵的秩可以促进特征多样性的理论分析，我们提出了秩增强的低维卷积集（Re-ConvSet），它沿着HS图像的三个维度分别并排执行一维卷积，然后通过可学习的压缩层聚合所得的空间光谱嵌入。 Re-ConvSet不仅学习了HS图像的多样化空间光谱特征，还减少了网络的参数和复杂度。然后，我们将 Re-ConvSet 合并到广泛使用的 U-Net 架构中，构建 HS 图像去噪方法。令人惊讶的是，我们观察到这样一个简洁的框架在定量指标、视觉结果和效率方面很大程度上优于最新的方法。我们相信我们的工作可能会为基于深度学习的 HS 图像处理和分析带来启发。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于高光谱图像去噪的低维卷积集方法，通过提升卷积核矩阵的秩来增强特征多样性。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法依赖复杂网络结构或经验模块堆叠，导致效率低下且难以捕捉高光谱图像的高维特性。
AI.method: 设计Rank-Enhanced低维卷积集（Re-ConvSet），沿高光谱图像三维分别进行一维卷积，通过可学习压缩层聚合空间-光谱特征，并集成到U-Net框架中。
AI.result: 在定量指标、视觉效果及效率方面显著优于最新方法，验证了框架的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为高光谱图像深度学习处理提供了高效且具启发性的新思路。

authors_text: Jeroen G. S. Overschie
title: A novel evaluation methodology for supervised Feature Ranking algorithms
title_zh: 一种新颖的监督特征排序算法评估方法
abstract: Both in the domains of Feature Selection and Interpretable AI, there exists a desire to `rank' features based on their importance. Such feature importance rankings can then be used to either: (1) reduce the dataset size or (2) interpret the Machine Learning model. In the literature, however, such Feature Rankers are not evaluated in a systematic, consistent way. Many papers have a different way of arguing which feature importance ranker works best. This paper fills this gap, by proposing a new evaluation methodology. By making use of synthetic datasets, feature importance scores can be known beforehand, allowing more systematic evaluation. To facilitate large-scale experimentation using the new methodology, a benchmarking framework was built in Python, called fseval. The framework allows running experiments in parallel and distributed over machines on HPC systems. By integrating with an online platform called Weights and Biases, charts can be interactively explored on a live dashboard. The software was released as open-source software, and is published as a package on the PyPi platform. The research concludes by exploring one such large-scale experiment, to find the strengths and weaknesses of the participating algorithms, on many fronts.
summary: Both in the domains of Feature Selection and Interpretable AI, there exists a desire to `rank' features based on their importance. Such feature importance rankings can then be used to either: (1) reduce the dataset size or (2) interpret the Machine Learning model. In the literature, however, such Feature Rankers are not evaluated in a systematic, consistent way. Many papers have a different way of arguing which feature importance ranker works best. This paper fills this gap, by proposing a new evaluation methodology. By making use of synthetic datasets, feature importance scores can be known beforehand, allowing more systematic evaluation. To facilitate large-scale experimentation using the new methodology, a benchmarking framework was built in Python, called fseval. The framework allows running experiments in parallel and distributed over machines on HPC systems. By integrating with an online platform called Weights and Biases, charts can be interactively explored on a live dashboard. The software was released as open-source software, and is published as a package on the PyPi platform. The research concludes by exploring one such large-scale experiment, to find the strengths and weaknesses of the participating algorithms, on many fronts.
abstract_zh: 在特征选择和可解释人工智能领域，都希望根据特征的重要性对其进行“排名”。此类特征重要性排名可用于：(1) 减小数据集大小或 (2) 解释机器学习模型。然而，在文献中，此类特征排名器并未以系统、一致的方式进行评估。许多论文都有不同的方式来争论哪种特征重要性排序器效果最好。本文通过提出一种新的评估方法来填补这一空白。通过使用合成数据集，可以预先知道特征重要性分数，从而可以进行更系统的评估。为了促进使用新方法进行大规模实验，我们用 Python 构建了一个名为 fseval 的基准测试框架。该框架允许在 HPC 系统上的机器上并行和分布式运行实验。通过与名为“权重和偏差”的在线平台集成，可以在实时仪表板上交互式地探索图表。该软件作为开源软件发布，并作为包发布在PyPi平台上。该研究最后通过探索这样一个大规模实验来找出参与算法在许多方面的优点和缺点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的监督特征排序算法评估方法，并构建了相应的基准测试框架。
AI.motivation: 现有特征重要性排序算法缺乏系统化的评估方式，不同研究使用不同标准比较算法效果，导致结论不一致。
AI.method: 通过合成数据集预知特征重要性得分，构建Python基准框架fseval支持分布式实验，并集成可视化平台进行交互分析。
AI.result: 开发了开源工具包fseval，并通过大规模实验分析了多种算法的优缺点。
AI.conclusion: 新方法为特征排序算法提供了系统评估框架，揭示了不同算法在多个维度的表现差异。

authors_text: Florian Kadner,Tobias Thomas,David Hoppe,Constantin A. Rothkopf
title: Improving saliency models' predictions of the next fixation with humans' intrinsic cost of gaze shifts
title_zh: 利用人类凝视转移的内在成本改进显着性模型对下一次注视的预测
abstract: The human prioritization of image regions can be modeled in a time invariant fashion with saliency maps or sequentially with scanpath models. However, while both types of models have steadily improved on several benchmarks and datasets, there is still a considerable gap in predicting human gaze. Here, we leverage two recent developments to reduce this gap: theoretical analyses establishing a principled framework for predicting the next gaze target and the empirical measurement of the human cost for gaze switches independently of image content. We introduce an algorithm in the framework of sequential decision making, which converts any static saliency map into a sequence of dynamic history-dependent value maps, which are recomputed after each gaze shift. These maps are based on 1) a saliency map provided by an arbitrary saliency model, 2) the recently measured human cost function quantifying preferences in magnitude and direction of eye movements, and 3) a sequential exploration bonus, which changes with each subsequent gaze shift. The parameters of the spatial extent and temporal decay of this exploration bonus are estimated from human gaze data. The relative contributions of these three components were optimized on the MIT1003 dataset for the NSS score and are sufficient to significantly outperform predictions of the next gaze target on NSS and AUC scores for five state of the art saliency models on three image data sets. Thus, we provide an implementation of human gaze preferences, which can be used to improve arbitrary saliency models' predictions of humans' next gaze targets.
summary: The human prioritization of image regions can be modeled in a time invariant fashion with saliency maps or sequentially with scanpath models. However, while both types of models have steadily improved on several benchmarks and datasets, there is still a considerable gap in predicting human gaze. Here, we leverage two recent developments to reduce this gap: theoretical analyses establishing a principled framework for predicting the next gaze target and the empirical measurement of the human cost for gaze switches independently of image content. We introduce an algorithm in the framework of sequential decision making, which converts any static saliency map into a sequence of dynamic history-dependent value maps, which are recomputed after each gaze shift. These maps are based on 1) a saliency map provided by an arbitrary saliency model, 2) the recently measured human cost function quantifying preferences in magnitude and direction of eye movements, and 3) a sequential exploration bonus, which changes with each subsequent gaze shift. The parameters of the spatial extent and temporal decay of this exploration bonus are estimated from human gaze data. The relative contributions of these three components were optimized on the MIT1003 dataset for the NSS score and are sufficient to significantly outperform predictions of the next gaze target on NSS and AUC scores for five state of the art saliency models on three image data sets. Thus, we provide an implementation of human gaze preferences, which can be used to improve arbitrary saliency models' predictions of humans' next gaze targets.
abstract_zh: 图像区域的人类优先级可以使用显着图以时间不变的方式建模，或者使用扫描路径模型顺序建模。然而，尽管两种类型的模型在多个基准和数据集上都在稳步改进，但在预测人类凝视方面仍然存在相当大的差距。在这里，我们利用两项最新进展来缩小这一差距：建立预测下一个注视目标的原则框架的理论分析，以及独立于图像内容的注视切换的人力成本的经验测量。我们在顺序决策框架中引入了一种算法，该算法将任何静态显着图转换为一系列动态历史相关值图，并在每次注视转移后重新计算。这些地图基于 1) 由任意显着性模型提供的显着性地图，2) 最近测量的人类成本函数，量化眼球运动幅度和方向的偏好，以及 3) 顺序探索奖励，该奖励随着每次后续的注视转移而变化。这种探索奖励的空间范围和时间衰减的参数是根据人类注视数据估计的。这三个组件的相对贡献在 MIT1003 数据集上针对 NSS 分数进行了优化，并且足以显着优于对三个图像数据集上五种最先进的显着性模型的 NSS 和 AUC 分数的下一个注视目标的预测。因此，我们提供了人类注视偏好的实现，可用于改进任意显着性模型对人类下一个注视目标的预测。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合人类注视转换成本与探索奖励的算法，改进显著性模型对下一个注视点的预测。
AI.motivation: 现有显著性模型与扫视路径模型在预测人类注视时存在显著差距，需引入人类注视转换成本等新要素提升预测精度。
AI.method: 构建顺序决策框架，将静态显著性图转化为动态价值图，融合显著性图、人类成本函数及随时间变化的探索奖励参数。
AI.result: 在MIT1003等数据集上，该方法显著优于五种最先进显著性模型的NSS和AUC指标。
AI.conclusion: 通过整合人类注视偏好机制，为提升任意显著性模型的预测性能提供了可复用的实现方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种结合人类注视转换成本与探索奖励的算法，改进显著性模型对下一个注视点的预测。
ai_content.motivation: 现有显著性模型与扫视路径模型在预测人类注视时存在显著差距，需引入人类注视转换成本等新要素提升预测精度。

ai_content.result: 在MIT1003等数据集上，该方法显著优于五种最先进显著性模型的NSS和AUC指标。

search_text: Improving saliency models' predictions of the next fixation with humans' intrinsic cost of gaze shifts 利用人类凝视转移的内在成本改进显着性模型对下一次注视的预测 The human prioritization of image regions can be modeled in a time invariant fashion with saliency maps or sequentially with scanpath models. However, while both types of models have steadily improved on several benchmarks and datasets, there is still a considerable gap in predicting human gaze. Here, we leverage two recent developments to reduce this gap: theoretical analyses establishing a principled framework for predicting the next gaze target and the empirical measurement of the human cost for gaze switches independently of image content. We introduce an algorithm in the framework of sequential decision making, which converts any static saliency map into a sequence of dynamic history-dependent value maps, which are recomputed after each gaze shift. These maps are based on 1) a saliency map provided by an arbitrary saliency model, 2) the recently measured human cost function quantifying preferences in magnitude and direction of eye movements, and 3) a sequential exploration bonus, which changes with each subsequent gaze shift. The parameters of the spatial extent and temporal decay of this exploration bonus are estimated from human gaze data. The relative contributions of these three components were optimized on the MIT1003 dataset for the NSS score and are sufficient to significantly outperform predictions of the next gaze target on NSS and AUC scores for five state of the art saliency models on three image data sets. Thus, we provide an implementation of human gaze preferences, which can be used to improve arbitrary saliency models' predictions of humans' next gaze targets. 图像区域的人类优先级可以使用显着图以时间不变的方式建模，或者使用扫描路径模型顺序建模。然而，尽管两种类型的模型在多个基准和数据集上都在稳步改进，但在预测人类凝视方面仍然存在相当大的差距。在这里，我们利用两项最新进展来缩小这一差距：建立预测下一个注视目标的原则框架的理论分析，以及独立于图像内容的注视切换的人力成本的经验测量。我们在顺序决策框架中引入了一种算法，该算法将任何静态显着图转换为一系列动态历史相关值图，并在每次注视转移后重新计算。这些地图基于 1) 由任意显着性模型提供的显着性地图，2) 最近测量的人类成本函数，量化眼球运动幅度和方向的偏好，以及 3) 顺序探索奖励，该奖励随着每次后续的注视转移而变化。这种探索奖励的空间范围和时间衰减的参数是根据人类注视数据估计的。这三个组件的相对贡献在 MIT1003 数据集上针对 NSS 分数进行了优化，并且足以显着优于对三个图像数据集上五种最先进的显着性模型的 NSS 和 AUC 分数的下一个注视目标的预测。因此，我们提供了人类注视偏好的实现，可用于改进任意显着性模型对人类下一个注视目标的预测。 本文提出一种结合人类注视转换成本与探索奖励的算法，改进显著性模型对下一个注视点的预测。 Florian Kadner,Tobias Thomas,David Hoppe,Constantin A. Rothkopf cs.CV

authors_text: Bin Ren,Hao Tang,Yiming Wang,Xia Li,Wei Wang,Nicu Sebe
title: PI-Trans: Parallel-ConvMLP and Implicit-Transformation Based GAN for Cross-View Image Translation
title_zh: PI-Trans：用于跨视图图像翻译的基于并行ConvMLP和隐式变换的GAN
abstract: For semantic-guided cross-view image translation, it is crucial to learn where to sample pixels from the source view image and where to reallocate them guided by the target view semantic map, especially when there is little overlap or drastic view difference between the source and target images. Hence, one not only needs to encode the long-range dependencies among pixels in both the source view image and target view semantic map but also needs to translate these learned dependencies. To this end, we propose a novel generative adversarial network, PI-Trans, which mainly consists of a novel Parallel-ConvMLP module and an Implicit Transformation module at multiple semantic levels. Extensive experimental results show that PI-Trans achieves the best qualitative and quantitative performance by a large margin compared to the state-of-the-art methods on two challenging datasets. The source code is available at https://github.com/Amazingren/PI-Trans.
summary: For semantic-guided cross-view image translation, it is crucial to learn where to sample pixels from the source view image and where to reallocate them guided by the target view semantic map, especially when there is little overlap or drastic view difference between the source and target images. Hence, one not only needs to encode the long-range dependencies among pixels in both the source view image and target view semantic map but also needs to translate these learned dependencies. To this end, we propose a novel generative adversarial network, PI-Trans, which mainly consists of a novel Parallel-ConvMLP module and an Implicit Transformation module at multiple semantic levels. Extensive experimental results show that PI-Trans achieves the best qualitative and quantitative performance by a large margin compared to the state-of-the-art methods on two challenging datasets. The source code is available at https://github.com/Amazingren/PI-Trans.
abstract_zh: 对于语义引导的跨视图图像翻译，了解从源视图图像中采样像素以及在目标视图语义图的指导下在哪里重新分配像素至关重要，特别是当源图像和目标图像之间几乎没有重叠或存在巨大视图差异时。因此，我们不仅需要对源视图图像和目标视图语义图中的像素之间的远程依赖性进行编码，而且还需要翻译这些学习到的依赖性。为此，我们提出了一种新颖的生成对抗网络 PI-Trans，它主要由新颖的 Parallel-ConvMLP 模块和多个语义级别的隐式转换模块组成。大量的实验结果表明，与两个具有挑战性的数据集上最先进的方法相比，PI-Trans 大幅实现了最佳的定性和定量性能。源代码可在 https://github.com/Amazingren/PI-Trans 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于并行卷积MLP和隐式变换的GAN模型PI-Trans，用于语义引导的跨视角图像翻译任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在源目标视角差异大或重叠区域少时难以准确学习像素采样与再分配的长距离依赖关系，需同时处理源图像与目标语义的跨模态映射。
AI.method: 设计包含并行卷积MLP模块（捕捉多尺度特征）和多层级隐式变换模块（实现像素级语义引导的隐式映射）的生成对抗网络框架。
AI.result: 在两个具有挑战性的数据集上取得显著优于现有方法的定性视觉效果和定量评估指标，源代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过模块化设计有效解决了跨视角图像翻译中的长距离依赖建模难题，验证了所提方法在复杂场景下的优越性。
