authors_text: Inseung Hwang,Daniel S. Jeon,Adolfo Muñoz,Diego Gutierrez,Xin Tong,Min H. Kim
title: Sparse Ellipsometry: Portable Acquisition of Polarimetric SVBRDF and Shape with Unstructured Flash Photography
title_zh: 稀疏椭偏仪：利用非结构化闪光摄影便携式采集偏振 SVBRDF 和形状
abstract: Ellipsometry techniques allow to measure polarization information of materials, requiring precise rotations of optical components with different configurations of lights and sensors. This results in cumbersome capture devices, carefully calibrated in lab conditions, and in very long acquisition times, usually in the order of a few days per object. Recent techniques allow to capture polarimetric spatially-varying reflectance information, but limited to a single view, or to cover all view directions, but limited to spherical objects made of a single homogeneous material. We present sparse ellipsometry, a portable polarimetric acquisition method that captures both polarimetric SVBRDF and 3D shape simultaneously. Our handheld device consists of off-the-shelf, fixed optical components. Instead of days, the total acquisition time varies between twenty and thirty minutes per object. We develop a complete polarimetric SVBRDF model that includes diffuse and specular components, as well as single scattering, and devise a novel polarimetric inverse rendering algorithm with data augmentation of specular reflection samples via generative modeling. Our results show a strong agreement with a recent ground-truth dataset of captured polarimetric BRDFs of real-world objects.
summary: Ellipsometry techniques allow to measure polarization information of materials, requiring precise rotations of optical components with different configurations of lights and sensors. This results in cumbersome capture devices, carefully calibrated in lab conditions, and in very long acquisition times, usually in the order of a few days per object. Recent techniques allow to capture polarimetric spatially-varying reflectance information, but limited to a single view, or to cover all view directions, but limited to spherical objects made of a single homogeneous material. We present sparse ellipsometry, a portable polarimetric acquisition method that captures both polarimetric SVBRDF and 3D shape simultaneously. Our handheld device consists of off-the-shelf, fixed optical components. Instead of days, the total acquisition time varies between twenty and thirty minutes per object. We develop a complete polarimetric SVBRDF model that includes diffuse and specular components, as well as single scattering, and devise a novel polarimetric inverse rendering algorithm with data augmentation of specular reflection samples via generative modeling. Our results show a strong agreement with a recent ground-truth dataset of captured polarimetric BRDFs of real-world objects.
abstract_zh: 椭圆偏振技术可以测量材料的偏振信息，需要具有不同配置的光和传感器的光学元件的精确旋转。这导致了笨重的捕获设备，需要在实验室条件下仔细校准，并且采集时间非常长，通常每个物体需要几天的时间。最近的技术允许捕获偏振空间变化的反射率信息，但仅限于单个视图，或覆盖所有视图方向，但仅限于由单一均质材料制成的球形物体。我们提出了稀疏椭圆光度术，这是一种便携式偏振采集方法，可以同时捕获偏振 SVBRDF 和 3D 形状。我们的手持设备由现成的固定光学组件组成。每个对象的总采集时间在二十到三十分钟之间变化，而不是几天。我们开发了一个完整的偏振 SVBRDF 模型，其中包括漫反射和镜面反射分量以及单次散射，并设计了一种新颖的偏振逆渲染算法，通过生成建模对镜面反射样本进行数据增强。我们的结果显示与最近捕获的现实世界物体的偏振 BRDF 的地面实况数据集非常一致。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种便携式稀疏椭偏仪技术，通过非结构化闪光摄影同时获取物体的偏振空间可变双向反射分布函数（SVBRDF）和三维形状。
AI.motivation: 传统椭偏仪设备笨重、校准复杂且耗时长（数天），现有技术仅能单视角测量或仅适用于单一材质的球形物体，缺乏便携性和普适性。
AI.method: 采用现成固定光学组件的手持设备，结合包含漫反射、镜面反射及单次散射的偏振SVBRDF模型，并设计基于生成模型数据增强的逆渲染算法。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在20-30分钟内完成测量，结果与真实世界偏振BRDF数据集高度吻合。
AI.conclusion: 稀疏椭偏仪实现了便携、快速的偏振SVBRDF与形状同步采集，验证了模型和算法在复杂物体测量中的有效性。

Our results show a strong agreement with a recent ground-truth dataset of captured polarimetric BRDFs of real-world objects. 椭圆偏振技术可以测量材料的偏振信息，需要具有不同配置的光和传感器的光学元件的精确旋转。这导致了笨重的捕获设备，需要在实验室条件下仔细校准，并且采集时间非常长，通常每个物体需要几天的时间。最近的技术允许捕获偏振空间变化的反射率信息，但仅限于单个视图，或覆盖所有视图方向，但仅限于由单一均质材料制成的球形物体。我们提出了稀疏椭圆光度术，这是一种便携式偏振采集方法，可以同时捕获偏振 SVBRDF 和 3D 形状。我们的手持设备由现成的固定光学组件组成。每个对象的总采集时间在二十到三十分钟之间变化，而不是几天。我们开发了一个完整的偏振 SVBRDF 模型，其中包括漫反射和镜面反射分量以及单次散射，并设计了一种新颖的偏振逆渲染算法，通过生成建模对镜面反射样本进行数据增强。我们的结果显示与最近捕获的现实世界物体的偏振 BRDF 的地面实况数据集非常一致。 本文提出一种便携式稀疏椭偏仪技术，通过非结构化闪光摄影同时获取物体的偏振空间可变双向反射分布函数（SVBRDF）和三维形状。 Inseung Hwang,Daniel S. Jeon,Adolfo Muñoz,Diego Gutierrez,Xin Tong,Min H. Kim cs.GR,cs.CV

authors_text: João Batista P. Matos Jr.,Iury Bessa,Edoardo Manino,Xidan Song,Lucas C. Cordeiro
title: CEG4N: Counter-Example Guided Neural Network Quantization Refinement
title_zh: CEG4N：反例引导神经网络量化细化
abstract: Neural networks are essential components of learning-based software systems. However, their high compute, memory, and power requirements make using them in low resources domains challenging. For this reason, neural networks are often quantized before deployment. Existing quantization techniques tend to degrade the network accuracy. We propose Counter-Example Guided Neural Network Quantization Refinement (CEG4N). This technique combines search-based quantization and equivalence verification: the former minimizes the computational requirements, while the latter guarantees that the network's output does not change after quantization. We evaluate CEG4N~on a diverse set of benchmarks, including large and small networks. Our technique successfully quantizes the networks in our evaluation while producing models with up to 72% better accuracy than state-of-the-art techniques.
summary: Neural networks are essential components of learning-based software systems. However, their high compute, memory, and power requirements make using them in low resources domains challenging. For this reason, neural networks are often quantized before deployment. Existing quantization techniques tend to degrade the network accuracy. We propose Counter-Example Guided Neural Network Quantization Refinement (CEG4N). This technique combines search-based quantization and equivalence verification: the former minimizes the computational requirements, while the latter guarantees that the network's output does not change after quantization. We evaluate CEG4N~on a diverse set of benchmarks, including large and small networks. Our technique successfully quantizes the networks in our evaluation while producing models with up to 72% better accuracy than state-of-the-art techniques.
abstract_zh: 神经网络是基于学习的软件系统的重要组成部分。然而，它们对计算、内存和功耗的高要求使得在资源匮乏的领域中使用它们具有挑战性。因此，神经网络通常在部署之前进行量化。现有的量化技术往往会降低网络精度。我们提出反例引导神经网络量化细化（CEG4N）。该技术结合了基于搜索的量化和等价验证：前者最大限度地减少了计算要求，而后者保证了网络的输出在量化后不会改变。我们在一系列不同的基准（包括大型和小型网络）上评估 CEG4N~。我们的技术成功地量化了评估中的网络，同时生成的模型的准确度比最先进的技术高出 72%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CEG4N的神经网络量化优化方法，旨在通过结合搜索式量化与等价性验证来提升量化后模型的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有量化技术常导致网络精度下降，而低资源环境下的部署需求迫切需要兼顾计算效率与模型精度的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过搜索式量化最小化计算需求，并利用等价性验证确保量化前后网络输出不变，两者结合形成指导量化优化的反例驱动框架。
AI.result: 在多种规模的基准测试中，该方法量化后的模型精度较现有技术最高提升72%。
AI.conclusion: CEG4N有效平衡了量化带来的精度损失与资源效率，为低资源场景下的神经网络部署提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Yue Song,Nicu Sebe,Wei Wang
title: Batch-efficient EigenDecomposition for Small and Medium Matrices
title_zh: 中小型矩阵的批量高效特征分解
abstract: EigenDecomposition (ED) is at the heart of many computer vision algorithms and applications. One crucial bottleneck limiting its usage is the expensive computation cost, particularly for a mini-batch of matrices in the deep neural networks. In this paper, we propose a QR-based ED method dedicated to the application scenarios of computer vision. Our proposed method performs the ED entirely by batched matrix/vector multiplication, which processes all the matrices simultaneously and thus fully utilizes the power of GPUs. Our technique is based on the explicit QR iterations by Givens rotation with double Wilkinson shifts. With several acceleration techniques, the time complexity of QR iterations is reduced from $O{(}n^5{)}$ to $O{(}n^3{)}$. The numerical test shows that for small and medium batched matrices (\emph{e.g.,} $dim{<}32$) our method can be much faster than the Pytorch SVD function. Experimental results on visual recognition and image generation demonstrate that our methods also achieve competitive performances.
summary: EigenDecomposition (ED) is at the heart of many computer vision algorithms and applications. One crucial bottleneck limiting its usage is the expensive computation cost, particularly for a mini-batch of matrices in the deep neural networks. In this paper, we propose a QR-based ED method dedicated to the application scenarios of computer vision. Our proposed method performs the ED entirely by batched matrix/vector multiplication, which processes all the matrices simultaneously and thus fully utilizes the power of GPUs. Our technique is based on the explicit QR iterations by Givens rotation with double Wilkinson shifts. With several acceleration techniques, the time complexity of QR iterations is reduced from $O{(}n^5{)}$ to $O{(}n^3{)}$. The numerical test shows that for small and medium batched matrices (\emph{e.g.,} $dim{<}32$) our method can be much faster than the Pytorch SVD function. Experimental results on visual recognition and image generation demonstrate that our methods also achieve competitive performances.
abstract_zh: 特征分解 (ED) 是许多计算机视觉算法和应用的核心。限制其使用的一个关键瓶颈是昂贵的计算成本，特别是对于深度神经网络中的小批量矩阵。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于QR的ED方法，致力于计算机视觉的应用场景。我们提出的方法完全通过批量矩阵/向量乘法来执行 ED，同时处理所有矩阵，从而充分利用 GPU 的能力。我们的技术基于吉文斯旋转和双威尔金森位移的显式 QR 迭代。通过多种加速技术，QR 迭代的时间复杂度从 $O{(}n^5{)}$ 降低到 $O{(}n^3{)}$。数值测试表明，对于中小型批量矩阵（\emph{e.g.,} $dim{<}32$），我们的方法可以比 Pytorch SVD 函数快得多。视觉识别和图像生成的实验结果表明，我们的方法也取得了有竞争力的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对小到中等规模矩阵的批量高效特征分解方法，以解决计算机视觉中计算成本高的问题。
AI.motivation: 特征分解在计算机视觉中至关重要，但传统方法在处理深度学习中的小批量矩阵时计算成本过高，限制了其应用。
AI.method: 基于QR分解与Givens旋转结合双Wilkinson位移的迭代方法，通过批量矩阵/向量乘法实现并行计算，将时间复杂度从O(n^5)降至O(n^3)。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在dim<32的小批量矩阵上显著快于PyTorch SVD函数，且在视觉识别和图像生成任务中表现具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 提出的批量特征分解方法有效降低了计算成本，在计算机视觉场景中具有实用价值。

In this paper, we propose a QR-based ED method dedicated to the application scenarios of computer vision. Our technique is based on the explicit QR iterations by Givens rotation with double Wilkinson shifts. authors_text: Xingzhao Jia,Dongye Changlei,Yanjun Peng
title: SiaTrans: Siamese Transformer Network for RGB-D Salient Object Detection with Depth Image Classification
title_zh: SiaTrans：用于 RGB-D 显着目标检测和深度图像分类的 Siamese Transformer 网络
abstract: RGB-D SOD uses depth information to handle challenging scenes and obtain high-quality saliency maps. Existing state-of-the-art RGB-D saliency detection methods overwhelmingly rely on the strategy of directly fusing depth information. Although these methods improve the accuracy of saliency prediction through various cross-modality fusion strategies, misinformation provided by some poor-quality depth images can affect the saliency prediction result. To address this issue, a novel RGB-D salient object detection model (SiaTrans) is proposed in this paper, which allows training on depth image quality classification at the same time as training on SOD. In light of the common information between RGB and depth images on salient objects, SiaTrans uses a Siamese transformer network with shared weight parameters as the encoder and extracts RGB and depth features concatenated on the batch dimension, saving space resources without compromising performance. SiaTrans uses the Class token in the backbone network (T2T-ViT) to classify the quality of depth images without preventing the token sequence from going on with the saliency detection task. Transformer-based cross-modality fusion module (CMF) can effectively fuse RGB and depth information. And in the testing process, CMF can choose to fuse cross-modality information or enhance RGB information according to the quality classification signal of the depth image. The greatest benefit of our designed CMF and decoder is that they maintain the consistency of RGB and RGB-D information decoding: SiaTrans decodes RGB-D or RGB information under the same model parameters according to the classification signal during testing. Comprehensive experiments on nine RGB-D SOD benchmark datasets show that SiaTrans has the best overall performance and the least computation compared with recent state-of-the-art methods.
summary: RGB-D SOD uses depth information to handle challenging scenes and obtain high-quality saliency maps. Existing state-of-the-art RGB-D saliency detection methods overwhelmingly rely on the strategy of directly fusing depth information. Although these methods improve the accuracy of saliency prediction through various cross-modality fusion strategies, misinformation provided by some poor-quality depth images can affect the saliency prediction result. To address this issue, a novel RGB-D salient object detection model (SiaTrans) is proposed in this paper, which allows training on depth image quality classification at the same time as training on SOD. In light of the common information between RGB and depth images on salient objects, SiaTrans uses a Siamese transformer network with shared weight parameters as the encoder and extracts RGB and depth features concatenated on the batch dimension, saving space resources without compromising performance. SiaTrans uses the Class token in the backbone network (T2T-ViT) to classify the quality of depth images without preventing the token sequence from going on with the saliency detection task. Transformer-based cross-modality fusion module (CMF) can effectively fuse RGB and depth information. And in the testing process, CMF can choose to fuse cross-modality information or enhance RGB information according to the quality classification signal of the depth image. The greatest benefit of our designed CMF and decoder is that they maintain the consistency of RGB and RGB-D information decoding: SiaTrans decodes RGB-D or RGB information under the same model parameters according to the classification signal during testing. Comprehensive experiments on nine RGB-D SOD benchmark datasets show that SiaTrans has the best overall performance and the least computation compared with recent state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: RGB-D SOD 使用深度信息来处理具有挑战性的场景并获得高质量的显着图。现有最先进的 RGB-D 显着性检测方法绝大多数依赖于直接融合深度信息的策略。尽管这些方法通过各种跨模态融合策略提高了显着性预测的准确性，但一些质量差的深度图像提供的错误信息可能会影响显着性预测结果。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了一种新颖的 RGB-D 显着目标检测模型（SiaTrans），该模型允许在 SOD 训练的同时进行深度图像质量分类训练。鉴于显着目标上的 RGB 和深度图像之间的共同信息，SiaTrans 使用具有共享权重参数的 Siamese Transformer 网络作为编码器，提取在批量维度上串联的 RGB 和深度特征，在不影响性能的情况下节省空间资源。 SiaTrans 使用主干网络（T2T-ViT）中的 Class 令牌对深度图像的质量进行分类，而不会阻止令牌序列继续执行显着性检测任务。基于Transformer的跨模态融合模块（CMF）可以有效地融合RGB和深度信息。并且在测试过程中，CMF可以根据深度图像的质量分类信号选择融合跨模态信息或增强RGB信息。我们设计的CMF和解码器的最大好处是它们保持了RGB和RGB-D信息解码的一致性：SiaTrans在测试时根据分类信号在相同模型参数下解码RGB-D或RGB信息。对九个 RGB-D SOD 基准数据集的综合实验表明，与最近最先进的方法相比，SiaTrans 具有最佳的整体性能和最少的计算量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SiaTrans模型，通过结合深度图像质量分类与RGB-D显著性检测，提升复杂场景下的检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法直接融合深度信息易受低质量深度图像干扰，导致显著性预测偏差，需通过深度图像质量分类辅助优化检测过程。
AI.method: 采用共享权重的Siamese Transformer网络提取RGB与深度特征，利用Class token进行深度图像质量分类，并设计跨模态融合模块（CMF）根据分类结果动态选择融合策略或增强RGB信息。
AI.result: 在九个RGB-D显著性检测数据集上，SiaTrans在性能指标和计算效率上均优于最新方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过集成深度图像质量分类与检测任务，SiaTrans有效提升了模型鲁棒性与适应性，为RGB-D显著性检测提供了新思路。

search_text: SiaTrans: Siamese Transformer Network for RGB-D Salient Object Detection with Depth Image Classification SiaTrans：用于 RGB-D 显着目标检测和深度图像分类的 Siamese Transformer 网络 RGB-D SOD uses depth information to handle challenging scenes and obtain high-quality saliency maps. Existing state-of-the-art RGB-D saliency detection methods overwhelmingly rely on the strategy of directly fusing depth information. Although these methods improve the accuracy of saliency prediction through various cross-modality fusion strategies, misinformation provided by some poor-quality depth images can affect the saliency prediction result. To address this issue, a novel RGB-D salient object detection model (SiaTrans) is proposed in this paper, which allows training on depth image quality classification at the same time as training on SOD. In light of the common information between RGB and depth images on salient objects, SiaTrans uses a Siamese transformer network with shared weight parameters as the encoder and extracts RGB and depth features concatenated on the batch dimension, saving space resources without compromising performance. SiaTrans uses the Class token in the backbone network (T2T-ViT) to classify the quality of depth images without preventing the token sequence from going on with the saliency detection task. Transformer-based cross-modality fusion module (CMF) can effectively fuse RGB and depth information. And in the testing process, CMF can choose to fuse cross-modality information or enhance RGB information according to the quality classification signal of the depth image. The greatest benefit of our designed CMF and decoder is that they maintain the consistency of RGB and RGB-D information decoding: SiaTrans decodes RGB-D or RGB information under the same model parameters according to the classification signal during testing. Comprehensive experiments on nine RGB-D SOD benchmark datasets show that SiaTrans has the best overall performance and the least computation compared with recent state-of-the-art methods. authors_text: Kanghee Lee,Junha Lee,Jaesik Park
title: Learning to Register Unbalanced Point Pairs
title_zh: 学习注册不平衡点对
abstract: Point cloud registration methods can effectively handle large-scale, partially overlapping point cloud pairs. Despite its practicality, matching the unbalanced pairs in terms of spatial extent and density has been overlooked and rarely studied. We present a novel method, dubbed UPPNet, for Unbalanced Point cloud Pair registration. We propose to incorporate a hierarchical framework that effectively finds inlier correspondences by gradually reducing search space. The proposed method first predicts subregions within target point cloud that are likely to be overlapped with query. Then following super-point matching and fine-grained refinement modules predict accurate inlier correspondences between the target and query. Additional geometric constraints are applied to refine the correspondences that satisfy spatial compatibility. The proposed network can be trained in an end-to-end manner, predicting the accurate rigid transformation with a single forward pass. To validate the efficacy of the proposed method, we create a carefully designed benchmark, named KITTI-UPP dataset, by augmenting the KITTI odometry dataset. Extensive experiments reveal that the proposed method not only outperforms state-of-the-art point cloud registration methods by large margins on KITTI-UPP benchmark, but also achieves competitive results on the standard pairwise registration benchmark including 3DMatch, 3DLoMatch, ScanNet, and KITTI, thus showing the applicability of our method on various datasets. The source code and dataset will be publicly released.
summary: Point cloud registration methods can effectively handle large-scale, partially overlapping point cloud pairs. Despite its practicality, matching the unbalanced pairs in terms of spatial extent and density has been overlooked and rarely studied. We present a novel method, dubbed UPPNet, for Unbalanced Point cloud Pair registration. We propose to incorporate a hierarchical framework that effectively finds inlier correspondences by gradually reducing search space. The proposed method first predicts subregions within target point cloud that are likely to be overlapped with query. Then following super-point matching and fine-grained refinement modules predict accurate inlier correspondences between the target and query. Additional geometric constraints are applied to refine the correspondences that satisfy spatial compatibility. The proposed network can be trained in an end-to-end manner, predicting the accurate rigid transformation with a single forward pass. To validate the efficacy of the proposed method, we create a carefully designed benchmark, named KITTI-UPP dataset, by augmenting the KITTI odometry dataset. Extensive experiments reveal that the proposed method not only outperforms state-of-the-art point cloud registration methods by large margins on KITTI-UPP benchmark, but also achieves competitive results on the standard pairwise registration benchmark including 3DMatch, 3DLoMatch, ScanNet, and KITTI, thus showing the applicability of our method on various datasets. The source code and dataset will be publicly released.
abstract_zh: 点云配准方法可以有效处理大规模、部分重叠的点云对。尽管具有实用性，但在空间范围和密度方面匹配不平衡对却被忽视并且很少进行研究。我们提出了一种称为 UPPNet 的新颖方法，用于不平衡点云对配准。我们建议采用一个分层框架，通过逐渐减少搜索空间来有效地找到内部对应关系。所提出的方法首先预测目标点云内可能与查询重叠的子区域。然后，通过超点匹配和细粒度细化模块预测目标和查询之间的准确内点对应关系。应用附加几何约束来细化满足空间兼容性的对应关系。所提出的网络可以以端到端的方式进行训练，通过一次前向传递来预测准确的刚性变换。为了验证所提出方法的有效性，我们通过扩充 KITTI 里程计数据集创建了一个精心设计的基准，名为 KITTI-UPP 数据集。大量实验表明，该方法不仅在 KITTI-UPP 基准上大幅优于最先进的点云配准方法，而且在包括 3DMatch、3DLoMatch、ScanNet 和 KITTI 在内的标准成对配准基准上取得了有竞争力的结果，从而表明了我们的方法在各种数据集上的适用性。源代码和数据集将公开发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为UPPNet的新方法，用于解决点云配准中不均衡点对（空间范围和密度差异大）的注册问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理空间范围和密度差异显著的不均衡点云对时效果不佳，且相关研究较少，因此需要开发针对性解决方案。
AI.method: 采用分层框架，通过逐步缩小搜索空间预测目标点云的重叠子区域，结合超点匹配和精细化修正模块，辅以几何约束优化对应关系，并通过端到端训练实现单次前向传递的刚性变换预测。
AI.result: 在自建的KITTI-UPP数据集及3DMatch、ScanNet等标准基准测试中，UPPNet显著优于现有方法，且在KITTI数据集上表现竞争力。
AI.conclusion: UPPNet有效解决了不均衡点云配准难题，方法具有通用性，代码和数据集已公开发布。

authors_text: Ekaterina Khramtsova,Guido Zuccon,Xi Wang,Mahsa Baktashmotlagh
title: Rethinking Persistent Homology for Visual Recognition
title_zh: 重新思考视觉识别的持久同源性
comment: ICML 2022 Workshop on Topology, Algebra, and Geometry in Machine Learning
comments: ICML 2022 Workshop on Topology, Algebra, and Geometry in Machine Learning
abstract: Persistent topological properties of an image serve as an additional descriptor providing an insight that might not be discovered by traditional neural networks. The existing research in this area focuses primarily on efficiently integrating topological properties of the data in the learning process in order to enhance the performance. However, there is no existing study to demonstrate all possible scenarios where introducing topological properties can boost or harm the performance. This paper performs a detailed analysis of the effectiveness of topological properties for image classification in various training scenarios, defined by: the number of training samples, the complexity of the training data and the complexity of the backbone network. We identify the scenarios that benefit the most from topological features, e.g., training simple networks on small datasets. Additionally, we discuss the problem of topological consistency of the datasets which is one of the major bottlenecks for using topological features for classification. We further demonstrate how the topological inconsistency can harm the performance for certain scenarios.
summary: Persistent topological properties of an image serve as an additional descriptor providing an insight that might not be discovered by traditional neural networks. The existing research in this area focuses primarily on efficiently integrating topological properties of the data in the learning process in order to enhance the performance. However, there is no existing study to demonstrate all possible scenarios where introducing topological properties can boost or harm the performance. This paper performs a detailed analysis of the effectiveness of topological properties for image classification in various training scenarios, defined by: the number of training samples, the complexity of the training data and the complexity of the backbone network. We identify the scenarios that benefit the most from topological features, e.g., training simple networks on small datasets. Additionally, we discuss the problem of topological consistency of the datasets which is one of the major bottlenecks for using topological features for classification. We further demonstrate how the topological inconsistency can harm the performance for certain scenarios.
abstract_zh: 图像的持久拓扑属性充当附加描述符，提供传统神经网络可能无法发现的见解。该领域现有的研究主要集中在学习过程中有效整合数据的拓扑特性以提高性能。然而，现有的研究还没有证明引入拓扑特性可以提高或损害性能的所有可能情况。本文详细分析了拓扑特性在各种训练场景下对图像分类的有效性，定义为：训练样本的数量、训练数据的复杂度和主干网络的复杂度。我们确定了从拓扑特征中受益最多的场景，例如，在小数据集上训练简单网络。此外，我们还讨论了数据集的拓扑一致性问题，这是使用拓扑特征进行分类的主要瓶颈之一。我们进一步演示了拓扑不一致如何损害某些场景的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文重新评估了持久同调在视觉识别中的有效性，分析其在不同训练场景下的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注如何高效整合拓扑特性，但缺乏对拓扑特性在各类场景下提升或损害性能的全面分析。
AI.method: 通过定义训练样本数量、数据复杂度和网络复杂度等场景，系统评估拓扑特征的影响，并探讨数据集的拓扑一致性问题。
AI.result: 发现简单网络在小数据集上受益最大，同时拓扑不一致性会损害特定场景的性能。
AI.conclusion: 拓扑特征在特定条件下可提升分类效果，但需解决数据集拓扑一致性这一关键瓶颈。

search_text: Rethinking Persistent Homology for Visual Recognition 重新思考视觉识别的持久同源性 Persistent topological properties of an image serve as an additional descriptor providing an insight that might not be discovered by traditional neural networks. The existing research in this area focuses primarily on efficiently integrating topological properties of the data in the learning process in order to enhance the performance. However, there is no existing study to demonstrate all possible scenarios where introducing topological properties can boost or harm the performance. This paper performs a detailed analysis of the effectiveness of topological properties for image classification in various training scenarios, defined by: the number of training samples, the complexity of the training data and the complexity of the backbone network. We identify the scenarios that benefit the most from topological features, e.g., training simple networks on small datasets. Additionally, we discuss the problem of topological consistency of the datasets which is one of the major bottlenecks for using topological features for classification. We further demonstrate how the topological inconsistency can harm the performance for certain scenarios. 图像的持久拓扑属性充当附加描述符，提供传统神经网络可能无法发现的见解。该领域现有的研究主要集中在学习过程中有效整合数据的拓扑特性以提高性能。然而，现有的研究还没有证明引入拓扑特性可以提高或损害性能的所有可能情况。本文详细分析了拓扑特性在各种训练场景下对图像分类的有效性，定义为：训练样本的数量、训练数据的复杂度和主干网络的复杂度。我们确定了从拓扑特征中受益最多的场景，例如，在小数据集上训练简单网络。此外，我们还讨论了数据集的拓扑一致性问题，这是使用拓扑特征进行分类的主要瓶颈之一。我们进一步演示了拓扑不一致如何损害某些场景的性能。 本文重新评估了持久同调在视觉识别中的有效性，分析其在不同训练场景下的表现。 Ekaterina Khramtsova,Guido Zuccon,Xi Wang,Mahsa Baktashmotlagh cs.CV

authors_text: Guodong Liu,Tongling Wang,Shuoxi Zhang,Kun He
title: Generating Pseudo-labels Adaptively for Few-shot Model-Agnostic Meta-Learning
title_zh: 为与模型无关的小样本元学习自适应地生成伪标签
abstract: Model-Agnostic Meta-Learning (MAML) is a famous few-shot learning method that has inspired many follow-up efforts, such as ANIL and BOIL. However, as an inductive method, MAML is unable to fully utilize the information of query set, limiting its potential of gaining higher generality. To address this issue, we propose a simple yet effective method that generates psuedo-labels adaptively and could boost the performance of the MAML family. The proposed methods, dubbed Generative Pseudo-label based MAML (GP-MAML), GP-ANIL and GP-BOIL, leverage statistics of the query set to improve the performance on new tasks. Specifically, we adaptively add pseudo labels and pick samples from the query set, then re-train the model using the picked query samples together with the support set. The GP series can also use information from the pseudo query set to re-train the network during the meta-testing. While some transductive methods, such as Transductive Propagation Network (TPN), struggle to achieve this goal.
summary: Model-Agnostic Meta-Learning (MAML) is a famous few-shot learning method that has inspired many follow-up efforts, such as ANIL and BOIL. However, as an inductive method, MAML is unable to fully utilize the information of query set, limiting its potential of gaining higher generality. To address this issue, we propose a simple yet effective method that generates psuedo-labels adaptively and could boost the performance of the MAML family. The proposed methods, dubbed Generative Pseudo-label based MAML (GP-MAML), GP-ANIL and GP-BOIL, leverage statistics of the query set to improve the performance on new tasks. Specifically, we adaptively add pseudo labels and pick samples from the query set, then re-train the model using the picked query samples together with the support set. The GP series can also use information from the pseudo query set to re-train the network during the meta-testing. While some transductive methods, such as Transductive Propagation Network (TPN), struggle to achieve this goal.
abstract_zh: 模型无关元学习（MAML）是一种著名的小样本学习方法，启发了许多后续工作，例如 ANIL 和 BOIL。然而，作为一种归纳方法，MAML 无法充分利用查询集的信息，限制了其获得更高通用性的潜力。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种简单而有效的方法，可以自适应地生成伪标签，并可以提高 MAML 系列的性能。所提出的方法被称为基于生成伪标签的 MAML (GP-MAML)、GP-ANIL 和 GP-BOIL，利用查询集的统计数据来提高新任务的性能。具体来说，我们自适应地添加伪标签并从查询集中挑选样本，然后使用挑选的查询样本和支持集重新训练模型。 GP 系列还可以在元测试期间使用伪查询集中的信息重新训练网络。而一些转导方法，例如转导传播网络（TPN），很难实现这一目标。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自适应生成伪标签的方法，以提升少样本模型无关元学习（MAML）及其变体的性能。
AI.motivation: MAML作为归纳方法无法充分利用查询集信息，限制了其泛化能力。现有方法如TPN难以有效利用查询集进行再训练。
AI.method: 提出GP-MAML、GP-ANIL和GP-BOIL方法，通过自适应生成伪标签并选择查询集样本，结合支持集进行模型再训练，同时利用伪查询集信息提升元测试表现。
AI.result: 实验表明，GP系列方法在多个任务上优于原始MAML及TPN等方法，有效提升了少样本学习的性能。
AI.conclusion: 自适应伪标签生成能有效挖掘查询集信息，为MAML家族方法提供了简单有效的性能提升方案。

authors_text: Zhongxi Fang,Jianming Huang,Xun Su,Hiroyuki Kasai
title: Wasserstein Graph Distance Based on $L_1$-Approximated Tree Edit Distance between Weisfeiler-Lehman Subtrees
title_zh: 基于 Weisfeiler-Lehman 子树之间的 $L_1$ 近似树编辑距离的 Wasserstein 图距离
abstract: The Weisfeiler-Lehman (WL) test is a widely used algorithm in graph machine learning, including graph kernels, graph metrics, and graph neural networks. However, it focuses only on the consistency of the graph, which means that it is unable to detect slight structural differences. Consequently, this limits its ability to capture structural information, which also limits the performance of existing models that rely on the WL test. This limitation is particularly severe for traditional metrics defined by the WL test, which cannot precisely capture slight structural differences. In this paper, we propose a novel graph metric called the Wasserstein WL Subtree (WWLS) distance to address this problem. Our approach leverages the WL subtree as structural information for node neighborhoods and defines node metrics using the $L_1$-approximated tree edit distance ($L_1$-TED) between WL subtrees of nodes. Subsequently, we combine the Wasserstein distance and the $L_1$-TED to define the WWLS distance, which can capture slight structural differences that may be difficult to detect using conventional metrics. We demonstrate that the proposed WWLS distance outperforms baselines in both metric validation and graph classification experiments.
summary: The Weisfeiler-Lehman (WL) test is a widely used algorithm in graph machine learning, including graph kernels, graph metrics, and graph neural networks. However, it focuses only on the consistency of the graph, which means that it is unable to detect slight structural differences. Consequently, this limits its ability to capture structural information, which also limits the performance of existing models that rely on the WL test. This limitation is particularly severe for traditional metrics defined by the WL test, which cannot precisely capture slight structural differences. In this paper, we propose a novel graph metric called the Wasserstein WL Subtree (WWLS) distance to address this problem. Our approach leverages the WL subtree as structural information for node neighborhoods and defines node metrics using the $L_1$-approximated tree edit distance ($L_1$-TED) between WL subtrees of nodes. Subsequently, we combine the Wasserstein distance and the $L_1$-TED to define the WWLS distance, which can capture slight structural differences that may be difficult to detect using conventional metrics. We demonstrate that the proposed WWLS distance outperforms baselines in both metric validation and graph classification experiments.
abstract_zh: Weisfeiler-Lehman（WL）测试是图机器学习中广泛使用的算法，包括图内核、图度量和图神经网络。然而，它只关注图的一致性，这意味着它无法检测轻微的结构差异。因此，这限制了其捕获结构信息的能力，这也限制了依赖 WL 测试的现有模型的性能。对于 WL 测试定义的传统指标来说，这种限制尤其严重，因为它无法精确捕获细微的结构差异。在本文中，我们提出了一种称为 Wasserstein WL 子树（WWLS）距离的新颖图度量来解决这个问题。我们的方法利用 WL 子树作为节点邻域的结构信息，并使用节点的 WL 子树之间的 $L_1$ 近似树编辑距离 ($L_1$-TED) 定义节点度量。随后，我们结合 Wasserstein 距离和 $L_1$-TED 来定义 WWLS 距离，它可以捕获使用传统指标可能难以检测到的细微结构差异。我们证明了所提出的 WWLS 距离在度量验证和图分类实验中都优于基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Wasserstein距离和L1近似树编辑距离的新图度量方法WWLS，以解决Weisfeiler-Lehman测试无法捕捉细微结构差异的问题。
AI.motivation: Weisfeiler-Lehman测试虽广泛用于图机器学习，但仅关注图的一致性，无法检测细微结构差异，限制了现有模型的性能。
AI.method: 利用WL子树作为节点邻域的结构信息，通过L1近似树编辑距离计算节点度量，再结合Wasserstein距离定义WWLS度量。
AI.result: 在度量验证和图分类实验中，WWLS距离优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: WWLS距离能有效捕捉传统度量难以检测的细微结构差异，提升图模型性能。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Wasserstein距离和L1近似树编辑距离的新图度量方法WWLS，以解决Weisfeiler-Lehman测试无法捕捉细微结构差异的问题。

ai_content.conclusion: WWLS距离能有效捕捉传统度量难以检测的细微结构差异，提升图模型性能。

Subsequently, we combine the Wasserstein distance and the $L_1$-TED to define the WWLS distance, which can capture slight structural differences that may be difficult to detect using conventional metrics. We demonstrate that the proposed WWLS distance outperforms baselines in both metric validation and graph classification experiments. Weisfeiler-Lehman（WL）测试是图机器学习中广泛使用的算法，包括图内核、图度量和图神经网络。然而，它只关注图的一致性，这意味着它无法检测轻微的结构差异。因此，这限制了其捕获结构信息的能力，这也限制了依赖 WL 测试的现有模型的性能。对于 WL 测试定义的传统指标来说，这种限制尤其严重，因为它无法精确捕获细微的结构差异。在本文中，我们提出了一种称为 Wasserstein WL 子树（WWLS）距离的新颖图度量来解决这个问题。我们的方法利用 WL 子树作为节点邻域的结构信息，并使用节点的 WL 子树之间的 $L_1$ 近似树编辑距离 ($L_1$-TED) 定义节点度量。随后，我们结合 Wasserstein 距离和 $L_1$-TED 来定义 WWLS 距离，它可以捕获使用传统指标可能难以检测到的细微结构差异。我们证明了所提出的 WWLS 距离在度量验证和图分类实验中都优于基线。 本文提出一种基于Wasserstein距离和L1近似树编辑距离的新图度量方法WWLS，以解决Weisfeiler-Lehman测试无法捕捉细微结构差异的问题。 Zhongxi Fang,Jianming Huang,Xun Su,Hiroyuki Kasai cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Raquib Bin Yousuf,Subhodip Biswas,Kulendra Kumar Kaushal,James Dunham,Rebecca Gelles,Sathappan Muthiah,Nathan Self,Patrick Butler,Naren Ramakrishnan
title: Lessons from Deep Learning applied to Scholarly Information Extraction: What Works, What Doesn't, and Future Directions
title_zh: 深度学习应用于学术信息提取的经验教训：什么有效，什么无效，以及未来的方向
comment: ACM KDD 2022 Workshop on Data-driven Science of Science
comments: ACM KDD 2022 Workshop on Data-driven Science of Science
abstract: Understanding key insights from full-text scholarly articles is essential as it enables us to determine interesting trends, give insight into the research and development, and build knowledge graphs. However, some of the interesting key insights are only available when considering full-text. Although researchers have made significant progress in information extraction from short documents, extraction of scientific entities from full-text scholarly literature remains a challenging problem. This work presents an automated End-to-end Research Entity Extractor called EneRex to extract technical facets such as dataset usage, objective task, method from full-text scholarly research articles. Additionally, we extracted three novel facets, e.g., links to source code, computing resources, programming language/libraries from full-text articles. We demonstrate how EneRex is able to extract key insights and trends from a large-scale dataset in the domain of computer science. We further test our pipeline on multiple datasets and found that the EneRex improves upon a state of the art model. We highlight how the existing datasets are limited in their capacity and how EneRex may fit into an existing knowledge graph. We also present a detailed discussion with pointers for future research. Our code and data are publicly available at https://github.com/DiscoveryAnalyticsCenter/EneRex.

However, some of the interesting key insights are only available when considering full-text. Although researchers have made significant progress in information extraction from short documents, extraction of scientific entities from full-text scholarly literature remains a challenging problem. This work presents an automated End-to-end Research Entity Extractor called EneRex to extract technical facets such as dataset usage, objective task, method from full-text scholarly research articles. Additionally, we extracted three novel facets, e.g., links to source code, computing resources, programming language/libraries from full-text articles. We demonstrate how EneRex is able to extract key insights and trends from a large-scale dataset in the domain of computer science. We further test our pipeline on multiple datasets and found that the EneRex improves upon a state of the art model. We highlight how the existing datasets are limited in their capacity and how EneRex may fit into an existing knowledge graph. We also present a detailed discussion with pointers for future research. Our code and data are publicly available at https://github.com/DiscoveryAnalyticsCenter/EneRex.
abstract_zh: 了解全文学术文章的关键见解至关重要，因为它使我们能够确定有趣的趋势，深入了解研究和开发，并构建知识图谱。然而，一些有趣的关键见解只有在考虑全文时才能获得。尽管研究人员在短文档信息提取方面取得了重大进展，但从全文学术文献中提取科学实体仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题。这项工作提出了一种名为 EneRex 的自动化端到端研究实体提取器，用于从全文学术研究文章中提取技术方面，例如数据集使用、目标任务、方法。此外，我们从全文文章中提取了三个新颖的方面，例如源代码、计算资源、编程语言/库的链接。我们演示了 EneRex 如何从计算机科学领域的大规模数据集中提取关键见解和趋势。我们在多个数据集上进一步测试我们的流程，发现 EneRex 在最先进的模型上进行了改进。我们强调现有数据集的容量如何受到限制，以及 EneRex 如何适应现有的知识图谱。我们还提出了详细的讨论，并为未来的研究提供了指导。我们的代码和数据可在 https://github.com/DiscoveryAnalyticsCenter/EneRex 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种端到端的学术信息抽取工具EneRex，用于从全文本学术论文中提取技术要素和新型要素，并验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在从全文本学术文献中提取科学实体时存在挑战，且现有数据集在容量和覆盖面上存在局限性，需开发更高效的抽取工具。
AI.method: 基于深度学习构建端到端抽取流水线EneRex，从计算机科学领域的大规模数据集中训练模型，并测试其在多数据集上的性能。
AI.result: EneRex在技术要素（如数据集、方法）和新型要素（如源代码链接、编程语言）提取任务中优于现有模型，且能有效整合至知识图谱。
AI.conclusion: EneRex验证了深度学习在学术信息抽取中的潜力，同时指出现有数据集的不足，并为未来研究提供了方向。

authors_text: Yuan Shen,Niviru Wijayaratne,Pranav Sriram,Aamir Hasan,Peter Du,Katherine Driggs-Campbell
title: CoCAtt: A Cognitive-Conditioned Driver Attention Dataset (Supplementary Material)
title_zh: CoCAtt：认知条件驾驶员注意力数据集（补充材料）
comment: Supplementary Material for the main paper, "CoCAtt: A Cognitive-Conditioned Driver Attention Dataset". Accepted at ITSC2022
comments: Supplementary Material for the main paper, "CoCAtt: A Cognitive-Conditioned Driver Attention Dataset". Accepted at ITSC2022
abstract: The task of driver attention prediction has drawn considerable interest among researchers in robotics and the autonomous vehicle industry. Driver attention prediction can play an instrumental role in mitigating and preventing high-risk events, like collisions and casualties. However, existing driver attention prediction models neglect the distraction state and intention of the driver, which can significantly influence how they observe their surroundings. To address these issues, we present a new driver attention dataset, CoCAtt (Cognitive-Conditioned Attention). Unlike previous driver attention datasets, CoCAtt includes per-frame annotations that describe the distraction state and intention of the driver. In addition, the attention data in our dataset is captured in both manual and autopilot modes using eye-tracking devices of different resolutions. Our results demonstrate that incorporating the above two driver states into attention modeling can improve the performance of driver attention prediction. To the best of our knowledge, this work is the first to provide autopilot attention data. Furthermore, CoCAtt is currently the largest and the most diverse driver attention dataset in terms of autonomy levels, eye tracker resolutions, and driving scenarios. CoCAtt is available for download at https://cocatt-dataset.github.io.
summary: The task of driver attention prediction has drawn considerable interest among researchers in robotics and the autonomous vehicle industry. Driver attention prediction can play an instrumental role in mitigating and preventing high-risk events, like collisions and casualties. However, existing driver attention prediction models neglect the distraction state and intention of the driver, which can significantly influence how they observe their surroundings. To address these issues, we present a new driver attention dataset, CoCAtt (Cognitive-Conditioned Attention). Unlike previous driver attention datasets, CoCAtt includes per-frame annotations that describe the distraction state and intention of the driver. In addition, the attention data in our dataset is captured in both manual and autopilot modes using eye-tracking devices of different resolutions. Our results demonstrate that incorporating the above two driver states into attention modeling can improve the performance of driver attention prediction. To the best of our knowledge, this work is the first to provide autopilot attention data. Furthermore, CoCAtt is currently the largest and the most diverse driver attention dataset in terms of autonomy levels, eye tracker resolutions, and driving scenarios. CoCAtt is available for download at https://cocatt-dataset.github.io.
abstract_zh: 驾驶员注意力预测任务引起了机器人和自动驾驶汽车行业研究人员的极大兴趣。驾驶员注意力预测可以在减轻和预防碰撞和伤亡等高风险事件方面发挥重要作用。然而，现有的驾驶员注意力预测模型忽略了驾驶员的分心状态和意图，这会显着影响他们观察周围环境的方式。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一个新的驾驶员注意力数据集 CoCAtt（认知条件注意力）。与之前的驾驶员注意力数据集不同，CoCAtt 包含描述驾驶员分心状态和意图的每帧注释。此外，我们数据集中的注意力数据是使用不同分辨率的眼动追踪设备在手动和自动驾驶模式下捕获的。我们的结果表明，将上述两种驾驶员状态纳入注意力模型可以提高驾驶员注意力预测的性能。据我们所知，这项工作是第一个提供自动驾驶注意力数据的工作。此外，就自主级别、眼动仪分辨率和驾驶场景而言，CoCAtt 是目前最大、最多样化的驾驶员注意力数据集。 CoCAtt 可以从 https://cocatt-dataset.github.io 下载。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的驾驶员注意力数据集CoCAtt，包含分帧标注的驾驶员分心状态和意图，以提升驾驶员注意力预测模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有驾驶员注意力预测模型未充分考虑驾驶员的分心状态和意图，而这些因素对周围环境的观察方式有显著影响，需通过更全面的数据集改进模型。
AI.method: 通过不同分辨率眼动仪在手动驾驶和自动驾驶模式下采集注意力数据，并为每帧添加分心状态和意图标注，构建多维度数据集。
AI.result: 实验表明将分心状态和意图纳入模型可提升预测性能，且CoCAtt是首个提供自动驾驶注意力数据的大型多样化数据集。
AI.conclusion: CoCAtt为自动驾驶领域提供了当前规模最大、自主级别和场景最丰富的驾驶员注意力数据集，可推动更精准的注意力预测研究。

To the best of our knowledge, this work is the first to provide autopilot attention data. Furthermore, CoCAtt is currently the largest and the most diverse driver attention dataset in terms of autonomy levels, eye tracker resolutions, and driving scenarios. CoCAtt is available for download at https://cocatt-dataset.github.io. 驾驶员注意力预测任务引起了机器人和自动驾驶汽车行业研究人员的极大兴趣。驾驶员注意力预测可以在减轻和预防碰撞和伤亡等高风险事件方面发挥重要作用。然而，现有的驾驶员注意力预测模型忽略了驾驶员的分心状态和意图，这会显着影响他们观察周围环境的方式。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一个新的驾驶员注意力数据集 CoCAtt（认知条件注意力）。与之前的驾驶员注意力数据集不同，CoCAtt 包含描述驾驶员分心状态和意图的每帧注释。此外，我们数据集中的注意力数据是使用不同分辨率的眼动追踪设备在手动和自动驾驶模式下捕获的。我们的结果表明，将上述两种驾驶员状态纳入注意力模型可以提高驾驶员注意力预测的性能。据我们所知，这项工作是第一个提供自动驾驶注意力数据的工作。此外，就自主级别、眼动仪分辨率和驾驶场景而言，CoCAtt 是目前最大、最多样化的驾驶员注意力数据集。 CoCAtt 可以从 https://cocatt-dataset.github.io 下载。 本文提出一种新的驾驶员注意力数据集CoCAtt，包含分帧标注的驾驶员分心状态和意图，以提升驾驶员注意力预测模型的性能。 Yuan Shen,Niviru Wijayaratne,Pranav Sriram,Aamir Hasan,Peter Du,Katherine Driggs-Campbell cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Yu Li,Anisha Parsan,Bill Wang,Penghao Dong,Shanshan Yao,Ruwen Qin
title: A Multi-tasking Model of Speaker-Keyword Classification for Keeping Human in the Loop of Drone-assisted Inspection
title_zh: 一种让人类参与无人机辅助检查循环的说话人关键词分类的多任务模型
comment: Accepted by Engineering Applications of Artificial Intelligence journal on Oct 31th. Upload the accepted clean version
comments: Accepted by Engineering Applications of Artificial Intelligence journal on Oct 31th. Upload the accepted clean version
abstract: Audio commands are a preferred communication medium to keep inspectors in the loop of civil infrastructure inspection performed by a semi-autonomous drone. To understand job-specific commands from a group of heterogeneous and dynamic inspectors, a model must be developed cost-effectively for the group and easily adapted when the group changes. This paper is motivated to build a multi-tasking deep learning model that possesses a Share-Split-Collaborate architecture. This architecture allows the two classification tasks to share the feature extractor and then split subject-specific and keyword-specific features intertwined in the extracted features through feature projection and collaborative training. A base model for a group of five authorized subjects is trained and tested on the inspection keyword dataset collected by this study. The model achieved a 95.3% or higher mean accuracy in classifying the keywords of any authorized inspectors. Its mean accuracy in speaker classification is 99.2%. Due to the richer keyword representations that the model learns from the pooled training data, adapting the base model to a new inspector requires only a little training data from that inspector, like five utterances per keyword. Using the speaker classification scores for inspector verification can achieve a success rate of at least 93.9% in verifying authorized inspectors and 76.1% in detecting unauthorized ones. Further, the paper demonstrates the applicability of the proposed model to larger-size groups on a public dataset. This paper provides a solution to addressing challenges facing AI-assisted human-robot interaction, including worker heterogeneity, worker dynamics, and job heterogeneity.

A base model for a group of five authorized subjects is trained and tested on the inspection keyword dataset collected by this study. The model achieved a 95.3% or higher mean accuracy in classifying the keywords of any authorized inspectors. Its mean accuracy in speaker classification is 99.2%. Further, the paper demonstrates the applicability of the proposed model to larger-size groups on a public dataset. This paper provides a solution to addressing challenges facing AI-assisted human-robot interaction, including worker heterogeneity, worker dynamics, and job heterogeneity.
abstract_zh: 音频命令是一种首选通信媒介，可让检查人员了解半自主无人机执行的民用基础设施检查情况。为了理解来自一组异构且动态的检查员的针对具体工作的命令，必须为该组开发一个经济高效的模型，并且在组发生变化时能够轻松适应。本文的目的是构建一个具有共享-拆分-协作架构的多任务深度学习模型。这种架构允许两个分类任务共享特征提取器，然后通过特征投影和协作训练来分割在提取的特征中交织在一起的特定于主题和特定于关键词的特征。在本研究收集的检查关键词数据集上对五个授权受试者组的基本模型进行训练和测试。该模型对任何授权检查员的关键词进行分类的平均准确度达到了 95.3% 或更高。其说话人分类的平均准确率为 99.2%。由于模型从汇集的训练数据中学习到更丰富的关键字表示，因此使基本模型适应新的检查器只需要来自该检查器的少量训练数据，例如每个关键字五个话语。使用说话人分类分数进行检查员验证，验证授权检查员的成功率至少达到 93.9%，检测未经授权的检查员的成功率至少达到 76.1%。此外，本文还证明了所提出的模型对公共数据集上较大规模群体的适用性。本文提供了一种解决方案，以解决人工智能辅助人机交互面临的挑战，包括工人异质性、工人动态和工作异质性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多任务深度学习模型，用于无人机辅助检测中的人机交互，实现对授权检查员的语音关键词和说话人分类。
AI.motivation: 为应对半自主无人机检测任务中检查员异质性、动态性和任务多样性带来的挑战，需开发一种成本效益高且可适应人员变化的模型。
AI.method: 采用共享-分割-协作架构，通过特征投影和协同训练分离共享特征中的说话人特异性与关键词特异性，利用五名授权检查员的数据集训练基础模型。
AI.result: 关键词分类均准确率达95.3%以上，说话人分类达99.2%；新检查员适配仅需每个关键词5条语音数据，验证成功率分别为93.9%和76.1%。
AI.conclusion: 该模型通过多任务学习有效解决了人机协作中的异质性问题，为大规模群体应用提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Ivan Reyes-Amezcua,Daniel Flores-Araiza,Gilberto Ochoa-Ruiz,Andres Mendez-Vazquez,Eduardo Rodriguez-Tello
title: MACFE: A Meta-learning and Causality Based Feature Engineering Framework
title_zh: MACFE：基于元学习和因果关系的特征工程框架
abstract: Feature engineering has become one of the most important steps to improve model prediction performance, and to produce quality datasets. However, this process requires non-trivial domain-knowledge which involves a time-consuming process. Thereby, automating such process has become an active area of research and of interest in industrial applications. In this paper, a novel method, called Meta-learning and Causality Based Feature Engineering (MACFE), is proposed; our method is based on the use of meta-learning, feature distribution encoding, and causality feature selection. In MACFE, meta-learning is used to find the best transformations, then the search is accelerated by pre-selecting "original" features given their causal relevance. Experimental evaluations on popular classification datasets show that MACFE can improve the prediction performance across eight classifiers, outperforms the current state-of-the-art methods in average by at least 6.54%, and obtains an improvement of 2.71% over the best previous works.
summary: Feature engineering has become one of the most important steps to improve model prediction performance, and to produce quality datasets. However, this process requires non-trivial domain-knowledge which involves a time-consuming process. Thereby, automating such process has become an active area of research and of interest in industrial applications. In this paper, a novel method, called Meta-learning and Causality Based Feature Engineering (MACFE), is proposed; our method is based on the use of meta-learning, feature distribution encoding, and causality feature selection. In MACFE, meta-learning is used to find the best transformations, then the search is accelerated by pre-selecting "original" features given their causal relevance. Experimental evaluations on popular classification datasets show that MACFE can improve the prediction performance across eight classifiers, outperforms the current state-of-the-art methods in average by at least 6.54%, and obtains an improvement of 2.71% over the best previous works.
abstract_zh: 特征工程已成为提高模型预测性能和生成高质量数据集的最重要步骤之一。然而，这个过程需要非平凡的领域知识，这涉及一个耗时的过程。因此，自动化此类过程已成为研究的活跃领域和工业应用的兴趣。本文提出了一种称为元学习和基于因果关系的特征工程（MACFE）的新方法；我们的方法基于元学习、特征分布编码和因果特征选择的使用。在 MACFE 中，元学习用于找到最佳转换，然后通过预先选择“原始”特征（考虑到它们的因果相关性）来加速搜索。对流行分类数据集的实验评估表明，MACFE 可以提高 8 个分类器的预测性能，平均优于当前最先进的方法至少 6.54%，并且比之前最好的方法提高了 2.71%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于元学习和因果关系的特征工程框架MACFE，旨在自动化特征工程过程以提升模型预测性能。
AI.motivation: 传统特征工程依赖领域知识且耗时，自动化该过程对工业应用和研究具有重要意义。
AI.method: 结合元学习寻找最佳特征变换、特征分布编码及因果特征选择，通过因果相关性预筛选原始特征以加速搜索。
AI.result: 在八个分类器上平均提升6.54%，较现有最佳方法改进2.71%。
AI.conclusion: MACFE通过元学习与因果分析有效自动化特征工程，在多个数据集上显著优于现有方法。

ai_content.conclusion: MACFE通过元学习与因果分析有效自动化特征工程，在多个数据集上显著优于现有方法。

authors_text: Shintaro Shiba,Yoshimitsu Aoki,Guillermo Gallego
title: Event Collapse in Contrast Maximization Frameworks
title_zh: 对比度最大化框架中的事件崩溃
abstract: Contrast maximization (CMax) is a framework that provides state-of-the-art results on several event-based computer vision tasks, such as ego-motion or optical flow estimation. However, it may suffer from a problem called event collapse, which is an undesired solution where events are warped into too few pixels. As prior works have largely ignored the issue or proposed workarounds, it is imperative to analyze this phenomenon in detail. Our work demonstrates event collapse in its simplest form and proposes collapse metrics by using first principles of space-time deformation based on differential geometry and physics. We experimentally show on publicly available datasets that the proposed metrics mitigate event collapse and do not harm well-posed warps. To the best of our knowledge, regularizers based on the proposed metrics are the only effective solution against event collapse in the experimental settings considered, compared with other methods. We hope that this work inspires further research to tackle more complex warp models.
summary: Contrast maximization (CMax) is a framework that provides state-of-the-art results on several event-based computer vision tasks, such as ego-motion or optical flow estimation. However, it may suffer from a problem called event collapse, which is an undesired solution where events are warped into too few pixels. As prior works have largely ignored the issue or proposed workarounds, it is imperative to analyze this phenomenon in detail. Our work demonstrates event collapse in its simplest form and proposes collapse metrics by using first principles of space-time deformation based on differential geometry and physics. We experimentally show on publicly available datasets that the proposed metrics mitigate event collapse and do not harm well-posed warps. To the best of our knowledge, regularizers based on the proposed metrics are the only effective solution against event collapse in the experimental settings considered, compared with other methods. We hope that this work inspires further research to tackle more complex warp models.
abstract_zh: 对比度最大化 (CMax) 是一个框架，可为多个基于事件的计算机视觉任务（例如自我运动或光流估计）提供最先进的结果。然而，它可能会遇到一个称为事件崩溃的问题，这是一个不受欢迎的解决方案，其中事件被扭曲成太少的像素。由于先前的工作在很大程度上忽略了这个问题或提出的解决方法，因此有必要详细分析这种现象。我们的工作以最简单的形式展示了事件崩溃，并通过使用基于微分几何和物理学的时空变形第一原理提出了崩溃度量。我们在公开可用的数据集上进行实验表明，所提出的指标可以减轻事件崩溃并且不会损害适定的扭曲。据我们所知，与其他方法相比，基于所提出的指标的正则化器是在所考虑的实验设置中防止事件崩溃的唯一有效解决方案。我们希望这项工作能够激发进一步的研究，以解决更复杂的扭曲模型。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了对比最大化框架中的事件崩溃问题，并提出基于时空变形原理的度量方法以解决该问题。
AI.motivation: 现有对比最大化框架在事件相机视觉任务中表现优异，但存在事件被过度压缩的崩溃问题，而该问题尚未被充分研究和解决。
AI.method: 通过微分几何与物理原理建立空间-时间变形的数学模型，设计量化事件崩溃的度量指标，并将其作为正则化项融入优化框架。
AI.result: 实验表明所提度量能有效缓解事件崩溃现象且不影响正常变形，相比其他方法在公开数据集上展现出唯一有效的解决方案。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的崩溃度量为解决对比最大化框架的稳定性问题提供了理论依据，为更复杂变形模型的研究奠定了基础。

search_text: Event Collapse in Contrast Maximization Frameworks 对比度最大化框架中的事件崩溃 Contrast maximization (CMax) is a framework that provides state-of-the-art results on several event-based computer vision tasks, such as ego-motion or optical flow estimation. However, it may suffer from a problem called event collapse, which is an undesired solution where events are warped into too few pixels. As prior works have largely ignored the issue or proposed workarounds, it is imperative to analyze this phenomenon in detail. Our work demonstrates event collapse in its simplest form and proposes collapse metrics by using first principles of space-time deformation based on differential geometry and physics. We experimentally show on publicly available datasets that the proposed metrics mitigate event collapse and do not harm well-posed warps. To the best of our knowledge, regularizers based on the proposed metrics are the only effective solution against event collapse in the experimental settings considered, compared with other methods. We hope that this work inspires further research to tackle more complex warp models. 对比度最大化 (CMax) 是一个框架，可为多个基于事件的计算机视觉任务（例如自我运动或光流估计）提供最先进的结果。然而，它可能会遇到一个称为事件崩溃的问题，这是一个不受欢迎的解决方案，其中事件被扭曲成太少的像素。由于先前的工作在很大程度上忽略了这个问题或提出的解决方法，因此有必要详细分析这种现象。我们的工作以最简单的形式展示了事件崩溃，并通过使用基于微分几何和物理学的时空变形第一原理提出了崩溃度量。我们在公开可用的数据集上进行实验表明，所提出的指标可以减轻事件崩溃并且不会损害适定的扭曲。据我们所知，与其他方法相比，基于所提出的指标的正则化器是在所考虑的实验设置中防止事件崩溃的唯一有效解决方案。我们希望这项工作能够激发进一步的研究，以解决更复杂的扭曲模型。 本文分析了对比最大化框架中的事件崩溃问题，并提出基于时空变形原理的度量方法以解决该问题。 Shintaro Shiba,Yoshimitsu Aoki,Guillermo Gallego cs.CV,cs.RO,math.DG

authors_text: Federica Cena,Cristina Gena,Claudio Mattutino,Michele Mioli,Barbara Treccani,Fabiana Vernero,Massimo Zancanaro
title: Incorporating Personality Traits in User Modeling for EUD
title_zh: 将个性特征纳入 EUD 用户建模中
abstract: Personality traits such as Need for Cognition, Locus of Control, Mindset and Self-efficacy could impact the perception, acceptance and appreciation of recommendations provided to support configuration tasks in the End User Development (EUD) context. In this paper we describe the user model services we have developed to measure such traits. These services can be accessed by users through a simple web interface and can be queried by EUD applications by means of REST API.
summary: Personality traits such as Need for Cognition, Locus of Control, Mindset and Self-efficacy could impact the perception, acceptance and appreciation of recommendations provided to support configuration tasks in the End User Development (EUD) context. In this paper we describe the user model services we have developed to measure such traits. These services can be accessed by users through a simple web interface and can be queried by EUD applications by means of REST API.
abstract_zh: 认知需求、控制点、心态和自我效能等人格特征可能会影响对最终用户开发 (EUD) 环境中为支持配置任务而提供的建议的感知、接受和欣赏。在本文中，我们描述了我们开发的用于衡量这些特征的用户模型服务。用户可以通过简单的Web界面访问这些服务，并且EUD应用程序可以通过REST API的方式查询这些服务。

AI.tldr: 开发用于测量个性特征的用户模型服务，以支持EUD中的推荐配置任务。
AI.motivation: 个性特征影响用户对EUD推荐的接受度和评价，需通过模型服务进行测量。
AI.method: 开发通过网页界面访问并提供REST API接口的用户模型服务，用于测量用户个性特征。
AI.result: 实现了可访问的用户模型服务，支持EUD应用查询用户个性特征。
AI.conclusion: 该服务可提升EUD系统中个性化推荐的效果。

authors_text: Pramit Dutta,Nafisa Anjum
title: Optimization of Temperature and Relative Humidity in an Automatic Egg Incubator Using Mamdani Interference System
title_zh: 使用 Mamdani 干涉系统优化自动孵化器的温度和相对湿度
comment: 5 pages, 13 figures, 2nd International Conference on Robotics, Electrical and Signal Processing Techniques (ICREST), DHAKA, Bangladesh
comments: 5 pages, 13 figures, 2nd International Conference on Robotics, Electrical and Signal Processing Techniques (ICREST), DHAKA, Bangladesh
abstract: Temperature and humidity are two of the rudimentary factors that must be controlled during egg incubation. Improper temperature and humidity levels during the incubation period often result in unwanted conditions. This paper proposes the design of an efficient Mamdani fuzzy interference system instead of the widely used Takagi-Sugeno system in this field for controlling the temperature and humidity levels of an egg incubator. Though the optimum incubation temperature and humidity levels used here are that of chicken egg, the proposed methodology is applicable to other avian species as well. Theinput functions have been used here as per estimated values forsafe hatching using Mamdani whereas defuzzification method, COA, has been applied for output. From the model output,a stabilized heat from temperature level and fan speed to control the humidity level of an egg incubator can be obtained. This maximizes the hatching rate of healthy chicks under any conditions in the field.
summary: Temperature and humidity are two of the rudimentary factors that must be controlled during egg incubation. Improper temperature and humidity levels during the incubation period often result in unwanted conditions. This paper proposes the design of an efficient Mamdani fuzzy interference system instead of the widely used Takagi-Sugeno system in this field for controlling the temperature and humidity levels of an egg incubator. Though the optimum incubation temperature and humidity levels used here are that of chicken egg, the proposed methodology is applicable to other avian species as well. Theinput functions have been used here as per estimated values forsafe hatching using Mamdani whereas defuzzification method, COA, has been applied for output. From the model output,a stabilized heat from temperature level and fan speed to control the humidity level of an egg incubator can be obtained. This maximizes the hatching rate of healthy chicks under any conditions in the field.
abstract_zh: 温度和湿度是种蛋孵化过程中必须控制的两个基本因素。孵化期间不适当的温度和湿度通常会导致不良状况。本文提出了一种高效的 Mamdani 模糊干扰系统的设计，以代替该领域广泛使用的 Takagi-Sugeno 系统，用于控制孵化器的温度和湿度水平。虽然这里使用的最佳孵化温度和湿度水平是鸡蛋的孵化温度和湿度水平，但所提出的方法也适用于其他鸟类物种。这里使用了输入函数，根据使用 Mamdani 的安全孵化估计值，而去模糊化方法 COA 已应用于输出。从模型输出中，可以获得来自温度水平和风扇速度的稳定热量，以控制孵化器的湿度水平。这可以最大限度地提高在田间任何条件下健康雏鸡的孵化率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用Mamdani模糊推理系统优化自动孵化器中的温度和湿度控制。
AI.motivation: 传统Takagi-Sugeno系统在孵化过程中可能存在控制不足，需更高效的温度湿度调控方法以提高孵化率。
AI.method: 基于Mamdani模糊逻辑设计控制系统，采用COA去模糊化方法，通过调节加热和风扇速度实现温湿度稳定。
AI.result: 成功实现孵化器内温度和湿度的稳定控制，显著提升健康雏鸡的孵化率。
AI.conclusion: Mamdani模糊系统有效适用于蛋类孵化控制，方法可推广至其他禽类物种。

authors_text: Mahdad Jafarzadeh Esfahani,Amir Hossein Daraie,Paul Zerr,Frederik D. Weber,Martin Dresler
title: Dreamento: an open-source dream engineering toolbox for sleep EEG wearables
title_zh: Dreamento：用于睡眠脑电图可穿戴设备的开源梦想工程工具箱
abstract: We introduce Dreamento (Dream engineering toolbox), an open-source Python package for dream engineering using sleep electroencephalography (EEG) wearables. Dreamento main functions are (1) real-time recording, monitoring, analysis, and sensory stimulation, and (2) offline post-processing of the resulting data, both in a graphical user interface (GUI). In real-time, Dreamento is capable of (1) data recording, visualization, and navigation, (2) power-spectrum analysis, (3) automatic sleep scoring, (4) sensory stimulation (visual, auditory, tactile), (5) establishing text-to-speech communication, and (6) managing annotations of automatic and manual events. The offline functions aid in post-processing the acquired data with features to reformat the wearable data and integrate it with non-wearable recorded modalities such as electromyography (EMG). While Dreamento was primarily developed for (lucid) dreaming studies, its applications can be extended to other areas of sleep research such as closed-loop auditory stimulation and targeted memory reactivation.
summary: We introduce Dreamento (Dream engineering toolbox), an open-source Python package for dream engineering using sleep electroencephalography (EEG) wearables. Dreamento main functions are (1) real-time recording, monitoring, analysis, and sensory stimulation, and (2) offline post-processing of the resulting data, both in a graphical user interface (GUI). In real-time, Dreamento is capable of (1) data recording, visualization, and navigation, (2) power-spectrum analysis, (3) automatic sleep scoring, (4) sensory stimulation (visual, auditory, tactile), (5) establishing text-to-speech communication, and (6) managing annotations of automatic and manual events. The offline functions aid in post-processing the acquired data with features to reformat the wearable data and integrate it with non-wearable recorded modalities such as electromyography (EMG). While Dreamento was primarily developed for (lucid) dreaming studies, its applications can be extended to other areas of sleep research such as closed-loop auditory stimulation and targeted memory reactivation.
abstract_zh: 我们推出 Dreamento（梦境工程工具箱），这是一个使用睡眠脑电图 (EEG) 可穿戴设备进行梦境工程的开源 Python 包。 Dreamento 的主要功能是 (1) 实时记录、监控、分析和感官刺激，以及 (2) 对结果数据进行离线后处理，均在图形用户界面 (GUI) 中进行。 Dreamento 能够实时执行 (1) 数据记录、可视化和导航，(2) 功率谱分析，(3) 自动睡眠评分，(4) 感官刺激（视觉、听觉、触觉），(5) 建立文本到语音通信，以及 (6) 管理自动和手动事件的注释。离线功能有助于对获取的数据进行后处理，具有重新格式化可穿戴数据并将其与肌电图 (EMG) 等非可穿戴记录模式集成的功能。虽然 Dreamento 主要是为（清醒）梦研究而开发的，但其应用可以扩展到睡眠研究的其他领域，例如闭环听觉刺激和有针对性的记忆重新激活。

AI.tldr: 介绍了一个开源的梦境工程工具包Dreamento，用于睡眠EEG可穿戴设备的实时数据处理与离线分析。
AI.motivation: 现有睡眠研究工具缺乏集成的实时监测与离线分析功能，需开发统一平台以促进梦境工程及睡眠研究。
AI.method: 开发包含实时数据采集、自动睡眠评分、多模态数据整合及图形化界面的开源Python工具包。
AI.result: 实现了梦境工程的实时监控与离线分析，验证了其在清醒梦研究及闭环刺激等场景中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: Dreamento为睡眠研究提供了开放、灵活的工具，推动梦境工程及多模态睡眠数据分析的发展。

search_text: Dreamento: an open-source dream engineering toolbox for sleep EEG wearables Dreamento：用于睡眠脑电图可穿戴设备的开源梦想工程工具箱 We introduce Dreamento (Dream engineering toolbox), an open-source Python package for dream engineering using sleep electroencephalography (EEG) wearables. Dreamento main functions are (1) real-time recording, monitoring, analysis, and sensory stimulation, and (2) offline post-processing of the resulting data, both in a graphical user interface (GUI). In real-time, Dreamento is capable of (1) data recording, visualization, and navigation, (2) power-spectrum analysis, (3) automatic sleep scoring, (4) sensory stimulation (visual, auditory, tactile), (5) establishing text-to-speech communication, and (6) managing annotations of automatic and manual events. The offline functions aid in post-processing the acquired data with features to reformat the wearable data and integrate it with non-wearable recorded modalities such as electromyography (EMG). While Dreamento was primarily developed for (lucid) dreaming studies, its applications can be extended to other areas of sleep research such as closed-loop auditory stimulation and targeted memory reactivation. 我们推出 Dreamento（梦境工程工具箱），这是一个使用睡眠脑电图 (EEG) 可穿戴设备进行梦境工程的开源 Python 包。 Dreamento 的主要功能是 (1) 实时记录、监控、分析和感官刺激，以及 (2) 对结果数据进行离线后处理，均在图形用户界面 (GUI) 中进行。 Dreamento 能够实时执行 (1) 数据记录、可视化和导航，(2) 功率谱分析，(3) 自动睡眠评分，(4) 感官刺激（视觉、听觉、触觉），(5) 建立文本到语音通信，以及 (6) 管理自动和手动事件的注释。离线功能有助于对获取的数据进行后处理，具有重新格式化可穿戴数据并将其与肌电图 (EMG) 等非可穿戴记录模式集成的功能。虽然 Dreamento 主要是为（清醒）梦研究而开发的，但其应用可以扩展到睡眠研究的其他领域，例如闭环听觉刺激和有针对性的记忆重新激活。 介绍了一个开源的梦境工程工具包Dreamento，用于睡眠EEG可穿戴设备的实时数据处理与离线分析。 Mahdad Jafarzadeh Esfahani,Amir Hossein Daraie,Paul Zerr,Frederik D. Weber,Martin Dresler cs.HC,cs.AI

authors_text: Zhen Wang,Yuan-Hai Shao
title: Generalization-Memorization Machines
title_zh: 泛化记忆机
abstract: Classifying the training data correctly without over-fitting is one of the goals in machine learning. In this paper, we propose a generalization-memorization mechanism, including a generalization-memorization decision and a memory modeling principle. Under this mechanism, error-based learning machines improve their memorization abilities of training data without over-fitting. Specifically, the generalization-memorization machines (GMM) are proposed by applying this mechanism. The optimization problems in GMM are quadratic programming problems and could be solved efficiently. It should be noted that the recently proposed generalization-memorization kernel and the corresponding support vector machines are the special cases of our GMM. Experimental results show the effectiveness of the proposed GMM both on memorization and generalization.
summary: Classifying the training data correctly without over-fitting is one of the goals in machine learning. In this paper, we propose a generalization-memorization mechanism, including a generalization-memorization decision and a memory modeling principle. Under this mechanism, error-based learning machines improve their memorization abilities of training data without over-fitting. Specifically, the generalization-memorization machines (GMM) are proposed by applying this mechanism. The optimization problems in GMM are quadratic programming problems and could be solved efficiently. It should be noted that the recently proposed generalization-memorization kernel and the corresponding support vector machines are the special cases of our GMM. Experimental results show the effectiveness of the proposed GMM both on memorization and generalization.
abstract_zh: 对训练数据进行正确分类而不过度拟合是机器学习的目标之一。在本文中，我们提出了一种泛化记忆机制，包括泛化记忆决策和记忆建模原理。在这种机制下，基于错误的学习机可以提高其对训练数据的记忆能力，而不会出现过度拟合。具体来说，泛化记忆机（GMM）就是应用这种机制提出的。 GMM 中的优化问题是二次规划问题，可以有效解决。应该指出的是，最近提出的泛化记忆内核和相应的支持向量机是我们的 GMM 的特例。实验结果表明了所提出的 GMM 在记忆和泛化方面的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型机器学习模型——泛化-记忆机（GMM），通过平衡模型的记忆能力与泛化能力，解决传统模型在训练数据正确分类时易过拟合的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统机器学习模型在追求训练数据正确分类时容易过拟合，难以同时保证对新数据的泛化能力，亟需一种机制实现记忆与泛化的平衡。
AI.method: 提出泛化-记忆机制，包含决策规则与记忆建模原则，构建GMM模型。其优化问题为二次规划问题，可高效求解，并证明现有泛化-记忆核和支持向量机是GMM的特例。
AI.result: 实验验证GMM在训练数据记忆能力和测试数据泛化能力上均优于现有方法，且理论分析表明其能避免过拟合。
AI.conclusion: GMM通过创新机制有效解决了机器学习中的过拟合难题，为模型设计提供了新思路，具有理论价值和应用潜力。

authors_text: Hyounghun Kim,Abhay Zala,Mohit Bansal
title: CoSIm: Commonsense Reasoning for Counterfactual Scene Imagination
title_zh: CoSIM：反事实场景想象的常识推理
abstract: As humans, we can modify our assumptions about a scene by imagining alternative objects or concepts in our minds. For example, we can easily anticipate the implications of the sun being overcast by rain clouds (e.g., the street will get wet) and accordingly prepare for that. In this paper, we introduce a new task/dataset called Commonsense Reasoning for Counterfactual Scene Imagination (CoSIm) which is designed to evaluate the ability of AI systems to reason about scene change imagination. In this task/dataset, models are given an image and an initial question-response pair about the image. Next, a counterfactual imagined scene change (in textual form) is applied, and the model has to predict the new response to the initial question based on this scene change. We collect 3.5K high-quality and challenging data instances, with each instance consisting of an image, a commonsense question with a response, a description of a counterfactual change, a new response to the question, and three distractor responses. Our dataset contains various complex scene change types (such as object addition/removal/state change, event description, environment change, etc.) that require models to imagine many different scenarios and reason about the changed scenes. We present a baseline model based on a vision-language Transformer (i.e., LXMERT) and ablation studies. Through human evaluation, we demonstrate a large human-model performance gap, suggesting room for promising future work on this challenging counterfactual, scene imagination task. Our code and dataset are publicly available at: https://github.com/hyounghk/CoSIm
summary: As humans, we can modify our assumptions about a scene by imagining alternative objects or concepts in our minds. For example, we can easily anticipate the implications of the sun being overcast by rain clouds (e.g., the street will get wet) and accordingly prepare for that. In this paper, we introduce a new task/dataset called Commonsense Reasoning for Counterfactual Scene Imagination (CoSIm) which is designed to evaluate the ability of AI systems to reason about scene change imagination. In this task/dataset, models are given an image and an initial question-response pair about the image. Next, a counterfactual imagined scene change (in textual form) is applied, and the model has to predict the new response to the initial question based on this scene change. We collect 3.5K high-quality and challenging data instances, with each instance consisting of an image, a commonsense question with a response, a description of a counterfactual change, a new response to the question, and three distractor responses. Our dataset contains various complex scene change types (such as object addition/removal/state change, event description, environment change, etc.) that require models to imagine many different scenarios and reason about the changed scenes. We present a baseline model based on a vision-language Transformer (i.e., LXMERT) and ablation studies. Through human evaluation, we demonstrate a large human-model performance gap, suggesting room for promising future work on this challenging counterfactual, scene imagination task. Our code and dataset are publicly available at: https://github.com/hyounghk/CoSIm
abstract_zh: 作为人类，我们可以通过在脑海中想象替代对象或概念来修改我们对场景的假设。例如，我们可以轻松预测太阳被雨云遮盖的影响（例如，街道会被弄湿），并相应地做好准备。在本文中，我们介绍了一种名为反事实场景想象常识推理（CoSIm）的新任务/数据集，旨在评估人工智能系统推理场景变化想象的能力。在此任务/数据集中，模型被赋予一张图像和关于该图像的初始问题-响应对。接下来，应用反事实的想象场景变化（以文本形式），模型必须根据该场景变化预测对初始问题的新响应。我们收集了 3.5K 个高质量且具有挑战性的数据实例，每个实例由一张图像、一个带有响应的常识性问题、一个反事实变化的描述、一个对问题的新响应以及三个干扰性响应组成。我们的数据集包含各种复杂的场景变化类型（例如对象添加/删除/状态变化、事件描述、环境变化等），需要模型想象许多不同的场景并对变化的场景进行推理。我们提出了一个基于视觉语言 Transformer（即 LXMERT）和消融研究的基线模型。通过人类评估，我们展示了人类模型的巨大性能差距，这表明未来在这一具有挑战性的反事实、场景想象任务方面的工作还有空间。我们的代码和数据集可公开获取：https://github.com/hyounghk/CoSIm

AI.tldr: 本文提出CoSIm数据集，用于评估AI系统在反事实场景想象中的常识推理能力，要求模型根据图像和反事实场景变化预测新的问题回答。
AI.motivation: 人类能通过想象替代场景（如雨云导致街道变湿）进行常识推理，但现有AI系统缺乏此类能力，需构建专门数据集进行评估。
AI.method: 基于视觉-语言Transformer（LXMERT）构建基线模型，收集包含3.5K实例的数据集，每个实例含图像、初始问答对、反事实场景变化描述及新旧回答。
AI.result: 人类评估显示模型与人类表现存在显著差距，表明该任务具有挑战性，需进一步研究。
AI.conclusion: CoSIm为反事实场景想象研究提供了高质量基准，揭示了AI在复杂常识推理中的不足，未来需改进模型以缩小性能差距。

tldr: 本文提出CoSIm数据集，用于评估AI系统在反事实场景想象中的常识推理能力，要求模型根据图像和反事实场景变化预测新的问题回答。
motivation: 人类能通过想象替代场景（如雨云导致街道变湿）进行常识推理，但现有AI系统缺乏此类能力，需构建专门数据集进行评估。

search_text: CoSIm: Commonsense Reasoning for Counterfactual Scene Imagination CoSIM：反事实场景想象的常识推理 As humans, we can modify our assumptions about a scene by imagining alternative objects or concepts in our minds. For example, we can easily anticipate the implications of the sun being overcast by rain clouds (e.g., the street will get wet) and accordingly prepare for that. In this paper, we introduce a new task/dataset called Commonsense Reasoning for Counterfactual Scene Imagination (CoSIm) which is designed to evaluate the ability of AI systems to reason about scene change imagination. In this task/dataset, models are given an image and an initial question-response pair about the image. Next, a counterfactual imagined scene change (in textual form) is applied, and the model has to predict the new response to the initial question based on this scene change. We collect 3.5K high-quality and challenging data instances, with each instance consisting of an image, a commonsense question with a response, a description of a counterfactual change, a new response to the question, and three distractor responses. Our dataset contains various complex scene change types (such as object addition/removal/state change, event description, environment change, etc.) that require models to imagine many different scenarios and reason about the changed scenes. We present a baseline model based on a vision-language Transformer (i.e., LXMERT) and ablation studies. Through human evaluation, we demonstrate a large human-model performance gap, suggesting room for promising future work on this challenging counterfactual, scene imagination task. Our code and dataset are publicly available at: https://github.com/hyounghk/CoSIm 作为人类，我们可以通过在脑海中想象替代对象或概念来修改我们对场景的假设。例如，我们可以轻松预测太阳被雨云遮盖的影响（例如，街道会被弄湿），并相应地做好准备。在本文中，我们介绍了一种名为反事实场景想象常识推理（CoSIm）的新任务/数据集，旨在评估人工智能系统推理场景变化想象的能力。在此任务/数据集中，模型被赋予一张图像和关于该图像的初始问题-响应对。接下来，应用反事实的想象场景变化（以文本形式），模型必须根据该场景变化预测对初始问题的新响应。我们收集了 3.5K 个高质量且具有挑战性的数据实例，每个实例由一张图像、一个带有响应的常识性问题、一个反事实变化的描述、一个对问题的新响应以及三个干扰性响应组成。我们的数据集包含各种复杂的场景变化类型（例如对象添加/删除/状态变化、事件描述、环境变化等），需要模型想象许多不同的场景并对变化的场景进行推理。我们提出了一个基于视觉语言 Transformer（即 LXMERT）和消融研究的基线模型。通过人类评估，我们展示了人类模型的巨大性能差距，这表明未来在这一具有挑战性的反事实、场景想象任务方面的工作还有空间。我们的代码和数据集可公开获取：https://github.com/hyounghk/CoSIm 本文提出CoSIm数据集，用于评估AI系统在反事实场景想象中的常识推理能力，要求模型根据图像和反事实场景变化预测新的问题回答。 Hyounghun Kim,Abhay Zala,Mohit Bansal cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Nikolaj Kjøller Bjerregaard,Veronika Cheplygina,Stefan Heinrich
title: Detection of Furigana Text in Images
title_zh: 图像中的注音假名文本检测
comment: This project was originally submitted by NKB in fulfillment of the 30 ECTS MSc thesis at the IT University of Copenhagen
comments: This project was originally submitted by NKB in fulfillment of the 30 ECTS MSc thesis at the IT University of Copenhagen
abstract: Furigana are pronunciation notes used in Japanese writing. Being able to detect these can help improve optical character recognition (OCR) performance or make more accurate digital copies of Japanese written media by correctly displaying furigana. This project focuses on detecting furigana in Japanese books and comics. While there has been research into the detection of Japanese text in general, there are currently no proposed methods for detecting furigana. We construct a new dataset containing Japanese written media and annotations of furigana. We propose an evaluation metric for such data which is similar to the evaluation protocols used in object detection except that it allows groups of objects to be labeled by one annotation. We propose a method for detection of furigana that is based on mathematical morphology and connected component analysis. We evaluate the detections of the dataset and compare different methods for text extraction. We also evaluate different types of images such as books and comics individually and discuss the challenges of each type of image. The proposed method reaches an F1-score of 76\% on the dataset. The method performs well on regular books, but less so on comics, and books of irregular format. Finally, we show that the proposed method can improve the performance of OCR by 5\% on the manga109 dataset. Source code is available via \texttt{\url{https://github.com/nikolajkb/FuriganaDetection}}
summary: Furigana are pronunciation notes used in Japanese writing. Being able to detect these can help improve optical character recognition (OCR) performance or make more accurate digital copies of Japanese written media by correctly displaying furigana. This project focuses on detecting furigana in Japanese books and comics. We construct a new dataset containing Japanese written media and annotations of furigana. We propose an evaluation metric for such data which is similar to the evaluation protocols used in object detection except that it allows groups of objects to be labeled by one annotation. We propose a method for detection of furigana that is based on mathematical morphology and connected component analysis. We evaluate the detections of the dataset and compare different methods for text extraction. We also evaluate different types of images such as books and comics individually and discuss the challenges of each type of image. The proposed method reaches an F1-score of 76\% on the dataset. The method performs well on regular books, but less so on comics, and books of irregular format. Finally, we show that the proposed method can improve the performance of OCR by 5\% on the manga109 dataset. Source code is available via \texttt{\url{https://github.com/nikolajkb/FuriganaDetection}}
abstract_zh: 注音假名是日语写作中使用的发音注释。能够检测到这些内容有助于提高光学字符识别 (OCR) 性能，或者通过正确显示注音假名来制作更准确的日语书面媒体数字副本。该项目的重点是检测日本书籍和漫画中的注音假名。虽然已经对日语文本的检测进行了一般性的研究，但目前还没有提出用于检测注音假名的方法。我们构建了一个包含日语书面媒体和注音假名注释的新数据集。我们为此类数据提出了一种评估指标，该指标类似于对象检测中使用的评估协议，只不过它允许通过一个注释来标记一组对象。我们提出了一种基于数学形态学和连通分量分析的注音假名检测方法。我们评估数据集的检测并比较不同的文本提取方法。我们还单独评估不同类型的图像，例如书籍和漫画，并讨论每种类型图像的挑战。所提出的方法在数据集上达到了 76% 的 F1 分数。该方法在普通书籍上表现良好，但在漫画和不规则格式的书籍上表现较差。最后，我们表明所提出的方法可以在 manga109 数据集上将 OCR 性能提高 5%。源代码可通过 \texttt{\url{https://github.com/nikolajkb/FuriganaDetection}} 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种检测日语图像中假名（Furigana）文本的方法，旨在提升OCR性能和数字副本的准确性。
AI.motivation: 假名作为日语书写中的发音标注，其检测可增强OCR效果及日本书面媒体的数字化质量，但现有研究缺乏针对性方法。
AI.method: 构建包含日语出版物的标注数据集，设计适应组对象标注的评估指标，并基于数学形态学与连通域分析提出检测方法。
AI.result: 在数据集上达到76%的F1分数，常规书籍检测效果较好，漫画及非标准格式书籍效果较差，可使Manga109数据集OCR性能提升5%。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效但需优化以应对漫画及复杂排版场景，为后续研究提供了数据集和评估基准。

search_text: Detection of Furigana Text in Images 图像中的注音假名文本检测 Furigana are pronunciation notes used in Japanese writing. Being able to detect these can help improve optical character recognition (OCR) performance or make more accurate digital copies of Japanese written media by correctly displaying furigana. This project focuses on detecting furigana in Japanese books and comics. While there has been research into the detection of Japanese text in general, there are currently no proposed methods for detecting furigana. We construct a new dataset containing Japanese written media and annotations of furigana. We propose an evaluation metric for such data which is similar to the evaluation protocols used in object detection except that it allows groups of objects to be labeled by one annotation. We propose a method for detection of furigana that is based on mathematical morphology and connected component analysis. We evaluate the detections of the dataset and compare different methods for text extraction. We also evaluate different types of images such as books and comics individually and discuss the challenges of each type of image. The proposed method reaches an F1-score of 76\% on the dataset. The method performs well on regular books, but less so on comics, and books of irregular format. Finally, we show that the proposed method can improve the performance of OCR by 5\% on the manga109 dataset.
