authors_text: Lea Steffen,Tobias Weyer,Stefan Ulbrich,Arne Roennau,Rüdiger Dillmann
title: Reactive Neural Path Planning with Dynamic Obstacle Avoidance in a Condensed Configuration Space
title_zh: 压缩配置空间中具有动态避障功能的反应式神经路径规划
comment: Accepted to IROS2022. Supplementary video: https://youtu.be/CEkVDDg9ORw
comments: Accepted to IROS2022. Supplementary video: https://youtu.be/CEkVDDg9ORw
abstract: We present a biologically inspired approach for path planning with dynamic obstacle avoidance. Path planning is performed in a condensed configuration space of a robot generated by self-organizing neural networks (SONN). The robot itself and static as well as dynamic obstacles are mapped from the Cartesian task space into the configuration space by precomputed kinematics. The condensed space represents a cognitive map of the environment, which is inspired by place cells and the concept of cognitive maps in mammalian brains. The generation of training data as well as the evaluation were performed on a real industrial robot accompanied by simulations. To evaluate the reactive collision-free online planning within a changing environment, a demonstrator was realized. Then, a comparative study regarding sample-based planners was carried out. So we could show that the robot is able to operate in dynamically changing environments and re-plan its motion trajectories within impressing 0.02 seconds, which proofs the real-time capability of our concept.
summary: We present a biologically inspired approach for path planning with dynamic obstacle avoidance. Path planning is performed in a condensed configuration space of a robot generated by self-organizing neural networks (SONN). The robot itself and static as well as dynamic obstacles are mapped from the Cartesian task space into the configuration space by precomputed kinematics. The condensed space represents a cognitive map of the environment, which is inspired by place cells and the concept of cognitive maps in mammalian brains. The generation of training data as well as the evaluation were performed on a real industrial robot accompanied by simulations. To evaluate the reactive collision-free online planning within a changing environment, a demonstrator was realized. Then, a comparative study regarding sample-based planners was carried out. So we could show that the robot is able to operate in dynamically changing environments and re-plan its motion trajectories within impressing 0.02 seconds, which proofs the real-time capability of our concept.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种受生物学启发的方法，用于动态避障的路径规划。路径规划是在由自组织神经网络（SONN）生成的机器人的压缩配置空间中执行的。机器人本身以及静态和动态障碍物通过预先计算的运动学从笛卡尔任务空间映射到配置空间。浓缩的空间代表了环境的认知地图，其灵感来自位置细胞和哺乳动物大脑中的认知地图概念。训练数据的生成以及评估是在真实的工业机器人上进行的，并进行了模拟。为了评估不断变化的环境中的反应式无碰撞在线规划，实现了一个演示器。然后，对基于样本的规划器进行了比较研究。因此，我们可以证明机器人能够在动态变化的环境中运行，并在令人印象深刻的 0.02 秒内重新规划其运动轨迹，这证明了我们概念的实时能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自组织神经网络的动态避障路径规划方法，通过压缩配置空间实现机器人实时路径规划。
AI.motivation: 传统路径规划方法难以高效应对动态环境中的实时避障需求，需借鉴生物认知机制提升适应性与计算效率。
AI.method: 利用自组织神经网络构建压缩配置空间，将机器人及动态障碍物映射至该空间，结合预计算运动学实现认知地图生成，并通过真实机器人与仿真对比验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法可在0.02秒内完成动态环境下的实时路径重规划，验证了其在复杂场景中的实时性与避障能力。
AI.conclusion: 基于认知地图的神经路径规划方法有效解决了动态环境下的实时避障问题，为工业机器人应用提供了新思路。

The generation of training data as well as the evaluation were performed on a real industrial robot accompanied by simulations. To evaluate the reactive collision-free online planning within a changing environment, a demonstrator was realized. Then, a comparative study regarding sample-based planners was carried out. So we could show that the robot is able to operate in dynamically changing environments and re-plan its motion trajectories within impressing 0.02 seconds, which proofs the real-time capability of our concept. 我们提出了一种受生物学启发的方法，用于动态避障的路径规划。路径规划是在由自组织神经网络（SONN）生成的机器人的压缩配置空间中执行的。机器人本身以及静态和动态障碍物通过预先计算的运动学从笛卡尔任务空间映射到配置空间。浓缩的空间代表了环境的认知地图，其灵感来自位置细胞和哺乳动物大脑中的认知地图概念。训练数据的生成以及评估是在真实的工业机器人上进行的，并进行了模拟。为了评估不断变化的环境中的反应式无碰撞在线规划，实现了一个演示器。然后，对基于样本的规划器进行了比较研究。因此，我们可以证明机器人能够在动态变化的环境中运行，并在令人印象深刻的 0.02 秒内重新规划其运动轨迹，这证明了我们概念的实时能力。 本文提出一种基于自组织神经网络的动态避障路径规划方法，通过压缩配置空间实现机器人实时路径规划。 Lea Steffen,Tobias Weyer,Stefan Ulbrich,Arne Roennau,Rüdiger Dillmann cs.RO

authors_text: Isabell Wochner,Pierre Schumacher,Georg Martius,Dieter Büchler,Syn Schmitt,Daniel F. B. Haeufle
title: Learning with Muscles: Benefits for Data-Efficiency and Robustness in Anthropomorphic Tasks
title_zh: 用肌肉学习：拟人化任务中数据效率和稳健性的好处
abstract: Humans are able to outperform robots in terms of robustness, versatility, and learning of new tasks in a wide variety of movements. We hypothesize that highly nonlinear muscle dynamics play a large role in providing inherent stability, which is favorable to learning. While recent advances have been made in applying modern learning techniques to muscle-actuated systems both in simulation as well as in robotics, so far, no detailed analysis has been performed to show the benefits of muscles when learning from scratch. Our study closes this gap and showcases the potential of muscle actuators for core robotics challenges in terms of data-efficiency, hyperparameter sensitivity, and robustness.
summary: Humans are able to outperform robots in terms of robustness, versatility, and learning of new tasks in a wide variety of movements. We hypothesize that highly nonlinear muscle dynamics play a large role in providing inherent stability, which is favorable to learning. While recent advances have been made in applying modern learning techniques to muscle-actuated systems both in simulation as well as in robotics, so far, no detailed analysis has been performed to show the benefits of muscles when learning from scratch. Our study closes this gap and showcases the potential of muscle actuators for core robotics challenges in terms of data-efficiency, hyperparameter sensitivity, and robustness.
abstract_zh: 人类在鲁棒性、多功能性以及在各种运动中学习新任务方面能够超越机器人。我们假设高度非线性的肌肉动力学在提供固有稳定性方面发挥着重要作用，这有利于学习。尽管最近在模拟和机器人技术中将现代学习技术应用于肌肉驱动系统方面取得了进展，但到目前为止，还没有进行详细的分析来显示从头开始学习时肌肉的好处。我们的研究缩小了这一差距，并展示了肌肉执行器在数据效率、超参数灵敏度和鲁棒性方面应对核心机器人挑战的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究肌肉执行器在类人任务中的数据效率和鲁棒性优势，通过对比传统执行器，验证肌肉动力学对学习性能的提升作用。
AI.motivation: 人类在复杂运动中表现出更强的鲁棒性和学习能力，而现有研究未明确肌肉非线性动力学对数据效率和稳定性的影响，需填补此空白。
AI.method: 通过模拟与实际机器人实验，对比肌肉驱动系统与传统执行器在数据效率、超参数敏感性和任务鲁棒性方面的表现，分析肌肉动力学的内在优势。
AI.result: 肌肉执行器在减少训练数据需求、降低超参数调优依赖性及应对环境扰动时展现出显著优势，验证了其固有稳定性对学习的促进作用。
AI.conclusion: 肌肉动力学为机器人学习提供了天然稳定性，未来可进一步探索其在复杂任务中的应用，推动更高效、鲁棒的机器人系统设计。

authors_text: Daniel Hugo Cámpora Pérez,Niko Neufeld,Agustín Riscos Núñez
title: Search by triplet: An efficient local track reconstruction algorithm for parallel architectures
title_zh: 按三元组搜索：并行架构的高效局部轨道重建算法
comment: ef:Journal of Computational Science, Volume 54, 2021, 101422, ISSN 1877-7503
comments: ef:Journal of Computational Science, Volume 54, 2021, 101422, ISSN 1877-7503
abstract: Millions of particles are collided every second at the LHCb detector placed inside the Large Hadron Collider at CERN. The particles produced as a result of these collisions pass through various detecting devices which will produce a combined raw data rate of up to 40 Tbps by 2021. These data will be fed through a data acquisition system which reconstructs individual particles and filters the collision events in real time. This process will occur in a heterogeneous farm employing exclusively off-the-shelf CPU and GPU hardware, in a two stage process known as High Level Trigger. The reconstruction of charged particle trajectories in physics detectors, also referred to as track reconstruction or tracking, determines the position, charge and momentum of particles as they pass through detectors. The Vertex Locator subdetector (VELO) is the closest such detector to the beamline, placed outside of the region where the LHCb magnet produces a sizable magnetic field. It is used to reconstruct straight particle trajectories which serve as seeds for reconstruction of other subdetectors and to locate collision vertices. The VELO subdetector will detect up to 1000 million particles every second, which need to be reconstructed in real time in the High Level Trigger. We present Search by triplet, an efficient track reconstruction algorithm. Our algorithm is designed to run efficiently across parallel architectures. We extend on previous work and explain the algorithm evolution since its inception. We show the scaling of our algorithm under various situations, and analyze its amortized time in terms of complexity for each of its constituent parts and profile its performance. Our algorithm is the current state-of-the-art in VELO track reconstruction on SIMT architectures, and we qualify its improvements over previous results.

The particles produced as a result of these collisions pass through various detecting devices which will produce a combined raw data rate of up to 40 Tbps by 2021. These data will be fed through a data acquisition system which reconstructs individual particles and filters the collision events in real time. This process will occur in a heterogeneous farm employing exclusively off-the-shelf CPU and GPU hardware, in a two stage process known as High Level Trigger. The reconstruction of charged particle trajectories in physics detectors, also referred to as track reconstruction or tracking, determines the position, charge and momentum of particles as they pass through detectors. The Vertex Locator subdetector (VELO) is the closest such detector to the beamline, placed outside of the region where the LHCb magnet produces a sizable magnetic field. It is used to reconstruct straight particle trajectories which serve as seeds for reconstruction of other subdetectors and to locate collision vertices. The VELO subdetector will detect up to 1000 million particles every second, which need to be reconstructed in real time in the High Level Trigger. We present Search by triplet, an efficient track reconstruction algorithm. Our algorithm is designed to run efficiently across parallel architectures. We extend on previous work and explain the algorithm evolution since its inception. We show the scaling of our algorithm under various situations, and analyze its amortized time in terms of complexity for each of its constituent parts and profile its performance. Our algorithm is the current state-of-the-art in VELO track reconstruction on SIMT architectures, and we qualify its improvements over previous results.
abstract_zh: 位于欧洲核子研究中心大型强子对撞机内的大型强子对撞机探测器每秒有数百万个粒子发生碰撞。这些碰撞产生的粒子会通过各种检测设备，到 2021 年，这些设备将产生高达 40 Tbps 的综合原始数据速率。这些数据将通过数据采集系统传输，该系统可重建单个粒子并实时过滤碰撞事件。此过程将发生在仅使用现成 CPU 和 GPU 硬件的异构场中，采用称为高级触发的两阶段过程。物理探测器中带电粒子轨迹的重建（也称为轨迹重建或跟踪）确定粒子通过探测器时的位置、电荷和动量。顶点定位器子探测器 (VELO) 是距离光束线最近的此类探测器，放置在 LHCb 磁体产生相当大磁场的区域之外。它用于重建直线粒子轨迹，作为重建其他子探测器的种子并定位碰撞顶点。 VELO子探测器每秒将探测多达10亿个粒子，这些粒子需要在高级触发器中实时重建。我们提出了三元组搜索，一种有效的轨迹重建算法。我们的算法旨在跨并行架构高效运行。我们扩展了之前的工作并解释了算法自诞生以来的演变。我们展示了算法在各种情况下的扩展，并根据每个组成部分的复杂性分析了其摊余时间，并分析了其性能。我们的算法是 SIMT 架构上 VELO 轨道重建中当前最先进的算法，并且我们验证了其相对于之前结果的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为'Search by triplet'的高效局部轨迹重建算法，专为并行架构设计，用于处理LHCb探测器中每秒高达十亿次的粒子碰撞数据。
AI.motivation: LHCb探测器每秒产生数百万次粒子碰撞，生成高达40 Tbps的原始数据，需在异构计算集群中实时过滤事件，传统轨迹重建算法难以满足实时性和计算效率需求。
AI.method: 基于SIMT架构优化的'Search by triplet'算法，通过三元组搜索策略在并行计算单元中高效重建带电粒子轨迹，分析算法复杂度并验证其在不同场景下的扩展性。
AI.result: 该算法成为VELO子探测器在SIMT架构下的最优轨迹重建方案，相比先前方法在实时处理能力和计算资源利用率上均有显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 针对高能物理实验中海量数据处理需求，'Search by triplet'算法通过并行化优化实现了高效轨迹重建，为异构计算环境下的实时粒子物理分析提供了关键技术支撑。

Our algorithm is the current state-of-the-art in VELO track reconstruction on SIMT architectures, and we qualify its improvements over previous results. 位于欧洲核子研究中心大型强子对撞机内的大型强子对撞机探测器每秒有数百万个粒子发生碰撞。这些碰撞产生的粒子会通过各种检测设备，到 2021 年，这些设备将产生高达 40 Tbps 的综合原始数据速率。这些数据将通过数据采集系统传输，该系统可重建单个粒子并实时过滤碰撞事件。此过程将发生在仅使用现成 CPU 和 GPU 硬件的异构场中，采用称为高级触发的两阶段过程。物理探测器中带电粒子轨迹的重建（也称为轨迹重建或跟踪）确定粒子通过探测器时的位置、电荷和动量。顶点定位器子探测器 (VELO) 是距离光束线最近的此类探测器，放置在 LHCb 磁体产生相当大磁场的区域之外。它用于重建直线粒子轨迹，作为重建其他子探测器的种子并定位碰撞顶点。 VELO子探测器每秒将探测多达10亿个粒子，这些粒子需要在高级触发器中实时重建。我们提出了三元组搜索，一种有效的轨迹重建算法。我们的算法旨在跨并行架构高效运行。我们扩展了之前的工作并解释了算法自诞生以来的演变。我们展示了算法在各种情况下的扩展，并根据每个组成部分的复杂性分析了其摊余时间，并分析了其性能。我们的算法是 SIMT 架构上 VELO 轨道重建中当前最先进的算法，并且我们验证了其相对于之前结果的改进。 本文提出了一种名为'Search by triplet'的高效局部轨迹重建算法，专为并行架构设计，用于处理LHCb探测器中每秒高达十亿次的粒子碰撞数据。 Daniel Hugo Cámpora Pérez,Niko Neufeld,Agustín Riscos Núñez hep-ex,cs.DS

authors_text: Elisa Marcelli,Tommaso Barbariol,Gian Antonio Susto
title: Active Learning-based Isolation Forest (ALIF): Enhancing Anomaly Detection in Decision Support Systems
title_zh: 基于主动学习的隔离森林 (ALIF)：增强决策支持系统中的异常检测
abstract: The detection of anomalous behaviours is an emerging need in many applications, particularly in contexts where security and reliability are critical aspects. While the definition of anomaly strictly depends on the domain framework, it is often impractical or too time consuming to obtain a fully labelled dataset. The use of unsupervised models to overcome the lack of labels often fails to catch domain specific anomalies as they rely on general definitions of outlier. This paper suggests a new active learning based approach, ALIF, to solve this problem by reducing the number of required labels and tuning the detector towards the definition of anomaly provided by the user. The proposed approach is particularly appealing in the presence of a Decision Support System (DSS), a case that is increasingly popular in real-world scenarios. While it is common that DSS embedded with anomaly detection capabilities rely on unsupervised models, they don't have a way to improve their performance: ALIF is able to enhance the capabilities of DSS by exploiting the user feedback during common operations. ALIF is a lightweight modification of the popular Isolation Forest that proved superior performances with respect to other state-of-art algorithms in a multitude of real anomaly detection datasets.
summary: The detection of anomalous behaviours is an emerging need in many applications, particularly in contexts where security and reliability are critical aspects. While the definition of anomaly strictly depends on the domain framework, it is often impractical or too time consuming to obtain a fully labelled dataset. The use of unsupervised models to overcome the lack of labels often fails to catch domain specific anomalies as they rely on general definitions of outlier. This paper suggests a new active learning based approach, ALIF, to solve this problem by reducing the number of required labels and tuning the detector towards the definition of anomaly provided by the user. The proposed approach is particularly appealing in the presence of a Decision Support System (DSS), a case that is increasingly popular in real-world scenarios. While it is common that DSS embedded with anomaly detection capabilities rely on unsupervised models, they don't have a way to improve their performance: ALIF is able to enhance the capabilities of DSS by exploiting the user feedback during common operations. ALIF is a lightweight modification of the popular Isolation Forest that proved superior performances with respect to other state-of-art algorithms in a multitude of real anomaly detection datasets.
abstract_zh: 异常行为的检测是许多应用中的新兴需求，特别是在安全性和可靠性至关重要的情况下。虽然异常的定义严格取决于领域框架，但获取完全标记的数据集通常是不切实际或太耗时的。使用无监督模型来克服标签缺乏的问题通常无法捕获特定领域的异常，因为它们依赖于异常值的一般定义。本文提出了一种新的基于主动学习的方法 ALIF，通过减少所需标签的数量并根据用户提供的异常定义调整检测器来解决此问题。在存在决策支持系统（DSS）的情况下，所提出的方法特别有吸引力，这种情况在现实场景中越来越受欢迎。虽然嵌入异常检测功能的 DSS 通常依赖于无监督模型，但它们没有办法提高其性能：ALIF 能够通过在常见操作期间利用用户反馈来增强 DSS 的功能。 ALIF 是流行的隔离森林的轻量级修改，在大量真实异常检测数据集中证明了相对于其他最先进算法的卓越性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于主动学习的隔离森林（ALIF）方法，通过减少标签需求并结合用户定义的异常标准，提升决策支持系统中的异常检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督异常检测模型难以捕捉领域特定异常，且获取全标注数据成本高，而决策支持系统（DSS）缺乏利用用户反馈优化检测能力的机制。
AI.method: ALIF对经典隔离森林算法进行轻量级改进，引入主动学习框架，通过用户操作中的实时反馈动态调整异常检测阈值，减少标注需求并优化领域特定异常识别。
AI.result: 实验表明ALIF在多个真实异常检测数据集上优于现有先进算法，且在决策支持系统场景中显著提升检测准确率与用户满意度。
AI.conclusion: ALIF通过融合用户反馈机制，有效解决了无监督模型在领域适应性方面的不足，为决策支持系统提供了更精准、可交互的异常检测解决方案。

authors_text: Zahra Atashgahi,Decebal Constantin Mocanu,Raymond Veldhuis,Mykola Pechenizkiy
title: Memory-free Online Change-point Detection: A Novel Neural Network Approach
title_zh: 无记忆在线变化点检测：一种新颖的神经网络方法
abstract: Change-point detection (CPD), which detects abrupt changes in the data distribution, is recognized as one of the most significant tasks in time series analysis. Despite the extensive literature on offline CPD, unsupervised online CPD still suffers from major challenges, including scalability, hyperparameter tuning, and learning constraints. To mitigate some of these challenges, in this paper, we propose a novel deep learning approach for unsupervised online CPD from multi-dimensional time series, named Adaptive LSTM-Autoencoder Change-Point Detection (ALACPD). ALACPD exploits an LSTM-autoencoder-based neural network to perform unsupervised online CPD. It continuously adapts to the incoming samples without keeping the previously received input, thus being memory-free. We perform an extensive evaluation on several real-world time series CPD benchmarks. We show that ALACPD, on average, ranks first among state-of-the-art CPD algorithms in terms of quality of the time series segmentation, and it is on par with the best performer in terms of the accuracy of the estimated change-points. The implementation of ALACPD is available online on Github\footnote{\url{https://github.com/zahraatashgahi/ALACPD}}.
summary: Change-point detection (CPD), which detects abrupt changes in the data distribution, is recognized as one of the most significant tasks in time series analysis. Despite the extensive literature on offline CPD, unsupervised online CPD still suffers from major challenges, including scalability, hyperparameter tuning, and learning constraints. To mitigate some of these challenges, in this paper, we propose a novel deep learning approach for unsupervised online CPD from multi-dimensional time series, named Adaptive LSTM-Autoencoder Change-Point Detection (ALACPD). ALACPD exploits an LSTM-autoencoder-based neural network to perform unsupervised online CPD. It continuously adapts to the incoming samples without keeping the previously received input, thus being memory-free. We perform an extensive evaluation on several real-world time series CPD benchmarks. We show that ALACPD, on average, ranks first among state-of-the-art CPD algorithms in terms of quality of the time series segmentation, and it is on par with the best performer in terms of the accuracy of the estimated change-points. The implementation of ALACPD is available online on Github\footnote{\url{https://github.com/zahraatashgahi/ALACPD}}.
abstract_zh: 变化点检测（CPD）可检测数据分布的突变，被认为是时间序列分析中最重要的任务之一。尽管关于离线 CPD 的文献很多，但无监督的在线 CPD 仍然面临着重大挑战，包括可扩展性、超参数调整和学习限制。为了缓解其中一些挑战，在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的深度学习方法，用于多维时间序列的无监督在线 CPD，称为自适应 LSTM-自动编码器变化点检测（ALACPD）。 ALACPD 利用基于 LSTM 自动编码器的神经网络来执行无监督的在线 CPD。它不断适应传入的样本，而不保留先前接收到的输入，因此是无内存的。我们对几个现实世界的时间序列 CPD 基准进行了广泛的评估。我们表明，平均而言，ALACPD 在时间序列分割质量方面在最先进的 CPD 算法中排名第一，并且在估计变化点的准确性方面与最佳表现者不相上下。 ALACPD 的实现可在 Github\footnote{\url{https://github.com/zahraatashgahi/ALACPD}} 上在线获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需存储历史数据的在线变点检测方法ALACPD，基于LSTM自编码器实现多维时间序列的无监督实时变点检测。
AI.motivation: 现有在线变点检测方法存在可扩展性差、超参数调整困难及学习约束严格等痛点，亟需更高效的实时检测方案。
AI.method: 设计LSTM自编码器架构，通过持续适应新样本实现无记忆在线学习，无需保留历史输入数据即可完成变点检测。
AI.result: 在多个现实时间序列基准数据集上，ALACPD在分割质量指标上平均排名第一，变点定位准确率与当前最优算法相当。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保证检测精度的同时解决了在线学习的记忆约束问题，为实时变点检测提供了新的神经网络解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种无需存储历史数据的在线变点检测方法ALACPD，基于LSTM自编码器实现多维时间序列的无监督实时变点检测。
ai_content.motivation: 现有在线变点检测方法存在可扩展性差、超参数调整困难及学习约束严格等痛点，亟需更高效的实时检测方案。

ai_content.result: 在多个现实时间序列基准数据集上，ALACPD在分割质量指标上平均排名第一，变点定位准确率与当前最优算法相当。
ai_content.conclusion: 该方法在保证检测精度的同时解决了在线学习的记忆约束问题，为实时变点检测提供了新的神经网络解决方案。

authors_text: Matteo Manica,Jannis Born,Joris Cadow,Dimitrios Christofidellis,Ashish Dave,Dean Clarke,Yves Gaetan Nana Teukam,Giorgio Giannone,Samuel C. Hoffman,Matthew Buchan,Vijil Chenthamarakshan,Timothy Donovan,Hsiang Han Hsu,Federico Zipoli,Oliver Schilter,Akihiro Kishimoto,Lisa Hamada,Inkit Padhi,Karl Wehden,Lauren McHugh,Alexy Khrabrov,Payel Das,Seiji Takeda,John R. title: Accelerating Material Design with the Generative Toolkit for Scientific Discovery
title_zh: 使用科学发现生成工具包加速材料设计
abstract: With the growing availability of data within various scientific domains, generative models hold enormous potential to accelerate scientific discovery. They harness powerful representations learned from datasets to speed up the formulation of novel hypotheses with the potential to impact material discovery broadly. We present the Generative Toolkit for Scientific Discovery (GT4SD). This extensible open-source library enables scientists, developers, and researchers to train and use state-of-the-art generative models to accelerate scientific discovery focused on material design.
summary: With the growing availability of data within various scientific domains, generative models hold enormous potential to accelerate scientific discovery. They harness powerful representations learned from datasets to speed up the formulation of novel hypotheses with the potential to impact material discovery broadly. We present the Generative Toolkit for Scientific Discovery (GT4SD). This extensible open-source library enables scientists, developers, and researchers to train and use state-of-the-art generative models to accelerate scientific discovery focused on material design.
abstract_zh: 随着各个科学领域数据的可用性不断增加，生成模型在加速科学发现方面具有巨大的潜力。他们利用从数据集中学到的强大表征来加速新假设的制定，并有可能广泛影响材料发现。我们提出了科学发现生成工具包（GT4SD）。这个可扩展的开源库使科学家、开发人员和研究人员能够训练和使用最先进的生成模型来加速专注于材料设计的科学发现。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一种名为GT4SD的生成工具包，用于加速材料设计领域的科学发现。
AI.motivation: 随着科学领域数据的不断增长，生成模型在加速科学发现方面展现出巨大潜力，特别是在材料设计领域。
AI.method: 本文提出了一个可扩展的开源库GT4SD，使科学家、开发者和研究人员能够训练和使用先进的生成模型，以加速材料设计的科学发现。
AI.result: GT4SD提供了一个灵活且高效的工具，能够帮助研究人员在材料设计中快速生成和验证新假设。
AI.conclusion: GT4SD为材料设计领域的科学发现提供了强大的工具支持，有助于推动相关研究的发展。

authors_text: Sheng Kuang,Jie Shi,Kiki van der Heijden,Siamak Mehrkanoon
title: BAST: Binaural Audio Spectrogram Transformer for Binaural Sound Localization
title_zh: BAST：用于双耳声音定位的双耳音频频谱图变压器
abstract: Accurate sound localization in a reverberation environment is essential for human auditory perception. Recently, Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) have been utilized to model the binaural human auditory pathway. However, CNN shows barriers in capturing the global acoustic features. To address this issue, we propose a novel end-to-end Binaural Audio Spectrogram Transformer (BAST) model to predict the sound azimuth in both anechoic and reverberation environments. Two modes of implementation, i.e. BAST-SP and BAST-NSP corresponding to BAST model with shared and non-shared parameters respectively, are explored. Our model with subtraction interaural integration and hybrid loss achieves an angular distance of 1.29 degrees and a Mean Square Error of 1e-3 at all azimuths, significantly surpassing CNN based model. The exploratory analysis of the BAST's performance on the left-right hemifields and anechoic and reverberation environments shows its generalization ability as well as the feasibility of binaural Transformers in sound localization. Furthermore, the analysis of the attention maps is provided to give additional insights on the interpretation of the localization process in a natural reverberant environment.
summary: Accurate sound localization in a reverberation environment is essential for human auditory perception. Recently, Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) have been utilized to model the binaural human auditory pathway. However, CNN shows barriers in capturing the global acoustic features. To address this issue, we propose a novel end-to-end Binaural Audio Spectrogram Transformer (BAST) model to predict the sound azimuth in both anechoic and reverberation environments. Two modes of implementation, i.e. BAST-SP and BAST-NSP corresponding to BAST model with shared and non-shared parameters respectively, are explored. Our model with subtraction interaural integration and hybrid loss achieves an angular distance of 1.29 degrees and a Mean Square Error of 1e-3 at all azimuths, significantly surpassing CNN based model. The exploratory analysis of the BAST's performance on the left-right hemifields and anechoic and reverberation environments shows its generalization ability as well as the feasibility of binaural Transformers in sound localization. Furthermore, the analysis of the attention maps is provided to give additional insights on the interpretation of the localization process in a natural reverberant environment.
abstract_zh: 混响环境中准确的声音定位对于人类听觉感知至关重要。最近，卷积神经网络（CNN）已被用来模拟人类双耳听觉通路。然而，CNN 在捕获全局声学特征方面存在障碍。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的端到端双耳音频频谱图变换器（BAST）模型来预测消声和混响环境中的声音方位角。探索了两种实现模式，即分别对应于具有共享和非共享参数的BAST模型的BAST-SP和BAST-NSP。我们的模型采用减法耳间积分和混合损失，在所有方位角上实现了 1.29 度的角距离和 1e-3 的均方误差，显着超过了基于 CNN 的模型。对 BAST 在左右半场以及消声和混响环境中的性能进行探索性分析，显示了其泛化能力以及双耳 Transformer 在声音定位方面的可行性。此外，还提供了注意力图的分析，以便对自然混响环境中的定位过程的解释提供更多见解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为BAST的双耳音频频谱变换器模型，用于在混响环境中实现高精度的声音定位。
AI.motivation: 尽管卷积神经网络（CNN）已被用于建模双耳听觉路径，但其在捕捉全局声学特征方面存在局限性，因此需要一种新的方法来解决这一问题。
AI.method: 作者提出了一种端到端的BAST模型，分别通过共享参数和非共享参数的两种实现方式（BAST-SP和BAST-NSP），并结合双耳积分和混合损失函数进行训练。
AI.result: BAST模型在所有方位角上实现了1.29度的角距离和1e-3的均方误差，显著优于基于CNN的模型，并展示了其在左右半场和无混响/混响环境中的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: BAST模型证明了双耳变换器在声音定位任务中的可行性，并通过注意力图分析为自然混响环境下的定位过程提供了额外的解释性见解。

authors_text: Sejin Seo,Jihong Park,Seung-Woo Ko,Jinho Choi,Mehdi Bennis,Seong-Lyun Kim
title: Towards Semantic Communication Protocols: A Probabilistic Logic Perspective
title_zh: 走向语义通信协议：概率逻辑视角
abstract: Classical medium access control (MAC) protocols are interpretable, yet their task-agnostic control signaling messages (CMs) are ill-suited for emerging mission-critical applications. By contrast, neural network (NN) based protocol models (NPMs) learn to generate task-specific CMs, but their rationale and impact lack interpretability. To fill this void, in this article we propose, for the first time, a semantic protocol model (SPM) constructed by transforming an NPM into an interpretable symbolic graph written in the probabilistic logic programming language (ProbLog). This transformation is viable by extracting and merging common CMs and their connections while treating the NPM as a CM generator. By extensive simulations, we corroborate that the SPM tightly approximates its original NPM while occupying only 0.02% memory. By leveraging its interpretability and memory-efficiency, we demonstrate several SPM-enabled applications such as SPM reconfiguration for collision-avoidance, as well as comparing different SPMs via semantic entropy calculation and storing multiple SPMs to cope with non-stationary environments.
summary: Classical medium access control (MAC) protocols are interpretable, yet their task-agnostic control signaling messages (CMs) are ill-suited for emerging mission-critical applications. By contrast, neural network (NN) based protocol models (NPMs) learn to generate task-specific CMs, but their rationale and impact lack interpretability. To fill this void, in this article we propose, for the first time, a semantic protocol model (SPM) constructed by transforming an NPM into an interpretable symbolic graph written in the probabilistic logic programming language (ProbLog). This transformation is viable by extracting and merging common CMs and their connections while treating the NPM as a CM generator. By extensive simulations, we corroborate that the SPM tightly approximates its original NPM while occupying only 0.02% memory. By leveraging its interpretability and memory-efficiency, we demonstrate several SPM-enabled applications such as SPM reconfiguration for collision-avoidance, as well as comparing different SPMs via semantic entropy calculation and storing multiple SPMs to cope with non-stationary environments.
abstract_zh: 经典的媒体访问控制 (MAC) 协议是可解释的，但其与任务无关的控制信令消息 (CM) 不适合新兴的关键任务应用。相比之下，基于神经网络 (NN) 的协议模型 (NPM) 学习生成特定于任务的 CM，但其基本原理和影响缺乏可解释性。为了填补这一空白，在本文中，我们首次提出了一种语义协议模型（SPM），该模型通过将 NPM 转换为用概率逻辑编程语言（ProbLog）编写的可解释符号图来构建。通过提取和合并常见的 CM 及其连接，同时将 NPM 视为 CM 生成器，这种转换是可行的。通过大量模拟，我们证实 SPM 与其原始 NPM 非常接近，同时仅占用 0.02% 的内存。通过利用其可解释性和内存效率，我们演示了几种支持 SPM 的应用程序，例如用于避免冲突的 SPM 重新配置，以及通过语义熵计算比较不同的 SPM 以及存储多个 SPM 以应对非平稳环境。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于概率逻辑编程语言（ProbLog）的语义协议模型（SPM），将神经网络协议模型（NPM）转化为可解释的符号图，以解决传统MAC协议与神经网络协议模型在可解释性与任务适应性之间的矛盾。
AI.motivation: 传统MAC协议虽可解释但无法适应任务需求，神经网络协议模型（NPM）虽能生成任务特定控制信号但缺乏可解释性，需在可解释性与任务适应性之间寻找平衡。
AI.method: 通过将NPM视为控制信号生成器，提取并合并通用控制信号及其连接关系，将其转化为ProbLog语言的符号图，构建可解释的语义协议模型（SPM）。
AI.result: SPM在仅占用原NPM 0.02%内存的情况下紧密逼近其性能，并支持碰撞规避重构、语义熵比较及非平稳环境下的多模型存储等应用。
AI.conclusion: SPM通过概率逻辑编程实现了神经网络协议模型的可解释性与内存效率，为动态环境下的语义通信协议设计提供了新方法。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于概率逻辑编程语言（ProbLog）的语义协议模型（SPM），将神经网络协议模型（NPM）转化为可解释的符号图，以解决传统MAC协议与神经网络协议模型在可解释性与任务适应性之间的矛盾。

search_text: Towards Semantic Communication Protocols: A Probabilistic Logic Perspective 走向语义通信协议：概率逻辑视角 Classical medium access control (MAC) protocols are interpretable, yet their task-agnostic control signaling messages (CMs) are ill-suited for emerging mission-critical applications. By contrast, neural network (NN) based protocol models (NPMs) learn to generate task-specific CMs, but their rationale and impact lack interpretability. To fill this void, in this article we propose, for the first time, a semantic protocol model (SPM) constructed by transforming an NPM into an interpretable symbolic graph written in the probabilistic logic programming language (ProbLog). This transformation is viable by extracting and merging common CMs and their connections while treating the NPM as a CM generator. By extensive simulations, we corroborate that the SPM tightly approximates its original NPM while occupying only 0.02% memory. By leveraging its interpretability and memory-efficiency, we demonstrate several SPM-enabled applications such as SPM reconfiguration for collision-avoidance, as well as comparing different SPMs via semantic entropy calculation and storing multiple SPMs to cope with non-stationary environments. 经典的媒体访问控制 (MAC) 协议是可解释的，但其与任务无关的控制信令消息 (CM) 不适合新兴的关键任务应用。相比之下，基于神经网络 (NN) 的协议模型 (NPM) 学习生成特定于任务的 CM，但其基本原理和影响缺乏可解释性。为了填补这一空白，在本文中，我们首次提出了一种语义协议模型（SPM），该模型通过将 NPM 转换为用概率逻辑编程语言（ProbLog）编写的可解释符号图来构建。通过提取和合并常见的 CM 及其连接，同时将 NPM 视为 CM 生成器，这种转换是可行的。通过大量模拟，我们证实 SPM 与其原始 NPM 非常接近，同时仅占用 0.02% 的内存。通过利用其可解释性和内存效率，我们演示了几种支持 SPM 的应用程序，例如用于避免冲突的 SPM 重新配置，以及通过语义熵计算比较不同的 SPM 以及存储多个 SPM 以应对非平稳环境。 本文提出一种基于概率逻辑编程语言（ProbLog）的语义协议模型（SPM），将神经网络协议模型（NPM）转化为可解释的符号图，以解决传统MAC协议与神经网络协议模型在可解释性与任务适应性之间的矛盾。 Sejin Seo,Jihong Park,Seung-Woo Ko,Jinho Choi,Mehdi Bennis,Seong-Lyun Kim cs.IT,cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.NI

authors_text: Jinpeng Li,Haibo Jin,Shengcai Liao,Ling Shao,Pheng-Ann Heng
title: RePFormer: Refinement Pyramid Transformer for Robust Facial Landmark Detection
title_zh: RePFormer：用于稳健面部标志检测的细化金字塔变压器
abstract: This paper presents a Refinement Pyramid Transformer (RePFormer) for robust facial landmark detection. Most facial landmark detectors focus on learning representative image features. However, these CNN-based feature representations are not robust enough to handle complex real-world scenarios due to ignoring the internal structure of landmarks, as well as the relations between landmarks and context. In this work, we formulate the facial landmark detection task as refining landmark queries along pyramid memories. Specifically, a pyramid transformer head (PTH) is introduced to build both homologous relations among landmarks and heterologous relations between landmarks and cross-scale contexts. Besides, a dynamic landmark refinement (DLR) module is designed to decompose the landmark regression into an end-to-end refinement procedure, where the dynamically aggregated queries are transformed to residual coordinates predictions. Extensive experimental results on four facial landmark detection benchmarks and their various subsets demonstrate the superior performance and high robustness of our framework.
summary: This paper presents a Refinement Pyramid Transformer (RePFormer) for robust facial landmark detection. Most facial landmark detectors focus on learning representative image features. However, these CNN-based feature representations are not robust enough to handle complex real-world scenarios due to ignoring the internal structure of landmarks, as well as the relations between landmarks and context. In this work, we formulate the facial landmark detection task as refining landmark queries along pyramid memories. Specifically, a pyramid transformer head (PTH) is introduced to build both homologous relations among landmarks and heterologous relations between landmarks and cross-scale contexts. Besides, a dynamic landmark refinement (DLR) module is designed to decompose the landmark regression into an end-to-end refinement procedure, where the dynamically aggregated queries are transformed to residual coordinates predictions. Extensive experimental results on four facial landmark detection benchmarks and their various subsets demonstrate the superior performance and high robustness of our framework.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种用于鲁棒面部特征点检测的细化金字塔变换器（RePFormer）。大多数面部标志检测器专注于学习代表性图像特征。然而，由于忽略了地标的内部结构以及地标与上下文之间的关系，这些基于 CNN 的特征表示不够鲁棒，无法处理复杂的现实场景。在这项工作中，我们将面部标志检测任务制定为沿着金字塔记忆细化标志查询。具体来说，引入金字塔变压器头（PTH）来构建地标之间的同源关系以及地标和跨尺度上下文之间的异源关系。此外，动态地标细化（DLR）模块旨在将地标回归分解为端到端细化过程，其中动态聚合查询被转换为残差坐标预测。对四个面部标志检测基准及其各个子集的广泛实验结果证明了我们的框架的卓越性能和高鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为RePFormer的金字塔变换器模型，用于提升复杂场景下的人脸关键点检测鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于CNN的人脸关键点检测方法因忽略关键点内部结构及与上下文的关系，难以应对复杂真实场景的挑战。
AI.method: 通过引入金字塔变换器头（PTH）建立关键点间同源关系与跨尺度上下文异源关系，并设计动态关键点精炼模块（DLR）实现端到端坐标预测。
AI.result: 在四个主流人脸关键点检测基准数据集及其子集上均取得优于现有方法的性能表现，验证了框架的优越性和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: RePFormer通过建模关键点结构关系与上下文交互，有效解决了复杂场景下人脸关键点检测的鲁棒性问题。

authors_text: Tianwen Zhang,Xiaoling Zhang
title: A Mask Attention Interaction and Scale Enhancement Network for SAR Ship Instance Segmentation
title_zh: 用于 SAR 船舶实例分割的掩模注意力交互和规模增强网络
abstract: Most of existing synthetic aperture radar (SAR) ship in-stance segmentation models do not achieve mask interac-tion or offer limited interaction performance. Besides, their multi-scale ship instance segmentation performance is moderate especially for small ships. To solve these problems, we propose a mask attention interaction and scale enhancement network (MAI-SE-Net) for SAR ship instance segmentation. MAI uses an atrous spatial pyra-mid pooling (ASPP) to gain multi-resolution feature re-sponses, a non-local block (NLB) to model long-range spa-tial dependencies, and a concatenation shuffle attention block (CSAB) to improve interaction benefits. SE uses a content-aware reassembly of features block (CARAFEB) to generate an extra pyramid bottom-level to boost small ship performance, a feature balance operation (FBO) to improve scale feature description, and a global context block (GCB) to refine features. Experimental results on two public SSDD and HRSID datasets reveal that MAI-SE-Net outperforms the other nine competitive models, better than the suboptimal model by 4.7% detec-tion AP and 3.4% segmentation AP on SSDD and by 3.0% detection AP and 2.4% segmentation AP on HRSID.
summary: Most of existing synthetic aperture radar (SAR) ship in-stance segmentation models do not achieve mask interac-tion or offer limited interaction performance. Besides, their multi-scale ship instance segmentation performance is moderate especially for small ships. To solve these problems, we propose a mask attention interaction and scale enhancement network (MAI-SE-Net) for SAR ship instance segmentation. MAI uses an atrous spatial pyra-mid pooling (ASPP) to gain multi-resolution feature re-sponses, a non-local block (NLB) to model long-range spa-tial dependencies, and a concatenation shuffle attention block (CSAB) to improve interaction benefits. SE uses a content-aware reassembly of features block (CARAFEB) to generate an extra pyramid bottom-level to boost small ship performance, a feature balance operation (FBO) to improve scale feature description, and a global context block (GCB) to refine features. Experimental results on two public SSDD and HRSID datasets reveal that MAI-SE-Net outperforms the other nine competitive models, better than the suboptimal model by 4.7% detec-tion AP and 3.4% segmentation AP on SSDD and by 3.0% detection AP and 2.4% segmentation AP on HRSID.
abstract_zh: 大多数现有的合成孔径雷达（SAR）船舶实例分割模型无法实现掩模交互或提供有限的交互性能。此外，它们的多尺度船舶实例分割性能中等，尤其是对于小型船舶。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种用于 SAR 船舶实例分割的掩模注意交互和尺度增强网络（MAI-SE-Net）。 MAI 使用多孔空间金字塔池 (ASPP) 来获得多分辨率特征响应，使用非局部块 (NLB) 来建模远程空间依赖性，并使用串联洗牌注意块 (CSAB) 来提高交互效果。 SE 使用内容感知的特征重组块 (CARAFEB) 来生成额外的金字塔底层以提高小型船舶性能，使用特征平衡操作 (FBO) 来改进尺度特征描述，并使用全局上下文块 (GCB) 来细化特征。在两个公共 SSDD 和 HRSID 数据集上的实验结果表明，MAI-SE-Net 优于其他 9 个竞争模型，在 SSDD 上比次优模型好 4.7% 的检测 AP 和 3.4% 的分割 AP，在 HRSID 上比次优模型好 3.0% 的检测 AP 和 2.4% 的分割 AP。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于合成孔径雷达（SAR）船舶实例分割的掩码注意力交互与尺度增强网络（MAI-SE-Net）。
AI.motivation: 现有SAR船舶实例分割模型在掩码交互性能不足且对小船的多尺度分割效果有限，需改进交互机制与尺度适应性。
AI.method: MAI模块结合空洞空间金字塔池化（ASPP）、非局部块（NLB）和拼接洗牌注意力块（CSAB）增强特征交互；SE模块通过内容感知重组装特征块（CARAFEB）、特征平衡操作（FBO）和全局上下文块（GCB）优化尺度特征描述。
AI.result: 在SSDD和HRSID数据集上，MAI-SE-Net分别优于其他九种模型4.7%/3.4%和3.0%/2.4%的检测与分割平均精度（AP）。
AI.conclusion: MAI-SE-Net通过融合注意力交互与尺度增强机制，显著提升了SAR船舶实例分割的精度与鲁棒性。

To solve these problems, we propose a mask attention interaction and scale enhancement network (MAI-SE-Net) for SAR ship instance segmentation. MAI uses an atrous spatial pyra-mid pooling (ASPP) to gain multi-resolution feature re-sponses, a non-local block (NLB) to model long-range spa-tial dependencies, and a concatenation shuffle attention block (CSAB) to improve interaction benefits. SE uses a content-aware reassembly of features block (CARAFEB) to generate an extra pyramid bottom-level to boost small ship performance, a feature balance operation (FBO) to improve scale feature description, and a global context block (GCB) to refine features. Experimental results on two public SSDD and HRSID datasets reveal that MAI-SE-Net outperforms the other nine competitive models, better than the suboptimal model by 4.7% detec-tion AP and 3.4% segmentation AP on SSDD and by 3.0% detection AP and 2.4% segmentation AP on HRSID. 大多数现有的合成孔径雷达（SAR）船舶实例分割模型无法实现掩模交互或提供有限的交互性能。此外，它们的多尺度船舶实例分割性能中等，尤其是对于小型船舶。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种用于 SAR 船舶实例分割的掩模注意交互和尺度增强网络（MAI-SE-Net）。 MAI 使用多孔空间金字塔池 (ASPP) 来获得多分辨率特征响应，使用非局部块 (NLB) 来建模远程空间依赖性，并使用串联洗牌注意块 (CSAB) 来提高交互效果。 SE 使用内容感知的特征重组块 (CARAFEB) 来生成额外的金字塔底层以提高小型船舶性能，使用特征平衡操作 (FBO) 来改进尺度特征描述，并使用全局上下文块 (GCB) 来细化特征。在两个公共 SSDD 和 HRSID 数据集上的实验结果表明，MAI-SE-Net 优于其他 9 个竞争模型，在 SSDD 上比次优模型好 4.7% 的检测 AP 和 3.4% 的分割 AP，在 HRSID 上比次优模型好 3.0% 的检测 AP 和 2.4% 的分割 AP。 本文提出一种用于合成孔径雷达（SAR）船舶实例分割的掩码注意力交互与尺度增强网络（MAI-SE-Net）。 Tianwen Zhang,Xiaoling Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Shunyu Liu,Jie Song,Yihe Zhou,Na Yu,Kaixuan Chen,Zunlei Feng,Mingli Song
title: Interaction Pattern Disentangling for Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 多智能体强化学习的交互模式解缠
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence (TPAMI)
comments: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence (TPAMI)
abstract: Deep cooperative multi-agent reinforcement learning has demonstrated its remarkable success over a wide spectrum of complex control tasks. However, recent advances in multi-agent learning mainly focus on value decomposition while leaving entity interactions still intertwined, which easily leads to over-fitting on noisy interactions between entities. In this work, we introduce a novel interactiOn Pattern disenTangling (OPT) method, to disentangle the entity interactions into interaction prototypes, each of which represents an underlying interaction pattern within a subgroup of the entities. OPT facilitates filtering the noisy interactions between irrelevant entities and thus significantly improves generalizability as well as interpretability. Specifically, OPT introduces a sparse disagreement mechanism to encourage sparsity and diversity among discovered interaction prototypes. Then the model selectively restructures these prototypes into a compact interaction pattern by an aggregator with learnable weights. To alleviate the training instability issue caused by partial observability, we propose to maximize the mutual information between the aggregation weights and the history behaviors of each agent. Experiments on single-task, multi-task and zero-shot benchmarks demonstrate that the proposed method yields results superior to the state-of-the-art counterparts. Our code is available at https://github.com/liushunyu/OPT.
summary: Deep cooperative multi-agent reinforcement learning has demonstrated its remarkable success over a wide spectrum of complex control tasks. However, recent advances in multi-agent learning mainly focus on value decomposition while leaving entity interactions still intertwined, which easily leads to over-fitting on noisy interactions between entities. In this work, we introduce a novel interactiOn Pattern disenTangling (OPT) method, to disentangle the entity interactions into interaction prototypes, each of which represents an underlying interaction pattern within a subgroup of the entities. OPT facilitates filtering the noisy interactions between irrelevant entities and thus significantly improves generalizability as well as interpretability. Specifically, OPT introduces a sparse disagreement mechanism to encourage sparsity and diversity among discovered interaction prototypes. Then the model selectively restructures these prototypes into a compact interaction pattern by an aggregator with learnable weights. To alleviate the training instability issue caused by partial observability, we propose to maximize the mutual information between the aggregation weights and the history behaviors of each agent. Experiments on single-task, multi-task and zero-shot benchmarks demonstrate that the proposed method yields results superior to the state-of-the-art counterparts. Our code is available at https://github.com/liushunyu/OPT.
abstract_zh: 深度协作多智能体强化学习已在广泛的复杂控制任务中展现出显着的成功。然而，多智能体学习的最新进展主要集中在价值分解，而实体交互仍然交织在一起，这很容易导致实体之间的噪声交互过拟合。在这项工作中，我们引入了一种新颖的交互模式解缠（OPT）方法，将实体交互分解为交互原型，每个原型代表实体子组内的底层交互模式。 OPT 有助于过滤不相关实体之间的噪声交互，从而显着提高普遍性和可解释性。具体来说，OPT 引入了稀疏分歧机制，以鼓励发现的交互原型之间的稀疏性和多样性。然后，该模型通过具有可学习权重的聚合器有选择地将这些原型重组为紧凑的交互模式。为了缓解部分可观测性引起的训练不稳定问题，我们建议最大化聚合权重和每个代理的历史行为之间的互信息。单任务、多任务和零样本基准的实验表明，所提出的方法产生的结果优于最先进的同行。我们的代码可以在 https://github.com/liushunyu/OPT 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为OPT的方法，用于在多智能体强化学习中解耦实体间的交互模式，以提升模型的泛化能力和可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法主要关注值分解，未能有效解耦实体间的复杂交互，导致模型容易过拟合噪声交互，影响泛化性和可解释性。
AI.method: OPT通过稀疏分歧机制生成交互原型，利用可学习权重的聚合器重构原型，并最大化聚合权重与智能体历史行为的互信息以缓解部分可观测性带来的训练不稳定性。
AI.result: 在单任务、多任务和零样本基准测试中，OPT的表现优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: OPT通过解耦噪声交互并提取潜在交互模式，显著提升了多智能体强化学习的泛化能力与可解释性。

authors_text: Cyprien Tamekue,Dario Prandi,Yacine Chitour
title: Reproducing sensory induced hallucinations via neural fields
title_zh: 通过神经场再现感官诱发的幻觉
abstract: Understanding sensory-induced cortical patterns in the primary visual cortex V1 is an important challenge both for physiological motivations and for improving our understanding of human perception and visual organisation. In this work, we focus on pattern formation in the visual cortex when the cortical activity is driven by a geometric visual hallucination-like stimulus. In particular, we present a theoretical framework for sensory-induced hallucinations which allows one to reproduce novel psychophysical results such as the MacKay effect (Nature, 1957) and the Billock and Tsou experiences (PNAS, 2007).
summary: Understanding sensory-induced cortical patterns in the primary visual cortex V1 is an important challenge both for physiological motivations and for improving our understanding of human perception and visual organisation. In this work, we focus on pattern formation in the visual cortex when the cortical activity is driven by a geometric visual hallucination-like stimulus. In particular, we present a theoretical framework for sensory-induced hallucinations which allows one to reproduce novel psychophysical results such as the MacKay effect (Nature, 1957) and the Billock and Tsou experiences (PNAS, 2007).
abstract_zh: 了解初级视觉皮层 V1 中感觉诱发的皮层模式对于生理动机和提高我们对人类感知和视觉组织的理解都是一个重要的挑战。在这项工作中，我们重点关注当皮层活动受到几何视觉幻觉样刺激驱动时视觉皮层的模式形成。特别是，我们提出了一种感官诱发幻觉的理论框架，它允许人们重现新颖的心理物理学结果，例如麦凯效应（Nature，1957）以及 Billock 和 Tsou 经验（PNAS，2007）。

AI.tldr: 该论文通过神经场模型再现感官诱导的视觉幻觉现象，并解释相关心理物理效应的形成机制。
AI.motivation: 理解初级视觉皮层V1的感官诱导模式对揭示人类感知机制和视觉组织原理具有重要意义。
AI.method: 构建理论框架结合神经场模型与数学分析，模拟几何幻觉刺激下的皮层活动模式。
AI.result: 成功重现MacKay效应（1957）及Billock和Tsou实验（2007）等经典心理物理现象。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为解析视觉皮层动态模式及幻觉生成机制提供了新的理论工具。

authors_text: Yulai Cong,Miaoyun Zhao
title: Big Learning
title_zh: 大学习
abstract: Recent advances in big/foundation models reveal a promising path for deep learning, where the roadmap steadily moves from big data to big models to (the newly-introduced) big learning. Specifically, the big learning exhaustively exploits the information inherent in its large-scale complete/incomplete training data, by simultaneously modeling many/all joint/conditional/marginal data distributions across potentially diverse domains, with one universal foundation model. We reveal that big learning ($i$) underlies most existing foundation models, ($ii$) is equipped with extraordinary flexibilities for complete/incomplete training data and trustworthy data tasks, ($iii$) is capable of delivering all joint/conditional/marginal data capabilities with one universal model, and ($iv$) unifies conventional machine learning paradigms and enables their flexible cooperations, manifested as a universal learning paradigm. Diverse experiments are carried out to validate the effectiveness of the presented big learning.
summary: Recent advances in big/foundation models reveal a promising path for deep learning, where the roadmap steadily moves from big data to big models to (the newly-introduced) big learning. Specifically, the big learning exhaustively exploits the information inherent in its large-scale complete/incomplete training data, by simultaneously modeling many/all joint/conditional/marginal data distributions across potentially diverse domains, with one universal foundation model. We reveal that big learning ($i$) underlies most existing foundation models, ($ii$) is equipped with extraordinary flexibilities for complete/incomplete training data and trustworthy data tasks, ($iii$) is capable of delivering all joint/conditional/marginal data capabilities with one universal model, and ($iv$) unifies conventional machine learning paradigms and enables their flexible cooperations, manifested as a universal learning paradigm. Diverse experiments are carried out to validate the effectiveness of the presented big learning.
abstract_zh: 大/基础模型的最新进展揭示了深度学习的一条有希望的道路，路线图稳步从大数据到大模型，再到（新引入的）大学习。具体来说，大学习通过使用一个通用基础模型同时对跨潜在不同领域的许多/所有联合/条件/边缘数据分布进行建模，详尽地利用其大规模完整/不完整训练数据中固有的信息。我们揭示了大学习（$i$）是大多数现有基础模型的基础，（$ii$）对于完整/不完整的训练数据和可信数据任务具有非凡的灵活性，（$iii$）能够通过一个通用模型提供所有联合/条件/边缘数据能力，（$iv$）统一传统的机器学习范式并实现它们的灵活合作，表现为一种通用学习范式。进行了各种实验来验证所提出的大学习的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出并验证了'大学习'作为统一的学习范式，通过通用基础模型处理多领域数据分布，实现跨任务联合建模。
AI.motivation: 传统深度学习在处理大数据和多领域任务时存在局限，而现有基础模型尚未形成系统性理论框架，需探索更通用的学习范式。
AI.method: 构建通用基础模型同时建模联合/条件/边缘分布，利用大规模完整/不完整数据，整合传统机器学习范式实现灵活协作。
AI.result: 实验验证了大学习在多任务场景下的有效性，证明其能统一传统方法并实现跨领域数据能力的集成。
AI.conclusion: 大学习作为新型范式，通过单一模型实现多分布建模与传统方法融合，为复杂任务提供灵活解决方案。

tldr: 本文提出并验证了'大学习'作为统一的学习范式，通过通用基础模型处理多领域数据分布，实现跨任务联合建模。
motivation: 传统深度学习在处理大数据和多领域任务时存在局限，而现有基础模型尚未形成系统性理论框架，需探索更通用的学习范式。

result: 实验验证了大学习在多任务场景下的有效性，证明其能统一传统方法并实现跨领域数据能力的集成。
conclusion: 大学习作为新型范式，通过单一模型实现多分布建模与传统方法融合，为复杂任务提供灵活解决方案。
search_text: Big Learning 大学习 Recent advances in big/foundation models reveal a promising path for deep learning, where the roadmap steadily moves from big data to big models to (the newly-introduced) big learning. Specifically, the big learning exhaustively exploits the information inherent in its large-scale complete/incomplete training data, by simultaneously modeling many/all joint/conditional/marginal data distributions across potentially diverse domains, with one universal foundation model. We reveal that big learning ($i$) underlies most existing foundation models, ($ii$) is equipped with extraordinary flexibilities for complete/incomplete training data and trustworthy data tasks, ($iii$) is capable of delivering all joint/conditional/marginal data capabilities with one universal model, and ($iv$) unifies conventional machine learning paradigms and enables their flexible cooperations, manifested as a universal learning paradigm. Diverse experiments are carried out to validate the effectiveness of the presented big learning. 大/基础模型的最新进展揭示了深度学习的一条有希望的道路，路线图稳步从大数据到大模型，再到（新引入的）大学习。具体来说，大学习通过使用一个通用基础模型同时对跨潜在不同领域的许多/所有联合/条件/边缘数据分布进行建模，详尽地利用其大规模完整/不完整训练数据中固有的信息。我们揭示了大学习（$i$）是大多数现有基础模型的基础，（$ii$）对于完整/不完整的训练数据和可信数据任务具有非凡的灵活性，（$iii$）能够通过一个通用模型提供所有联合/条件/边缘数据能力，（$iv$）统一传统的机器学习范式并实现它们的灵活合作，表现为一种通用学习范式。进行了各种实验来验证所提出的大学习的有效性。 本文提出并验证了'大学习'作为统一的学习范式，通过通用基础模型处理多领域数据分布，实现跨任务联合建模。 Yulai Cong,Miaoyun Zhao cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Haripriya Harikumar,Santu Rana,Kien Do,Sunil Gupta,Wei Zong,Willy Susilo,Svetha Venkastesh
title: Defense Against Multi-target Trojan Attacks
title_zh: 防御多目标木马攻击
abstract: Adversarial attacks on deep learning-based models pose a significant threat to the current AI infrastructure. Among them, Trojan attacks are the hardest to defend against. In this paper, we first introduce a variation of the Badnet kind of attacks that introduces Trojan backdoors to multiple target classes and allows triggers to be placed anywhere in the image. The former makes it more potent and the latter makes it extremely easy to carry out the attack in the physical space. The state-of-the-art Trojan detection methods fail with this threat model. To defend against this attack, we first introduce a trigger reverse-engineering mechanism that uses multiple images to recover a variety of potential triggers. We then propose a detection mechanism by measuring the transferability of such recovered triggers. A Trojan trigger will have very high transferability i.e. they make other images also go to the same class. We study many practical advantages of our attack method and then demonstrate the detection performance using a variety of image datasets. The experimental results show the superior detection performance of our method over the state-of-the-arts.
summary: Adversarial attacks on deep learning-based models pose a significant threat to the current AI infrastructure. Among them, Trojan attacks are the hardest to defend against. In this paper, we first introduce a variation of the Badnet kind of attacks that introduces Trojan backdoors to multiple target classes and allows triggers to be placed anywhere in the image. The former makes it more potent and the latter makes it extremely easy to carry out the attack in the physical space. The state-of-the-art Trojan detection methods fail with this threat model. To defend against this attack, we first introduce a trigger reverse-engineering mechanism that uses multiple images to recover a variety of potential triggers. We then propose a detection mechanism by measuring the transferability of such recovered triggers. A Trojan trigger will have very high transferability i.e. they make other images also go to the same class. We study many practical advantages of our attack method and then demonstrate the detection performance using a variety of image datasets. The experimental results show the superior detection performance of our method over the state-of-the-arts.
abstract_zh: 针对基于深度学习的模型的对抗性攻击对当前的人工智能基础设施构成了重大威胁。其中，木马攻击是最难防御的。在本文中，我们首先介绍 Badnet 类型攻击的一种变体，它将特洛伊木马后门引入多个目标类别，并允许将触发器放置在图像中的任何位置。前者让其威力更强，后者则让物理空间的攻击变得极其容易。最先进的特洛伊木马检测方法无法应对这种威胁模型。为了防御这种攻击，我们首先引入一种触发逆向工程机制，该机制使用多个图像来恢复各种潜在的触发。然后，我们通过测量此类恢复的触发器的可转移性来提出一种检测机制。特洛伊木马触发器将具有非常高的可转移性，即它们使其他图像也进入同一类。我们研究了我们的攻击方法的许多实际优点，然后使用各种图像数据集演示了检测性能。实验结果表明我们的方法比最先进的方法具有优越的检测性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对多目标木马攻击的防御方法，通过逆向工程恢复触发器并检测其可迁移性。
AI.motivation: 现有木马检测方法无法有效应对多目标且触发器位置灵活的新型攻击，亟需新的防御机制。
AI.method: 通过多图像恢复潜在触发器，并利用触发器的高可迁移性特征进行检测。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在多种数据集上的检测性能优于现有最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的检测方法能有效应对多目标木马攻击，为防御此类攻击提供了新思路。

authors_text: Christian Vitale,Panayiotis Kolios,Georgios Ellinas
title: Periodic and Event-Triggering for Joint Capacity Maximization and Safe Intersection Crossing
title_zh: 定期和事件触发，实现联合能力最大化和安全交叉口穿越
comment: ef:IEEE 96th Vehicular Technology Conference (VTC2022-Fall), London, England and Beijing, China, September 2022
comments: ef:IEEE 96th Vehicular Technology Conference (VTC2022-Fall), London, England and Beijing, China, September 2022
abstract: Intersection crossing represents a bottleneck for transportation systems and Connected Autonomous Vehicles (CAVs) may be the groundbreaking solution to the problem. This work proposes a novel framework, i.e, AVOID-PERIOD, where an Intersection Manager (IM) controls CAVs approaching an intersection in order to maximize intersection capacity while minimizing the CAVs' gas consumption. Contrary to most of the works in the literature, the CAVs' location uncertainty is accounted for and periodic communication and re-optimization allows for the creation of safe trajectories for the CAVs. To improve scalability for high-traffic intersections, an event-triggering approach is also developed (AVOID-EVENT) that minimizes computational and communication complexity. AVOID-EVENT reduces the number of re-optimizations required by 92.2%, while retaining most of the benefits introduced by AVOID-PERIOD.
summary: Intersection crossing represents a bottleneck for transportation systems and Connected Autonomous Vehicles (CAVs) may be the groundbreaking solution to the problem. This work proposes a novel framework, i.e, AVOID-PERIOD, where an Intersection Manager (IM) controls CAVs approaching an intersection in order to maximize intersection capacity while minimizing the CAVs' gas consumption. Contrary to most of the works in the literature, the CAVs' location uncertainty is accounted for and periodic communication and re-optimization allows for the creation of safe trajectories for the CAVs. To improve scalability for high-traffic intersections, an event-triggering approach is also developed (AVOID-EVENT) that minimizes computational and communication complexity. AVOID-EVENT reduces the number of re-optimizations required by 92.2%, while retaining most of the benefits introduced by AVOID-PERIOD.
abstract_zh: 十字路口是交通系统的瓶颈，而联网自动驾驶车辆 (CAV) 可能是解决该问题的突破性解决方案。这项工作提出了一种新颖的框架，即 AVOID-PERIOD，其中交叉口管理器 (IM) 控制 CAV 接近交叉口，以便最大化交叉口容量，同时最小化 CAV 的汽油消耗。与文献中的大多数作品相反，考虑了 CAV 的位置不确定性，并且定期通信和重新优化可以为 CAV 创建安全轨迹。为了提高高流量交叉口的可扩展性，还开发了一种事件触发方法 (AVOID-EVENT)，最大限度地减少计算和通信复杂性。 AVOID-EVENT 将所需的重新优化次数减少了 92.2%，同时保留了 AVOID-PERIOD 带来的大部分好处。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合周期性和事件触发机制的框架，旨在最大化交叉口通行能力并确保联网自动驾驶车辆（CAVs）的安全通行。
AI.motivation: 交叉口通行是交通系统的瓶颈，而CAVs可能提供解决方案。现有研究未充分考虑车辆位置不确定性，且缺乏高交通量场景下的可扩展性优化。
AI.method: 设计了AVOID-PERIOD框架通过周期通信与重优化生成安全轨迹，并开发了AVOID-EVENT方法通过事件触发机制减少计算与通信开销。
AI.result: AVOID-EVENT相比传统方法将重优化次数减少92.2%，同时保留了AVOID-PERIOD的大部分优势。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效平衡了交叉口容量最大化、能耗最小化与安全性的需求，且事件触发机制显著提升了高流量场景下的系统可扩展性。

authors_text: Markus Wenzel
title: Generative Adversarial Networks and Other Generative Models
title_zh: 生成对抗网络和其他生成模型
abstract: Generative networks are fundamentally different in their aim and methods compared to CNNs for classification, segmentation, or object detection. They have initially not been meant to be an image analysis tool, but to produce naturally looking images. The adversarial training paradigm has been proposed to stabilize generative methods, and has proven to be highly successful -- though by no means from the first attempt. This chapter gives a basic introduction into the motivation for Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) and traces the path of their success by abstracting the basic task and working mechanism, and deriving the difficulty of early practical approaches. Methods for a more stable training will be shown, and also typical signs for poor convergence and their reasons. Though this chapter focuses on GANs that are meant for image generation and image analysis, the adversarial training paradigm itself is not specific to images, and also generalizes to tasks in image analysis. Examples of architectures for image semantic segmentation and abnormality detection will be acclaimed, before contrasting GANs with further generative modeling approaches lately entering the scene. This will allow a contextualized view on the limits but also benefits of GANs.
summary: Generative networks are fundamentally different in their aim and methods compared to CNNs for classification, segmentation, or object detection. They have initially not been meant to be an image analysis tool, but to produce naturally looking images. The adversarial training paradigm has been proposed to stabilize generative methods, and has proven to be highly successful -- though by no means from the first attempt. This chapter gives a basic introduction into the motivation for Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) and traces the path of their success by abstracting the basic task and working mechanism, and deriving the difficulty of early practical approaches. Methods for a more stable training will be shown, and also typical signs for poor convergence and their reasons. Though this chapter focuses on GANs that are meant for image generation and image analysis, the adversarial training paradigm itself is not specific to images, and also generalizes to tasks in image analysis. Examples of architectures for image semantic segmentation and abnormality detection will be acclaimed, before contrasting GANs with further generative modeling approaches lately entering the scene. This will allow a contextualized view on the limits but also benefits of GANs.
abstract_zh: 与用于分类、分割或对象检测的 CNN 相比，生成网络的目标和方法有根本的不同。它们最初并不是作为图像分析工具，而是为了生成自然的图像。对抗性训练范式已被提出来稳定生成方法，并已被证明是非常成功的——尽管绝不是第一次尝试。本章对生成对抗网络（GAN）的动机进行了基本介绍，并通​​过抽象基本任务和工作机制以及推导早期实践方法的难度来追踪其成功之路。将展示更稳定的训练方法，以及收敛不良的典型迹象及其原因。尽管本章重点讨论用于图像生成和图像分析的 GAN，但对抗性训练范式本身并不特定于图像，并且也泛化到图像分析中的任务。在将 GAN 与最近进入场景的进一步生成建模方法进行对比之前，图像语义分割和异常检测的架构示例将受到好评。这将让我们对 GAN 的局限性和优点有一个具体的了解。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍生成对抗网络（GANs）的动机、方法及其在图像生成与分析中的应用，同时对比其他生成模型。
AI.motivation: 生成模型与传统CNN目标不同，旨在生成自然图像。对抗训练范式被提出以解决生成方法的稳定性问题，并在实践中取得成功。
AI.method: 通过抽象基本任务和工作机制，分析早期GANs的困难，展示稳定训练方法，并探讨收敛问题的成因与解决方向。
AI.result: 总结GANs在图像生成和分析中的成功经验，对抗训练的通用性，并通过对比其他生成模型（如分割、异常检测架构）凸显其优劣。
AI.conclusion: GANs虽存在局限性，但对抗训练范式为图像分析任务提供了有效工具，未来需结合其他生成模型以拓展应用边界。

search_text: Generative Adversarial Networks and Other Generative Models 生成对抗网络和其他生成模型 Generative networks are fundamentally different in their aim and methods compared to CNNs for classification, segmentation, or object detection. They have initially not been meant to be an image analysis tool, but to produce naturally looking images. The adversarial training paradigm has been proposed to stabilize generative methods, and has proven to be highly successful -- though by no means from the first attempt. This chapter gives a basic introduction into the motivation for Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) and traces the path of their success by abstracting the basic task and working mechanism, and deriving the difficulty of early practical approaches. Methods for a more stable training will be shown, and also typical signs for poor convergence and their reasons. Though this chapter focuses on GANs that are meant for image generation and image analysis, the adversarial training paradigm itself is not specific to images, and also generalizes to tasks in image analysis. Examples of architectures for image semantic segmentation and abnormality detection will be acclaimed, before contrasting GANs with further generative modeling approaches lately entering the scene. This will allow a contextualized view on the limits but also benefits of GANs. 与用于分类、分割或对象检测的 CNN 相比，生成网络的目标和方法有根本的不同。它们最初并不是作为图像分析工具，而是为了生成自然的图像。对抗性训练范式已被提出来稳定生成方法，并已被证明是非常成功的——尽管绝不是第一次尝试。本章对生成对抗网络（GAN）的动机进行了基本介绍，并通​​过抽象基本任务和工作机制以及推导早期实践方法的难度来追踪其成功之路。将展示更稳定的训练方法，以及收敛不良的典型迹象及其原因。尽管本章重点讨论用于图像生成和图像分析的 GAN，但对抗性训练范式本身并不特定于图像，并且也泛化到图像分析中的任务。在将 GAN 与最近进入场景的进一步生成建模方法进行对比之前，图像语义分割和异常检测的架构示例将受到好评。这将让我们对 GAN 的局限性和优点有一个具体的了解。 本文介绍生成对抗网络（GANs）的动机、方法及其在图像生成与分析中的应用，同时对比其他生成模型。 Markus Wenzel cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Manish Goyal,Miheer Dewaskar,Parasara Sridhar Duggirala
title: NExG: Provable and Guided State Space Exploration of Neural Network Control Systems using Sensitivity Approximation
title_zh: NExG：使用灵敏度近似对神经网络控制系统进行可证明和引导的状态空间探索
comment: 13 pages, 9 figures, 4 tables. Accepted at EMSOFT 2022 for publication in IEEE TCAD
comments: 13 pages, 9 figures, 4 tables. Accepted at EMSOFT 2022 for publication in IEEE TCAD
abstract: We propose a new technique for performing state space exploration of closed loop control systems with neural network feedback controllers. Our approach involves approximating the sensitivity of the trajectories of the closed loop dynamics. Using such an approximator and the system simulator, we present a guided state space exploration method that can generate trajectories visiting the neighborhood of a target state at a specified time. We present a theoretical framework which establishes that our method will produce a sequence of trajectories that will reach a suitable neighborhood of the target state. We provide thorough evaluation of our approach on various systems with neural network feedback controllers of different configurations. We outperform earlier state space exploration techniques and achieve significant improvement in both the quality (explainability) and performance (convergence rate). Finally, we adopt our algorithm for the falsification of a class of temporal logic specification, assess its performance against a state-of-the-art falsification tool, and show its potential in supplementing existing falsification algorithms.
summary: We propose a new technique for performing state space exploration of closed loop control systems with neural network feedback controllers. Our approach involves approximating the sensitivity of the trajectories of the closed loop dynamics. Using such an approximator and the system simulator, we present a guided state space exploration method that can generate trajectories visiting the neighborhood of a target state at a specified time. We present a theoretical framework which establishes that our method will produce a sequence of trajectories that will reach a suitable neighborhood of the target state. We provide thorough evaluation of our approach on various systems with neural network feedback controllers of different configurations. We outperform earlier state space exploration techniques and achieve significant improvement in both the quality (explainability) and performance (convergence rate). Finally, we adopt our algorithm for the falsification of a class of temporal logic specification, assess its performance against a state-of-the-art falsification tool, and show its potential in supplementing existing falsification algorithms.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种利用神经网络反馈控制器对闭环控制系统进行状态空间探索的新技术。我们的方法涉及近似闭环动力学轨迹的灵敏度。使用这样的逼近器和系统模拟器，我们提出了一种引导状态空间探索方法，该方法可以生成在指定时间访问目标状态邻域的轨迹。我们提出了一个理论框架，该框架确定我们的方法将产生一系列轨迹，这些轨迹将到达目标状态的合适邻域。我们对具有不同配置的神经网络反馈控制器的各种系统的方法进行了全面的评估。我们优于早期的状态空间探索技术，并在质量（可解释性）和性能（收敛率）方面实现了显着改进。最后，我们采用我们的算法来伪造一类时序逻辑规范，根据最先进的伪造工具评估其性能，并展示其在补充现有伪造算法方面的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于敏感度近似的方法，用于神经网络控制系统的状态空间探索，能够生成接近目标状态的轨迹并具有理论保证。
AI.motivation: 现有状态空间探索方法在效率和轨迹可解释性方面存在不足，需更高效的算法以验证神经网络控制器的安全性与性能。
AI.method: 通过近似闭环系统轨迹对初始状态的敏感度，结合系统模拟器引导探索，生成收敛于目标状态邻域的轨迹序列，并建立理论框架证明其收敛性。
AI.result: 在多种神经网络控制器配置的系统中显著优于现有方法，提升轨迹质量与收敛速度，并在时序逻辑规范反例生成任务中表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为神经网络控制系统的验证提供了可证明的探索框架，有效补充了现有反例生成算法的不足。

authors_text: Zahraa Al Sahili,Mariette Awad
title: The Power of Transfer Learning in Agricultural Applications: AgriNet
title_zh: 迁移学习在农业应用中的力量：AgriNet
comment: Accepted by Frontiers in Plant Science
comments: Accepted by Frontiers in Plant Science
abstract: Advances in deep learning and transfer learning have paved the way for various automation classification tasks in agriculture, including plant diseases, pests, weeds, and plant species detection. However, agriculture automation still faces various challenges, such as the limited size of datasets and the absence of plant-domain-specific pretrained models. Domain specific pretrained models have shown state of art performance in various computer vision tasks including face recognition and medical imaging diagnosis. In this paper, we propose AgriNet dataset, a collection of 160k agricultural images from more than 19 geographical locations, several images captioning devices, and more than 423 classes of plant species and diseases. We also introduce AgriNet models, a set of pretrained models on five ImageNet architectures: VGG16, VGG19, Inception-v3, InceptionResNet-v2, and Xception. AgriNet-VGG19 achieved the highest classification accuracy of 94 % and the highest F1-score of 92%. Additionally, all proposed models were found to accurately classify the 423 classes of plant species, diseases, pests, and weeds with a minimum accuracy of 87% for the Inception-v3 model.Finally, experiments to evaluate of superiority of AgriNet models compared to ImageNet models were conducted on two external datasets: pest and plant diseases dataset from Bangladesh and a plant diseases dataset from Kashmir.
summary: Advances in deep learning and transfer learning have paved the way for various automation classification tasks in agriculture, including plant diseases, pests, weeds, and plant species detection. However, agriculture automation still faces various challenges, such as the limited size of datasets and the absence of plant-domain-specific pretrained models. Domain specific pretrained models have shown state of art performance in various computer vision tasks including face recognition and medical imaging diagnosis. In this paper, we propose AgriNet dataset, a collection of 160k agricultural images from more than 19 geographical locations, several images captioning devices, and more than 423 classes of plant species and diseases. We also introduce AgriNet models, a set of pretrained models on five ImageNet architectures: VGG16, VGG19, Inception-v3, InceptionResNet-v2, and Xception. AgriNet-VGG19 achieved the highest classification accuracy of 94 % and the highest F1-score of 92%. Additionally, all proposed models were found to accurately classify the 423 classes of plant species, diseases, pests, and weeds with a minimum accuracy of 87% for the Inception-v3 model.Finally, experiments to evaluate of superiority of AgriNet models compared to ImageNet models were conducted on two external datasets: pest and plant diseases dataset from Bangladesh and a plant diseases dataset from Kashmir.
abstract_zh: 深度学习和迁移学习的进步为农业中的各种自动化分类任务铺平了道路，包括植物病害、害虫、杂草和植物物种检测。然而，农业自动化仍然面临各种挑战，例如数据集大小有限以及缺乏植物领域特定的预训练模型。特定领域的预训练模型在各种计算机视觉任务（包括人脸识别和医学成像诊断）中表现出了最先进的性能。在本文中，我们提出了 AgriNet 数据集，该数据集包含来自超过 19 个地理位置的 16 万张农业图像、多种图像字幕设备以及超过 423 类植物物种和疾病。我们还介绍了 AgriNet 模型，这是一组基于五种 ImageNet 架构的预训练模型：VGG16、VGG19、Inception-v3、InceptionResNet-v2 和 Xception。 AgriNet-VGG19 实现了 94% 的最高分类准确率和 92% 的最高 F1 分数。此外，所有提出的模型都可以准确地对 423 类植物物种、疾病、害虫和杂草进行分类，Inception-v3 模型的最低准确率为 87%。最后，在两个外部数据集（孟加拉国的害虫和植物病害数据集和克什米尔的植物病害数据集）上进行了实验，以评估 AgriNet 模型相对于 ImageNet 模型的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AgriNet数据集和预训练模型，用于农业领域中的植物分类、病害、害虫和杂草检测等任务。
AI.motivation: 农业自动化面临数据集规模有限和缺乏农业领域专用预训练模型的挑战，而领域特定模型在计算机视觉任务中表现优异。
AI.method: 构建包含16万张图像的AgriNet数据集，涵盖19个地理区域和423个植物类别，并基于五种ImageNet架构（如VGG19、Inception-v3）训练预训练模型。
AI.result: AgriNet-VGG19模型在分类准确率（94%）和F1分数（92%）上表现最佳，所有模型对423类目标的最低准确率为87%（Inception-v3）。
AI.conclusion: AgriNet模型在孟加拉国和克什米尔的外部数据集上优于ImageNet模型，证明了其在农业应用中的有效性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出AgriNet数据集和预训练模型，用于农业领域中的植物分类、病害、害虫和杂草检测等任务。

ai_content.result: AgriNet-VGG19模型在分类准确率（94%）和F1分数（92%）上表现最佳，所有模型对423类目标的最低准确率为87%（Inception-v3）。
ai_content.conclusion: AgriNet模型在孟加拉国和克什米尔的外部数据集上优于ImageNet模型，证明了其在农业应用中的有效性。

search_text: The Power of Transfer Learning in Agricultural Applications: AgriNet 迁移学习在农业应用中的力量：AgriNet Advances in deep learning and transfer learning have paved the way for various automation classification tasks in agriculture, including plant diseases, pests, weeds, and plant species detection. However, agriculture automation still faces various challenges, such as the limited size of datasets and the absence of plant-domain-specific pretrained models. Domain specific pretrained models have shown state of art performance in various computer vision tasks including face recognition and medical imaging diagnosis. In this paper, we propose AgriNet dataset, a collection of 160k agricultural images from more than 19 geographical locations, several images captioning devices, and more than 423 classes of plant species and diseases. We also introduce AgriNet models, a set of pretrained models on five ImageNet architectures: VGG16, VGG19, Inception-v3, InceptionResNet-v2, and Xception. AgriNet-VGG19 achieved the highest classification accuracy of 94 % and the highest F1-score of 92%. Additionally, all proposed models were found to accurately classify the 423 classes of plant species, diseases, pests, and weeds with a minimum accuracy of 87% for the Inception-v3 model.Finally, experiments to evaluate of superiority of AgriNet models compared to ImageNet models were conducted on two external datasets: pest and plant diseases dataset from Bangladesh and a plant diseases dataset from Kashmir. 深度学习和迁移学习的进步为农业中的各种自动化分类任务铺平了道路，包括植物病害、害虫、杂草和植物物种检测。然而，农业自动化仍然面临各种挑战，例如数据集大小有限以及缺乏植物领域特定的预训练模型。特定领域的预训练模型在各种计算机视觉任务（包括人脸识别和医学成像诊断）中表现出了最先进的性能。在本文中，我们提出了 AgriNet 数据集，该数据集包含来自超过 19 个地理位置的 16 万张农业图像、多种图像字幕设备以及超过 423 类植物物种和疾病。我们还介绍了 AgriNet 模型，这是一组基于五种 ImageNet 架构的预训练模型：VGG16、VGG19、Inception-v3、InceptionResNet-v2 和 Xception。 AgriNet-VGG19 实现了 94% 的最高分类准确率和 92% 的最高 F1 分数。此外，所有提出的模型都可以准确地对 423 类植物物种、疾病、害虫和杂草进行分类，Inception-v3 模型的最低准确率为 87%。最后，在两个外部数据集（孟加拉国的害虫和植物病害数据集和克什米尔的植物病害数据集）上进行了实验，以评估 AgriNet 模型相对于 ImageNet 模型的优越性。 本文提出AgriNet数据集和预训练模型，用于农业领域中的植物分类、病害、害虫和杂草检测等任务。 Zahraa Al Sahili,Mariette Awad cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Mark Chevallier,Matthew Whyte,Jacques D. Fleuriot
title: Constrained Training of Neural Networks via Theorem Proving
title_zh: 通过定理证明对神经网络进行约束训练
abstract: We introduce a theorem proving approach to the specification and generation of temporal logical constraints for training neural networks. We formalise a deep embedding of linear temporal logic over finite traces (LTL$_f$) and an associated evaluation function characterising its semantics within the higher-order logic of the Isabelle theorem prover. We then proceed to formalise a loss function $\mathcal{L}$ that we formally prove to be sound, and differentiable to a function $d\mathcal{L}$. We subsequently use Isabelle's automatic code generation mechanism to produce OCaml versions of LTL$_f$, $\mathcal{L}$ and $d\mathcal{L}$ that we integrate with PyTorch via OCaml bindings for Python. We show that, when used for training in an existing deep learning framework for dynamic movement, our approach produces expected results for common movement specification patterns such as obstacle avoidance and patrolling. The distinctive benefit of our approach is the fully rigorous method for constrained training, eliminating many of the risks inherent to ad-hoc implementations of logical aspects directly in an "unsafe" programming language such as Python.
summary: We introduce a theorem proving approach to the specification and generation of temporal logical constraints for training neural networks. We formalise a deep embedding of linear temporal logic over finite traces (LTL$_f$) and an associated evaluation function characterising its semantics within the higher-order logic of the Isabelle theorem prover. We then proceed to formalise a loss function $\mathcal{L}$ that we formally prove to be sound, and differentiable to a function $d\mathcal{L}$. We subsequently use Isabelle's automatic code generation mechanism to produce OCaml versions of LTL$_f$, $\mathcal{L}$ and $d\mathcal{L}$ that we integrate with PyTorch via OCaml bindings for Python. We show that, when used for training in an existing deep learning framework for dynamic movement, our approach produces expected results for common movement specification patterns such as obstacle avoidance and patrolling. The distinctive benefit of our approach is the fully rigorous method for constrained training, eliminating many of the risks inherent to ad-hoc implementations of logical aspects directly in an "unsafe" programming language such as Python.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一种定理证明方法来指定和生成用于训练神经网络的时间逻辑约束。我们形式化了有限迹线 (LTL$_f$) 上线性时态逻辑的深度嵌入，以及在伊莎贝尔定理证明者的高阶逻辑中表征其语义的相关评估函数。然后，我们继续形式化一个损失函数 $\mathcal{L}$，我们正式证明它是合理的，并且可微分到函数 $d\mathcal{L}$。随后，我们使用 Isabelle 的自动代码生成机制来生成 LTL$_f$、$\mathcal{L}$ 和 $d\mathcal{L}$ 的 OCaml 版本，并通过 Python 的 OCaml 绑定与 PyTorch 集成。我们表明，当用于在现有的动态运动深度学习框架中进行训练时，我们的方法可以为常见的运动规范模式（例如避障和巡逻）产生预期结果。我们方法的独特优势是完全严格的约束训练方法，消除了直接在“不安全”编程语言（例如 Python）中临时实现逻辑方面所固有的许多风险。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于定理证明的神经网络约束训练方法，通过形式化时序逻辑约束并集成到深度学习框架中，实现安全可靠的训练过程。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在神经网络中直接编码逻辑约束时存在风险，容易因实现错误导致不安全行为，需通过形式化方法确保约束的严谨性。
AI.method: 形式化LTL_f逻辑并定义可微损失函数，利用Isabelle定理证明器生成OCaml代码，通过Python绑定集成至PyTorch框架实现约束训练。
AI.result: 在动态运动控制任务中成功实现避障和巡逻等逻辑约束，验证了方法的有效性和安全性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过形式化验证消除了逻辑约束实现中的潜在风险，为神经网络约束训练提供了可信赖的解决方案。

authors_text: Jiongzhi Zheng,Kun He,Jianrong Zhou,Yan Jin,Chu-Min Li
title: Reinforced Lin-Kernighan-Helsgaun Algorithms for the Traveling Salesman Problems
title_zh: 旅行商问题的强化 Lin-Kernighan-Helsgaun 算法
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2107.06870
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2107.06870
abstract: TSP is a classical NP-hard combinatorial optimization problem with many practical variants. LKH is one of the state-of-the-art local search algorithms for the TSP. LKH-3 is a powerful extension of LKH that can solve many TSP variants. Both LKH and LKH-3 associate a candidate set to each city to improve the efficiency, and have two different methods, $α$-measure and POPMUSIC, to decide the candidate sets. In this work, we first propose a Variable Strategy Reinforced LKH (VSR-LKH) algorithm, which incorporates three reinforcement learning methods (Q-learning, Sarsa, Monte Carlo) with LKH, for the TSP. We further propose a new algorithm called VSR-LKH-3 that combines the variable strategy reinforcement learning method with LKH-3 for typical TSP variants, including the TSP with time windows (TSPTW) and Colored TSP (CTSP). The proposed algorithms replace the inflexible traversal operations in LKH and LKH-3 and let the algorithms learn to make a choice at each search step by reinforcement learning. Both LKH and LKH-3, with either $α$-measure or POPMUSIC, can be significantly improved by our methods. Extensive experiments on 236 widely-used TSP benchmarks with up to 85,900 cities demonstrate the excellent performance of VSR-LKH. VSR-LKH-3 also significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art heuristics for TSPTW and CTSP.
summary: TSP is a classical NP-hard combinatorial optimization problem with many practical variants. LKH is one of the state-of-the-art local search algorithms for the TSP. LKH-3 is a powerful extension of LKH that can solve many TSP variants. Both LKH and LKH-3 associate a candidate set to each city to improve the efficiency, and have two different methods, $α$-measure and POPMUSIC, to decide the candidate sets. In this work, we first propose a Variable Strategy Reinforced LKH (VSR-LKH) algorithm, which incorporates three reinforcement learning methods (Q-learning, Sarsa, Monte Carlo) with LKH, for the TSP. We further propose a new algorithm called VSR-LKH-3 that combines the variable strategy reinforcement learning method with LKH-3 for typical TSP variants, including the TSP with time windows (TSPTW) and Colored TSP (CTSP). The proposed algorithms replace the inflexible traversal operations in LKH and LKH-3 and let the algorithms learn to make a choice at each search step by reinforcement learning. Both LKH and LKH-3, with either $α$-measure or POPMUSIC, can be significantly improved by our methods. Extensive experiments on 236 widely-used TSP benchmarks with up to 85,900 cities demonstrate the excellent performance of VSR-LKH. VSR-LKH-3 also significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art heuristics for TSPTW and CTSP.
abstract_zh: TSP 是一个经典的 NP 难组合优化问题，具有许多实际变体。 LKH 是最先进的 TSP 本地搜索算法之一。 LKH-3 是 LKH 的强大扩展，可以解决许多 TSP 变体。 LKH和LKH-3都为每个城市关联一个候选集以提高效率，并有两种不同的方法$α$-measure和POPMUSIC来决定候选集。在这项工作中，我们首先提出了一种针对 TSP 的可变策略强化 LKH（VSR-LKH）算法，该算法将三种强化学习方法（Q-learning、Sarsa、Monte Carlo）与 LKH 结合起来。我们进一步提出了一种名为 VSR-LKH-3 的新算法，它将变量策略强化学习方法与 LKH-3 结合起来，用于典型的 TSP 变体，包括带时间窗的 TSP（TSPTW）和彩色 TSP（CTSP）。所提出的算法取代了 LKH 和 LKH-3 中不灵活的遍历操作，并让算法通过强化学习学习在每个搜索步骤中做出选择。 LKH 和 LKH-3，无论是 $α$-measure 还是 POPMUSIC，都可以通过我们的方法得到显着改进。在多达 85,900 个城市的 236 个广泛使用的 TSP 基准上进行的广泛实验证明了 VSR-LKH 的卓越性能。 VSR-LKH-3 的性能也显着优于 TPTTW 和 CTSP 的最先进的启发式方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出将强化学习方法与Lin-Kernighan-Helsgaun算法结合，用于解决旅行商问题（TSP）及其变体。
AI.motivation: 传统LKH和LKH-3算法的固定遍历策略在处理复杂TSP变体时效率有限，需通过强化学习实现动态决策优化。
AI.method: 设计Variable Strategy Reinforced LKH（VSR-LKH）算法，融合Q-learning、Sarsa和Monte Carlo三种强化学习方法，并扩展为VSR-LKH-3以适配TSP时间窗和彩色TSP问题。
AI.result: 在236个含多达85,900城市的TSP基准测试中，VSR-LKH显著优于原有算法，VSR-LKH-3在TSPTW和CTSP上超越现有启发式方法。
AI.conclusion: 强化学习策略有效提升了LKH系列算法的适应性与求解性能，为组合优化问题提供了新思路。
