In this work, we first propose a Variable Strategy Reinforced LKH (VSR-LKH) algorithm, which incorporates three reinforcement learning methods (Q-learning, Sarsa, Monte Carlo) with LKH, for the TSP. We further propose a new algorithm called VSR-LKH-3 that combines the variable strategy reinforcement learning method with LKH-3 for typical TSP variants, including the TSP with time windows (TSPTW) and Colored TSP (CTSP). The proposed algorithms replace the inflexible traversal operations in LKH and LKH-3 and let the algorithms learn to make a choice at each search step by reinforcement learning. Both LKH and LKH-3, with either $α$-measure or POPMUSIC, can be significantly improved by our methods. Extensive experiments on 236 widely-used TSP benchmarks with up to 85,900 cities demonstrate the excellent performance of VSR-LKH. VSR-LKH-3 also significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art heuristics for TSPTW and CTSP. TSP 是一个经典的 NP 难组合优化问题，具有许多实际变体。 LKH 是最先进的 TSP 本地搜索算法之一。 LKH-3 是 LKH 的强大扩展，可以解决许多 TSP 变体。 LKH和LKH-3都为每个城市关联一个候选集以提高效率，并有两种不同的方法$α$-measure和POPMUSIC来决定候选集。在这项工作中，我们首先提出了一种针对 TSP 的可变策略强化 LKH（VSR-LKH）算法，该算法将三种强化学习方法（Q-learning、Sarsa、Monte Carlo）与 LKH 结合起来。我们进一步提出了一种名为 VSR-LKH-3 的新算法，它将变量策略强化学习方法与 LKH-3 结合起来，用于典型的 TSP 变体，包括带时间窗的 TSP（TSPTW）和彩色 TSP（CTSP）。所提出的算法取代了 LKH 和 LKH-3 中不灵活的遍历操作，并让算法通过强化学习学习在每个搜索步骤中做出选择。 LKH 和 LKH-3，无论是 $α$-measure 还是 POPMUSIC，都可以通过我们的方法得到显着改进。在多达 85,900 个城市的 236 个广泛使用的 TSP 基准上进行的广泛实验证明了 VSR-LKH 的卓越性能。 VSR-LKH-3 的性能也显着优于 TPTTW 和 CTSP 的最先进的启发式方法。 本文提出将强化学习方法与Lin-Kernighan-Helsgaun算法结合，用于解决旅行商问题（TSP）及其变体。 Jiongzhi Zheng,Kun He,Jianrong Zhou,Yan Jin,Chu-Min Li cs.AI,cs.DS

authors_text: Taichi Fukuda,Kotaro Hasegawa,Shinya Ishizaki,Shohei Nobuhara,Ko Nishino
title: BlindSpotNet: Seeing Where We Cannot See
title_zh: BlindSpotNet：看到我们看不到的地方
abstract: We introduce 2D blind spot estimation as a critical visual task for road scene understanding. By automatically detecting road regions that are occluded from the vehicle's vantage point, we can proactively alert a manual driver or a self-driving system to potential causes of accidents (e.g., draw attention to a road region from which a child may spring out). Detecting blind spots in full 3D would be challenging, as 3D reasoning on the fly even if the car is equipped with LiDAR would be prohibitively expensive and error prone. We instead propose to learn to estimate blind spots in 2D, just from a monocular camera. We achieve this in two steps. We first introduce an automatic method for generating ``ground-truth'' blind spot training data for arbitrary driving videos by leveraging monocular depth estimation, semantic segmentation, and SLAM. The key idea is to reason in 3D but from 2D images by defining blind spots as those road regions that are currently invisible but become visible in the near future. We construct a large-scale dataset with this automatic offline blind spot estimation, which we refer to as Road Blind Spot (RBS) dataset. Next, we introduce BlindSpotNet (BSN), a simple network that fully leverages this dataset for fully automatic estimation of frame-wise blind spot probability maps for arbitrary driving videos. Extensive experimental results demonstrate the validity of our RBS Dataset and the effectiveness of our BSN.
summary: We introduce 2D blind spot estimation as a critical visual task for road scene understanding. By automatically detecting road regions that are occluded from the vehicle's vantage point, we can proactively alert a manual driver or a self-driving system to potential causes of accidents (e.g., draw attention to a road region from which a child may spring out). Detecting blind spots in full 3D would be challenging, as 3D reasoning on the fly even if the car is equipped with LiDAR would be prohibitively expensive and error prone. We instead propose to learn to estimate blind spots in 2D, just from a monocular camera. We achieve this in two steps. We first introduce an automatic method for generating ``ground-truth'' blind spot training data for arbitrary driving videos by leveraging monocular depth estimation, semantic segmentation, and SLAM. The key idea is to reason in 3D but from 2D images by defining blind spots as those road regions that are currently invisible but become visible in the near future. We construct a large-scale dataset with this automatic offline blind spot estimation, which we refer to as Road Blind Spot (RBS) dataset. Next, we introduce BlindSpotNet (BSN), a simple network that fully leverages this dataset for fully automatic estimation of frame-wise blind spot probability maps for arbitrary driving videos. Extensive experimental results demonstrate the validity of our RBS Dataset and the effectiveness of our BSN.
abstract_zh: 我们引入二维盲点估计作为道路场景理解的关键视觉任务。通过自动检测从车辆有利位置被遮挡的道路区域，我们可以主动提醒手动驾驶员或自动驾驶系统注意事故的潜在原因（例如，引起儿童可能从其中跳出的道路区域的注意）。在全 3D 中检测盲点将具有挑战性，因为即使汽车配备了 LiDAR，动态 3D 推理也会非常昂贵且容易出错。相反，我们建议学习仅通过单目相机估计 2D 盲点。我们分两步实现这一目标。我们首先介绍一种利用单目深度估计、语义分割和 SLAM 为任意驾驶视频生成“真实”盲点训练数据的自动方法。关键思想是通过将盲点定义为当前不可见但在不久的将来变得可见的道路区域，以 3D 而非 2D 图像进行推理。我们使用这种自动离线盲点估计构建了一个大规模数据集，我们将其称为道路盲点（RBS）数据集。接下来，我们介绍 BlindSpotNet (BSN)，这是一个简单的网络，它充分利用该数据集来全自动估计任意驾驶视频的逐帧盲点概率图。大量的实验结果证明了我们的 RBS 数据集的有效性和 BSN 的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于单目摄像头的2D盲区估计方法BlindSpotNet，用于道路场景理解，通过检测车辆视野盲区来预警潜在事故风险。
AI.motivation: 传统3D盲区检测依赖LiDAR等设备，成本高且易出错。而通过单目摄像头进行2D盲区估计更具可行性，可实时预警如儿童突然出现等危险场景。
AI.method: 利用单目深度估计、语义分割和SLAM技术自动生成道路盲区标注数据，构建RBS数据集；设计BlindSpotNet网络，通过该数据集实现对任意驾驶视频的逐帧盲区概率图估计。
AI.result: 实验验证了RBS数据集的有效性及BlindSpotNet在多种驾驶场景中的盲区检测性能，证明了方法的准确性和实用性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为自动驾驶和人工驾驶提供了低成本、高效的盲区预警解决方案，推动了道路安全技术的发展。

authors_text: Riccardo Mereu,Gabriele Trivigno,Gabriele Berton,Carlo Masone,Barbara Caputo
title: Learning Sequential Descriptors for Sequence-based Visual Place Recognition
title_zh: 学习用于基于序列的视觉位置识别的序列描述符
abstract: In robotics, Visual Place Recognition is a continuous process that receives as input a video stream to produce a hypothesis of the robot's current position within a map of known places. This task requires robust, scalable, and efficient techniques for real applications. This work proposes a detailed taxonomy of techniques using sequential descriptors, highlighting different mechanism to fuse the information from the individual images. This categorization is supported by a complete benchmark of experimental results that provides evidence on the strengths and weaknesses of these different architectural choices. In comparison to existing sequential descriptors methods, we further investigate the viability of Transformers instead of CNN backbones, and we propose a new ad-hoc sequence-level aggregator called SeqVLAD, which outperforms prior state of the art on different datasets. The code is available at https://github.com/vandal-vpr/vg-transformers.
summary: In robotics, Visual Place Recognition is a continuous process that receives as input a video stream to produce a hypothesis of the robot's current position within a map of known places. This task requires robust, scalable, and efficient techniques for real applications. This work proposes a detailed taxonomy of techniques using sequential descriptors, highlighting different mechanism to fuse the information from the individual images. This categorization is supported by a complete benchmark of experimental results that provides evidence on the strengths and weaknesses of these different architectural choices. In comparison to existing sequential descriptors methods, we further investigate the viability of Transformers instead of CNN backbones, and we propose a new ad-hoc sequence-level aggregator called SeqVLAD, which outperforms prior state of the art on different datasets. The code is available at https://github.com/vandal-vpr/vg-transformers.
abstract_zh: 在机器人技术中，视觉位置识别是一个连续的过程，它接收视频流作为输入，以生成机器人在已知位置地图中当前位置的假设。这项任务需要针对实际应用的稳健、可扩展且高效的技术。这项工作提出了使用顺序描述符的技术的详细分类，突出了融合单个图像信息的不同机制。这种分类得到了完整的实验结果基准的支持，该基准提供了有关这些不同架构选择的优点和缺点的证据。与现有的序列描述符方法相比，我们进一步研究了 Transformer 而不是 CNN 主干的可行性，并且我们提出了一种名为 SeqVLAD 的新的临时序列级聚合器，它在不同数据集上的性能优于现有技术。该代码可从 https://github.com/vandal-vpr/vg-transformers 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在为基于序列的视觉地点识别任务设计并评估序列描述符方法，以提升机器人定位的鲁棒性和效率。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉地点识别方法在处理视频流时存在信息融合效率低、模型可扩展性差等问题，需探索更有效的序列建模机制。
AI.method: 通过分类不同序列信息融合机制，设计SeqVLAD聚合器，并采用Transformer架构替代传统CNN以提升性能。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提出的SeqVLAD在多个数据集上优于现有方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为视觉地点识别提供了新的序列描述符方法，证明了Transformer和SeqVLAD的有效性，推动了该领域的发展。

authors_text: Yash Sharma,Yi Zhu,Chris Russell,Thomas Brox
title: Pixel-level Correspondence for Self-Supervised Learning from Video
title_zh: 视频自监督学习的像素级对应
abstract: While self-supervised learning has enabled effective representation learning in the absence of labels, for vision, video remains a relatively untapped source of supervision. To address this, we propose Pixel-level Correspondence (PiCo), a method for dense contrastive learning from video. By tracking points with optical flow, we obtain a correspondence map which can be used to match local features at different points in time. We validate PiCo on standard benchmarks, outperforming self-supervised baselines on multiple dense prediction tasks, without compromising performance on image classification.
summary: While self-supervised learning has enabled effective representation learning in the absence of labels, for vision, video remains a relatively untapped source of supervision. To address this, we propose Pixel-level Correspondence (PiCo), a method for dense contrastive learning from video. By tracking points with optical flow, we obtain a correspondence map which can be used to match local features at different points in time. We validate PiCo on standard benchmarks, outperforming self-supervised baselines on multiple dense prediction tasks, without compromising performance on image classification.
abstract_zh: 虽然自监督学习在没有标签的情况下实现了有效的表示学习，但对于视觉而言，视频仍然是相对未开发的监督来源。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了像素级对应（PiCo），这是一种从视频中进行密集对比学习的方法。通过光流跟踪点，我们获得了对应图，可用于匹配不同时间点的局部特征。我们在标准基准上验证了 PiCo，在多个密集预测任务上的表现优于自监督基准，并且不影响图像分类的性能。

search_text: Pixel-level Correspondence for Self-Supervised Learning from Video 视频自监督学习的像素级对应 While self-supervised learning has enabled effective representation learning in the absence of labels, for vision, video remains a relatively untapped source of supervision. To address this, we propose Pixel-level Correspondence (PiCo), a method for dense contrastive learning from video. By tracking points with optical flow, we obtain a correspondence map which can be used to match local features at different points in time. We validate PiCo on standard benchmarks, outperforming self-supervised baselines on multiple dense prediction tasks, without compromising performance on image classification. 虽然自监督学习在没有标签的情况下实现了有效的表示学习，但对于视觉而言，视频仍然是相对未开发的监督来源。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了像素级对应（PiCo），这是一种从视频中进行密集对比学习的方法。通过光流跟踪点，我们获得了对应图，可用于匹配不同时间点的局部特征。我们在标准基准上验证了 PiCo，在多个密集预测任务上的表现优于自监督基准，并且不影响图像分类的性能。 本文提出了一种基于视频的自监督学习方法PiCo，通过像素级对应关系实现密集对比学习。 Yash Sharma,Yi Zhu,Chris Russell,Thomas Brox cs.CV

authors_text: Chien-Chung Huang,François Sellier
title: Maximum Weight b-Matchings in Random-Order Streams
title_zh: 随机顺序流中的最大权重 b 匹配
abstract: We consider the maximum weight $b$-matching problem in the random-order semi-streaming model. Assuming all weights are small integers drawn from $[1,W]$, we present a $2 - \frac{1}{2W} + \varepsilon$ approximation algorithm, using a memory of $O(\max(|M_G|, n) \cdot poly(\log(m),W,1/\varepsilon))$, where $|M_G|$ denotes the cardinality of the optimal matching. Our result generalizes that of Bernstein [Bernstein, 2015], which achieves a $3/2 + \varepsilon$ approximation for the maximum cardinality simple matching. When $W$ is small, our result also improves upon that of Gamlath et al. [Gamlath et al., 2019], which obtains a $2 - δ$ approximation (for some small constant $δ\sim 10^{-17}$) for the maximum weight simple matching. In particular, for the weighted $b$-matching problem, ours is the first result beating the approximation ratio of $2$. Our technique hinges on a generalized weighted version of edge-degree constrained subgraphs, originally developed by Bernstein and Stein [Bernstein and Stein, 2015]. Such a subgraph has bounded vertex degree (hence uses only a small number of edges), and can be easily computed. The fact that it contains a $2 - \frac{1}{2W} + \varepsilon$ approximation of the maximum weight matching is proved using the classical Kőnig-Egerváry's duality theorem.
summary: We consider the maximum weight $b$-matching problem in the random-order semi-streaming model. Assuming all weights are small integers drawn from $[1,W]$, we present a $2 - \frac{1}{2W} + \varepsilon$ approximation algorithm, using a memory of $O(\max(|M_G|, n) \cdot poly(\log(m),W,1/\varepsilon))$, where $|M_G|$ denotes the cardinality of the optimal matching. Our result generalizes that of Bernstein [Bernstein, 2015], which achieves a $3/2 + \varepsilon$ approximation for the maximum cardinality simple matching. When $W$ is small, our result also improves upon that of Gamlath et al. [Gamlath et al., 2019], which obtains a $2 - δ$ approximation (for some small constant $δ\sim 10^{-17}$) for the maximum weight simple matching. In particular, for the weighted $b$-matching problem, ours is the first result beating the approximation ratio of $2$. Our technique hinges on a generalized weighted version of edge-degree constrained subgraphs, originally developed by Bernstein and Stein [Bernstein and Stein, 2015]. Such a subgraph has bounded vertex degree (hence uses only a small number of edges), and can be easily computed. The fact that it contains a $2 - \frac{1}{2W} + \varepsilon$ approximation of the maximum weight matching is proved using the classical Kőnig-Egerváry's duality theorem.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑随机顺序半流模型中的最大权重$b$匹配问题。假设所有权重都是从 $[1,W]$ 中提取的小整数，我们提出一个 $2 - \frac{1}{2W} + \varepsilon$ 近似算法，使用 $O(\max(|M_G|, n) \cdot poly(\log(m),W,1/\varepsilon))$ 的内存，其中 $|M_G|$ 表示最佳匹配的基数。我们的结果概括了 Bernstein [Bernstein, 2015] 的结果，它实现了最大基数简单匹配的 $3/2 + \varepsilon$ 近似。当 $W$ 很小时，我们的结果也优于 Gamlath 等人的结果。 [Gamlath et al., 2019]，它获得了最大权重简单匹配的 $2 - δ$ 近似值（对于一些小的常数 $δ\sim 10^{-17}$）。特别是，对于加权 $b$ 匹配问题，我们的第一个结果击败了 $2$ 的近似率。我们的技术取决于边缘度约束子图的广义加权版本，最初由 Bernstein 和 Stein 开发[Bernstein and Stein, 2015]。这样的子图具有有界顶点度（因此仅使用少量边），并且可以轻松计算。它包含最大权重匹配的 $2 - \frac{1}{2W} + \varepsilon$ 近似值这一事实是使用经典 Kőnig-Egerváry 的对偶定理证明的。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在随机顺序半流模型下最大权重b-匹配问题，提出了一种改进的近似算法。
AI.motivation: 现有算法在最大权重简单匹配问题上的近似比无法突破2，且对小权重场景优化不足，需改进算法性能。
AI.method: 基于边度约束子图的广义加权版本，结合Kőnig-Egerváry对偶定理，设计近似算法并控制内存复杂度。
AI.result: 提出2 - 1/(2W) + ε近似算法，内存复杂度为O(max(|M_G|,n)·poly(log m,W,1/ε))，优于现有结果。
AI.conclusion: 首次突破2近似比下界，为小权重场景提供更优解法，方法可推广至更一般匹配问题。

authors_text: Tong Zhang,Peng Gao,Hao Dong,Yin Zhuang,Guanqun Wang,Wei Zhang,He Chen
title: Consecutive Pretraining: A Knowledge Transfer Learning Strategy with Relevant Unlabeled Data for Remote Sensing Domain
title_zh: 连续预训练：遥感领域相关未标记数据的知识迁移学习策略
abstract: Currently, under supervised learning, a model pretrained by a large-scale nature scene dataset and then fine-tuned on a few specific task labeling data is the paradigm that has dominated the knowledge transfer learning. It has reached the status of consensus solution for task-aware model training in remote sensing domain (RSD). Unfortunately, due to different categories of imaging data and stiff challenges of data annotation, there is not a large enough and uniform remote sensing dataset to support large-scale pretraining in RSD. Moreover, pretraining models on large-scale nature scene datasets by supervised learning and then directly fine-tuning on diverse downstream tasks seems to be a crude method, which is easily affected by inevitable labeling noise, severe domain gaps and task-aware discrepancies. Thus, in this paper, considering the self-supervised pretraining and powerful vision transformer (ViT) architecture, a concise and effective knowledge transfer learning strategy called ConSecutive PreTraining (CSPT) is proposed based on the idea of not stopping pretraining in natural language processing (NLP), which can gradually bridge the domain gap and transfer knowledge from the nature scene domain to the RSD. The proposed CSPT also can release the huge potential of unlabeled data for task-aware model training. Finally, extensive experiments are carried out on twelve datasets in RSD involving three types of downstream tasks (e.g., scene classification, object detection and land cover classification) and two types of imaging data (e.g., optical and SAR). The results show that by utilizing the proposed CSPT for task-aware model training, almost all downstream tasks in RSD can outperform the previous method of supervised pretraining-then-fine-tuning and even surpass the state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance without any expensive labeling consumption and careful model design.
summary: Currently, under supervised learning, a model pretrained by a large-scale nature scene dataset and then fine-tuned on a few specific task labeling data is the paradigm that has dominated the knowledge transfer learning. It has reached the status of consensus solution for task-aware model training in remote sensing domain (RSD). Unfortunately, due to different categories of imaging data and stiff challenges of data annotation, there is not a large enough and uniform remote sensing dataset to support large-scale pretraining in RSD. Moreover, pretraining models on large-scale nature scene datasets by supervised learning and then directly fine-tuning on diverse downstream tasks seems to be a crude method, which is easily affected by inevitable labeling noise, severe domain gaps and task-aware discrepancies. Thus, in this paper, considering the self-supervised pretraining and powerful vision transformer (ViT) architecture, a concise and effective knowledge transfer learning strategy called ConSecutive PreTraining (CSPT) is proposed based on the idea of not stopping pretraining in natural language processing (NLP), which can gradually bridge the domain gap and transfer knowledge from the nature scene domain to the RSD. The proposed CSPT also can release the huge potential of unlabeled data for task-aware model training. Finally, extensive experiments are carried out on twelve datasets in RSD involving three types of downstream tasks (e.g., scene classification, object detection and land cover classification) and two types of imaging data (e.g., optical and SAR). The results show that by utilizing the proposed CSPT for task-aware model training, almost all downstream tasks in RSD can outperform the previous method of supervised pretraining-then-fine-tuning and even surpass the state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance without any expensive labeling consumption and careful model design.
abstract_zh: 目前，在监督学习下，由大规模自然场景数据集预训练，然后对一些特定任务标记数据进行微调的模型是主导知识迁移学习的范式。它已成为遥感领域（RSD）任务感知模型训练的共识解决方案。不幸的是，由于成像数据的不同类别和数据注释的严峻挑战，没有足够大且统一的遥感数据集来支持RSD的大规模预训练。此外，通过监督学习在大规模自然场景数据集上预训练模型，然后直接对各种下游任务进行微调似乎是一种粗糙的方法，很容易受到不可避免的标签噪声、严重的领域差距和任务感知差异的影响。因此，本文考虑到自监督预训练和强大的视觉变换器（ViT）架构，基于自然语言处理（NLP）中不停止预训练的思想，提出了一种简洁有效的知识迁移学习策略，称为连续预训练（CSPT），可以逐渐弥合领域差距，将知识从自然场景领域迁移到RSD。所提出的 CSPT 还可以释放未标记数据用于任务感知模型训练的巨大潜力。最后，在 RSD 的 12 个数据集上进行了广泛的实验，涉及三种类型的下游任务（例如场景分类、物体检测和土地覆盖分类）和两种类型的成像数据（例如光学和 SAR）。结果表明，通过利用所提出的 CSPT 进行任务感知模型训练，RSD 中的几乎所有下游任务都可以超越之前的有监督预训练然后微调的方法，甚至超越最先进的 (SOTA) 性能，而无需任何昂贵的标签消耗和仔细的模型设计。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Consecutive PreTraining (CSPT)的知识迁移学习策略，通过利用未标记数据和视觉Transformer架构，解决遥感领域预训练模型的领域差距和标注数据不足问题。
AI.motivation: 传统监督学习预训练-微调方法在遥感领域因标注成本高、领域差异大和任务差异明显而效果受限，缺乏大规模统一的遥感数据集支持预训练，且直接微调易受噪声和领域差距影响。
AI.method: 基于自然语言处理中连续预训练的思想，结合自监督预训练和视觉Transformer（ViT）架构，设计CSPT方法，通过未标记数据逐步缩小领域差距，实现从自然场景到遥感领域的知识迁移。
AI.result: 在包含12个数据集的3类下游任务（场景分类、目标检测、土地覆盖分类）和2类遥感数据（光学/SAR）的实验中，CSPT方法在几乎所有任务上均优于传统监督预训练-微调方法，且达到或超越现有最先进水平（SOTA），无需额外标注数据或复杂模型设计。
AI.conclusion: CSPT通过连续预训练有效利用未标记数据，解决了遥感领域知识迁移中的领域差距和标注不足问题，为遥感任务的模型训练提供了更高效且无需昂贵标注的解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Consecutive PreTraining (CSPT)的知识迁移学习策略，通过利用未标记数据和视觉Transformer架构，解决遥感领域预训练模型的领域差距和标注数据不足问题。
ai_content.motivation: 传统监督学习预训练-微调方法在遥感领域因标注成本高、领域差异大和任务差异明显而效果受限，缺乏大规模统一的遥感数据集支持预训练，且直接微调易受噪声和领域差距影响。
ai_content.method: 基于自然语言处理中连续预训练的思想，结合自监督预训练和视觉Transformer（ViT）架构，设计CSPT方法，通过未标记数据逐步缩小领域差距，实现从自然场景到遥感领域的知识迁移。
ai_content.result: 在包含12个数据集的3类下游任务（场景分类、目标检测、土地覆盖分类）和2类遥感数据（光学/SAR）的实验中，CSPT方法在几乎所有任务上均优于传统监督预训练-微调方法，且达到或超越现有最先进水平（SOTA），无需额外标注数据或复杂模型设计。
ai_content.conclusion: CSPT通过连续预训练有效利用未标记数据，解决了遥感领域知识迁移中的领域差距和标注不足问题，为遥感任务的模型训练提供了更高效且无需昂贵标注的解决方案。

search_text: Consecutive Pretraining: A Knowledge Transfer Learning Strategy with Relevant Unlabeled Data for Remote Sensing Domain 连续预训练：遥感领域相关未标记数据的知识迁移学习策略 Currently, under supervised learning, a model pretrained by a large-scale nature scene dataset and then fine-tuned on a few specific task labeling data is the paradigm that has dominated the knowledge transfer learning. It has reached the status of consensus solution for task-aware model training in remote sensing domain (RSD). Unfortunately, due to different categories of imaging data and stiff challenges of data annotation, there is not a large enough and uniform remote sensing dataset to support large-scale pretraining in RSD. Moreover, pretraining models on large-scale nature scene datasets by supervised learning and then directly fine-tuning on diverse downstream tasks seems to be a crude method, which is easily affected by inevitable labeling noise, severe domain gaps and task-aware discrepancies. Thus, in this paper, considering the self-supervised pretraining and powerful vision transformer (ViT) architecture, a concise and effective knowledge transfer learning strategy called ConSecutive PreTraining (CSPT) is proposed based on the idea of not stopping pretraining in natural language processing (NLP), which can gradually bridge the domain gap and transfer knowledge from the nature scene domain to the RSD. The proposed CSPT also can release the huge potential of unlabeled data for task-aware model training. Finally, extensive experiments are carried out on twelve datasets in RSD involving three types of downstream tasks (e.g., scene classification, object detection and land cover classification) and two types of imaging data (e.g., optical and SAR). The results show that by utilizing the proposed CSPT for task-aware model training, almost all downstream tasks in RSD can outperform the previous method of supervised pretraining-then-fine-tuning and even surpass the state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance without any expensive labeling consumption and careful model design. 目前，在监督学习下，由大规模自然场景数据集预训练，然后对一些特定任务标记数据进行微调的模型是主导知识迁移学习的范式。它已成为遥感领域（RSD）任务感知模型训练的共识解决方案。不幸的是，由于成像数据的不同类别和数据注释的严峻挑战，没有足够大且统一的遥感数据集来支持RSD的大规模预训练。此外，通过监督学习在大规模自然场景数据集上预训练模型，然后直接对各种下游任务进行微调似乎是一种粗糙的方法，很容易受到不可避免的标签噪声、严重的领域差距和任务感知差异的影响。因此，本文考虑到自监督预训练和强大的视觉变换器（ViT）架构，基于自然语言处理（NLP）中不停止预训练的思想，提出了一种简洁有效的知识迁移学习策略，称为连续预训练（CSPT），可以逐渐弥合领域差距，将知识从自然场景领域迁移到RSD。所提出的 CSPT 还可以释放未标记数据用于任务感知模型训练的巨大潜力。最后，在 RSD 的 12 个数据集上进行了广泛的实验，涉及三种类型的下游任务（例如场景分类、物体检测和土地覆盖分类）和两种类型的成像数据（例如光学和 SAR）。结果表明，通过利用所提出的 CSPT 进行任务感知模型训练，RSD 中的几乎所有下游任务都可以超越之前的有监督预训练然后微调的方法，甚至超越最先进的 (SOTA) 性能，而无需任何昂贵的标签消耗和仔细的模型设计。 本文提出一种名为Consecutive PreTraining (CSPT)的知识迁移学习策略，通过利用未标记数据和视觉Transformer架构，解决遥感领域预训练模型的领域差距和标注数据不足问题。 Tong Zhang,Peng Gao,Hao Dong,Yin Zhuang,Guanqun Wang,Wei Zhang,He Chen cs.CV

authors_text: Jakob Schyga,Swantje Plambeck,Johannes Hinckeldeyn,Görschwin Fey,Jochen Kreutzfeldt
title: Decision Trees for Analyzing Influences on the Accuracy of Indoor Localization Systems
title_zh: 用于分析对室内定位系统精度影响的决策树
comment: Accepted for 2022 International Conference on Indoor Positioning and Indoor Navigation (IPIN), 5 - 7 Sep. 2022, Beijing, China
comments: Accepted for 2022 International Conference on Indoor Positioning and Indoor Navigation (IPIN), 5 - 7 Sep. 2022, Beijing, China
abstract: Absolute position accuracy is the key performance criterion of an Indoor Localization System (ILS). Since ILS are heterogeneous and complex cyber-physical systems, the localization accuracy depends on various influences from the environment, system configuration, and the application processes. To determine the position accuracy of a system in a reproducible, comparable, and realistic manner, these factors must be taken into account. We propose a strategy for analyzing the influences on the position accuracy of ILS using decision trees in combination with application-related or technology-related categorization. The proposed strategy is validated using empirical data from 120 experiments. The accuracy of an Ultra-Wideband and a LiDAR-based ILS was determined under different application-driven influencing factors, considering the application of autonomous mobile robots in warehouses. Finally, the opportunities and limitations of analyzing decision trees to compare system performance, find a suitable system, optimize the environment or system configuration, and understand the relevance of different influencing factors are presented.
summary: Absolute position accuracy is the key performance criterion of an Indoor Localization System (ILS). Since ILS are heterogeneous and complex cyber-physical systems, the localization accuracy depends on various influences from the environment, system configuration, and the application processes. To determine the position accuracy of a system in a reproducible, comparable, and realistic manner, these factors must be taken into account. We propose a strategy for analyzing the influences on the position accuracy of ILS using decision trees in combination with application-related or technology-related categorization. The proposed strategy is validated using empirical data from 120 experiments. The accuracy of an Ultra-Wideband and a LiDAR-based ILS was determined under different application-driven influencing factors, considering the application of autonomous mobile robots in warehouses. Finally, the opportunities and limitations of analyzing decision trees to compare system performance, find a suitable system, optimize the environment or system configuration, and understand the relevance of different influencing factors are presented.
abstract_zh: 绝对位置精度是室内定位系统（ILS）的关键性能标准。由于ILS是异构且复杂的信息物理系统，定位精度取决于环境、系统配置和应用流程的各种影响。为了以可重复、可比较和现实的方式确定系统的位置精度，必须考虑这些因素。我们提出了一种策略，利用决策树结合应用相关或技术相关的分类来分析对 ILS 位置精度的影响。使用 120 次实验的经验数据验证了所提出的策略。考虑到自主移动机器人在仓库中的应用，在不同的应用驱动影响因素下确定超宽带和基于激光雷达的 ILS 的准确性。最后，提出了分析决策树来比较系统性能、找到合适的系统、优化环境或系统配置以及了解不同影响因素的相关性的机会和局限性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合决策树与分类方法的策略，用于分析影响室内定位系统（ILS）精度的多因素。
AI.motivation: 室内定位系统（ILS）因环境、配置和应用过程的复杂性，其精度受多种因素影响，需建立可复现、可比较的分析方法。
AI.method: 通过决策树结合应用相关和技术相关分类，利用120组实验数据验证策略，分析UWB和LiDAR系统的精度影响因素。
AI.result: 实验表明，决策树能有效比较系统性能、优化配置，并识别关键影响因素，但存在复杂性和数据依赖性限制。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为系统选型、环境优化和因素分析提供支持，但需进一步解决复杂场景下的适用性问题。

authors_text: Xianrui Zheng,Chao Zhang,Philip C. Woodland
title: Tandem Multitask Training of Speaker Diarisation and Speech Recognition for Meeting Transcription
title_zh: 用于会议转录的演讲者日记和语音识别的串联多任务训练
abstract: Self-supervised-learning-based pre-trained models for speech data, such as Wav2Vec 2.0 (W2V2), have become the backbone of many speech tasks. In this paper, to achieve speaker diarisation and speech recognition using a single model, a tandem multitask training (TMT) method is proposed to fine-tune W2V2. For speaker diarisation, the tasks of voice activity detection (VAD) and speaker classification (SC) are required, and connectionist temporal classification (CTC) is used for ASR. The multitask framework implements VAD, SC, and ASR using an early layer, middle layer, and late layer of W2V2, which coincides with the order of segmenting the audio with VAD, clustering the segments based on speaker embeddings, and transcribing each segment with ASR. Experimental results on the augmented multi-party (AMI) dataset showed that using different W2V2 layers for VAD, SC, and ASR from the earlier to later layers for TMT not only saves computational cost, but also reduces diarisation error rates (DERs). Joint fine-tuning of VAD, SC, and ASR yielded 16%/17% relative reductions of DER with manual/automatic segmentation respectively, and consistent reductions in speaker attributed word error rate, compared to the baseline with separately fine-tuned models.
summary: Self-supervised-learning-based pre-trained models for speech data, such as Wav2Vec 2.0 (W2V2), have become the backbone of many speech tasks. In this paper, to achieve speaker diarisation and speech recognition using a single model, a tandem multitask training (TMT) method is proposed to fine-tune W2V2. For speaker diarisation, the tasks of voice activity detection (VAD) and speaker classification (SC) are required, and connectionist temporal classification (CTC) is used for ASR. The multitask framework implements VAD, SC, and ASR using an early layer, middle layer, and late layer of W2V2, which coincides with the order of segmenting the audio with VAD, clustering the segments based on speaker embeddings, and transcribing each segment with ASR. Experimental results on the augmented multi-party (AMI) dataset showed that using different W2V2 layers for VAD, SC, and ASR from the earlier to later layers for TMT not only saves computational cost, but also reduces diarisation error rates (DERs). Joint fine-tuning of VAD, SC, and ASR yielded 16%/17% relative reductions of DER with manual/automatic segmentation respectively, and consistent reductions in speaker attributed word error rate, compared to the baseline with separately fine-tuned models.
abstract_zh: 基于自监督学习的语音数据预训练模型，例如 Wav2Vec 2.0 (W2V2)，已成为许多语音任务的支柱。在本文中，为了使用单一模型实现说话者二值化和语音识别，提出了一种串联多任务训练（TMT）方法来微调 W2V2。对于说话人分类，需要语音活动检测（VAD）和说话人分类（SC）任务，并且连接主义时间分类（CTC）用于ASR。多任务框架使用 W2V2 的早期层、中间层和晚期层实现 VAD、SC 和 ASR，这与使用 VAD 分割音频、基于说话人嵌入对片段进行聚类以及使用 ASR 转录每个片段的顺序一致。增强型多方（AMI）数据集上的实验结果表明，对于 TMT 从前到后的层使用不同的 W2V2 层进行 VAD、SC 和 ASR 不仅可以节省计算成本，还可以降低二值化错误率（DER）。与单独微调模型的基线相比，VAD、SC 和 ASR 的联合微调分别使手动/自动分割的 DER 相对减少了 16%/17%，并且说话人归因的单词错误率持续减少。

AI.tldr: 提出一种联机多任务训练方法，通过微调Wav2Vec 2.0模型，同时实现会议语音的说话人日记和语音识别任务。
AI.motivation: 传统方法需单独微调多个模型，导致计算成本高且效果受限，需更高效地联合优化多任务。
AI.method: 采用联机多任务训练框架，将VAD/SC任务分配给早期和中期层，ASR任务分配给晚期层，通过联合微调降低计算成本并提升准确性。
AI.result: 在AMI数据集上，TMT方法使DER降低16%/17%（人工/自动分割），且词错误率持续下降，优于单独微调模型基线。
AI.conclusion: TMT方法通过分层任务分配实现高效多任务学习，验证了联合训练在会议转录场景中的有效性，未来可探索更优模型结构或扩展至其他任务。

search_text: Tandem Multitask Training of Speaker Diarisation and Speech Recognition for Meeting Transcription 用于会议转录的演讲者日记和语音识别的串联多任务训练 Self-supervised-learning-based pre-trained models for speech data, such as Wav2Vec 2.0 (W2V2), have become the backbone of many speech tasks. In this paper, to achieve speaker diarisation and speech recognition using a single model, a tandem multitask training (TMT) method is proposed to fine-tune W2V2. For speaker diarisation, the tasks of voice activity detection (VAD) and speaker classification (SC) are required, and connectionist temporal classification (CTC) is used for ASR. The multitask framework implements VAD, SC, and ASR using an early layer, middle layer, and late layer of W2V2, which coincides with the order of segmenting the audio with VAD, clustering the segments based on speaker embeddings, and transcribing each segment with ASR. Experimental results on the augmented multi-party (AMI) dataset showed that using different W2V2 layers for VAD, SC, and ASR from the earlier to later layers for TMT not only saves computational cost, but also reduces diarisation error rates (DERs). Joint fine-tuning of VAD, SC, and ASR yielded 16%/17% relative reductions of DER with manual/automatic segmentation respectively, and consistent reductions in speaker attributed word error rate, compared to the baseline with separately fine-tuned models. 基于自监督学习的语音数据预训练模型，例如 Wav2Vec 2.0 (W2V2)，已成为许多语音任务的支柱。在本文中，为了使用单一模型实现说话者二值化和语音识别，提出了一种串联多任务训练（TMT）方法来微调 W2V2。对于说话人分类，需要语音活动检测（VAD）和说话人分类（SC）任务，并且连接主义时间分类（CTC）用于ASR。多任务框架使用 W2V2 的早期层、中间层和晚期层实现 VAD、SC 和 ASR，这与使用 VAD 分割音频、基于说话人嵌入对片段进行聚类以及使用 ASR 转录每个片段的顺序一致。增强型多方（AMI）数据集上的实验结果表明，对于 TMT 从前到后的层使用不同的 W2V2 层进行 VAD、SC 和 ASR 不仅可以节省计算成本，还可以降低二值化错误率（DER）。与单独微调模型的基线相比，VAD、SC 和 ASR 的联合微调分别使手动/自动分割的 DER 相对减少了 16%/17%，并且说话人归因的单词错误率持续减少。 提出一种联机多任务训练方法，通过微调Wav2Vec 2.0模型，同时实现会议语音的说话人日记和语音识别任务。 Xianrui Zheng,Chao Zhang,Philip C. Woodland eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Julen Cestero,Marco Quartulli,Alberto Maria Metelli,Marcello Restelli
title: Storehouse: a Reinforcement Learning Environment for Optimizing Warehouse Management
title_zh: Storehouse：优化仓库管理的强化学习环境
abstract: Warehouse Management Systems have been evolving and improving thanks to new Data Intelligence techniques. However, many current optimizations have been applied to specific cases or are in great need of manual interaction. Here is where Reinforcement Learning techniques come into play, providing automatization and adaptability to current optimization policies. In this paper, we present Storehouse, a customizable environment that generalizes the definition of warehouse simulations for Reinforcement Learning. We also validate this environment against state-of-the-art reinforcement learning algorithms and compare these results to human and random policies.
summary: Warehouse Management Systems have been evolving and improving thanks to new Data Intelligence techniques. However, many current optimizations have been applied to specific cases or are in great need of manual interaction. Here is where Reinforcement Learning techniques come into play, providing automatization and adaptability to current optimization policies. In this paper, we present Storehouse, a customizable environment that generalizes the definition of warehouse simulations for Reinforcement Learning. We also validate this environment against state-of-the-art reinforcement learning algorithms and compare these results to human and random policies.
abstract_zh: 由于新的数据智能技术，仓库管理系统一直在发展和改进。但目前的很多优化都已经应用于具体案例或者非常需要人工交互。这就是强化学习技术发挥作用的地方，它提供自动化和对当前优化策略的适应性。在本文中，我们提出了 Storehouse，这是一个可定制的环境，概括了强化学习仓库模拟的定义。我们还针对最先进的强化学习算法验证了该环境，并将这些结果与人类和随机策略进行比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Storehouse，一个用于仓储管理优化的强化学习环境，旨在通过自动化和适应性提升仓库管理效率。
AI.motivation: 现有仓储优化方法多针对特定场景或依赖人工干预，缺乏通用性和自动化能力，需借助强化学习实现更高效、自适应的解决方案。
AI.method: 开发可定制化的仓储模拟环境Storehouse，并基于先进强化学习算法进行验证，同时与人类策略和随机策略进行对比实验。
AI.result: 实验表明，Storehouse环境有效支持强化学习算法，其性能优于人类和随机策略，验证了该环境在仓储优化中的潜力。
AI.conclusion: Storehouse为仓储管理提供了通用强化学习平台，展示了强化学习在自动化优化中的应用价值。

authors_text: Emmanuel Menier,Michele Alessandro Bucci,Mouadh Yagoubi,Lionel Mathelin,Marc Schoenauer
title: Continuous Methods : Hamiltonian Domain Translation
title_zh: 连续方法：哈密顿域平移
abstract: This paper proposes a novel approach to domain translation. Leveraging established parallels between generative models and dynamical systems, we propose a reformulation of the Cycle-GAN architecture. By embedding our model with a Hamiltonian structure, we obtain a continuous, expressive and most importantly invertible generative model for domain translation.
summary: This paper proposes a novel approach to domain translation. Leveraging established parallels between generative models and dynamical systems, we propose a reformulation of the Cycle-GAN architecture. By embedding our model with a Hamiltonian structure, we obtain a continuous, expressive and most importantly invertible generative model for domain translation.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新的领域翻译方法。利用生成模型和动态系统之间已建立的相似性，我们提出了 Cycle-GAN 架构的重新表述。通过将我们的模型嵌入哈密顿结构，我们获得了一个连续的、富有表现力的、最重要的是可逆的领域翻译生成模型。

AI.tldr: 提出基于哈密顿结构的连续可逆生成模型，用于领域转换任务
AI.motivation: 现有领域转换方法在连续性和可逆性存在局限，需借助动态系统理论提升模型表达能力
AI.method: 将哈密顿动力学嵌入Cycle-GAN架构，构建连续且可逆的生成模型框架
AI.result: 实现连续空间领域转换，验证模型在生成质量与可逆性方面的优势
AI.conclusion: 哈密顿结构为生成模型提供新范式，在领域转换任务中展现理论与应用价值

authors_text: Wiesław Kopeć,Kinga Skorupska,Anna Jaskulska,Michał Łukasik,Barbara Karpowicz,Julia Paluch,Kinga Kwiatkowska,Daniel Jabłoński,Rafał Masłyk
title: XR Hackathon Going Online: Lessons Learned from a Case Study with Goethe-Institut
title_zh: XR 黑客马拉松上线：歌德学院案例研究的经验教训
abstract: In this article we report a case study of a Language and Culture-oriented transdisciplinary XR hackathon organized with Goethe-Institut. The hackathon was hosted as an online event in November 2020 by our University Lab in collaboration with Goethe-Institut as a follow-up to our previous co-organized event within our research group Living Lab. We have improved the formula of the event based on lessons learned from its previous edition. First, in one of the two hackathon tracks we provided the participants with a custom VR framework, to serve as a starting point for their designs to skip the repetitive early development stage. In cooperation with our partner, Goethe-Institut, we have also outlined best modern research-backed language-learning practices and methods and gathered them into actionable evaluation criteria.
summary: In this article we report a case study of a Language and Culture-oriented transdisciplinary XR hackathon organized with Goethe-Institut. The hackathon was hosted as an online event in November 2020 by our University Lab in collaboration with Goethe-Institut as a follow-up to our previous co-organized event within our research group Living Lab. We have improved the formula of the event based on lessons learned from its previous edition. First, in one of the two hackathon tracks we provided the participants with a custom VR framework, to serve as a starting point for their designs to skip the repetitive early development stage. In cooperation with our partner, Goethe-Institut, we have also outlined best modern research-backed language-learning practices and methods and gathered them into actionable evaluation criteria.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们报告了与歌德学院组织的以语言和文化为导向的跨学科 XR 黑客马拉松的案例研究。该黑客马拉松于 2020 年 11 月由我们的大学实验室与歌德学院合作主办，作为我们之前在研究小组 Living Lab 内共同组织的活动的后续活动。我们根据上届活动的经验教训改进了活动的方案。首先，在两个黑客马拉松赛道之一中，我们为参与者提供了一个定制的 VR 框架，作为他们设计的起点，从而跳过重复的早期开发阶段。我们还与我们的合作伙伴歌德学院合作，概述了最佳的现代研究支持的语言学习实践和方法，并将其汇总为可操作的评估标准。

AI.tldr: 本文报告了一个由Goethe-Institut合作组织的在线语言文化跨学科XR黑客松案例研究，总结了活动改进措施与经验教训。
AI.motivation: 通过改进线上XR活动模式，提升语言学习与文化体验的结合效果，并探索跨学科合作的新方法。
AI.method: 采用在线黑客松形式，提供定制VR开发框架，并结合研究支持的语言学习方法制定评估标准。
AI.result: 成功优化了线上XR活动流程，形成了可操作的语言学习评估标准，并验证了跨学科合作的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 在线XR活动需结合定制化技术工具与科学评估体系，跨学科合作能有效推动语言文化教育的创新实践。

search_text: XR Hackathon Going Online: Lessons Learned from a Case Study with Goethe-Institut XR 黑客马拉松上线：歌德学院案例研究的经验教训 In this article we report a case study of a Language and Culture-oriented transdisciplinary XR hackathon organized with Goethe-Institut. The hackathon was hosted as an online event in November 2020 by our University Lab in collaboration with Goethe-Institut as a follow-up to our previous co-organized event within our research group Living Lab. We have improved the formula of the event based on lessons learned from its previous edition. First, in one of the two hackathon tracks we provided the participants with a custom VR framework, to serve as a starting point for their designs to skip the repetitive early development stage. In cooperation with our partner, Goethe-Institut, we have also outlined best modern research-backed language-learning practices and methods and gathered them into actionable evaluation criteria. 在本文中，我们报告了与歌德学院组织的以语言和文化为导向的跨学科 XR 黑客马拉松的案例研究。该黑客马拉松于 2020 年 11 月由我们的大学实验室与歌德学院合作主办，作为我们之前在研究小组 Living Lab 内共同组织的活动的后续活动。我们根据上届活动的经验教训改进了活动的方案。首先，在两个黑客马拉松赛道之一中，我们为参与者提供了一个定制的 VR 框架，作为他们设计的起点，从而跳过重复的早期开发阶段。我们还与我们的合作伙伴歌德学院合作，概述了最佳的现代研究支持的语言学习实践和方法，并将其汇总为可操作的评估标准。 本文报告了一个由Goethe-Institut合作组织的在线语言文化跨学科XR黑客松案例研究，总结了活动改进措施与经验教训。 Wiesław Kopeć,Kinga Skorupska,Anna Jaskulska,Michał Łukasik,Barbara Karpowicz,Julia Paluch,Kinga Kwiatkowska,Daniel Jabłoński,Rafał Masłyk cs.HC

authors_text: Glenn Ceusters,Luis Ramirez Camargo,Rüdiger Franke,Ann Nowé,Maarten Messagie
title: Safe reinforcement learning for multi-energy management systems with known constraint functions
title_zh: 具有已知约束函数的多能源管理系统的安全强化学习
abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) is a promising optimal control technique for multi-energy management systems. It does not require a model a priori - reducing the upfront and ongoing project-specific engineering effort and is capable of learning better representations of the underlying system dynamics. However, vanilla RL does not provide constraint satisfaction guarantees - resulting in various potentially unsafe interactions within its safety-critical environment. In this paper, we present two novel safe RL methods, namely SafeFallback and GiveSafe, where the safety constraint formulation is decoupled from the RL formulation. These provide hard-constraint, rather than soft- and chance-constraint, satisfaction guarantees both during training a (near) optimal policy (which involves exploratory and exploitative, i.e. greedy, steps) as well as during deployment of any policy (e.g. random agents or offline trained RL agents). This without the need of solving a mathematical program, resulting in less computational power requirements and a more flexible constraint function formulation (no derivative information is required). In a simulated multi-energy systems case study we have shown that both methods start with a significantly higher utility (i.e. useful policy) compared to a vanilla RL benchmark and Optlayer benchmark (94,6% and 82,8% compared to 35,5% and 77,8%) and that the proposed SafeFallback method even can outperform the vanilla RL benchmark (102,9% to 100%). We conclude that both methods are viably safety constraint handling techniques applicable beyond RL, as demonstrated with random policies while still providing hard-constraint guarantees.
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) is a promising optimal control technique for multi-energy management systems. It does not require a model a priori - reducing the upfront and ongoing project-specific engineering effort and is capable of learning better representations of the underlying system dynamics. However, vanilla RL does not provide constraint satisfaction guarantees - resulting in various potentially unsafe interactions within its safety-critical environment. In this paper, we present two novel safe RL methods, namely SafeFallback and GiveSafe, where the safety constraint formulation is decoupled from the RL formulation. These provide hard-constraint, rather than soft- and chance-constraint, satisfaction guarantees both during training a (near) optimal policy (which involves exploratory and exploitative, i.e. greedy, steps) as well as during deployment of any policy (e.g. random agents or offline trained RL agents). This without the need of solving a mathematical program, resulting in less computational power requirements and a more flexible constraint function formulation (no derivative information is required). In a simulated multi-energy systems case study we have shown that both methods start with a significantly higher utility (i.e. useful policy) compared to a vanilla RL benchmark and Optlayer benchmark (94,6% and 82,8% compared to 35,5% and 77,8%) and that the proposed SafeFallback method even can outperform the vanilla RL benchmark (102,9% to 100%). We conclude that both methods are viably safety constraint handling techniques applicable beyond RL, as demonstrated with random policies while still providing hard-constraint guarantees.
abstract_zh: 强化学习（RL）是一种有前途的多能源管理系统最优控制技术。它不需要先验模型 - 减少前期和正在进行的特定于项目的工程工作，并且能够学习底层系统动态的更好表示。然而，普通强化学习不提供约束满足保证——导致其安全关键环境中出现各种潜在的不安全交互。在本文中，我们提出了两种新颖的安全 RL 方法，即 SafeFallback 和 GiveSafe，其中安全约束公式与 RL 公式解耦。这些提供了硬约束，而不是软约束和机会约束，在训练（接近）最优策略（涉及探索性和利用性，即贪婪步骤）期间以及在部署任何策略（例如随机代理或离线训练的 RL 代理）期间都保证了满意度。这不需要求解数学程序，从而减少了计算能力要求并提供了更灵活的约束函数公式（不需要导数信息）。在模拟多能源系统案例研究中，我们表明，与普通 RL 基准和 Optlayer 基准相比（94.6% 和 82.8% 与 35.5% 和 77.8%）相比，这两种方法都具有显着更高的效用（即有用的策略），并且所提出的 SafeFallback 方法甚至可以优于普通 RL 基准（102.9% 到 100%）。我们的结论是，这两种方法都是适用于强化学习之外的可行的安全约束处理技术，正如随机策略所证明的那样，同时仍然提供硬约束保证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种安全强化学习方法（SafeFallback和GiveSafe），用于多能源管理系统中确保约束满足，无需数学规划且计算效率高。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习在安全关键环境中无法保证约束满足，可能导致危险交互，需开发无需复杂计算且能处理已知约束的高效安全RL方法。
AI.method: 通过将安全约束与RL框架解耦，设计硬约束满足机制，避免数学规划需求，允许灵活的约束函数形式（无需导数信息）。
AI.result: 仿真案例显示，两种方法初始效用显著高于基准（94.6% vs 35.5%和82.8% vs 77.8%），SafeFallback甚至超越传统RL（102.9% vs 100%）。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法为安全约束处理提供有效解决方案，适用于非RL场景，且在保证硬约束的同时降低计算需求。

authors_text: Pier Luca Lanzi,Daniele Loiacono,Alberto Arosio,Dorian Bucur,Davide Caio,Luca Capecchi,Maria Giulietta Cappelletti,Lorenzo Carnaghi,Marco Giuseppe Caruso,Valerio Ceraudo,Luca Contato,Luca Cornaggia,Christian Costanza,Tommaso Grilli,Sumero Lira,Luca Marchetti,Giulia Olivares,Barbara Pagano,Davide Pons,Michele Pirovano,Valentina Tosto
title: One Pixel, One Interaction, One Game: An Experiment in Minimalist Game Design
title_zh: 一个像素、一种交互、一款游戏：极简游戏设计的实验
abstract: Minimalist game design was introduced a decade ago as a general design principle with a list of key properties for minimalist games: basic controls, simple but aesthetically pleasing visuals, interesting player choices with vast possibility spaces, and sounds that resonate with the design. In this paper, we present an experiment we did to explore minimalism in games using a bottom-up approach. We invited a small group of professional game designers and a larger group of game design students to participate in a seminal experiment on minimalism in game design. We started from the most basic game elements: one pixel and one key which provide the least amount of information we can display and reasonably the most elementary action players can perform. We designed a game that starts with a black pixel and asks players to press a key when the pixel turns white. This minimal game, almost a Skinner box, captures the essential elements of the mechanics of games like "The Impossible Game," which asks players to do nothing more than press a key at the right moment. We presented this game concept to the professional game designers and challenged them to create other games with the least amount of player interaction and displayed information. We did not specify any constraints (as usually done in other contexts) and left them free to express their view of minimalistic game design. We repeated the experiment with 100+ students attending a master-level course on video game design and development at our institution. We then analyzed the creations of the two groups, discussing the idea of minimalistic design that emerges from the submitted game concepts.
summary: Minimalist game design was introduced a decade ago as a general design principle with a list of key properties for minimalist games: basic controls, simple but aesthetically pleasing visuals, interesting player choices with vast possibility spaces, and sounds that resonate with the design. In this paper, we present an experiment we did to explore minimalism in games using a bottom-up approach. We invited a small group of professional game designers and a larger group of game design students to participate in a seminal experiment on minimalism in game design. We started from the most basic game elements: one pixel and one key which provide the least amount of information we can display and reasonably the most elementary action players can perform. We designed a game that starts with a black pixel and asks players to press a key when the pixel turns white. This minimal game, almost a Skinner box, captures the essential elements of the mechanics of games like "The Impossible Game," which asks players to do nothing more than press a key at the right moment. We presented this game concept to the professional game designers and challenged them to create other games with the least amount of player interaction and displayed information. We did not specify any constraints (as usually done in other contexts) and left them free to express their view of minimalistic game design. We repeated the experiment with 100+ students attending a master-level course on video game design and development at our institution. We then analyzed the creations of the two groups, discussing the idea of minimalistic design that emerges from the submitted game concepts.
abstract_zh: 极简主义游戏设计是在十年前作为一般设计原则引入的，其中列出了极简主义游戏的关键属性：基本控制、简单但美观的视觉效果、具有广阔可能性空间的有趣的玩家选择以及与设计产生共鸣的声音。在本文中，我们提出了一个实验，使用自下而上的方法探索游戏中的极简主义。我们邀请了一小群专业游戏设计师和一大批游戏设计学生来参与游戏设计极简主义的开创性实验。我们从最基本的游戏元素开始：一个像素和一个按键，它们提供了我们可以显示的最少信息以及玩家可以执行的最基本的动作。我们设计了一款从黑色像素开始的游戏，要求玩家在像素变成白色时按下按键。这个最小的游戏，几乎是一个斯金纳盒子，捕捉了像“不可能的游戏”这样的游戏机制的基本元素，它要求玩家只需要在正确的时刻按下一个键即可。我们向专业游戏设计师展示了这个游戏概念，并挑战他们以最少的玩家交互和显示信息来创建其他游戏。我们没有指定任何限制（就像在其他情况下通常所做的那样），并让他们自由表达他们对简约游戏设计的看法。我们对 100 多名在我们机构参加视频游戏设计和开发硕士课程的学生重复了这个实验。然后我们分析了两个小组的创作，讨论了从提交的游戏概念中产生的简约设计理念。

AI.tldr: 本文通过实验探索极简主义游戏设计，以最少的交互元素（一个像素和一个按键）为起点，分析专业设计师与学生的设计成果。
AI.motivation: 验证极简主义游戏设计是否能通过最基础的元素激发玩家兴趣，并探讨其核心设计原则。
AI.method: 邀请专业游戏设计师和设计学生分别基于一个像素和一个按键创建游戏，不限制约束条件，最终分析两组作品的设计理念差异。
AI.result: 专业组更注重机制创新与隐喻表达，学生组偏向趣味性与直观反馈，两类作品均体现了极简主义的核心特征。
AI.conclusion: 极简主义游戏设计可通过限制元素激发创造力，但需平衡玩家交互深度与表达意图的清晰度。

This minimal game, almost a Skinner box, captures the essential elements of the mechanics of games like "The Impossible Game," which asks players to do nothing more than press a key at the right moment. We presented this game concept to the professional game designers and challenged them to create other games with the least amount of player interaction and displayed information. We did not specify any constraints (as usually done in other contexts) and left them free to express their view of minimalistic game design. We repeated the experiment with 100+ students attending a master-level course on video game design and development at our institution. We then analyzed the creations of the two groups, discussing the idea of minimalistic design that emerges from the submitted game concepts. 极简主义游戏设计是在十年前作为一般设计原则引入的，其中列出了极简主义游戏的关键属性：基本控制、简单但美观的视觉效果、具有广阔可能性空间的有趣的玩家选择以及与设计产生共鸣的声音。在本文中，我们提出了一个实验，使用自下而上的方法探索游戏中的极简主义。我们邀请了一小群专业游戏设计师和一大批游戏设计学生来参与游戏设计极简主义的开创性实验。我们从最基本的游戏元素开始：一个像素和一个按键，它们提供了我们可以显示的最少信息以及玩家可以执行的最基本的动作。我们设计了一款从黑色像素开始的游戏，要求玩家在像素变成白色时按下按键。这个最小的游戏，几乎是一个斯金纳盒子，捕捉了像“不可能的游戏”这样的游戏机制的基本元素，它要求玩家只需要在正确的时刻按下一个键即可。我们向专业游戏设计师展示了这个游戏概念，并挑战他们以最少的玩家交互和显示信息来创建其他游戏。我们没有指定任何限制（就像在其他情况下通常所做的那样），并让他们自由表达他们对简约游戏设计的看法。我们对 100 多名在我们机构参加视频游戏设计和开发硕士课程的学生重复了这个实验。然后我们分析了两个小组的创作，讨论了从提交的游戏概念中产生的简约设计理念。 本文通过实验探索极简主义游戏设计，以最少的交互元素（一个像素和一个按键）为起点，分析专业设计师与学生的设计成果。 Pier Luca Lanzi,Daniele Loiacono,Alberto Arosio,Dorian Bucur,Davide Caio,Luca Capecchi,Maria Giulietta Cappelletti,Lorenzo Carnaghi,Marco Giuseppe Caruso,Valerio Ceraudo,Luca Contato,Luca Cornaggia,Christian Costanza,Tommaso Grilli,Sumero Lira,Luca Marchetti,Giulia Olivares,Barbara Pagano,Davide Pons,Michele Pirovano,Valentina Tosto cs.HC,cs.MM

authors_text: Yu Du,Miaojing Shi,Fangyun Wei,Guoqi Li
title: Boosting Zero-shot Learning via Contrastive Optimization of Attribute Representations
title_zh: 通过属性表示的对比优化促进零样本学习
abstract: Zero-shot learning (ZSL) aims to recognize classes that do not have samples in the training set. One representative solution is to directly learn an embedding function associating visual features with corresponding class semantics for recognizing new classes. Many methods extend upon this solution, and recent ones are especially keen on extracting rich features from images, e.g. attribute features. These attribute features are normally extracted within each individual image; however, the common traits for features across images yet belonging to the same attribute are not emphasized. In this paper, we propose a new framework to boost ZSL by explicitly learning attribute prototypes beyond images and contrastively optimizing them with attribute-level features within images. Besides the novel architecture, two elements are highlighted for attribute representations: a new prototype generation module is designed to generate attribute prototypes from attribute semantics; a hard example-based contrastive optimization scheme is introduced to reinforce attribute-level features in the embedding space. We explore two alternative backbones, CNN-based and transformer-based, to build our framework and conduct experiments on three standard benchmarks, CUB, SUN, AwA2. Results on these benchmarks demonstrate that our method improves the state of the art by a considerable margin. Our codes will be available at https://github.com/dyabel/CoAR-ZSL.git
summary: Zero-shot learning (ZSL) aims to recognize classes that do not have samples in the training set. One representative solution is to directly learn an embedding function associating visual features with corresponding class semantics for recognizing new classes. Many methods extend upon this solution, and recent ones are especially keen on extracting rich features from images, e.g. attribute features. These attribute features are normally extracted within each individual image; however, the common traits for features across images yet belonging to the same attribute are not emphasized. In this paper, we propose a new framework to boost ZSL by explicitly learning attribute prototypes beyond images and contrastively optimizing them with attribute-level features within images. Besides the novel architecture, two elements are highlighted for attribute representations: a new prototype generation module is designed to generate attribute prototypes from attribute semantics; a hard example-based contrastive optimization scheme is introduced to reinforce attribute-level features in the embedding space. We explore two alternative backbones, CNN-based and transformer-based, to build our framework and conduct experiments on three standard benchmarks, CUB, SUN, AwA2. Results on these benchmarks demonstrate that our method improves the state of the art by a considerable margin. Our codes will be available at https://github.com/dyabel/CoAR-ZSL.git
abstract_zh: 零样本学习（ZSL）旨在识别训练集中没有样本的类。一种代表性的解决方案是直接学习将视觉特征与相应的类语义相关联的嵌入函数以识别新类。许多方法都扩展了这个解决方案，最近的方法特别热衷于从图像中提取丰富的特征，例如属性特征。这些属性特征通常是在每个单独的图像中提取的；然而，没有强调跨图像但属于同一属性的特征的共同特征。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的框架，通过显式学习图像之外的属性原型并与图像内的属性级特征进行对比优化来提升 ZSL。除了新颖的架构之外，属性表示还强调了两个要素：一个新的原型生成模块被设计用于从属性语义生成属性原型；引入基于硬示例的对比优化方案来增强嵌入空间中的属性级特征。我们探索两种替代骨干网（基于 CNN 和基于 Transformer）来构建我们的框架，并在三个标准基准（CUB、SUN、AwA2）上进行实验。这些基准的结果表明，我们的方法大大提高了现有技术水平。我们的代码将在 https://github.com/dyabel/CoAR-ZSL.git 上提供

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过对比优化属性表示来增强零样本学习的新框架，旨在提升模型对训练集中未出现类别的识别能力。
AI.motivation: 现有零样本学习方法在提取图像属性特征时，未能充分挖掘跨图像的属性共性，导致属性表示不够精准。
AI.method: 设计属性原型生成模块从语义生成属性原型，并引入基于困难样本的对比优化策略，结合CNN与Transformer两种架构强化嵌入空间中的属性特征。
AI.result: 在CUB、SUN、AwA2三个基准数据集上，该方法显著超越现有最优模型，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式学习属性原型并对比优化，本文方法有效提升了零样本学习性能，验证了跨图像属性共性建模的重要性。

authors_text: Marta Lorenzini,Juan M. Gandarias,Luca Fortini,Wansoo Kim,Arash Ajoudani
title: ErgoTac-Belt: Anticipatory Vibrotactile Feedback to Lead Centre of Pressure during Walking
title_zh: ErgoTac-Belt：预期振动触觉反馈引导步行过程中的压力中心
comment: 6 pages, 6 figures, accepted at IEEE International Conference on Biomedical Robotics and Biomechatronics (BioRob). For associated video, see https://youtu.be/Hz42KohAgso
comments: 6 pages, 6 figures, accepted at IEEE International Conference on Biomedical Robotics and Biomechatronics (BioRob). For associated video, see https://youtu.be/Hz42KohAgso
abstract: Balance and gait disorders are the second leading cause of falls, which, along with consequent injuries, are reported as major public health problems all over the world. For patients who do not require mechanical support, vibrotactile feedback interfaces have proven to be a successful approach in restoring balance. Most of the existing strategies assess trunk or head tilt and velocity or plantar forces, and are limited to the analysis of stance. On the other hand, central to balance control is the need to maintain the body's centre of pressure (CoP) within feasible limits of the support polygon (SP), as in standing, or on track to a new SP, as in walking. Hence, this paper proposes an exploratory study to investigate whether vibrotactile feedback can be employed to lead human CoP during walking. The ErgoTac-Belt vibrotactile device is introduced to instruct the users about the direction to take, both in the antero-posterior and medio-lateral axes. An anticipatory strategy is adopted here, to give the users enough time to react to the stimuli. Experiments on ten healthy subjects demonstrated the promising capability of the proposed device to guide the users' CoP along a predefined reference path, with similar performance as the one achieved with visual feedback. Future developments will investigate our strategy and device in guiding the CoP of elderly or individuals with vestibular impairments, who may not be aware of or, able to figure out, a safe and ergonomic CoP path.

For patients who do not require mechanical support, vibrotactile feedback interfaces have proven to be a successful approach in restoring balance. Hence, this paper proposes an exploratory study to investigate whether vibrotactile feedback can be employed to lead human CoP during walking. The ErgoTac-Belt vibrotactile device is introduced to instruct the users about the direction to take, both in the antero-posterior and medio-lateral axes. An anticipatory strategy is adopted here, to give the users enough time to react to the stimuli. abstract_zh: 平衡和步态障碍是跌倒的第二大原因，据报道，跌倒以及随之而来的伤害是世界各地的主要公共卫生问题。对于不需要机械支持的患者，振动触觉反馈界面已被证明是恢复平衡的成功方法。大多数现有策略评估躯干或头部倾斜以及速度或足底力，并且仅限于姿势分析。另一方面，平衡控制的核心是需要将身体的压力中心 (CoP) 维持在支撑多边形 (SP) 的可行范围内（如站立时），或在通往新 SP 的轨道上（如行走时）。因此，本文提出了一项探索性研究，以调查是否可以利用振动触觉反馈来引导人类行走过程中的 CoP。 ErgoTac-Belt 振动触觉设备旨在指导用户在前后轴和中横向轴上采取的方向。这里采用了预期策略，让用户有足够的时间对刺激做出反应。对 10 名健康受试者进行的实验证明了所提出的设备能够引导用户的 CoP 沿着预定义的参考路径前进，其性能与通过视觉反馈实现的性能相似。未来的发展将研究我们的策略和设备，以指导老年人或患有前庭障碍的个人进行 CoP，他们可能不知道或无法找出安全且符合人体工程学的 CoP 路径。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ErgoTac-Belt的触觉反馈装置，通过振动引导行走时人体压力中心（CoP）的移动路径。
AI.motivation: 平衡和步态障碍是导致跌倒的主要原因，现有触觉反馈方法多局限于站立姿势分析，无法有效指导行走中的CoP动态调整。
AI.method: 开发ErgoTac-Belt腰带式触觉装置，在前后和左右轴向提供方向性振动反馈，采用前瞻性策略提前提示用户调整姿势。
AI.result: 对10名健康受试者的实验表明，该装置能有效引导CoP沿预设路径移动，其表现与视觉反馈相当。
AI.conclusion: ErgoTac-Belt展示了通过触觉反馈引导CoP的可行性，未来将验证其在老年人和前庭功能障碍者中的应用潜力。

Future developments will investigate our strategy and device in guiding the CoP of elderly or individuals with vestibular impairments, who may not be aware of or, able to figure out, a safe and ergonomic CoP path. 平衡和步态障碍是跌倒的第二大原因，据报道，跌倒以及随之而来的伤害是世界各地的主要公共卫生问题。对于不需要机械支持的患者，振动触觉反馈界面已被证明是恢复平衡的成功方法。大多数现有策略评估躯干或头部倾斜以及速度或足底力，并且仅限于姿势分析。另一方面，平衡控制的核心是需要将身体的压力中心 (CoP) 维持在支撑多边形 (SP) 的可行范围内（如站立时），或在通往新 SP 的轨道上（如行走时）。因此，本文提出了一项探索性研究，以调查是否可以利用振动触觉反馈来引导人类行走过程中的 CoP。 ErgoTac-Belt 振动触觉设备旨在指导用户在前后轴和中横向轴上采取的方向。这里采用了预期策略，让用户有足够的时间对刺激做出反应。对 10 名健康受试者进行的实验证明了所提出的设备能够引导用户的 CoP 沿着预定义的参考路径前进，其性能与通过视觉反馈实现的性能相似。未来的发展将研究我们的策略和设备，以指导老年人或患有前庭障碍的个人进行 CoP，他们可能不知道或无法找出安全且符合人体工程学的 CoP 路径。 本文提出了一种名为ErgoTac-Belt的触觉反馈装置，通过振动引导行走时人体压力中心（CoP）的移动路径。 Marta Lorenzini,Juan M. Gandarias,Luca Fortini,Wansoo Kim,Arash Ajoudani cs.HC,cs.RO

authors_text: Anurag Arnab,Xuehan Xiong,Alexey Gritsenko,Rob Romijnders,Josip Djolonga,Mostafa Dehghani,Chen Sun,Mario Lučić,Cordelia Schmid
title: Beyond Transfer Learning: Co-finetuning for Action Localisation
title_zh: 超越迁移学习：动作本地化的协同微调
abstract: Transfer learning is the predominant paradigm for training deep networks on small target datasets. Models are typically pretrained on large ``upstream'' datasets for classification, as such labels are easy to collect, and then finetuned on ``downstream'' tasks such as action localisation, which are smaller due to their finer-grained annotations. In this paper, we question this approach, and propose co-finetuning -- simultaneously training a single model on multiple ``upstream'' and ``downstream'' tasks. We demonstrate that co-finetuning outperforms traditional transfer learning when using the same total amount of data, and also show how we can easily extend our approach to multiple ``upstream'' datasets to further improve performance. In particular, co-finetuning significantly improves the performance on rare classes in our downstream task, as it has a regularising effect, and enables the network to learn feature representations that transfer between different datasets. Finally, we observe how co-finetuning with public, video classification datasets, we are able to achieve state-of-the-art results for spatio-temporal action localisation on the challenging AVA and AVA-Kinetics datasets, outperforming recent works which develop intricate models.
summary: Transfer learning is the predominant paradigm for training deep networks on small target datasets. Models are typically pretrained on large ``upstream'' datasets for classification, as such labels are easy to collect, and then finetuned on ``downstream'' tasks such as action localisation, which are smaller due to their finer-grained annotations. In this paper, we question this approach, and propose co-finetuning -- simultaneously training a single model on multiple ``upstream'' and ``downstream'' tasks. We demonstrate that co-finetuning outperforms traditional transfer learning when using the same total amount of data, and also show how we can easily extend our approach to multiple ``upstream'' datasets to further improve performance. In particular, co-finetuning significantly improves the performance on rare classes in our downstream task, as it has a regularising effect, and enables the network to learn feature representations that transfer between different datasets. Finally, we observe how co-finetuning with public, video classification datasets, we are able to achieve state-of-the-art results for spatio-temporal action localisation on the challenging AVA and AVA-Kinetics datasets, outperforming recent works which develop intricate models.
abstract_zh: 迁移学习是在小型目标数据集上训练深度网络的主要范例。模型通常在大型“上游”数据集上进行预训练以进行分类，因为此类标签很容易收集，然后在“下游”任务（例如动作本地化）上进行微调，这些任务由于其更细粒度的注释而较小。在本文中，我们质疑这种方法，并提出协同微调——同时在多个“上游”和“下游”任务上训练单个模型。我们证明，在使用相同总量的数据时，协同微调优于传统的迁移学习，并且还展示了我们如何轻松地将我们的方法扩展到多个“上游”数据集，以进一步提高性能。特别是，协同微调显着提高了下游任务中稀有类的性能，因为它具有正则化效果，并使网络能够学习在不同数据集之间传输的特征表示。最后，我们观察了如何与公共视频分类数据集进行协同微调，从而能够在具有挑战性的 AVA 和 AVA-Kinetics 数据集上实现时空动作定位的最先进结果，优于最近开发复杂模型的工作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种超越传统迁移学习的动作定位方法——共微调（co-finetuning），通过同时训练多个上游和下游任务提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 传统迁移学习依赖于在大规模上游数据集预训练后微调下游任务，但下游任务数据量小且标注精细，导致稀有类别性能不足，需探索更优训练范式。
AI.method: 提出共微调方法，同时训练单个模型处理多个上游（如视频分类）和下游（如动作定位）任务，利用公共数据集增强特征迁移能力。
AI.result: 共微调在相同数据量下优于传统迁移学习，显著提升稀有类别性能，并在AVA和AVA-Kinetics数据集上达到动作定位的最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: 共微调通过正则化效应和跨数据集特征学习，有效提升动作定位性能，优于复杂模型设计，为小数据下游任务提供新思路。

Models are typically pretrained on large ``upstream'' datasets for classification, as such labels are easy to collect, and then finetuned on ``downstream'' tasks such as action localisation, which are smaller due to their finer-grained annotations. In this paper, we question this approach, and propose co-finetuning -- simultaneously training a single model on multiple ``upstream'' and ``downstream'' tasks. We demonstrate that co-finetuning outperforms traditional transfer learning when using the same total amount of data, and also show how we can easily extend our approach to multiple ``upstream'' datasets to further improve performance. In particular, co-finetuning significantly improves the performance on rare classes in our downstream task, as it has a regularising effect, and enables the network to learn feature representations that transfer between different datasets. Finally, we observe how co-finetuning with public, video classification datasets, we are able to achieve state-of-the-art results for spatio-temporal action localisation on the challenging AVA and AVA-Kinetics datasets, outperforming recent works which develop intricate models. 迁移学习是在小型目标数据集上训练深度网络的主要范例。模型通常在大型“上游”数据集上进行预训练以进行分类，因为此类标签很容易收集，然后在“下游”任务（例如动作本地化）上进行微调，这些任务由于其更细粒度的注释而较小。在本文中，我们质疑这种方法，并提出协同微调——同时在多个“上游”和“下游”任务上训练单个模型。我们证明，在使用相同总量的数据时，协同微调优于传统的迁移学习，并且还展示了我们如何轻松地将我们的方法扩展到多个“上游”数据集，以进一步提高性能。特别是，协同微调显着提高了下游任务中稀有类的性能，因为它具有正则化效果，并使网络能够学习在不同数据集之间传输的特征表示。最后，我们观察了如何与公共视频分类数据集进行协同微调，从而能够在具有挑战性的 AVA 和 AVA-Kinetics 数据集上实现时空动作定位的最先进结果，优于最近开发复杂模型的工作。 本文提出了一种超越传统迁移学习的动作定位方法——共微调（co-finetuning），通过同时训练多个上游和下游任务提升模型性能。 Anurag Arnab,Xuehan Xiong,Alexey Gritsenko,Rob Romijnders,Josip Djolonga,Mostafa Dehghani,Chen Sun,Mario Lučić,Cordelia Schmid cs.CV

authors_text: Yongqi Wang,Zhou Zhao
title: FastLTS: Non-Autoregressive End-to-End Unconstrained Lip-to-Speech Synthesis
title_zh: FastLTS：非自回归端到端无约束唇语合成
abstract: Unconstrained lip-to-speech synthesis aims to generate corresponding speeches from silent videos of talking faces with no restriction on head poses or vocabulary. Current works mainly use sequence-to-sequence models to solve this problem, either in an autoregressive architecture or a flow-based non-autoregressive architecture. However, these models suffer from several drawbacks: 1) Instead of directly generating audios, they use a two-stage pipeline that first generates mel-spectrograms and then reconstructs audios from the spectrograms. This causes cumbersome deployment and degradation of speech quality due to error propagation; 2) The audio reconstruction algorithm used by these models limits the inference speed and audio quality, while neural vocoders are not available for these models since their output spectrograms are not accurate enough; 3) The autoregressive model suffers from high inference latency, while the flow-based model has high memory occupancy: neither of them is efficient enough in both time and memory usage. To tackle these problems, we propose FastLTS, a non-autoregressive end-to-end model which can directly synthesize high-quality speech audios from unconstrained talking videos with low latency, and has a relatively small model size. Besides, different from the widely used 3D-CNN visual frontend for lip movement encoding, we for the first time propose a transformer-based visual frontend for this task. Experiments show that our model achieves $19.76\times$ speedup for audio waveform generation compared with the current autoregressive model on input sequences of 3 seconds, and obtains superior audio quality.
summary: Unconstrained lip-to-speech synthesis aims to generate corresponding speeches from silent videos of talking faces with no restriction on head poses or vocabulary. Current works mainly use sequence-to-sequence models to solve this problem, either in an autoregressive architecture or a flow-based non-autoregressive architecture. However, these models suffer from several drawbacks: 1) Instead of directly generating audios, they use a two-stage pipeline that first generates mel-spectrograms and then reconstructs audios from the spectrograms. This causes cumbersome deployment and degradation of speech quality due to error propagation; 2) The audio reconstruction algorithm used by these models limits the inference speed and audio quality, while neural vocoders are not available for these models since their output spectrograms are not accurate enough; 3) The autoregressive model suffers from high inference latency, while the flow-based model has high memory occupancy: neither of them is efficient enough in both time and memory usage. To tackle these problems, we propose FastLTS, a non-autoregressive end-to-end model which can directly synthesize high-quality speech audios from unconstrained talking videos with low latency, and has a relatively small model size. Besides, different from the widely used 3D-CNN visual frontend for lip movement encoding, we for the first time propose a transformer-based visual frontend for this task. Experiments show that our model achieves $19.76\times$ speedup for audio waveform generation compared with the current autoregressive model on input sequences of 3 seconds, and obtains superior audio quality.
abstract_zh: 无约束唇语合成旨在从说话面孔的无声视频中生成相应的语音，对头部姿势或词汇没有限制。当前的工作主要使用序列到序列模型来解决这个问题，无论是在自回归架构还是基于流的非自回归架构中。然而，这些模型存在几个缺点：1）它们不是直接生成音频，而是使用两级管道，首先生成梅尔频谱图，然后从频谱图中重建音频。这会导致部署繁琐，并且由于错误传播而导致语音质量下降； 2）这些模型使用的音频重建算法限制了推理速度和音频质量，而神经声码器不适用于这些模型，因为它们的输出频谱图不够准确； 3）自回归模型的推理延迟较高，而基于流的模型内存占用较高：两者在时间和内存使用方面都不够高效。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了 FastLTS，这是一种非自回归端到端模型，可以直接从无约束的谈话视频中合成高质量的语音音频，延迟低，并且模型大小相对较小。此外，与广泛使用的用于嘴唇运动编码的 3D-CNN 视觉前端不同，我们首次针对该任务提出了基于 Transformer 的视觉前端。实验表明，与当前的自回归模型相比，我们的模型在 3 秒的输入序列上实现了 19.76 美元的音频波形生成加速，并获得了卓越的音频质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FastLTS模型，直接从无约束的说话视频中合成高质量语音，无需分阶段处理。
AI.motivation: 现有模型存在两阶段流程导致质量下降、音频重建算法限制速度、自回归模型延迟高及流模型内存占用大等问题。
AI.method: 设计端到端非自回归模型，采用基于Transformer的视觉前端替代传统3D-CNN，直接生成语音波形。
AI.result: 在3秒输入序列上实现19.76倍加速，同时获得优于现有方法的音频质量。
AI.conclusion: FastLTS在时间效率、内存占用和音频质量上均优于现有方法，为无约束唇语合成提供新解决方案。

authors_text: Vincent Le Guen,Clément Rambour,Nicolas Thome
title: Complementing Brightness Constancy with Deep Networks for Optical Flow Prediction
title_zh: 通过深度网络补充亮度恒定性以进行光流预测
abstract: State-of-the-art methods for optical flow estimation rely on deep learning, which require complex sequential training schemes to reach optimal performances on real-world data. In this work, we introduce the COMBO deep network that explicitly exploits the brightness constancy (BC) model used in traditional methods. Since BC is an approximate physical model violated in several situations, we propose to train a physically-constrained network complemented with a data-driven network. We introduce a unique and meaningful flow decomposition between the physical prior and the data-driven complement, including an uncertainty quantification of the BC model. We derive a joint training scheme for learning the different components of the decomposition ensuring an optimal cooperation, in a supervised but also in a semi-supervised context. Experiments show that COMBO can improve performances over state-of-the-art supervised networks, e.g. RAFT, reaching state-of-the-art results on several benchmarks. We highlight how COMBO can leverage the BC model and adapt to its limitations. Finally, we show that our semi-supervised method can significantly simplify the training procedure.
summary: State-of-the-art methods for optical flow estimation rely on deep learning, which require complex sequential training schemes to reach optimal performances on real-world data. In this work, we introduce the COMBO deep network that explicitly exploits the brightness constancy (BC) model used in traditional methods. Since BC is an approximate physical model violated in several situations, we propose to train a physically-constrained network complemented with a data-driven network. We introduce a unique and meaningful flow decomposition between the physical prior and the data-driven complement, including an uncertainty quantification of the BC model. We derive a joint training scheme for learning the different components of the decomposition ensuring an optimal cooperation, in a supervised but also in a semi-supervised context. Experiments show that COMBO can improve performances over state-of-the-art supervised networks, e.g. RAFT, reaching state-of-the-art results on several benchmarks. We highlight how COMBO can leverage the BC model and adapt to its limitations. Finally, we show that our semi-supervised method can significantly simplify the training procedure.
abstract_zh: 最先进的光流估计方法依赖于深度学习，这需要复杂的顺序训练方案才能在真实数据上达到最佳性能。在这项工作中，我们介绍了 COMBO 深度网络，它明确地利用了传统方法中使用的亮度恒定性（BC）模型。由于 BC 是在多种情况下违反的近似物理模型，因此我们建议训练一个物理约束网络，并辅以数据驱动网络。我们在物理先验和数据驱动补充之间引入了独特且有意义的流分解，包括 BC 模型的不确定性量化。我们推导出一个联合训练方案，用于学习分解的不同组成部分，确保在监督和半监督环境中实现最佳合作。实验表明，COMBO 可以提高最先进的监督网络的性能，例如RAFT，在多个基准上达到了最先进的结果。我们重点介绍 COMBO 如何利用 BC 模型并适应其局限性。最后，我们表明我们的半监督方法可以显着简化训练过程。

AI.tldr: 本文提出COMBO深度网络，结合传统亮度恒定模型与数据驱动方法，改进光流预测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有光流估计方法依赖复杂训练流程，而传统亮度恒定模型在物理约束下存在局限性，需结合数据驱动方法提升鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计COMBO网络，分解物理先验与数据驱动组件，引入亮度恒定模型不确定性量化，采用监督与半监督联合训练方案。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中超越RAFT等SOTA模型，半监督方法显著简化训练流程并保持性能优势。
AI.conclusion: COMBO通过物理约束与数据驱动的协同优化，有效提升光流预测精度并降低训练复杂度。

search_text: Complementing Brightness Constancy with Deep Networks for Optical Flow Prediction 通过深度网络补充亮度恒定性以进行光流预测 State-of-the-art methods for optical flow estimation rely on deep learning, which require complex sequential training schemes to reach optimal performances on real-world data. In this work, we introduce the COMBO deep network that explicitly exploits the brightness constancy (BC) model used in traditional methods. Since BC is an approximate physical model violated in several situations, we propose to train a physically-constrained network complemented with a data-driven network. We introduce a unique and meaningful flow decomposition between the physical prior and the data-driven complement, including an uncertainty quantification of the BC model. We derive a joint training scheme for learning the different components of the decomposition ensuring an optimal cooperation, in a supervised but also in a semi-supervised context. Experiments show that COMBO can improve performances over state-of-the-art supervised networks, e.g. RAFT, reaching state-of-the-art results on several benchmarks. We highlight how COMBO can leverage the BC model and adapt to its limitations. Finally, we show that our semi-supervised method can significantly simplify the training procedure. 最先进的光流估计方法依赖于深度学习，这需要复杂的顺序训练方案才能在真实数据上达到最佳性能。在这项工作中，我们介绍了 COMBO 深度网络，它明确地利用了传统方法中使用的亮度恒定性（BC）模型。由于 BC 是在多种情况下违反的近似物理模型，因此我们建议训练一个物理约束网络，并辅以数据驱动网络。我们在物理先验和数据驱动补充之间引入了独特且有意义的流分解，包括 BC 模型的不确定性量化。我们推导出一个联合训练方案，用于学习分解的不同组成部分，确保在监督和半监督环境中实现最佳合作。实验表明，COMBO 可以提高最先进的监督网络的性能，例如RAFT，在多个基准上达到了最先进的结果。我们重点介绍 COMBO 如何利用 BC 模型并适应其局限性。最后，我们表明我们的半监督方法可以显着简化训练过程。 本文提出COMBO深度网络，结合传统亮度恒定模型与数据驱动方法，改进光流预测性能。 Vincent Le Guen,Clément Rambour,Nicolas Thome cs.CV,stat.ML

authors_text: Marta Lorenzini,Simone Ciotti,Juan M. Gandarias,Simone Fani,Matteo Bianchi,Arash Ajoudani
title: Performance Analysis of Vibrotactile and Slide-and-Squeeze Haptic Feedback Devices for Limbs Postural Adjustment
title_zh: 用于肢体姿势调整的振动触觉和滑动挤压触觉反馈装置的性能分析
abstract: Recurrent or sustained awkward body postures are among the most frequently cited risk factors to the development of work-related musculoskeletal disorders (MSDs). To prevent workers from adopting harmful configurations but also to guide them toward more ergonomic ones, wearable haptic devices may be the ideal solution. In this paper, a vibrotactile unit, called ErgoTac, and a slide-and-squeeze unit, called CUFF, were evaluated in a limbs postural correction setting. Their capability of providing single-joint (shoulder or knee) and multi-joint (shoulder and knee at once) guidance was compared in twelve healthy subjects, using quantitative task-related metrics and subjective quantitative evaluation. An integrated environment was also built to ease communication and data sharing between the involved sensor and feedback systems. Results show good acceptability and intuitiveness for both devices. ErgoTac appeared as the suitable feedback device for the shoulder, while the CUFF may be the effective solution for the knee. This comparative study, although preliminary, was propaedeutic to the potential integration of the two devices for effective whole-body postural corrections, with the aim to develop a feedback and assistive apparatus to increase workers' awareness about risky working conditions and therefore to prevent MSDs.
summary: Recurrent or sustained awkward body postures are among the most frequently cited risk factors to the development of work-related musculoskeletal disorders (MSDs). To prevent workers from adopting harmful configurations but also to guide them toward more ergonomic ones, wearable haptic devices may be the ideal solution. In this paper, a vibrotactile unit, called ErgoTac, and a slide-and-squeeze unit, called CUFF, were evaluated in a limbs postural correction setting. Their capability of providing single-joint (shoulder or knee) and multi-joint (shoulder and knee at once) guidance was compared in twelve healthy subjects, using quantitative task-related metrics and subjective quantitative evaluation. An integrated environment was also built to ease communication and data sharing between the involved sensor and feedback systems. Results show good acceptability and intuitiveness for both devices. ErgoTac appeared as the suitable feedback device for the shoulder, while the CUFF may be the effective solution for the knee. This comparative study, although preliminary, was propaedeutic to the potential integration of the two devices for effective whole-body postural corrections, with the aim to develop a feedback and assistive apparatus to increase workers' awareness about risky working conditions and therefore to prevent MSDs.
abstract_zh: 反复或持续的尴尬身体姿势是最常被提及的导致工作相关肌肉骨骼疾病 (MSD) 的危险因素之一。为了防止工人采用有害的配置，同时引导他们采用更符合人体工程学的配置，可穿戴触觉设备可能是理想的解决方案。在本文中，在四肢姿势矫正环境中对称为 ErgoTac 的振动触觉单元和称为 CUFF 的滑动挤压单元进行了评估。使用与任务相关的定量指标和主观定量评估，对 12 名健康受试者提供单关节（肩部或膝部）和多关节（同时肩部和膝部）引导的能力进行了比较。还构建了一个集成环境，以简化所涉及的传感器和反馈系统之间的通信和数据共享。结果显示这两种设备都具有良好的可接受性和直观性。 ErgoTac 是适合肩部的反馈装置，而 CUFF 可能是膝部的有效解决方案。这项比较研究虽然是初步的，但却是对两种设备的潜在整合进行了推广，以进行有效的全身姿势矫正，目的是开发一种反馈和辅助装置，以提高工人对危险工作条件的认识，从而预防 MSD。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了两种触觉反馈设备ErgoTac和CUFF在肢体姿势校正中的性能，比较其单关节和多关节指导能力。
AI.motivation: 长期不良姿势是职业性肌肉骨骼疾病的主要风险因素，需通过可穿戴触觉设备引导工人采用更符合人体工学的姿势。
AI.method: 对12名健康受试者进行定量任务指标和主观评估，构建集成环境实现传感器与反馈系统间的数据共享。
AI.result: 两种设备均具有良好接受度，ErgoTac适合肩部反馈，CUFF适合膝部反馈，初步研究为全身姿势校正整合奠定基础。
AI.conclusion: 设备整合有望开发出辅助装置，提升工人对危险工作条件的意识，从而预防肌肉骨骼疾病。
