LiDAR (Light Detection and Ranging) has been used for many SLAM solutions due to its superb accuracy, but its performance degrades in featureless environments, like tunnels or long corridors. Centralized SLAM solves the problem with a cloud server, which requires a huge amount of computational resources and lacks robustness against central node failure. To address these issues, we present a distributed SLAM solution to estimate the trajectory of a group of robots using Ultra-WideBand (UWB) ranging and odometry measurements. The proposed approach distributes the processing among the robot team and significantly mitigates the computation concern emerged from the centralized SLAM. Our solution determines the relative pose (also known as loop closure) between two robots by minimizing the UWB ranging measurements taken at different positions when the robots are in close proximity. UWB provides a good distance measure in line-of-sight conditions, but retrieving a precise pose estimation remains a challenge, due to ranging noise and unpredictable path traveled by the robot. To deal with the suspicious loop closures, we use Pairwise Consistency Maximization (PCM) to examine the quality of loop closures and perform outlier rejections. The filtered loop closures are then fused with odometry in a distributed pose graph optimization (DPGO) module to recover the full trajectory of the robot team. Extensive experiments are conducted to validate the effectiveness of the proposed approach.
abstract_zh: 为了在多机器人系统中有效地完成任务，必须解决的一个问题是同步定位和建图（SLAM）。 LiDAR（光探测和测距）因其卓越的精度而被用于许多 SLAM 解决方案，但在隧道或长廊等无特征的环境中，其性能会下降。集中式SLAM通过云服务器解决了需要大量计算资源且缺乏针对中心节点故障的鲁棒性的问题。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种分布式 SLAM 解决方案，使用超宽带 (UWB) 测距和里程测量来估计一组机器人的轨迹。所提出的方法将处理任务分配给机器人团队，并显着减轻集中式 SLAM 带来的计算问题。我们的解决方案通过最小化机器人靠近时在不同位置进行的 UWB 测距测量来确定两个机器人之间的相对位姿（也称为闭环）。 UWB 在视线条件下提供了良好的距离测量，但由于测距噪声和机器人行驶路径不可预测，检索精确的姿态估计仍然是一个挑战。为了处理可疑的闭环，我们使用成对一致性最大化（PCM）来检查闭环的质量并执行异常值拒绝。然后，过滤后的闭环与分布式位姿图优化（DPGO）模块中的里程计融合，以恢复机器人团队的完整轨迹。进行了大量的实验来验证所提出方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于超宽带（UWB）测距和里程计测量的分布式SLAM方法，用于多机器人系统的轨迹估计。
AI.motivation: 传统SLAM方法在无特征环境中（如隧道）性能下降，且集中式SLAM依赖云端计算资源，存在计算量大和鲁棒性差的问题。
AI.method: 通过分布式处理框架，结合UWB测距和里程计数据，利用配对一致性最大化（PCM）筛选异常环路闭合，并通过分布式位姿图优化（DPGO）融合数据以恢复机器人团队完整轨迹。
AI.result: 实验验证了所提方法在多机器人系统中的有效性，显著降低了计算负担并提升了鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过分布式架构和UWB测距优化，有效解决了多机器人SLAM中的计算与环境适应性挑战。

authors_text: Wen Chin Huang,Dejan Markovic,Alexander Richard,Israel Dejene Gebru,Anjali Menon
title: End-to-End Binaural Speech Synthesis
title_zh: 端到端双耳语音合成
abstract: In this work, we present an end-to-end binaural speech synthesis system that combines a low-bitrate audio codec with a powerful binaural decoder that is capable of accurate speech binauralization while faithfully reconstructing environmental factors like ambient noise or reverb. The network is a modified vector-quantized variational autoencoder, trained with several carefully designed objectives, including an adversarial loss. We evaluate the proposed system on an internal binaural dataset with objective metrics and a perceptual study. Results show that the proposed approach matches the ground truth data more closely than previous methods. In particular, we demonstrate the capability of the adversarial loss in capturing environment effects needed to create an authentic auditory scene.
summary: In this work, we present an end-to-end binaural speech synthesis system that combines a low-bitrate audio codec with a powerful binaural decoder that is capable of accurate speech binauralization while faithfully reconstructing environmental factors like ambient noise or reverb. The network is a modified vector-quantized variational autoencoder, trained with several carefully designed objectives, including an adversarial loss. We evaluate the proposed system on an internal binaural dataset with objective metrics and a perceptual study. Results show that the proposed approach matches the ground truth data more closely than previous methods. In particular, we demonstrate the capability of the adversarial loss in capturing environment effects needed to create an authentic auditory scene.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种端到端双耳语音合成系统，该系统将低比特率音频编解码器与强大的双耳解码器相结合，能够准确地进行语音双耳化，同时忠实地重建环境因素（例如环境噪声或混响）。该网络是一种改进的矢量量化变分自动编码器，通过几个精心设计的目标进行训练，包括对抗性损失。我们通过客观指标和感知研究在内部双耳数据集上评估所提出的系统。结果表明，所提出的方法比以前的方法更接近地面实况数据。特别是，我们展示了对抗性损失在捕获创建真实听觉场景所需的环境效果方面的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种端到端双耳语音合成系统，结合低比特率编解码器与双耳解码器，实现语音双耳化与环境因素重建。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以在低比特率下同时保持语音质量与环境声学特性的真实性，需提升双耳语音合成的环境还原能力。
AI.method: 基于改进的向量量化变分自编码器（VQ-VAE），引入对抗损失等多目标训练策略，分离语音与环境信息并重建双耳信号。
AI.result: 在内部数据集上客观指标与感知实验均优于现有方法，对抗损失有效捕捉环境混响与噪声特征。
AI.conclusion: 所提系统可高质量生成双耳语音，验证了对抗学习在声学环境建模中的关键作用。

We evaluate the proposed system on an internal binaural dataset with objective metrics and a perceptual study. Results show that the proposed approach matches the ground truth data more closely than previous methods. In particular, we demonstrate the capability of the adversarial loss in capturing environment effects needed to create an authentic auditory scene. 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种端到端双耳语音合成系统，该系统将低比特率音频编解码器与强大的双耳解码器相结合，能够准确地进行语音双耳化，同时忠实地重建环境因素（例如环境噪声或混响）。该网络是一种改进的矢量量化变分自动编码器，通过几个精心设计的目标进行训练，包括对抗性损失。我们通过客观指标和感知研究在内部双耳数据集上评估所提出的系统。结果表明，所提出的方法比以前的方法更接近地面实况数据。特别是，我们展示了对抗性损失在捕获创建真实听觉场景所需的环境效果方面的能力。 本文提出一种端到端双耳语音合成系统，结合低比特率编解码器与双耳解码器，实现语音双耳化与环境因素重建。 Wen Chin Huang,Dejan Markovic,Alexander Richard,Israel Dejene Gebru,Anjali Menon cs.SD,cs.AI,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Kasun Weerakoon,Souradip Chakraborty,Nare Karapetyan,Adarsh Jagan Sathyamoorthy,Amrit Singh Bedi,Dinesh Manocha
title: HTRON:Efficient Outdoor Navigation with Sparse Rewards via Heavy Tailed Adaptive Reinforce Algorithm
title_zh: HTRON：通过重尾自适应强化算法实现高效户外导航和稀疏奖励
abstract: We present a novel approach to improve the performance of deep reinforcement learning (DRL) based outdoor robot navigation systems. Most, existing DRL methods are based on carefully designed dense reward functions that learn the efficient behavior in an environment. We circumvent this issue by working only with sparse rewards (which are easy to design), and propose a novel adaptive Heavy-Tailed Reinforce algorithm for Outdoor Navigation called HTRON. Our main idea is to utilize heavy-tailed policy parametrizations which implicitly induce exploration in sparse reward settings. We evaluate the performance of HTRON against Reinforce, PPO and TRPO algorithms in three different outdoor scenarios: goal-reaching, obstacle avoidance, and uneven terrain navigation. We observe in average an increase of 34.41% in terms of success rate, a 15.15% decrease in the average time steps taken to reach the goal, and a 24.9% decrease in the elevation cost compared to the navigation policies obtained by the other methods. Further, we demonstrate that our algorithm can be transferred directly into a Clearpath Husky robot to perform outdoor terrain navigation in real-world scenarios.
summary: We present a novel approach to improve the performance of deep reinforcement learning (DRL) based outdoor robot navigation systems. Most, existing DRL methods are based on carefully designed dense reward functions that learn the efficient behavior in an environment. We circumvent this issue by working only with sparse rewards (which are easy to design), and propose a novel adaptive Heavy-Tailed Reinforce algorithm for Outdoor Navigation called HTRON. Our main idea is to utilize heavy-tailed policy parametrizations which implicitly induce exploration in sparse reward settings. We evaluate the performance of HTRON against Reinforce, PPO and TRPO algorithms in three different outdoor scenarios: goal-reaching, obstacle avoidance, and uneven terrain navigation. We observe in average an increase of 34.41% in terms of success rate, a 15.15% decrease in the average time steps taken to reach the goal, and a 24.9% decrease in the elevation cost compared to the navigation policies obtained by the other methods. Further, we demonstrate that our algorithm can be transferred directly into a Clearpath Husky robot to perform outdoor terrain navigation in real-world scenarios.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的方法来提高基于深度强化学习（DRL）的户外机器人导航系统的性能。大多数现有的 DRL 方法都基于精心设计的密集奖励函数，这些函数可以学习环境中的有效行为。我们通过仅使用稀疏奖励（易于设计）来规避这个问题，并提出了一种名为 HTRON 的新型自适应户外导航自适应重尾强化算法。我们的主要想法是利用重尾策略参数化，隐含地诱导稀疏奖励设置中的探索。我们在三种不同的户外场景中评估 HTRON 与 Reinforce、PPO 和 TRPO 算法的性能：到达目标、避障和不平坦地形导航。与其他方法获得的导航策略相比，我们观察到成功率平均提高了 34.41%，达到目标的平均时间步数减少了 15.15%，海拔成本降低了 24.9%。此外，我们证明我们的算法可以直接转移到 Clearpath Husky 机器人中，以在现实场景中执行户外地形导航。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于稀疏奖励的高效户外机器人导航算法HTRON，通过重尾自适应强化学习方法解决传统深度强化学习依赖密集奖励函数的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有深度强化学习方法依赖复杂设计的密集奖励函数，而稀疏奖励更易设计但探索效率低。本文旨在利用稀疏奖励实现高效户外导航。
AI.method: 提出重尾自适应强化算法HTRON，通过重尾策略参数化隐式增强稀疏奖励下的探索能力，并在目标到达、避障和复杂地形导航场景中验证效果。
AI.result: 相比Reinforce、PPO和TRPO算法，HTRON成功率提升34.41%，平均步数减少15.15%，地形高度成本降低24.9%，并在Clearpath Husky机器人实测中表现优异。
AI.conclusion: HTRON算法通过重尾策略有效解决了稀疏奖励场景下的探索难题，在多种户外导航任务中展现优越性能，验证了其在现实场景中的可行性。

authors_text: Md. Sadman Sakib,David Paulius,Yu Sun
title: Approximate Task Tree Retrieval in a Knowledge Network for Robotic Cooking
title_zh: 机器人烹饪知识网络中的近似任务树检索
abstract: Flexible task planning continues to pose a difficult challenge for robots, where a robot is unable to creatively adapt their task plans to new or unseen problems, which is mainly due to the limited knowledge it has about its actions and world. Motivated by a human's ability to adapt, we explore how task plans from a knowledge graph, known as the Functional Object- Oriented Network (FOON), can be generated for novel problems requiring concepts that are not readily available to the robot in its knowledge base. Knowledge from 140 cooking recipes are structured in a FOON knowledge graph, which is used for acquiring task plan sequences known as task trees. Task trees can be modified to replicate recipes in a FOON knowledge graph format, which can be useful for enriching FOON with new recipes containing unknown object and state combinations, by relying upon semantic similarity. We demonstrate the power of task tree generation to create task trees with never-before-seen ingredient and state combinations as seen in recipes from the Recipe1M+ dataset, with which we evaluate the quality of the trees based on how accurately they depict newly added ingredients. Our experimental results show that our system is able to provide task sequences with 76% correctness.
summary: Flexible task planning continues to pose a difficult challenge for robots, where a robot is unable to creatively adapt their task plans to new or unseen problems, which is mainly due to the limited knowledge it has about its actions and world. Motivated by a human's ability to adapt, we explore how task plans from a knowledge graph, known as the Functional Object- Oriented Network (FOON), can be generated for novel problems requiring concepts that are not readily available to the robot in its knowledge base. Knowledge from 140 cooking recipes are structured in a FOON knowledge graph, which is used for acquiring task plan sequences known as task trees. Task trees can be modified to replicate recipes in a FOON knowledge graph format, which can be useful for enriching FOON with new recipes containing unknown object and state combinations, by relying upon semantic similarity. We demonstrate the power of task tree generation to create task trees with never-before-seen ingredient and state combinations as seen in recipes from the Recipe1M+ dataset, with which we evaluate the quality of the trees based on how accurately they depict newly added ingredients. Our experimental results show that our system is able to provide task sequences with 76% correctness.
abstract_zh: 灵活的任务规划仍然对机器人构成艰巨的挑战，机器人无法创造性地调整其任务计划以适应新的或未见过的问题，这主要是由于它对其行为和世界的了解有限。受人类适应能力的推动，我们探索如何从知识图（称为功能面向对象网络（FOON））生成任务计划，以解决需要机器人知识库中不易获得的概念的新问题。来自 140 个烹饪食谱的知识被构建在 FOON 知识图中，该知识图用于获取称为任务树的任务计划序列。可以修改任务树以复制 FOON 知识图格式的配方，这对于通过依赖语义相似性使用包含未知对象和状态组合的新配方来丰富 FOON 很有用。我们展示了任务树生成的强大功能，可以创建具有前所未见的成分和状态组合的任务树，如 Recipe1M+ 数据集的食谱中所示，我们根据树描述新添加成分的准确程度来评估树的质量。我们的实验结果表明，我们的系统能够提供 76% 正确率的任务序列。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于知识网络的近似任务树检索方法，用于机器人烹饪场景下的任务规划，通过语义相似性扩展知识图谱中的新食谱组合。
AI.motivation: 机器人缺乏灵活适应新任务的能力，传统知识库难以覆盖未知对象和状态组合，需借鉴人类利用知识图谱进行任务规划的适应性机制。
AI.method: 构建包含140个食谱的FOON知识图谱，通过语义相似性匹配生成任务树，并利用Recipe1M+数据集验证新生成任务树对未知食材组合的描述准确性。
AI.result: 实验表明系统能生成包含新食材组合的任务序列，准确率达到76%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升了机器人应对未知烹饪任务的能力，为知识驱动型任务规划提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Jianing Qiu,Frank P. -W. Lo,Yingnan Sun,Siyao Wang,Benny Lo
title: Mining Discriminative Food Regions for Accurate Food Recognition
title_zh: 挖掘有区别的食物区域以实现准确的食物识别
comment: Accepted in BMVC 2019 as a spotlight paper
comments: Accepted in BMVC 2019 as a spotlight paper
abstract: Automatic food recognition is the very first step towards passive dietary monitoring. In this paper, we address the problem of food recognition by mining discriminative food regions. Taking inspiration from Adversarial Erasing, a strategy that progressively discovers discriminative object regions for weakly supervised semantic segmentation, we propose a novel network architecture in which a primary network maintains the base accuracy of classifying an input image, an auxiliary network adversarially mines discriminative food regions, and a region network classifies the resulting mined regions. The global (the original input image) and the local (the mined regions) representations are then integrated for the final prediction. The proposed architecture denoted as PAR-Net is end-to-end trainable, and highlights discriminative regions in an online fashion. In addition, we introduce a new fine-grained food dataset named as Sushi-50, which consists of 50 different sushi categories. Extensive experiments have been conducted to evaluate the proposed approach. On three food datasets chosen (Food-101, Vireo-172, and Sushi-50), our approach performs consistently and achieves state-of-the-art results (top-1 testing accuracy of $90.4\%$, $90.2\%$, $92.0\%$, respectively) compared with other existing approaches. Dataset and code are available at https://github.com/Jianing-Qiu/PARNet
summary: Automatic food recognition is the very first step towards passive dietary monitoring. In this paper, we address the problem of food recognition by mining discriminative food regions. Taking inspiration from Adversarial Erasing, a strategy that progressively discovers discriminative object regions for weakly supervised semantic segmentation, we propose a novel network architecture in which a primary network maintains the base accuracy of classifying an input image, an auxiliary network adversarially mines discriminative food regions, and a region network classifies the resulting mined regions. The global (the original input image) and the local (the mined regions) representations are then integrated for the final prediction. The proposed architecture denoted as PAR-Net is end-to-end trainable, and highlights discriminative regions in an online fashion. In addition, we introduce a new fine-grained food dataset named as Sushi-50, which consists of 50 different sushi categories. Extensive experiments have been conducted to evaluate the proposed approach. On three food datasets chosen (Food-101, Vireo-172, and Sushi-50), our approach performs consistently and achieves state-of-the-art results (top-1 testing accuracy of $90.4\%$, $90.2\%$, $92.0\%$, respectively) compared with other existing approaches. Dataset and code are available at https://github.com/Jianing-Qiu/PARNet
abstract_zh: 自动食物识别是被动饮食监测的第一步。在本文中，我们通过挖掘有区别的食物区域来解决食物识别问题。受对抗性擦除（Adversarial Erasing）的启发，对抗性擦除是一种逐步发现弱监督语义分割的有区别的对象区域的策略，我们提出了一种新颖的网络架构，其中主网络保持分类输入图像的基本精度，辅助网络对抗性地挖掘有区别的食物区域，区域网络对所得的挖掘区域进行分类。然后将全局（原始输入图像）和局部（挖掘区域）表示进行整合以进行最终预测。所提出的表示为 PAR-Net 的架构是端到端可训练的，并以在线方式突出显示判别区域。此外，我们还引入了一个名为 Sushi-50 的新细粒度食品数据集，其中包含 50 个不同的寿司类别。已经进行了大量的实验来评估所提出的方法。在所选的三个食品数据集（Food-101、Vireo-172 和 Sushi-50）上，与其他现有方法相比，我们的方法表现一致，并实现了最先进的结果（top-1 测试精度分别为 $90.4\%$、$90.2\%$、$92.0\%$）。数据集和代码可在 https://github.com/Jianing-Qiu/PARNet 获取

AI.motivation: 现有食物识别方法难以有效捕捉图像中关键判别区域，导致分类准确率受限，需探索更精准的特征提取策略。
AI.method: 设计包含主网络（保持基础分类精度）、辅助网络（对抗性挖掘判别区域）和区域网络（分类挖掘区域）的PAR-Net架构，结合全局与局部特征进行端到端训练。
AI.result: 在Food-101、Vireo-172和Sushi-50数据集上分别达到90.4%、90.2%和92.0%的Top-1测试准确率，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: PAR-Net通过动态挖掘判别区域显著提升食物识别性能，新数据集Sushi-50为细粒度食物研究提供支持。

In addition, we introduce a new fine-grained food dataset named as Sushi-50, which consists of 50 different sushi categories. authors_text: Peihao Wang,Zhiwen Fan,Tianlong Chen,Zhangyang Wang
title: Neural Implicit Dictionary via Mixture-of-Expert Training
title_zh: 通过专家混合训练的神经隐式词典
abstract: Representing visual signals by coordinate-based deep fully-connected networks has been shown advantageous in fitting complex details and solving inverse problems than discrete grid-based representation. However, acquiring such a continuous Implicit Neural Representation (INR) requires tedious per-scene training on tons of signal measurements, which limits its practicality. In this paper, we present a generic INR framework that achieves both data and training efficiency by learning a Neural Implicit Dictionary (NID) from a data collection and representing INR as a functional combination of basis sampled from the dictionary. Our NID assembles a group of coordinate-based subnetworks which are tuned to span the desired function space. After training, one can instantly and robustly acquire an unseen scene representation by solving the coding coefficients. To parallelly optimize a large group of networks, we borrow the idea from Mixture-of-Expert (MoE) to design and train our network with a sparse gating mechanism. Our experiments show that, NID can improve reconstruction of 2D images or 3D scenes by 2 orders of magnitude faster with up to 98% less input data. We further demonstrate various applications of NID in image inpainting and occlusion removal, which are considered to be challenging with vanilla INR. Our codes are available in https://github.com/VITA-Group/Neural-Implicit-Dict.
summary: Representing visual signals by coordinate-based deep fully-connected networks has been shown advantageous in fitting complex details and solving inverse problems than discrete grid-based representation. However, acquiring such a continuous Implicit Neural Representation (INR) requires tedious per-scene training on tons of signal measurements, which limits its practicality. In this paper, we present a generic INR framework that achieves both data and training efficiency by learning a Neural Implicit Dictionary (NID) from a data collection and representing INR as a functional combination of basis sampled from the dictionary. Our NID assembles a group of coordinate-based subnetworks which are tuned to span the desired function space. After training, one can instantly and robustly acquire an unseen scene representation by solving the coding coefficients. To parallelly optimize a large group of networks, we borrow the idea from Mixture-of-Expert (MoE) to design and train our network with a sparse gating mechanism. Our experiments show that, NID can improve reconstruction of 2D images or 3D scenes by 2 orders of magnitude faster with up to 98% less input data. We further demonstrate various applications of NID in image inpainting and occlusion removal, which are considered to be challenging with vanilla INR. Our codes are available in https://github.com/VITA-Group/Neural-Implicit-Dict.
abstract_zh: 与基于离散网格的表示相比，通过基于坐标的深度全连接网络表示视觉信号在拟合复杂细节和解决逆问题方面已被证明具有优势。然而，获取这种连续的隐式神经表示（INR）需要对大量信号测量进行繁琐的每场景训练，这限制了其实用性。在本文中，我们提出了一个通用的 INR 框架，该框架通过从数据集合中学习神经隐式字典（NID）并将 INR 表示为从字典中采样的基础的函数组合来实现数据和训练效率。我们的 NID 组装了一组基于坐标的子网络，这些子网络经过调整以跨越所需的功能空间。训练后，通过求解编码系数，可以立即稳健地获得未见过的场景表示。为了并行优化一大群网络，我们借鉴了专家混合 (MoE) 的思想，使用稀疏门控机制来设计和训练我们的网络。我们的实验表明，NID 可以将 2D 图像或 3D 场景的重建速度提高 2 个数量级，同时输入数据减少高达 98%。我们进一步演示了 NID 在图像修复和遮挡去除中的各种应用，这被认为对普通 INR 具有挑战性。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/VITA-Group/Neural-Implicit-Dict 中找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于混合专家训练的神经隐式字典（NID）框架，通过高效的数据和训练方法提升隐式神经表示（INR）的实用性。
AI.motivation: 传统坐标基深度全连接网络在拟合复杂细节和解决逆问题上表现优异，但需大量数据和耗时训练，限制了其实际应用。
AI.method: 通过混合专家（MoE）思想设计稀疏门控机制，训练一组坐标基子网络构成隐式字典，利用字典基函数组合实现高效场景表示与重建。
AI.result: 实验表明，NID在2D图像和3D场景重建中速度提升2个数量级，数据需求减少98%，并在图像修复和遮挡移除等任务中表现优异。
AI.conclusion: NID框架通过高效训练与表示方法显著提升了INR的实用性，为复杂视觉任务提供了更优解决方案。

authors_text: Francisco Durán López,Silverio Martínez-Fernández,Michael Felderer,Xavier Franch
title: Guiding the retraining of convolutional neural networks against adversarial inputs
title_zh: 指导卷积神经网络针对对抗性输入的再训练
abstract: Background: When using deep learning models, there are many possible vulnerabilities and some of the most worrying are the adversarial inputs, which can cause wrong decisions with minor perturbations. Therefore, it becomes necessary to retrain these models against adversarial inputs, as part of the software testing process addressing the vulnerability to these inputs. Furthermore, for an energy efficient testing and retraining, data scientists need support on which are the best guidance metrics and optimal dataset configurations. Aims: We examined four guidance metrics for retraining convolutional neural networks and three retraining configurations. Our goal is to improve the models against adversarial inputs regarding accuracy, resource utilization and time from the point of view of a data scientist in the context of image classification. Method: We conducted an empirical study in two datasets for image classification. We explore: (a) the accuracy, resource utilization and time of retraining convolutional neural networks by ordering new training set by four different guidance metrics (neuron coverage, likelihood-based surprise adequacy, distance-based surprise adequacy and random), (b) the accuracy and resource utilization of retraining convolutional neural networks with three different configurations (from scratch and augmented dataset, using weights and augmented dataset, and using weights and only adversarial inputs). Results: We reveal that retraining with adversarial inputs from original weights and by ordering with surprise adequacy metrics gives the best model w.r.t. the used metrics. Conclusions: Although more studies are necessary, we recommend data scientists to use the above configuration and metrics to deal with the vulnerability to adversarial inputs of deep learning models, as they can improve their models against adversarial inputs without using many inputs.

Our goal is to improve the models against adversarial inputs regarding accuracy, resource utilization and time from the point of view of a data scientist in the context of image classification. Method: We conducted an empirical study in two datasets for image classification. We explore: (a) the accuracy, resource utilization and time of retraining convolutional neural networks by ordering new training set by four different guidance metrics (neuron coverage, likelihood-based surprise adequacy, distance-based surprise adequacy and random), (b) the accuracy and resource utilization of retraining convolutional neural networks with three different configurations (from scratch and augmented dataset, using weights and augmented dataset, and using weights and only adversarial inputs). Results: We reveal that retraining with adversarial inputs from original weights and by ordering with surprise adequacy metrics gives the best model w.r.t. the used metrics. Conclusions: Although more studies are necessary, we recommend data scientists to use the above configuration and metrics to deal with the vulnerability to adversarial inputs of deep learning models, as they can improve their models against adversarial inputs without using many inputs.
abstract_zh: 背景：使用深度学习模型时，可能存在许多漏洞，其中最令人担忧的是对抗性输入，这可能会导致轻微扰动的错误决策。因此，有必要针对对抗性输入重新训练这些模型，作为解决这些输入漏洞的软件测试过程的一部分。此外，为了进行节能测试和再培训，数据科学家需要获得最佳指导指标和最佳数据集配置的支持。目标：我们研究了用于再训练卷积神经网络的四个指导指标和三个再训练配置。我们的目标是从图像分类背景下数据科学家的角度，针对准确性、资源利用率和时间方面的对抗性输入改进模型。方法：我们对两个图像分类数据集进行了实证研究。我们探索：（a）通过四种不同的指导指标（神经元覆盖率、基于可能性的意外充分性、基于距离的意外充分性和随机）对新训练集进行排序来重新训练卷积神经网络的准确性、资源利用率和时间，（b）具有三种不同配置（从头开始和增强数据集、使用权重和增强数据集、使用权重和仅对抗性输入）重新训练卷积神经网络的准确性和资源利用率。结果：我们发现，使用原始权重的对抗性输入进行再训练，并通过意外充分性指标进行排序，可以给出最佳模型。使用的指标。结论：虽然需要进行更多研究，但我们建议数据科学家使用上述配置和指标来处理深度学习模型对抗性输入的脆弱性，因为他们可以在不使用大量输入的情况下针对对抗性输入改进模型。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了通过不同指导指标和再训练配置优化卷积神经网络对抗对抗性输入的方法。
AI.motivation: 对抗性输入可通过微小扰动导致模型错误决策，需有效再训练方法提升模型鲁棒性，同时需确定最佳指导指标与数据集配置以提高效率。
AI.method: 在两个图像分类数据集上进行实证研究，比较四种指导指标（神经元覆盖、基于似然的惊讶充分性、基于距离的惊讶充分性、随机）和三种再训练配置（从头训练、使用权重加增强数据、仅使用对抗样本）的效果。
AI.result: 使用原始权重结合惊讶充分性指标排序的再训练配置在准确率、资源利用率和时间效率上表现最优。
AI.conclusion: 建议数据科学家采用原始权重与惊讶充分性指标组合的配置，无需大量输入即可有效提升模型对抗对抗性输入的能力。

search_text: Guiding the retraining of convolutional neural networks against adversarial inputs 指导卷积神经网络针对对抗性输入的再训练 Background: When using deep learning models, there are many possible vulnerabilities and some of the most worrying are the adversarial inputs, which can cause wrong decisions with minor perturbations. Therefore, it becomes necessary to retrain these models against adversarial inputs, as part of the software testing process addressing the vulnerability to these inputs. Furthermore, for an energy efficient testing and retraining, data scientists need support on which are the best guidance metrics and optimal dataset configurations. Aims: We examined four guidance metrics for retraining convolutional neural networks and three retraining configurations. Our goal is to improve the models against adversarial inputs regarding accuracy, resource utilization and time from the point of view of a data scientist in the context of image classification. Method: We conducted an empirical study in two datasets for image classification. We explore: (a) the accuracy, resource utilization and time of retraining convolutional neural networks by ordering new training set by four different guidance metrics (neuron coverage, likelihood-based surprise adequacy, distance-based surprise adequacy and random), (b) the accuracy and resource utilization of retraining convolutional neural networks with three different configurations (from scratch and augmented dataset, using weights and augmented dataset, and using weights and only adversarial inputs). Results: We reveal that retraining with adversarial inputs from original weights and by ordering with surprise adequacy metrics gives the best model w.r.t. the used metrics. Conclusions: Although more studies are necessary, we recommend data scientists to use the above configuration and metrics to deal with the vulnerability to adversarial inputs of deep learning models, as they can improve their models against adversarial inputs without using many inputs. 背景：使用深度学习模型时，可能存在许多漏洞，其中最令人担忧的是对抗性输入，这可能会导致轻微扰动的错误决策。因此，有必要针对对抗性输入重新训练这些模型，作为解决这些输入漏洞的软件测试过程的一部分。此外，为了进行节能测试和再培训，数据科学家需要获得最佳指导指标和最佳数据集配置的支持。目标：我们研究了用于再训练卷积神经网络的四个指导指标和三个再训练配置。我们的目标是从图像分类背景下数据科学家的角度，针对准确性、资源利用率和时间方面的对抗性输入改进模型。方法：我们对两个图像分类数据集进行了实证研究。我们探索：（a）通过四种不同的指导指标（神经元覆盖率、基于可能性的意外充分性、基于距离的意外充分性和随机）对新训练集进行排序来重新训练卷积神经网络的准确性、资源利用率和时间，（b）具有三种不同配置（从头开始和增强数据集、使用权重和增强数据集、使用权重和仅对抗性输入）重新训练卷积神经网络的准确性和资源利用率。结果：我们发现，使用原始权重的对抗性输入进行再训练，并通过意外充分性指标进行排序，可以给出最佳模型。使用的指标。结论：虽然需要进行更多研究，但我们建议数据科学家使用上述配置和指标来处理深度学习模型对抗性输入的脆弱性，因为他们可以在不使用大量输入的情况下针对对抗性输入改进模型。 本文研究了通过不同指导指标和再训练配置优化卷积神经网络对抗对抗性输入的方法。 Francisco Durán López,Silverio Martínez-Fernández,Michael Felderer,Xavier Franch cs.SE,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Venus Haghighi,Behnaz Soltani,Adnan Mahmood,Quan Z. Sheng,Jian Yang
title: GCN-based Multi-task Representation Learning for Anomaly Detection in Attributed Networks
title_zh: 基于 GCN 的多任务表示学习，用于属性网络中的异常检测
abstract: Anomaly detection in attributed networks has received a considerable attention in recent years due to its applications in a wide range of domains such as finance, network security, and medicine. Traditional approaches cannot be adopted on attributed networks' settings to solve the problem of anomaly detection. The main limitation of such approaches is that they inherently ignore the relational information between data features. With a rapid explosion in deep learning- and graph neural networks-based techniques, spotting rare objects on attributed networks has significantly stepped forward owing to the potentials of deep techniques in extracting complex relationships. In this paper, we propose a new architecture on anomaly detection. The main goal of designing such an architecture is to utilize multi-task learning which would enhance the detection performance. Multi-task learning-based anomaly detection is still in its infancy and only a few studies in the existing literature have catered to the same. We incorporate both community detection and multi-view representation learning techniques for extracting distinct and complementary information from attributed networks and subsequently fuse the captured information for achieving a better detection result. The mutual collaboration between two main components employed in this architecture, i.e., community-specific learning and multi-view representation learning, exhibits a promising solution to reach more effective results.
summary: Anomaly detection in attributed networks has received a considerable attention in recent years due to its applications in a wide range of domains such as finance, network security, and medicine. Traditional approaches cannot be adopted on attributed networks' settings to solve the problem of anomaly detection. The main limitation of such approaches is that they inherently ignore the relational information between data features. With a rapid explosion in deep learning- and graph neural networks-based techniques, spotting rare objects on attributed networks has significantly stepped forward owing to the potentials of deep techniques in extracting complex relationships. In this paper, we propose a new architecture on anomaly detection. The main goal of designing such an architecture is to utilize multi-task learning which would enhance the detection performance. Multi-task learning-based anomaly detection is still in its infancy and only a few studies in the existing literature have catered to the same. We incorporate both community detection and multi-view representation learning techniques for extracting distinct and complementary information from attributed networks and subsequently fuse the captured information for achieving a better detection result. The mutual collaboration between two main components employed in this architecture, i.e., community-specific learning and multi-view representation learning, exhibits a promising solution to reach more effective results.
abstract_zh: 近年来，归因网络中的异常检测由于其在金融、网络安全和医学等广泛领域的应用而受到了相当大的关注。传统方法无法在属性网络的设置上采用来解决异常检测问题。这种方法的主要局限性在于它们本质上忽略了数据特征之间的关系信息。随着基于深度学习和图神经网络的技术的快速爆发，由于深度技术在提取复杂关系方面的潜力，在属性网络上发现稀有物体已经取得了显着的进步。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的异常检测架构。设计这种架构的主要目标是利用多任务学习来提高检测性能。基于多任务学习的异常检测仍处于起步阶段，现有文献中只有少数研究做到了这一点。我们结合了社区检测和多视图表示学习技术，用于从属性网络中提取独特且互补的信息，然后融合捕获的信息以实现更好的检测结果。该架构中采用的两个主要组件（即社区特定学习和多视图表示学习）之间的相互协作，展示了一种有前途的解决方案，可以达到更有效的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图卷积网络（GCN）的多任务表征学习方法，用于属性网络中的异常检测。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在属性网络异常检测中无法有效利用节点间的关系信息，而现有基于多任务学习的研究较少，需结合社区检测与多视角表征学习提升检测效果。
AI.method: 融合社区检测与多视角表征学习技术，通过多任务学习框架提取属性网络中互补信息，并融合特征以提升检测性能。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法通过社区特定学习与多视角学习的协同作用，显著提升了属性网络异常检测的准确性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的多任务框架有效结合了社区结构与多视角表征，为属性网络异常检测提供了新思路，未来可进一步优化融合策略。

authors_text: Wei Feng,Lin Wang,Lie Ju,Xin Zhao,Xin Wang,Xiaoyu Shi,Zongyuan Ge
title: Unsupervised Domain Adaptive Fundus Image Segmentation with Category-level Regularization
title_zh: 具有类别级正则化的无监督域自适应眼底图像分割
abstract: Existing unsupervised domain adaptation methods based on adversarial learning have achieved good performance in several medical imaging tasks. However, these methods focus only on global distribution adaptation and ignore distribution constraints at the category level, which would lead to sub-optimal adaptation performance. This paper presents an unsupervised domain adaptation framework based on category-level regularization that regularizes the category distribution from three perspectives. Specifically, for inter-domain category regularization, an adaptive prototype alignment module is proposed to align feature prototypes of the same category in the source and target domains. In addition, for intra-domain category regularization, we tailored a regularization technique for the source and target domains, respectively. In the source domain, a prototype-guided discriminative loss is proposed to learn more discriminative feature representations by enforcing intra-class compactness and inter-class separability, and as a complement to traditional supervised loss. In the target domain, an augmented consistency category regularization loss is proposed to force the model to produce consistent predictions for augmented/unaugmented target images, which encourages semantically similar regions to be given the same label. Extensive experiments on two publicly fundus datasets show that the proposed approach significantly outperforms other state-of-the-art comparison algorithms.
summary: Existing unsupervised domain adaptation methods based on adversarial learning have achieved good performance in several medical imaging tasks. However, these methods focus only on global distribution adaptation and ignore distribution constraints at the category level, which would lead to sub-optimal adaptation performance. This paper presents an unsupervised domain adaptation framework based on category-level regularization that regularizes the category distribution from three perspectives. Specifically, for inter-domain category regularization, an adaptive prototype alignment module is proposed to align feature prototypes of the same category in the source and target domains. In addition, for intra-domain category regularization, we tailored a regularization technique for the source and target domains, respectively. In the source domain, a prototype-guided discriminative loss is proposed to learn more discriminative feature representations by enforcing intra-class compactness and inter-class separability, and as a complement to traditional supervised loss. In the target domain, an augmented consistency category regularization loss is proposed to force the model to produce consistent predictions for augmented/unaugmented target images, which encourages semantically similar regions to be given the same label. Extensive experiments on two publicly fundus datasets show that the proposed approach significantly outperforms other state-of-the-art comparison algorithms.
abstract_zh: 现有的基于对抗性学习的无监督域适应方法在多种医学成像任务中取得了良好的性能。然而，这些方法仅关注全局分布适应，而忽略了类别级别的分布约束，这将导致适应性能次优。本文提出了一种基于类别级正则化的无监督领域适应框架，从三个角度对类别分布进行正则化。具体来说，对于域间类别正则化，提出了自适应原型对齐模块来对齐源域和目标域中相同类别的特征原型。此外，对于域内类别正则化，我们分别为源域和目标域定制了正则化技术。在源域中，提出了一种原型引导的判别性损失，通过强制类内紧凑性和类间可分离性来学习更多判别性特征表示，并作为传统监督损失的补充。在目标域中，提出了增强一致性类别正则化损失，以迫使模型对增强/未增强的目标图像产生一致的预测，这鼓励语义相似的区域被赋予相同的标签。对两个公开眼底数据集的广泛实验表明，所提出的方法明显优于其他最先进的比较算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于类别级正则化的无监督领域自适应方法，用于提升眼底图像分割性能。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗学习方法仅关注全局分布适应，忽略类别级分布约束，导致领域自适应效果次优。
AI.method: 设计三重类别级正则化：跨领域原型对齐模块、源域原型引导判别损失、目标域增强一致性正则化损失。
AI.result: 在两个公开眼底数据集上显著优于现有最先进算法，验证方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 类别级正则化能有效提升无监督领域自适应分割性能，证明了跨/领域内分布约束的重要性。

search_text: Unsupervised Domain Adaptive Fundus Image Segmentation with Category-level Regularization 具有类别级正则化的无监督域自适应眼底图像分割 Existing unsupervised domain adaptation methods based on adversarial learning have achieved good performance in several medical imaging tasks. However, these methods focus only on global distribution adaptation and ignore distribution constraints at the category level, which would lead to sub-optimal adaptation performance. This paper presents an unsupervised domain adaptation framework based on category-level regularization that regularizes the category distribution from three perspectives. Specifically, for inter-domain category regularization, an adaptive prototype alignment module is proposed to align feature prototypes of the same category in the source and target domains. In addition, for intra-domain category regularization, we tailored a regularization technique for the source and target domains, respectively. In the source domain, a prototype-guided discriminative loss is proposed to learn more discriminative feature representations by enforcing intra-class compactness and inter-class separability, and as a complement to traditional supervised loss. In the target domain, an augmented consistency category regularization loss is proposed to force the model to produce consistent predictions for augmented/unaugmented target images, which encourages semantically similar regions to be given the same label. Extensive experiments on two publicly fundus datasets show that the proposed approach significantly outperforms other state-of-the-art comparison algorithms. 现有的基于对抗性学习的无监督域适应方法在多种医学成像任务中取得了良好的性能。然而，这些方法仅关注全局分布适应，而忽略了类别级别的分布约束，这将导致适应性能次优。本文提出了一种基于类别级正则化的无监督领域适应框架，从三个角度对类别分布进行正则化。具体来说，对于域间类别正则化，提出了自适应原型对齐模块来对齐源域和目标域中相同类别的特征原型。此外，对于域内类别正则化，我们分别为源域和目标域定制了正则化技术。在源域中，提出了一种原型引导的判别性损失，通过强制类内紧凑性和类间可分离性来学习更多判别性特征表示，并作为传统监督损失的补充。在目标域中，提出了增强一致性类别正则化损失，以迫使模型对增强/未增强的目标图像产生一致的预测，这鼓励语义相似的区域被赋予相同的标签。对两个公开眼底数据集的广泛实验表明，所提出的方法明显优于其他最先进的比较算法。 本文提出一种基于类别级正则化的无监督领域自适应方法，用于提升眼底图像分割性能。 Wei Feng,Lin Wang,Lie Ju,Xin Zhao,Xin Wang,Xiaoyu Shi,Zongyuan Ge cs.CV

authors_text: Junfu Pu,Ying Shan
title: Music-driven Dance Regeneration with Controllable Key Pose Constraints
title_zh: 具有可控关键姿势约束的音乐驱动的舞蹈再生
abstract: In this paper, we propose a novel framework for music-driven dance motion synthesis with controllable key pose constraint. In contrast to methods that generate dance motion sequences only based on music without any other controllable conditions, this work targets on synthesizing high-quality dance motion driven by music as well as customized poses performed by users. Our model involves two single-modal transformer encoders for music and motion representations and a cross-modal transformer decoder for dance motions generation. The cross-modal transformer decoder achieves the capability of synthesizing smooth dance motion sequences, which keeps a consistency with key poses at corresponding positions, by introducing the local neighbor position embedding. Such mechanism makes the decoder more sensitive to key poses and the corresponding positions. Our dance synthesis model achieves satisfactory performance both on quantitative and qualitative evaluations with extensive experiments, which demonstrates the effectiveness of our proposed method.
summary: In this paper, we propose a novel framework for music-driven dance motion synthesis with controllable key pose constraint. In contrast to methods that generate dance motion sequences only based on music without any other controllable conditions, this work targets on synthesizing high-quality dance motion driven by music as well as customized poses performed by users. Our model involves two single-modal transformer encoders for music and motion representations and a cross-modal transformer decoder for dance motions generation. The cross-modal transformer decoder achieves the capability of synthesizing smooth dance motion sequences, which keeps a consistency with key poses at corresponding positions, by introducing the local neighbor position embedding. Such mechanism makes the decoder more sensitive to key poses and the corresponding positions. Our dance synthesis model achieves satisfactory performance both on quantitative and qualitative evaluations with extensive experiments, which demonstrates the effectiveness of our proposed method.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种具有可控关键姿势约束的音乐驱动舞蹈动作合成的新颖框架。与仅基于音乐而没有任何其他可控条件生成舞蹈动作序列的方法相比，这项工作的目标是合成由音乐驱动的高质量舞蹈动作以及用户执行的定制姿势。我们的模型涉及两个用于音乐和运动表示的单模态转换器编码器和一个用于生成舞蹈动作的跨模态转换器解码器。跨模态变换器解码器通过引入局部邻居位置嵌入，实现了合成平滑的舞蹈运动序列的能力，该序列与相应位置的关键姿势保持一致。这种机制使得解码器对关键姿势和相应位置更加敏感。通过大量的实验，我们的舞蹈合成模型在定量和定性评估上都取得了令人满意的表现，这证明了我们提出的方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于音乐驱动并可控制关键姿势约束的高质量舞蹈动作合成框架。
AI.motivation: 现有舞蹈生成方法仅依赖音乐输入，缺乏对用户自定义关键姿势的控制能力，难以满足个性化需求。
AI.method: 采用双单模态Transformer编码器分别处理音乐与动作表示，结合跨模态Transformer解码器，并通过局部邻近位置嵌入机制实现关键姿势约束。
AI.result: 在定量与定性实验中均表现出色，验证了模型在生成流畅且符合关键姿势约束的舞蹈动作方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效实现了音乐驱动下可控关键姿势的舞蹈合成，为个性化舞蹈生成提供了新思路。
